1.1: Taariika iwdi Iisaa *Almasiihu mo Daawuuda mo Ibraahiima.
1.2: Ko Ibraahiima jibini Issaaqa, Issaaqa jibini Yaaquuba, Yaaquuba jibini Yahuuda e musi…ì…ìe mun …ìen,
1.3: Yahuuda kadi jibini Faarisa e Zaaraha, tawi yumma …ìen no wi'ee Tamaaru. Faarisa jibini Hasruunu, Hasruunu jibini Araama,
1.4: Araama jibini Ammiina-Daaba, Ammiina-Daaba jibini Nahasuuna, Nahasuuna jibini Salmaana,
1.5: Raabi* jibinani Salmaana Bo'aaza, Rugiyata jibinani Bo'aaza Obiida, Obiida jibini Yassaa'u,
1.6: Yassaa'u jibini Daawuuda lan…óo on, oo wonnoo…óo …ìeyngu Uriyaa jibinani mo kanko Daawuuda Sulaymaana.
1.7: Sulaymaana jibini Rahabaama, Rahabaama jibini Abiiya. Abiiya jibini Asaa,
1.8: Asaa jibini Yuhusaafata, Yuhusaafata jibini Yuuraama, Yuuraama jibini Uziiya,
1.9: Uziiya jibini Yotaana, Yotaana jibini Ahaaza, Ahaaza jibini Hazikiiya,
1.10: Hazikiiya jibini Manase, Manase jibini Amuunu, Amuunu jibini Yuusiya,
1.11: Yuusiya jibini Yeekoniya e musi…ì…ìe mun …ìen fewndo egginegol na…ìee *Baabiila.
1.12: ∆Åawto egginegol na…ìee Baabiila ngol, Yeekoniya jibini Sa'alti'iila, Sa'alti'iila jibini Zarubaabila,
1.13: Zarubaabila jibini Abiyuuda, Abiyuuda jibini Alyaqiima, Alyaqiima jibini Aazuru,
1.14: Aazuru jibini Saduuqa, Saduuqa jibini Akiima, Akiima jibini Eliyuuda.
1.15: Eliyuuda jibini Eliyaasaru, Eliyaasaru jibini Mataana, Mataana jibini Yaaquuba.
1.16: Yaaquuba jibini Yuusufu moodibbo Mariyama on, on jibinnoo…óo Iisaa wi'aa…óo Almasiihu on.
1.17: Gila e Ibraahiima haa e Daawuuda, fow mun hawri jamaanuuji sappoo e nay. Gila e Daawuuda kadi haa e egginegol na…ìee Baabiila hawri jamaanuuji sappoo e nay. Gila egginegol na…ìee Baabiila kadi haa e Almasiihu on ko jamaanuuji sappoo e nay. Fii Jibineede Iisaa Almasiihu on (Luk. 2.1-7)
1.18: E hino no Iisaa Almasiihu on jibiniraa. Tawi ko Yuusufu ∆¥ami Mariyama yumma makko. Ado …ìe yiidude, tawi kanko jiwo on ko o sowii…óo e dow bawgal *Ruuhu Senii…óo on.
1.19: Tawi Yuusufu, on ∆¥amu…óo mo, ko gorko feewu…óo, hari o faalaaka mo wirtude, o miijii accitugol mo e nder gundoo.
1.20: Nde tawnoo himo miijii …óun, malaa'ikaajo Joomiraa…óo on fee…≤ani mo e koy…óol, wi'i mo: ¬´Yuusufu mo Daawuuda, wota a hulu ∆¥ettugol Mariyama, o wona …ìeyngu maa, ko fii …ìi…ó…óo mo o saawi on ko immorde e Ruuhu Senii…óo on.
1.21: O he…ìoyay …ìi…ó…óo, innoyaa mo Iisaa, ko fii ko kanko dandoyta jamaa makko on lette junuubaaji ma…ì…ìe …óin.¬ª
1.22: ∆äun fow wa…óiri fii ko Joomiraa…óo on daalirnoo annabaajo on kon no laatora, wonde:
1.23: ¬´Awa, jiwo mo andaali gorko on reeday, o firtoo boobo gorko, o innee Imanu'iila.¬ª Ko woni firo …óun ko: ‚ÄπAlla no wondi e men.‚Ä∫
1.24: ∆Åay kanko Yuusufu o finii, o wa…ói ko malaa'ikaajo Joomiraa…óo on yamiri mo kon, o ∆¥etti …ìeyngu makko, o addi ka makko.
1.25: Kono laatii o yiidaali e debbo on haa nde o firtinoo on …ìi…ó…óo gorko, o inni mo Iisaa.

2.1: ∆Åay wonii Iisaa jibinaama Bayti-Lahiimi, …óun ko e nder diiwal *Yahuuda fewndo laamu *Heroodu, onsay gandi…óu…ìe iwri funnaange ari *Yerusalaam,
2.2: …ìe wi'i: ¬´Ko honto oo lan…óo *Yahuudiyankee…ìe ar…óo e jibineede woni? Ko fii men yi'ii hoodere makko nden ka funnaange, men arii sujjangol mo.¬ª
2.3: ∆Åay kanko Heroodu lan…óo on o nanii …óun, o jii…ìii, o jii…ìodi e …ìe Yerusalaam …ìen fow.
2.4: Onsay o mottindiri hooree…ìe *yottinoo…ìe sadaka …ìen fow e jannoo…ìe fii Sariya on fii landagol …ìe ko honto *Almasiihu on haanaa jibinireede.
2.5: ∆Åen wi'i mo: ¬´Ko Bayti-Lahiimi e nder ngal diiwal Yahuuda. Ko fii e hino ko annabaajo on windi kon:
2.6: ‚ÄπKo an yo ko…óolun Bayti-Lahiimi, jeyaakun e nder leydi bolondaa Yahuuda, hinaa a gasoohun hayfineede e yeeso …óiya ko…óooli hittu…ói e nder Yahuuda. Ko fii lan…óo yaltay e maa ko ardoo jamaa an *Isra'iila on.‚Ä∫ ¬ª
2.7: Onsay Heroodu noddi …ìen gandi…óu…ìe e gundoo, o torii …ìe yo …ìe tentinan mo saa'i mo hoodere nden fee…≤i e mun on.
2.8: Onsay o immini …ìe Bayti-Lahiimi, o wi'i …ìe: ¬´Yahee humpitoyo…óon no laa…ìiri fii kun paykun. Si on yi'oyii kun, humpiton mi min kadi, mi yaha mi sujjana kun.¬ª
2.9: ∆Åay wonii …ìe nanii ko lan…óo on wi'i kon, …ìe yahi. Tawi hoodere nde …ìe yi'unoo ka funnaange nden no wontirde yeeso ma…ì…ìe. ∆Åay wonii nde hewtii fewndo ka paykun kun woni …óon, nde darii.
2.10: ∆Åay kam…ìe gandi…óu…ìe …ìen …ìe yiitii hoodere nden, …ìe heewi weltaare.
2.11: Onsay …ìe naati ka suudu, …ìe yi'i paykun kun e yumma mun Mariyama, …ìe jiccii, …ìe sujjani kun. E hoore …óun …ìe yaltini jawle ma…ì…ìe, …ìe okkori kun ka≈ã≈ãe e urngallo no wi'ee libaana e *mirri.
2.12: Onsay Allaahu on andini …ìe e koy…óol wonde hita …ìe yiltito ka Heroodu. ∆Åe rewti laawol goo, …ìe hooti ka leydi ma…ì…ìe. Fii no Yuusufu Yaltiri Misira
2.13: ∆Åay wonii …ìen gandi…óu…ìe yahii, malaa'ikaajo Joomiraa…óo on fee…≤ani Yuusufu e koy…óol, o wi'i mo: ¬´Immo, ∆¥ettaa paykun kun e yumma mun, dogaa yahaa *Misira, wonaa ton haa nde mi wi'i yo a artu woo. Ko fii Heroodu …óa…ì…ìitoyay paykun kun fii warugol kun.¬ª
2.14: Yuusufu immii jemma, ∆¥etti paykun kun e yumma mun, yahi Misira.
2.15: O woni ton haa Heroodu maayi. Ko nii ko Joomiraa…óo on daalirnoo annabaajo on kon laatori, wonde: ¬´Mi noddii ∆Åi…ó…óo an on yo o yaltu Misira.¬ª
2.16: ∆Åay Heroodu yi'ii wonde gandi…óu…ìe …ìen janfike mo, o tikki. Onsay o yamiri yo …ìe waroy kala paykun gorun kun duu…ìi …ói…ói maa jaasukun …óun wonkun e nder Bayti-Lahiimi e ko…óoloy takkiikoy …óon koy, …óun yaadi e saa'i mo gandi…óu…ìe …ìen fe…≤…≤inannoo mo on.
2.17: Ko nii ko daaliranoo annabi Yeremiiya kon laatori, wonde:
2.18: ¬´Hito nanike ka wi'etee …óon Raama: wullaandu e sowru tii…óundu. Tawi ko Raahiilu woni wullude …ìi…ì…ìe mun …ìen, o ja…ìaano yarlineede, ko fii …ìe woodaaka han kadi.¬ª Fii no Yuusufu Yiltitori Leydi Isra'iila
2.19: ∆Åay wonii Heroodu maayii, malaa'ikaajo Joomiraa…óo on fee…≤ani Yuusufu e koy…óol Misira,
2.20: o wi'i mo: ¬´Immo, ∆¥ettaa paykun kun e yumma mun, yiltito…óaa leydi Isra'iila, ko fii faalanoo…ìe warude paykun kun …ìen maayii.¬ª
2.21: Onsay Yuusufu ∆¥etti paykun kun e yumma mun, o yahi leydi Isra'iila.
2.22: Kono o nani wonde Arkalaawu laamike diiwal Yahuuda ngal lonto ben mun Heroodu, o huli wonoygol ton. Allaahu on …ìanginani mo e koy…óol, o yaari e ngal diiwal Jaliilu,
2.23: o wonoyi e saare no wi'ee Naasirata, fii no ko daaliranoo annabaa…ìe …ìen kon laatora, wonde: ¬´O noddoyte Naasirayankoojo.¬ª

3.1: Ko e on saa'i …óon, Yaayaa *lootoowo maande tuubuubuyee on fee…≤i, tawi himo waajoo ka wulaa diiwal Yahuuda,
3.2: himo wi'a: ¬´Tuubee, ko fii laamu kammu ngun …ìadike!¬ª
3.3: Tawi ko fii makko annabi *Isaaya wowlunoo, o wi'i: ¬´Kaa hawa ko hawa ewnotoo…óo ka wulaa, wi'a: ‚ÄπMo∆¥∆¥inee laawol Joomiraa…óo on, fewnon juri makko …óin!‚Ä∫ ¬ª
3.4: Tawi dolokke Yaayaa on ko lee…ìi ngelooba, dattol keeci makko …óin ko guri. Tawi ko kanu e njuuri buruure o …≤aamata.
3.5: Ho…óu…ìe Yerusalaam …ìen e …ìe ka diiwal Yahuuda …ìen fow e ko…óooli hundu…ói Yurdayniwol …óin fow ari e makko.
3.6: ∆Åe qirritii junuubaaji ma…ì…ìe …óin, o looti …ìe maande tuubuubuyee ka maayo Yurdayniwol.
3.7: ∆Åay o yi'ii *Fariisiyaa…ìe e *Sadduusiyaa…ìe buy no arude fii *lootegol maande tuubuubuyee, o wi'i …ìe: ¬´Ko onon yo iwdi kuura! Ko hombo tindini on dogugol tikkere aroyaynde nden?
3.8: Awa yo kuu…óe mon …óen hollu wonde on tuubii.
3.9: Hara on hooloraali wi'ugol wonde ko Ibraahiima woni maama mon, ko fii mi andinii on, Alla no waawi wattude …óee kaa∆¥e …óoo …ìi…ì…ìe Ibraahiima.
3.10: Toode teenirde nden no waalii ka binde le…ó…óe. Kala leggal ngal rimataa …ìi…ì…ìe mo∆¥∆¥u…ìe, ngal soppete, ngal bugee ka yiite!
3.11: ¬´Min ko ndiyan mi woni on lootirde maande tuubuubuyee. Kono on aroyoowo …ìaawo an no …ìuri lan doole, awa kadi mi hewtaa hay solugol pa…óe makko …óen. On non ko *Ruuhu Senii…óo on e yiite o lootirta on.
3.12: Himo jogii feeteewo makko ngon ka jungo ko o hentinira bete makko on, o moo…ìa …≤aametee on ka beembal makko, o sunnira foron on yiite nge …óaanotaako.¬ª Fii no Iisaa Lootiraa (Mrk. 1.9-11; Luk. 3.21-22)
3.13: Onsay Iisaa iwri Jaliilu, o ari Yurdayniwol ka Yaayaa, fii yo on lootu mo.
3.14: Kono Yaayaa salii, wi'i: ¬´Ko min haani arude yo a lootan! Kono an a arii yo mi loote!¬ª
3.15: Kono Iisaa jaabii mo wi'i: ¬´Accu wonira non, ko fii ko nii haanirani en timmingol peewal ngal fow.¬ª Ko e hoore …óun Yaayaa ja…ìi mo lootude.
3.16: No Iisaa gayniranoo looteede, o ∆¥awi ka ndiyan, tun kammu ngun udditii, o yi'i Ruuhu Allaahu on no tippora e makko wa gabooru.
3.17: Onsay hawa nanii ka kammu, no wi'a: ¬´Ko oo woni ∆Åi…ó…óo an Yi…óaa…óo, mo mi weltori on!¬ª

4.1: ∆Åawto …óun, Ruuhu Allaahu on nawri Iisaa ka wulaa fii no Ibuliisa ndarndora mo.
4.2: O hoori bal…óe cappan…óe nay, jemma e …≤alorma. ∆Åawto …óun o weelaa.
4.3: Ndarndotoo…óo on …ìadii mo, wi'i: ¬´Si tawii ko a *∆Åi…ó…óo Alla, yamir …óee kaa∆¥e yo …óe wontu …≤aametee.¬ª
4.4: Iisaa jaabii: ¬´No windii wondema: ‚ÄπNe…ó…óo hinaa …≤aametee tun wuurirta, kono ko kala kongu…ói iwru…ói ka Alla.‚Ä∫ ¬ª
4.5: Ibuliisa nawri mo kadi ka saare hormorde, …óun ko Yerusalaam, o jo…ó…óinoyi mo ka hoore war…≤akere *juulirde mawnde, o wi'i mo:
4.6: ¬´Si tawii ko a ∆Åi…ó…óo Alla, hocco …óon cikko…óaa ka leydi, ko fii no windii wondema: ‚ÄπO yamiray malaa'ikaa…ìe makko …ìen fii maa, …ìe tamboro-maa juu…óe ma…ì…ìe …óen, fii wota koyngal maa ngal feggo e hayre.‚Ä∫ ¬ª
4.7: Iisaa jaabii mo wi'i: ¬´No windii kadi wondema: ‚ÄπWota a ndarndo Joomiraa…óo on, on Alla maa.‚Ä∫ ¬ª
4.8: Ibuliisa nawri mo kadi e fello toowungo fota, o holli mo laamateeriiji aduna on fow e darja mun.
4.9: O wi'i mo: ¬´Mi okkete …óun fow si a jiccike, a sujjanii lan.¬ª
4.10: Iisaa jaabii, wi'i: ¬´Pottito, yo Ibuliisa, ko fii no windii: ‚ÄπKo Alla Joomiraa…óo maa on sujjantaa, rewaa mo kanko tun.‚Ä∫ ¬ª
4.11: Onsay Ibuliisa pottitii mo. ∆Åawto …óun malaa'ikaa…ìe …ìadii Iisaa fii kurkanagol mo. Fii Ardu Iisaa ndun Jaliilu e Kafernahuum (Mrk. 1.14-15; Luk. 4.14-15)
4.12: ∆Åay Iisaa andii Yaayaa wattaama e joge, o yahi Jaliilu.
4.13: O eggi Naasirata, o yahi, o ho…óoyi Kafernahuum ka daande weendu ka kernidi …óon e Zabuluunu e Naftali,
4.14: fii no ko daaliranoo annabi Isaaya kon laatora, wonde:
4.15: ¬´Ko an yo leydi Zabuluunu e Naftali ley…óe won…óe ka daande weendu, ga…óa Yurdayniwol, …óun ko Jaliilu ka …óiya le∆¥∆¥i ho…ói e mun.
4.16: Oo jamaa won…óo e nder niwre yi'ii ndaygu moolanaangu, e hoore …ìen joo…óii…ìe e ndin leydi ndi …óowdi mayde woni e mun, ndaygu jalbanii …ìe.¬ª
4.17: Gila …óun Iisaa fu…ó…óii waajaade, wi'a: ¬´Tuubee, ko fii laamu kammu ngun …ìadike!¬ª Fii ∆Åe Iisaa Adii Noddude …ìen (Mrk. 1.16-20; Luk. 5.1-11)
4.18: E nder ko o yiilotoo e daande *Weendu Jaliilu ndun kon, o yi'i musi…ì…ìe …ói…óo no bugoo *jalaaji ka weendu, tawi …ìen ko yungoo…ìe: go…ó…óo on no wi'ee Sim'uunu, mo o jammoyta Petruusu, oya on no wi'ee Andaraawu, mi…≤…≤iraawo makko kanko Sim'uunu on.
4.19: O wi'i …ìe: ¬´Jokkee lan, mi wattay on yungoo…ìe yim…ìe.¬ª
4.21: E nder yaadu ma…ì…ìe ndun, Iisaa yi'i musi…ì…ìe …ói…óo goo kadi, tawi …ìen ko Yaaquuba e mi…≤an mun Yuuhanna, …ìen ko …ìi…ì…ìe Zabadii. Tawi …ìen no wondi e ben mun Zabadii ka nder laana, hi…ìe mo∆¥∆¥intina jalaaji ma…ì…ìe. Kanko Iisaa o noddi …ìe.
4.22: ∆äon kisan …ìe acci …óon laana kan e ben ma…ì…ìe, …ìe jokki mo.
4.23: Tawi Iisaa no yiiloo e nder Jaliilu fow, janna ka nder juulir…óe, waajoo fii Kibaaru Mo∆¥∆¥o *laamu Alla ngun, e himo …≤awndora kala noone …≤abbeeli e nawnaaje yim…ìe …ìen.
4.24: Fii makko andii e nder Sirii on fow. O addanaa kala tampir…óo nawnaare e noonee muuseendiiji e …ìe jinna e iirotoo…ìe e maaya-…ìanduu…ìe, o ndikkini …ìe.
4.25: Jamaa moolanaa…óo iwru…óo Jaliilu e *Dekapooli e Yerusalaam e diiwal Yahuuda ngal e …ìe ga…óa Yurdayniwol jokki mo.

5.1: ∆Åay Iisaa yi'ii jamaa on, o ∆¥awi ka fello, o joo…óii, taalibaa…ìe makko …ìen kadi …ìadii mo.
5.2: Onsay o woni e jannugol jamaa on, wi'a:
5.3: ¬´Yondinii…ìe ka …ìernde …ìen ko malaa…ìe, …ìay laamu kammu ngun ko kam…ìe wonani.
5.5: Newii…ìe …ìen ko malaa…ìe, …ìay …ìe ronoyay leydi ndin.
5.10: Cukketee…ìe sabu peewal ngal ko malaa…ìe, …ìay laamu kammu ngun ko kam…ìe wonani.
5.11: ¬´On wonay malaa…ìe nde …ìe yenni on e nde …ìe cukkii on e nde …ìe fawi penaale e kala bone e hoore mon sabu an.
5.12: Weltee, wonon e nder welo-welo, …ìay hi…óon maranaa njoddi mawndi ka kammu, ko fii ko nii …ìe cukkornoo annabaa…ìe adinoo…ìe on …ìen.
5.13: ¬´Ko onon woni lan…óan aduna on. Kono si dakamme majjan on iwii, haray ko honno dakamme majjan on wattirtee? Haray …óan alaa nafa fus si hinaa bugegol ka yaasi, …óan yaa…ìee.
5.14: ¬´Ko onon woni ndaygu aduna on. Si saare wonii e hoore fello, haray nde waawetaake suu…óeede.
5.15: Hay gooto hu…ì…ìintaa lampu, hippa mo e miran, kono o wa…óay mo e kene, o ndayginana kala won…óo ka nder suudu.
5.16: Yo ndaygu mon ngun jalbir nii yeeso yim…ìe …ìen, fii no …ìe yi'ira kuu…óe mon mo∆¥∆¥e …óen, …ìe mawnina Ben mon Won…óo ka kammu on.¬ª Fii Laatingol Sariya on
5.17: ¬´Wota on sikku ko mi arani ko fii firtugol Sariya on maa ko annabaa…ìe …ìen wi'i kon. Min mi ardaali fii firtugol …ói, kono ko fii laatingol …ói.
5.18: Ka haqiiqa mi andinii on, haa kammu ngun e leydi ndin muta, ko hay ciifun e to…ì…ìere iwataa e nder bindol Sariya on, haa fow laatoo.
5.19: Kala non bonnu…óo gootel e …ìurngel fan…óude e yamirooje …óen, janni kadi yim…ìe …ìen warrugol wano non, o innete …ìur…óo fan…óude e laamateeri kammu ngun. Kono kala …óoftii…óo janni, on innete teddu…óo e nder laamateeri kammu ngun.
5.20: Awa mi andinii on, si peewal mon ngal …ìuraali ngal jannoo…ìe fii Sariya on …ìen ngal e ngal *Fariisiyaa…ìe …ìen ngal, on naatataa ka laamateeri kammu few.
5.21: ¬´On nanii wonde maamaa…ìe men …ìen wi'ano: ‚ÄπWota a ittu hoore , kala on ittu…óo hoore …≤aawete.‚Ä∫
5.22: Kono min mi wi'ay on, kala tikkan…óo musi…ó…óo mun …≤aawete. Kala wi'u…óo musi…ó…óo mun kadi ‚Äπkomoojo‚Ä∫ …≤aawete yeeso dental fewjoo…ìe …ìen. Kala non wi'u…óo musi…ó…óo mun ‚Äπla'iifu‚Ä∫ haray no e laawol yiite jahannama.
5.23: ¬´Si hi…óa sakkaade ka juulirde, a anditii …óon wonde musi…ó…óo maa no monoran-maa go…ó…óun,
5.24: haray accu …óon ittugol sadaka maa on, yahaa taho mo∆¥∆¥intinoyaa hakkunde maa e musi…ó…óo maa on, si araa non ittaa sadaka maa on.
5.25: ¬´Eto no faamondiriraa e mo ha…ìidu…óaa on kisan fewndo wonu…óon ka …óatal, fii wota on mo ha…ìidu…óaa watte e juu…óe …≤aawoowo on, on …≤aawoowo kadi watte e juu…óe suufaajo on, on wa…óe ka kaso.
5.26: Ko fii ka haqiiqa mi andinii ma, a yaltataa …óon fannamaa a yo…ìaali mbuu…óu sakkitoro on.
5.27: ¬´On nanii kadi wi'aama wonde: ‚Äπwota a jeenu.‚Ä∫
5.28: Kono min mi wi'ay on, kala ndaaru…óo debbo fii himmangol mo, haray ontigi jeenii mo ka …ìernde mun.
5.29: Si tawii yiitere maa …≤aamere nden wonay sabu haa feggo…óaa, haray awu nde, bugo…óaa nde ka wo…ó…óiti-maa. Ko fii no …ìuru-maa mo∆¥∆¥ande ka teral maa gootal hayra, edii ka …ìandu maa ndun fow bugee ka jahannama.
5.30: Si tawii jungo maa …≤aamo ngon kadi wonay sabu haa feggo…óaa, haray ta∆¥u ngo, bugo…óaa ka wo…ó…óiti-maa. Ko fii no …ìuru-maa mo∆¥∆¥ande ka teral maa gootal hayra edii ka …ìandu maa ndun fow yaha ka jahannama.
5.31: ¬´Wi'aama kadi, kala on accitu…óo …ìeyngu mun haray yo o wa…óan mo kaydi sertigal.
5.32: Kono min mi wi'ay on, kala on accitu…óo …ìeyngu mun, si hinaa hara on jeenu, haray o wa…óii mo jeenoowo. Kala non kadi ∆¥ettu…óo debbo seedaa…óo haray on…óon kadi jeenii.
5.33: ¬´On nanii kadi wonde maamaa…ìe men …ìen wi'ano: ‚ÄπWota mo firta woondoore, hunnu woondooje …óe woondan…óaa Joomiraa…óo on …óen.‚Ä∫
5.34: Kono min mi wi'ay on, wota on woondu toode, wota on woondir kammu ngun, ko fii ko ngu jullere laamu Alla.
5.35: Wota on woondir kadi leydi ndin, ko fii ko ndi nda…ó…óudi tundaaje makko …óen, maa woondiron Yerusalaam, ko fii ko saare Lan…óo Maw…óo on non.
5.36: Wota mo woondira hoore mun nden kadi, ko fii on waawaa rawninde maa …ìawlinde hay cukulol gootol.
5.37: Yo ‚Äπhiiyii‚Ä∫ mon on wonu ‚Äπhiiyii‚Ä∫, ‚Äπoo'o‚Ä∫ mon on wona ‚Äπoo'o.‚Ä∫ Ko …ìeyditaa e …óun woo, haray ko e Ibuliisa iwri.
5.38: ¬´On nanii kadi wi'aama wonde: ‚Äπko yiitere yo…ìirtee yiitere, …≤iire yo…ìiree …≤iire.‚Ä∫
5.39: Kono min mi wi'ay on, wota mo dartoo bon…óo, awa kadi mo bantike ma e wa…ì…ìugo …≤aamo, tu…óan mo ngoya kadi.
5.40: On mo faala-maa na…ìude ka …≤aawoore fii ∆¥ettugol ma fokiya on, accidu mo e waramba on kadi.
5.41: On mo karhu-maa kadi rondanagol mo dongal, na…ìaa yeru sagara gooto, na…ìan mo yeru sagara …ói…ói.
5.42: Okkor on torii…óo ma, wota a huccu kadi on faalaa…óo ma …≤awlaade.
5.43: ¬´On nanii kadi wi'aama wonde: ‚ÄπYo a yi…óu gi…óo maa, a…≤aa ga…≤o maa.‚Ä∫
5.44: Kono min mi wi'ay on: yi…óee ay…ìe mon …ìen, torano…óon won…ìe cukkaade on …ìen,
5.45: …óun on wonay …ìi…ì…ìe Ben mon Won…óo ka kammu on. Ko fii himo fu…óinana bon…ìe …ìen e mo∆¥∆¥u…ìe …ìen naange makko ngen, himo saa∆¥inana kadi feewu…ìe …ìen e …ìe feewaa …ìen ndiyan …óan.
5.46: Si tawii non ko yi…óu…ìe on …ìen tun yi…óu…óon, haray ko mbarjaari hondi he…ìoyton? E hinaa ∆¥antiroo…ìe sagalle janfa …ìen kadi ko non warrata?
5.47: Si tawii ko musi…ì…ìe mon …ìen tun hiwroto…óon, haray ko hon…óun wa…óu…óon ko …ìeyditii? Hinaa …ìe gom…óinaa …ìen kadi ko non warrata?
5.48: Awa wonee timmu…ìe wano Ben mon kammuyankeejo on woniri Timmu…óo non.¬ª

6.1: ¬´Reenee e wa…óirgol golle mon mo∆¥∆¥e …óen yiingo. Si hinaa …óun on he…ìataa njoddi ka Ben mon Won…óo ka kammu on.
6.2: ¬´Nde hi…óon okkora miskin…ìe …ìen, wota on wuttu *liite yeeso mon wano faasiqii…ìe …ìen gerdata non ka juulir…óe e ka …óate fii no yim…ìe …ìen mantira …ìe. Ko fii ka haqiiqa mi andinii on …ìe hendike mbarjaari ma…ì…ìe ndin.
6.3: Nde hi…óon okkora miskin…ìe …ìen, wota jungo mon nano ngon andu ko …≤aamo ngon wa…ói kon,
6.4: fii no dokkal mon ngal wonira e gundoo, …óun Ben mon, on Yi'oowo ko yi'otaako, jonnitoyay on mbarjaari mon ndin.
6.5: ¬´Nde hi…óon juula kadi wota on wa'u wa faasiqii…ìe …ìen, …ìen yi…óu…ìe juulugol hara no darii ka nder juulir…óe e ka sera balla≈ãe fii hollitagol yim…ìe …ìen. Ko fii, ka haqiiqa mi andinii on, …ìe hendike mbarjaari ma…ì…ìe ndin.
6.6: Kono onon, nde hi…óon juula, naatee ka nder cuu…ói mon, ombon baafe mon …óen, juulon e Ben mon mo yi'otaako on. ∆äun, Ben mon Yi'oowo ko yi'otaako kon, jonnitoyay on mbarjaari mon ndin.
6.7: ¬´Nde hi…óon juula, wota on fillifillinno haalaaji …óuu…óu…ói wano …ìe wonaa Yahuudiyanke …ìen non, ko fii …ìen no sikka ko no …ìe …óu…ó…óiniri haalaaji woo …ìe ja…ìirantee.
6.8: Wota on nandintino e ma…ì…ìe, ko fii Ben mon no andi ko hon…óun faala…óon ado on toraade mo.
6.9: ¬´Ko nii haanu…óon tororde Alla: ‚ÄπBaaba amen Won…óo ka kammu, yo innde maa nden hormore,
6.10: yo laamu maa ngun fee…≤u, yo faale maa on wa…óu ka aduna wano woniri non ka kammuuli.
6.11: Okkor men hande …≤aametee haanan…óo men on.
6.12: Yaafano…óaa men bonnereeji amen …óin, wano menen kadi men yaaforani bonnu…ìe men …ìen non.
6.13: Wota a naadu men e jarrabuyee, kono jattin men Bon…óo on. Ko fii ko an heerori laamu e bawgal e mangu, haa poomaa. Aamiina.‚Ä∫
6.14: ¬´Si on yaafanike yim…ìe …ìen bonnereeji ma…ì…ìe …óin, haray Baaba mon kammuyankeejo on yaafanto on onon kadi bonnereeji mon …óin.
6.15: Kono si on yaafanaaki yim…ìe …ìen, haray Ben mon kadi yaafantaako on bonnereeji mon …óin.
6.16: ¬´Nde hi…óon hoora, wota on …≤ir…ìin geece mon …óen wa faasiqii…ìe …ìen, ko fii kam…ìe …ìe waylay geece ma…ì…ìe …óen fii hollugol yim…ìe …ìen wonde hi…ìe hoori. Ka haqiiqa mi andinii on, kam…ìe …ìe hendike mbarjaari ma…ì…ìe ndin.
6.17: Kono onon, nde hi…óon hoora, urnee ko'e mon …óen, looton geece mon …óen,
6.18: fii wota on hollu yim…ìe …ìen wonde hi…óon hoori, hara ko Ben mon mo yi'otaako on tun yi'i kon ko wa…óu…óon e nder gundoo. ∆äun, Ben mon Yi'oowo ko yi'otaako on, jonnitay on mbarjaari mon ndin.¬ª Fii Keyee Haqinqin…óo on (Luk. 12.33-34)
6.19: ¬´Wota on moo…ìu jawle ka hoore leydi, ka …óe bonirta wu…óugol e kornugol, e ka wuy…ìe fusata ∆¥etta.
6.20: Kono moo…ìee …óe ka kammu ka …óe wu…óataa e ka …óe kornataa e ka wuy…ìe fusataa ∆¥etta.
6.21: Ko fii ko ka keyee mon on woni woo, …ìernde mon nden wonata.
6.22: ¬´Ko yiitere woni ndaygu …ìandu. Si tawii yiitere nden no selli, haray …ìandu ndun fow no ndaygi.
6.23: On mo yiitere mun …≤awi, haray …ìandu ontigi ndun fow no e nder niwre. Si tawii non ngun ndaygu wongu e ontigi ko niwre, haray ko embere honto nden niwre mawni!
6.24: ¬´Hay gooto waawataa gollande jey…ìe …óun …ói…óo, ko si o a…≤ay oya, o yi…óa oya, maa o ha…ì…ìoo e oya, o itta bote e oya. Ko …óun wa…ói si on waawataa rewude Alla rewon jawdi.
6.25: ¬´Ko …óun wa…ói si mi wi'ay on: wota on aanu fii ko …≤aamon maa ko yaron e nder ngurndan mon …óan, maa fii ko …ìornon …ìalli mon …óin. Taw si hinaa ngurndan …ìuri neema, awa kadi …ìandu …ìuri koltu?
6.26: Ndaaree colli …óin ka kammu: …ói sankataa, …ói wa'ataa, …ói moo…ìataa hay huunde e nder caagaaje, kono Ben mon Kammuyankeejo on no wurni …ói. E taw si on …ìuraa …ói hittude?
6.27: Ko hombo e mon, e nder annde mun, waawata …ìeydude ngurndan mun …óan beru sogonal gootal?
6.28: ¬´E ko hon…óun aananton fii conci? Ndaaree no …óii piindiiji ka gese fu…óirta njan…óa: hara-le …ói gollataa, …ói sa…≤…≤ataa.
6.29: Kono non mi andinii on, hay Sulaymaana e nder darja mun on fow holtiraali hay wa wootiri e majji.
6.30: Si tawii non Allaahu on no holtinirde non hay hu…óo wonuko hande ka ngesa kon, bugoyteeko jango ka yiite kon, hara o ronkay wa…óande on ko …ìuri …óun, onon …ìee fan…óa-gom…óinal…ìe?
6.31: Awa wota on aanu haa wi'on: ‚Äπko hon…óun men …≤aamata?‚Ä∫ maa: ‚Äπko hon…óun men yarata?‚Ä∫ maa: ‚Äπko hon…óun men …ìornotoo?‚Ä∫
6.32: ∆äun, ko …ìe gom…óinaa …ìen …óa…ì…ìata …óun. Kono Ben mon Kammuyankeejo on no andi hi…óon handi e …óun.
6.33: Kono …óa…ì…ìee taho laamu makko ngun e peewal makko ngal, …óin piiji fow …ìeydanoyte on.
6.34: Awa wota on aanu fii jango, ko fii jango aananay hoore mun. ∆ùalaande bee arday e maapunde mun.¬ª

7.2: Ko fii, ko wano …≤aawir…óon non …≤aawirte…óon, e ko sariyaare nde etir…óon nden etirante…óon.
7.3: ¬´Ko honno yiirataa lojol wongol ka yiitere musi…ó…óo maa on, hara a yi'aali falimawal wongal ka yiitere maa ngal?
7.4: Ko honno wawrataa wi'ude musi…ó…óo maa on: ‚ÄπAccu mi ittane lojol ngol ka yiitere maa‚Ä∫, e hara falimawal no ka yiitere maa an?
7.5: Ko an yo faasiqiijo, ittu taho falimawal wongal ka yiitere maa ngal, onsay non a yi'ay no ittiranaa musi…ó…óo maa on lojol wongol ka yiitere makko ngol.
7.6: ¬´Wota on ∆¥ettu ko hormortee kon, jonnon bareeji …óin, fii wota …ói yiltito …ói ∆¥akka on. Wota on bugo kadi ko…óe mon lambiri …óen yeeso koseeji …óin, sakko …ói yaa…ìa …óe.
7.7: ¬´Toree, on okkorte. ∆äa…ì…ìee, on he…ìay. Ho…ó…óee, on udditante.
7.8: Ko fii kala torii…óo okkorte, kala …óa…ì…ìu…óo he…ìay, awa kadi kala on ho…ó…óii…óo udditante.
7.9: ¬´Ko hombo e mon, …ìi…ó…óo mun torotoo …óun bireedi, ontigi jonna mo hayre?
7.10: Maa o toroo mo lingii, ontigi jonna mo mboddi?
7.11: Si tawii non hay onon bon…ìe …ìen hi…óon waawi wa…óande …ìi…ì…ìe mon …ìen piiji mo∆¥∆¥i, haray ko haa honto Ben mon Won…óo ka kammu on okkorta …ìen torii…ìe mo mo∆¥∆¥ereeji!
7.12: Wa…óanee yim…ìe …ìen wano faalira…óon yo …ìe wa…óan on non. Ko fii ko …óun Sariya on e annabaa…ìe …ìen wi'i.¬ª Fii ∆äate …óen ∆äi…ói (Luk. 13.24)
7.13: ¬´Naatiree ka dambugal faa…óungal. Ko fii dambugal nawrayngal e hayrannde ngal ko yaajungal. ∆äatal nawrayngal e hayrannde ngal kadi ko wee…ìungal, awa-le …óuu…óu…ìe naatiray …óon.
7.14: Kono dambugal nawrayngal e ngurndan ngal e …óatal nawrayngal e ngurndan ngal ko faa…óu…óe, kono ko see…óaa…ìe he…ìata …óen.¬ª Fii Wa…óitii…ìe ko Annabaa…ìe (Luk. 6.43-44)
7.15: ¬´Awa reenee e wa…óitii…ìe annaba …ìen, ko fii …ìe arday e mon wa baali, kono hara ka nder ko …ìe caapaali hun∆¥u…ói.
7.16: Ko kuu…óe ma…ì…ìe …óen anditirton …ìe. E hara en ittay sungala e hoore bulle-ko…≤on, maa ∆¥ibbe e hoore bulle-baali?
7.17: Kala leggal mo∆¥∆¥al ko …ìi…ì…ìe mo∆¥∆¥u…ìe rimata, kono leggal bongal ko …ìi…ì…ìe bon…ìe rimata.
7.18: Leggal mo∆¥∆¥al waawataa rimude …ìi…ì…ìe …ìon…ìe, leggal bongal kadi waawataa rimude …ìi…ì…ìe mo∆¥∆¥u…ìe.
7.19: Kala leggal ngal rimataa …ìi…ì…ìe mo∆¥∆¥u…ìe ko soppeteengal bugee ka yiite.
7.21: ¬´Hinaa wi'oo…ìe lan ‚ÄπKoohoojo, Koohoojo‚Ä∫ …ìen fow naatata ka laamateeri kammu, kono ko wa…óay…ìe ko Baaba an Won…óo ka kammu on faalaa kon tun.
7.22: Nden …≤ande, buy wi'oyay lan: ‚ÄπKoohoojo, Koohoojo! Taw si hinaa e innde maa men haaliraynoo ko Alla longini men, men ra…óora kadi jinnaaji e innde maa, men wa…óa kadi kaawakeeji mo∆¥∆¥i buy e innde maa?‚Ä∫
7.23: Onsay mi wi'oyay …ìe: ‚ÄπMi andaano on few. Pottitee lan, yo onon wa…óoo…ìe ko boni!‚Ä∫
7.24: ¬´Awa kala nanu…óo …óii kongu…ói an, huutori …ói, wa'ay wa faamu…óo, darnu…óo suudu mun e hoore fetere.
7.25: Ndiyan …óan saa∆¥i, waameeji …óin ari, keneeli …óin wifi, …óin piyii e ndun suudu, ndu ronka yanude, ko fii hari ko e fetere ndu darii.
7.26: Kono kala nanu…óo kongu…ói an …óin, huutoraali …ói, on no wa'i wa njofoojo darnu…óo suudu mun e hoore njaare.
7.27: Ndiyan …óan saa∆¥i, waameeji …óin ari, keneeli …óin wifi, …óin piyii e ndun suudu, ndu yani, yanal tii…óungal.¬ª
7.28: ∆Åay wonii Iisaa timminii yewtere mun nden, jamaa on ≈ãal…ói fii ko o jannaynoo kon,
7.29: ko fii hari himo jannirde …ìe bawgal, hara wonaa wano jannoo…ìe fii Sariya on …ìen janniraynoo non.

8.1: ∆Åay wonii Iisaa tippike ka fello, jamaa moolanaa…óo jokki mo.
8.2: Onsay mo …óamajan ari jiccii yeeso makko, wi'i: ¬´Koohoojo, si hi…óon faalaa, hi…óon waawi lan sellinde, mi laa…ìa.¬ª
8.3: Iisaa fonti jungo mun ngon, meemi mo, wi'i: ¬´Mi…óo faalaa, laato sellu…óo, laa…ìaa.¬ª ∆äon kisan o selli …óamajan …óan, o laa…ìi.
8.4: E hoore …óun Iisaa wi'i mo: ¬´Reeno wota a wowlan …óun hay gooto, kono yahu hollitoyo…óaa *yottinoowo sadaka on, ittaa sadaka wano Muusaa yamiri non, fii yo …óun wonan …ìe seedee.¬ª Fii no Iisaa Selliniri Kurkaadu Suufaajo (Luk. 7.1-10; Yhn. 4.43-54)
8.5: ∆Åay wonii Iisaa naatii Kafernahuum, hooreejo suufaa…ìe teemedere …ìadii mo, jeeji,
8.6: wi'i: ¬´Koohoojo, kurkaadu an ndun no waalii ka suudu, …ìandu makko ndun no maayi, awa kadi himo tampi fota.¬ª
8.7: Iisaa wi'i mo: ¬´Mi yahay, mi sellina mo.¬ª
8.8: Onsay kanko hooreejo suufaa…ìe …ìen o jaabii mo, o wi'i: ¬´Koohoojo, mi foddaa e mo'on ka suudu an. Kono maakee tun kongol gootol, kurkaadu an ndun ndikkay.
8.9: Ko fii min tigi, ko mi won…óo e ley kongol hooree…ìe goo, min kadi mi…óo mari suufaa…ìe won…ìe e ley kongol an. Si mi wi'ii go…ó…óo e …ìen ‚Äπyahu‚Ä∫, o yahay. Si mi wi'ii oya on ‚Äπaru‚Ä∫, o aray. Awa kadi si mi wi'ii kurkaadu an ndun ‚Äπwa…óu …óun‚Ä∫, ndu wa…óay.¬ª
8.10: ∆Åay Iisaa nanii …óun, o ≈ãal…ói, o wi'i jokku…ìe mo …ìen: ¬´Ka haqiiqa mi andinii on, hay ka *Isra'iila'en mi yi'aali ne…ó…óo gom…óinir…óo wa oo.
8.11: Mi andinii on, …óuu…óu…ìe iwroyay funnaange e hirnaange, …ìe nafodoya e Ibraahiima e Issaaqa e Yaaquuba ka laamateeri kammu.
8.12: Kono haanunoo…ìe ronude laamateeri ndin …ìen bugete ka niwre ka …ìuri wo…ó…óude, ka wullaandu e ≈ãatindiro …≤ii∆¥e woni ton.¬ª
8.13: Onsay Iisaa wi'i on hooreejo suufaa…ìe …ìen: ¬´Yahu, yo …óun wonirane wano gom…óinir…óaa non.¬ª E on saa'i tigi kurkaadu ndun sellinaa. Fii no Iisaa ∆ùawndiri Nawnu…ìe buy (Mrk. 1.29-34; Luk. 4.38-41)
8.14: ∆Åawto …óun Iisaa yahi ka galle Petruusu, o tawi esiraawo Petruusu suddii…óo on no waalii nawnaare nguli-…ìandu.
8.15: O meemi jungo on ngon, nguli-…ìandu kin yalti e makko. Onsay on immii, o woni e kurkanagol Iisaa.
8.16: ∆Åay ni…ì…ìii, …ìe addani mo …óuu…óu…ìe …ìe jinna nangi, o ra…óori …óin jinnaaji kongol makko ngol, o sellini nawnu…ìe …ìen fow.
8.17: Ko nii ko daaliranoo annabi Isaaya kon laatori, wonde: ¬´O ∆¥ettii nawnaaje men …óen, o fawtike …≤abbeeli men …óin.¬ª
8.18: ∆Åay Iisaa yi'ii jamaa hundu…óo mo on, o yamiri taalibaa…ìe makko …ìen yo …ìe lumbitu ga…óa.
8.19: Jannoowo fii Sariya on goo …ìadii mo, wi'i: ¬´Karamoko'en, mi jokkete kala ka yaaru…óaa.¬ª
8.20: Iisaa jaabii mo wi'i: ¬´Ndoni …óin no mari gay…óe mun, awa kadi colli …óin ka weeyo no mari …≤akkaaji mun, kono *∆Åii-Aaden on kan alaa hay ka fowtina hoore mun nden.¬ª
8.21: Go…ó…óo e taalibaa…ìe …ìen wi'i mo: ¬´Koohoojo, newnanee lan taho mi yaha, mi wattinoya ben an en.¬ª
8.22: Kono Iisaa jaabii mo, wi'i: ¬´Jokkan, accaa may…ìe …ìen wattina may…ìe mun …ìen.¬ª Fii no Iisaa Dee∆¥iniri Waabiliire nden (Mrk. 4.35; Luk. 8.22-25)
8.23: ∆Åawto …óun Iisaa bakii ka laana, taalibaa…ìe makko …ìen kadi jokki mo.
8.24: Onsay waabiliire tii…óunde wondunde e hendu tippii ka weendu haa morloo…óe ndiyan …óen watti diwude laana kan, tawi kanko himo …óaanii.
8.25: ∆Åe ari, …ìe findini mo, …ìe wi'i: ¬´Koohoojo, dandu en, en mulay woni!¬ª
8.26: O wi'i …ìe: ¬´Ko fii hon…óun hulan…óon, onon …ìee fan…óa-gom…óinal…ìe?¬ª Onsay o immii, o to≈ãani hendu ndun e morloo…óe ndiyan …óen, dee∆¥aango tii…óungo wa…ói.
8.27: ∆Åen ≈ãal…ói fota, …ìe wi'indiri: ¬´Ko hombo woni oo? Ko fii hay keneeli …óin e baharu on …óoftoto mo!¬ª Fii no Jinnanoo…ìe ∆äi…óo Selliniraa (Mrk. 5.1-20; Luk. 8.26-39)
8.28: ∆Åay wonii o hewtoyii ga…óa weendu ndun, …óun ko e ndii leydi …ìee Gadariyankoo…ìe, jinnaa…ìe …ói…óo sortii ka ber…óe, ari fottugol e makko. Tawi hakkee ko …ìen hul…ìinii, hay gooto suusataano rewude …óon.
8.29: ∆Åen sonki e makko, …ìe wi'i: ¬´Ko hon…óun faalana…óaa men, an oo *∆Åi…ó…óo Alla. E hara ko ardu…óaa …óoo ko fii lettugol men hara saa'i on hewtaali?¬ª
8.30: Tawi wuro kose moolanaango no ooraynoo ka wo…ó…óitii …ìe.
8.31: Onsay jinnaaji …óin jeeji mo, …ói wi'i: ¬´Si a ra…óoto men, nawru men e ngoo wuro kose.¬ª
8.32: O wi'i …ói: ¬´Yahee!¬ª Onsay …ói yalti e …ìen, …ói naatoyi e nder …óin koseeji. Tun, koseeji …óin fow giddi ka falo, …ói unoyii ka weendu, …ói muli ka nder ndiyan.
8.33: Ornaynoo…ìe …ói …ìen dogi, yahi ka saare, fillitoyii ko wa…ói kon fow, tentinii ko he…ìi …ìen jinnanoo…ìe kon.
8.34: Onsay yim…ìe saare nden fow yalti fii fottugol e Iisaa. Nde …ìe yiirunoo mo, …ìe jeeji mo wo…ó…óitagol leydi ma…ì…ìe ndin.

9.1: ∆Åawto …óun Iisaa bakii …óon e laana, o lumboyi weendu ndun, o yahi ka saare makko.
9.2: ∆Åe addani mo maaya-…ìanduujo waalii…óo e …ìoggi-dimbor…ói. ∆Åay Iisaa yi'ii gom…óinal ma…ì…ìe ngal, o wi'i maaya-…ìanduujo on: ¬´Wakkilo yo boobo an. Junuubaaji maa …óin yaafaama.¬ª
9.3: Onsay wo…ì…ìe e jannoo…ìe fii Sariya on wi'indiri: ¬´Oo ne…ó…óo no hoynude Alla!¬ª
9.4: Nde tawnoo Iisaa no andi miijooji ma…ì…ìe …óin, o wi'i …ìe: ¬´Ko hon…óun jogani…óon …óii miijooji bon…ói ka …ìer…óe mon?
9.5: Enee, hakkunde wi'ugol ‚Äπjunuubaaji maa …óin yaafaama‚Ä∫ e ‚Äπimmo yahaa‚Ä∫, ko hon…óun e …óii …óoo …ìuri wee…ìude?
9.6: Fii no andiron wonde *∆Åii-Aaden on no mari bawgal ka aduna …óoo fii yaafagol junuubaaji¬ª, o wi'i jukku…óo on: ¬´Immo ∆¥ettaa …ìoggi-dimbor…ói maa …óin, hootaa ka maa.¬ª
9.7: On immii, o hooti ka makko.
9.8: ∆Åay jamaa on yi'ii …óun, …ìe huli, …ìe mawnini Alla, on ye…óu…óo yim…ìe …ìen sifa ngal bawgal. Fii no Matta Jokkiri Iisaa (Mrk. 2.13-17; Luk. 5.27-32)
9.9: Wa ko Iisaa iwata …óon, o yi'i go…ó…óo no wi'ee Matta no joo…óii ka ∆¥antirde sagalle. O wi'i mo: ¬´Aru, jokkaa mi!¬ª Kanko Matta o immii, o jokki mo.
9.10: ∆Åawto …óun, Iisaa joo…óii fii …≤aamugol ka suudu Matta, tawi *∆¥antoo…ìe sagalle e junuubankee…ìe …óuu…óu…ìe no joo…óodi e makko, wondude e taalibaa…ìe makko …ìen.
9.11: ∆Åay *Fariisiyaa…ìe …ìen yi'ii …óun, …ìe wi'i taalibaa…ìe makko …ìen: ¬´E ko fii hon…óun karamoko mon …≤aamidanta e ∆¥antoo…ìe sagalle …ìen e junuubanke'en?¬ª
9.12: ∆Åay wonii Iisaa nanii …óun, o wi'i: ¬´Hinaa sellu…ìe …ìen hatonjini e …≤awndoowo, kono ko …≤aw…ìe …ìen.
9.13: Allaahu non no daali: ‚ÄπKo yurmeende mi faalaa, wonaa sadaka.‚Ä∫ Awa, yahee andinoyo…óon ko woni firo …óun. Ko fii min, wonaa noddugol feewu…ìe …ìen mi arani, kono ko junuubankee…ìe …ìen.¬ª Landal fii Hoorugol (Mrk. 2.18-22; Luk. 5.33-39)
9.14: Onsay taalibaa…ìe Yaayaa …ìen ari e Iisaa, …ìe wi'i mo: ¬´Ko fii hon…óun menen e Fariisiyaa…ìe …ìen men hooranta, hara taalibaa…ìe maa …ìen kan alaa hoorude?¬ª
9.15: Iisaa jaabii …ìe wi'i: ¬´Taw si njaatigii…ìe jom jomba no haani yoomude yeru hi…ìe wondi e jom jomba? ∆ùalaa…óe aroyay nde jom jomba pottinaa e hakkunde ma…ì…ìe, onsay …ìe hooray.
9.16: Hay gooto ∆¥ettataa ceelol bagi keso, walkira dolokke ki…ó…óo. Ko fii ceelol ngol poo…óay dolokke on, haa wuddere nden …ìurta yaajude.
9.17: Njaram kesan men loowetaake e nder bootooji guri ki…ó…ói. Si hinaa …óun, guri …óin seekoto, njaram …óan hibba, bootooji guri …óin kadi bona. Kono njaram kesan ko e nder bootooji guri kesi loowetee, …ói fow …ói maroda.¬ª Fii no Iisaa Wurnitiri Jiwo, Sellini Debbo (Mrk. 5.21-43; Luk. 8.40-56)
9.18: Wa fewndo ko Iisaa yewtata …ìe …óii kongu…ói, hooreejo goo hewti, jiccii yeeso makko, wi'i: ¬´Jiwo an on maayii jooni jooni! Kono aree *fawon juu…óe mon …óen e hoore makko, o wuuritay.¬ª
9.19: Iisaa e taalibaa…ìe mun …ìen immii jokki mo.
9.20: Onsay debbo wonnoo…óo soncaade gila duu…ìi sappoo e …ói…ói ari wontiri …ìaawo Iisaa, o meemi kombol dolokke makko on.
9.21: Ko fii hari on debbo no miijoo wonde: ¬´Si mi waawii tun meemude dolokke makko on, mi ndikkay.¬ª
9.22: Onsay Iisaa ye∆¥∆¥itii. ∆Åay o yi'ii mo, o wi'i: ¬´Wakkilo, yo jiwo an! Gom…óinal maa ngal sellinii ma.¬ª On debbo selli e on saa'i tigi.
9.23: ∆Åay Iisaa hewtii ka suudu on hooreejo, o yi'ii ko wuttoo…ìe ceri …ìen e jamaa on woni e nder jii…ìoldu kon,
9.24: o wi'i …ìe: ¬´Pottitee, jiwo on maayaali, o …óaani.¬ª ∆Åe jali mo.
9.25: ∆Åay wonii jamaa on yaltinaama, onsay o naati, o nangi jungo jiwo on, jiwo on immii.
9.26: Fii …óun andii e leydi ndin fow. Fii no Iisaa Wuntiniri Bum…ìe ∆äi…óo
9.27: Wa ko Iisaa iwata …óon, bum…ìe …ói…óo jokki mo, no ewnoo wi'a: ¬´Yurminee men, yo …ìii Daawuuda!¬ª
9.28: ∆Åay o hewtii ka suudu, bum…ìe …ìen …ìadii mo. Iisaa wi'i …ìe: ¬´Hi…óon sikka mi…óo waawi wa…óude …óun?¬ª ∆Åe jaabii mo: ¬´Hiiyii, yaa an Koohoojo.¬ª
9.29: Onsay o meemi …ìe gite …óen, o wi'i: ¬´Yo …óun woniran on wano gom…óinir…óon non.¬ª
9.30: Gite ma…ì…ìe …óen wunti. Iisaa yamiri …ìe …óun…óoo, o sattini, o wi'i: ¬´Reenee wota gooto andu.¬ª
9.31: Kono nde …ìe yaltirnoo, …ìe nangi e fillagol e nder leydi ndin fow ko Iisaa wa…óani …ìe kon. Fii no Iisaa Selliniri Mboboojo mo Jinna Nangi
9.32: Wa ko Iisaa e taalibaa…ìe mun …ìen fokkitata, …ìe addani mo mboboojo mo jinna nangi.
9.33: ∆Åay wonii jinnawii ngin ra…óaama, mboboojo on wowli. E nder ko jamaa on ≈ãal…ói kon, …ìe wi'i: ¬´Haa hande sifa …óun yi'aaka e leydi Isra'iila ndin!¬ª
9.34: Kono Fariisiyaa…ìe …ìen ka…≤un wi'i: ¬´Ko tippude e lan…óo jinnaaji …óin o woni ra…óorde jinnaaji …óin.¬ª Fii no Iisaa Yurmiraa Jamaa on (Mrk. 6.34; Luk. 10.2)
9.35: Tawi Iisaa no yiilotonoo e ca'e …óen fow e ko…óooli …óin, janna ka nder juulir…óe ma…ì…ìe, waajoo fii Kibaaru Mo∆¥∆¥o *laamu Alla ngun, …≤awnda kadi kala nawnaaje e …≤abbeeli.
9.36: ∆Åay o yi'ii jamaa on, o yurmaa, ko fii hari hi…ìe aybi, hi…ìe ≈ãakkiraa ballo wa baali …ói alaa ngaynaako.
9.37: Onsay o wi'i taalibaa…ìe makko …ìen: ¬´Baagol ngol no …óuu…ói, kono wa'oo…ìe …ìen …óuu…óaa.
9.38: Awa jooni, toree non Jom baagol ngol yo o addu wa'oo…ìe ka baagol makko.¬ª

10.1: ∆Åawto …óun, Iisaa noddi *sahaabaa…ìe makko …ìen sappoo e …ói…óo, o okki …ìe bawgal ra…óagol jinnaaji …óin e sellingol kala …≤aw e kala nawnaare.
10.2: E hino in…óe …ìen sahaabaa…ìe sappoo e …ói…óo: arano on e ma…ì…ìe ko Sim'uunu, jammaa…óo on Petruusu, e Andaraawu neene-gooto makko on, e Yaaquuba mo Zabadii, e Yuuhanna neene-gooto on on,
10.3: e Filiipu e Bartolomaawu e Tooma e Matta, ∆¥antaynoo…óo sagalle on, e Yaaquuba mo Alfaa, e Taddaawu,
10.4: e Sim'uunu tawdaa…óo e fedde *Zelotii…ìe …ìen, e Yudaasi Iskariiyu, janfoytoo…óo mo on.
10.5: Ko …ìee sappoo e …ói…óoo…ìe …óoo Iisaa immini …ìawto o yamirde …ìe …óun…óoo: ¬´Wota on yaaru ka …ìe wonaa Yahuudiyanke …ìen e wota on naatu ka ca'e Samariyankee…ìe …ìen.
10.6: Kono yaaree ka baali suudu *Isra'iila majju…ói …óin.
10.7: E nder yaadu mon ndun, waajo…óon wonde laamu kammu ngun …ìadike.
10.8: ∆ùawndon …≤aw…ìe …ìen, immintinon may…ìe …ìen, sellinon …ìe …óamajan …ìen, …ìe laa…ìa, ra…óo…óon jinnaaji …óin. On hendike …óun e hoore on ittaa hay huunde, onon kadi okkee …óun, hara on ittinaali hay huunde.
10.9: Wota on datto ka≈ã≈ãe maa kaalisi maa sila, yoo…ìo…óon,
10.10: maa bonfo fii yaadu ndun, maa dolokkaaji …ói…ói, maa pa…óe, maa tuggordu. Ko fii golloowo no handi e …≤aametee mun.
10.11: ¬´Kala saare maa ho…óo ka naatu…óon, andee si tawii no woodi …óon go…ó…óo hebulii…óo ja…ìugol on, haray weeree ka makko haa nde hi…óon yaha.
10.12: Nde hi…óon naata e suudu, salminee.
10.13: Si yim…ìe ndun suudu ja…ìii on, haray yo …ìuttu mon on wonu e ma…ì…ìe, kono si tawii …ìe ja…ìaali on, haray yo …ìuttu mon on artan on.
10.14: Si tawii non on ja…ìaaka, maa kongu…ói mon …óin he…óaaka, haray yaltee e ndun suudu maa e nden saare, honkon mbullaari teppe mon …óen.
10.15: Ka haqiiqa mi andinii on, …≤ande …≤aawoore nden ko …óee ca'e Saduuma e *Amuura …ìuretee hoynaneede edii nden saare …óon.
10.16: ¬´Jooni mi…óo imminirde on wa baali e hakkunde caapaali, awa reenoree wa mboddi, neworon wa gabooji.
10.17: Reeno…óon e yim…ìe …ìen, ko fii …ìe na…ìoyay on ka …≤aawir…ói, …ìe foccoya on ka juulir…óe ma…ì…ìe.
10.18: On na…ìete ka yeesoo…ìe …ìen e ka lam…ìe …ìen sabu an, seedito…óon fii an yeeso ma…ì…ìe, kam…ìe e …ìe wonaa Yahuudiyanke …ìen.
10.19: ¬´Kono tuma …ìe watti on e joge, wota on ji…ìoyo ko honno haalirton maa ko wi'on. Ko fii ko wowloyton kon longinte on e on saa'i tigi.
10.20: Ko fii wonaa onon yewtoyta, kono ko Ruuhu Ben mon on yewtiroyta on.
10.21: Ko fii go…ó…óo ∆¥ettoyay musi…ó…óo mun, watta mo e joge fii yo o ware, baabaajo kadi warra non …ìi…ó…óo mun. Fay…ìe …ìen kadi hawtanoyoo maw…ìe mun …ìen, …ìe wona sabu haa …ìe waree.
10.22: Fow a…≤oyay on sabu innde an nden. Kono mo ≈ãa…≤…≤ike …óun haa ka lannoode, o dandoyte.
10.23: Kono si on cukkaama e ndee saare …óoo, dogee yaaron e wonnde goo. Ko fii ka haqiiqa mi andinii on, on waawataa yahude e ca'e Isra'iilayanke …óen fow ado *∆Åii-Aaden on arude.
10.24: ¬´Awa taalibaajo …ìuraa karamoko mun, wano non kadi kurkaadu …ìuraa jey…óo …óun.
10.25: Yonanii taalibaajo ka o wa'a wa karamoko makko, kurkaadu ndun kadi wa'a wa jom mun. Si …ìe jammii non jom suudu ndun *Balzabuula, haray ko haa honto non …ìe jammata yim…ìe suudu makko ndun!
10.26: Awa wota on hulu …ìe few, ko fii alaa ko suu…óii ko fee…≤ataa, awa kadi alaa gundoo mo andotaako.
10.27: Ko mi wowlani on kon ka niwre, fe…≤…≤inee …óun tumbere …≤alorma. Ko sownda…óon kon kadi, ewnee …óun ka war…≤akke.
10.28: Awa wota on hulu waroo…ìe …ìandu …ìen, hara waawataa warude wonkii. Kono hulee waawu…óo mulude wonkii e …ìandu on ka jahannama.
10.29: Hinaa seresereeji …ói…ói no yeeyee tammaaru wooturu? Kono hay wooturu yanataa e leydi e …ìaawo muy…óe Ben mon.
10.30: Onon e hoore mon, hay cukuli ko'e mon …óen fow no limaa.
10.31: Awa, wota on hulu, ko fii hi…óon …ìuri seresereeji buy hittude ka Alla.
10.32: ¬´Ko …óun wa…ói, kala qirritii…óo fii an yeeso yim…ìe …ìen, min kadi mi qirritoyto fii makko yeeso Ben an Won…óo ka kammu on.
10.33: Kono kala yeddu…óo fii an yeeso yim…ìe …ìen, min kadi mi yeddoyay fii makko yeeso Ben an Won…óo ka kammu on.
10.34: ¬´Wota on sikku ko addugol …ìuttu e oo aduna mi arani. Wonaa …ìuttu mi addi, kono ko kaafa.
10.35: Ko mi arani ko liddondiral: gorko e ben mun liddondira, jiwo e yumma mun liddondira, jiwo e esiraawo mun debbo liddondira.
10.36: Yim…ìe suudu ontigi ndun wona ay…ìe makko.
10.37: ¬´Kala yi…óu…óo ben mun maa yumma mun …ìuri lan min, haray ontigi foddaa e an. Kala yi…óu…óo kadi …ìi…ó…óo mun gorko maa …ìi…ó…óo mun jiwo …ìuri lan, haray ontigi foddaa e an.
10.38: Kala mo ∆¥ettaali leggal mun altindiraangal* ngal, jokkimmi, haray ontigi foddaa e an.
10.39: Kala faalaa…óo dandude ngurndan mun …óan, …óan hayriray mo, kala non mo ngurndan mun …óan hayriraa sabu an min, o hettoyay …óan.
10.40: ¬´Kala ja…ìu…óo on haray ja…ìii lan, kala non ja…ìu…óo lan haray o ja…ìii Nulu…óo lan on.
10.41: Kala ja…ìu…óo annabaajo sabu on ko annabaajo, o he…ìay mbarjaari annabaajo. Kala ja…ìu…óo feewu…óo sabu on ko feewu…óo, o he…ìay mbarjaari feewu…óo.
10.42: Ka haqiiqa mi andinii on, kala okkor…óo go…ó…óo e koy taalibahoy an ndiyan …ìuu…ìu…óan, sabu kun ko taalibahun an, o fa…óataa mbarjaari makko ndin few.¬ª

11.1: ∆Åay wonii Iisaa gaynii yamirde *sahaabaa…ìe makko …ìen sappoo e …ói…óo, o iwi …óon, o yahi e ca'e diiwal ngal fii jannugol waajoo.
11.2: Fewndo Yaayaa woni ka nder kaso, o nani fii kuu…óe *Almasiihu on no wowlee. Onsay o immini taalibaa…ìe makko …ìen
11.3: ko landoyoo mo, wi'a: ¬´Taw si ko onon woni haanu…óo arude on, kaa hara yo men habbo go…ó…óo goo?¬ª
11.4: Iisaa jaabii …ìe wi'i: ¬´Yahee fillitano…óon Yaayaa ko yi'u…óon kon e ko nanu…óon kon,
11.5: wonde: bum…ìe …ìen yi'ii, boofoo…ìe …ìen yahii, …ìe …óamajan …ìen sellinaama laa…ìii, pahi…óu…ìe …ìen nanii, may…ìe no immintineede, Kibaaru Mo∆¥∆¥o on no fe…≤…≤inaneede miskin…ìe …ìen.
11.6: Kala mo feggaaki e an ko malaa…óo.¬ª
11.7: ∆Åay …ìe yiltitike, onsay Iisaa fu…ó…óii yewtude jamaa on fii Yaayaa, o landii …ìe …óun…óoo, o wi'i: ¬´Ko hon…óun yahuno…óon ndaaroygol ka wulaa? Hara ko ku…óol ngol hendu ndun dimbata?
11.8: Kaa ko hon…óun yahuno…óon ndaarugol? Ko ne…ó…óo …ìornii…óo conci dimi? Ndaaree, …ìee …ìornii…ìe conci dimi no e nder galleeji laamu.
11.9: Ko hon…óun non yahuno…óon ndaarugol? Ko annabaajo? Hiiyii, min mi wi'ay on, ko ko …ìuri annabaajo.
11.10: Ko oo …óoo woni mo fii mun windii on, wonde: ‚ÄπAwa, mi…óo imminde nulaa…óo an on yeeso maa, fii ko fertano-maa laawol maa ngol.‚Ä∫
11.11: ¬´Ko fii ka haqiiqa mi andinii on, alaa mo suddii…óo jibini …ìur…óo Yaayaa *lootoowo maande tuubuubuyee on. Kono non …ìur…óo fan…óude on ka laamateeri kammu no …ìuri mo teddude.
11.12: Gila e Yaayaa lootoowo maande tuubuubuyee on haa hande laamu kammu ngun no yaarude yeeso e nder doole, tawi dooloo…ìe …ìen no etaade fii halorgol ngu.
11.13: Ko fii ko haa e Yaayaa annabaa…ìe …ìen fow e Sariya on haalunoo ko Alla longini …óun.
11.14: Si hi…óon faalaa ja…ìude …óun, ko kanko woni Iiliiya, on haanunoo…óo arude.
11.15: Mo no mari noppi yo nanu!
11.16: ¬´Hara ko e hon…óun mi e…ì…ìindirta nguu jamaanu? Hingu nandi e fay…ìe, joo…óii…ìe e kubitirde, hara …ìen no noddindira, wi'a:
11.17: ‚ÄπMen wuttanii on ceri, on amaali, men yimanii on gim…ói yurmu…ói, on wullaali!‚Ä∫
11.18: Ko fii Yaayaa arno, o …≤aamataano, o yarataano ko mandilinta, wi'u…óon: ‚ÄπOn ko mo jinna!‚Ä∫
11.19: ∆Åii-Aaden* on kadi arii no …≤aama no yara, wi'u…óon: ‚ÄπOn ko reere…óu…óo, yaroowo, weldu…óo e ∆¥antoo…ìe sagalle e junuubanke'en!‚Ä∫ Kono kuu…óe faamu Allaahu on …óen hollay wonde ko ngu feewungu.¬ª Fii Ca'e Salii…óe Gom…óinde …óen (Luk. 10.12-15)
11.20: Onsay Iisaa woni e felugol ca'e …óe o …ìuri wa…óude kaawakeeji mo∆¥∆¥i e mun …óen, sabu ko …óe tuubaali kon,
11.21: o wi'i: ¬´Bone wonanii ndee saare Kuuraziin e ndee saare Bayti-Sa'iida! Ko fii si tawno …óii kaawakeeji mo∆¥∆¥i wa…óunoo…ói ka mon ko non wa…óirnoo e …óee ca'e Tiiri e Siduuna, harayno nee…ìii ko jeyaa…ìe e …óen ca'e …ìornii conci heynor…ói, …ìe wujitii ndoondi fii hollugol wonde …ìe tuubii.
11.22: Ko …óun wa…ói si mi wi'ay on, …≤ande …≤aawoore nden ko Tiiri e Siduuna …ìuretee hoynaneede edii onon.
11.23: Onon non, …ìee …ìe Kafernahuum, hi…óon sikka fii mon …ìantete haa ka aljanna? Oo'o, on bugete ka jahannama. Ko fii si tawno …óii kaawakeeji mo∆¥∆¥i wa…óu…ói e maa wa…óirno non e ndee saare wi'eteende *Saduuma, harayno haa hande hinde woodaa.
11.24: Ko …óun wa…ói si mi wi'ay on, …≤ande …≤aawoore nden ko ndee saare Saduuma …ìuretee hoynaneede edii ndee saare …óoo.¬ª Fii no Iisaa Noddiri en e Makko (Luk. 10.21-22)
11.25: E on saa'i …óon, Iisaa ∆¥etti haala kan, o wi'i: ¬´Mi yettii ma yo Baaba, Jom leydi e kammu, fii koo ko wirnan…óaa …óun …ìen faamu…ìe e …ìee gandi…óu…ìe, fe…≤…≤inan…óaa …óun …ìee fay…ìe.
11.26: Hiiyii, ko fii ko …óun wonnoo yi…ói maa on, yo Baaba.
11.27: ¬´Awa, Baaba an wattii fow e juu…óe an. Awa kadi hay gooto andaa ∆Åi…ó…óo on si hinaa Baabaajo on, wano tawiri non kadi hay gooto andaa Baabaajo on si hinaa ∆Åi…ó…óo on e on mo ∆Åi…ó…óo on faalaa mo fe…≤…≤inande.
11.28: ¬´Aree e an, on fow, yo rondii…ìe ko teddi haa ronki, mi fowtina on.
11.29: Ja…ìon yankinanagol ko mi fawi on kon, ja…ìon janndeeji an …óin. Ko fii min ko mi newii…óo, yankinii…óo kadi e …ìernde, …óun on he…ìay fowtunde fii wonkiiji mon …óin.
11.30: Ko fii ko mi fawata on kon no weli na…ìude, awa dongal ngal mi fawata on ngal ko hayfungal.¬ª

12.1: E on saa'i …óon, tawi Iisaa no rewude e gese ngawri …≤ande aseweere nden, …óun ko *…≤alaande fowteteende nden. Tawi taalibaa…ìe makko …ìen no woocora cawti …óen gese, worsa …ói …≤aama, ko fii hari hi…ìe weelaa.
12.2: ∆Åay *Fariisiyaa…ìe …ìen yi'ii …óun, …ìe wi'i mo kanko Iisaa: ¬´E hino taalibaa…ìe maa …ìen no wa…óude ko dagaaki e …≤alaande fowteteende nden!¬ª
12.3: Kono Iisaa jaabii …ìe, wi'i: ¬´Hara on jangaali ko Daawuuda wa…óunoo kon fewndo o weelaa, kanko e yim…ìe wondunoo…ìe e makko …ìen?
12.4: O naati ka nder suudu Alla, onsay …ìe …≤aami bireediije wee…ìitaa…óe fii sadaka …óen, …óe tawata hinaa kanko, hinaa …ìe o wondunoo …ìen daganinoo …≤aamugol, kono ko *yottinoo…ìe sadaka …ìen tun daganinoo …≤aamugol …óe.
12.5: Kaa on jangaali ka Sariya wonde e aseweeje …óen hooree…ìe yottinoo…ìe sadaka …ìen no bonna Sariya …≤alaande fowteteende nden ka nder *juulirde mawnde, hara fawaaki …ìe?
12.6: Kono mi andinii on, …ìur…óo juulirde mawnde nden no …óoo.
12.7: Allaahu on no daali: ‚ÄπKo yurmeende mi faalaa, wonaa sadaka.‚Ä∫ Si hi…óon andunoo ko …óun firi, on felataano yim…ìe …ìe bonnaa.
12.8: Ko fii ko *∆Åii-Aaden on woni jom …≤alaande fowteteende nden. Fii no Iisaa Selliniri Maaya-Jungoojo (Mrk. 3.1-6; Luk. 6.6-11)
12.9: Onsay o iwi …óon, o naatoyi ka nder juulirde ma…ì…ìe.
12.10: Tawi maaya-jungoojo no nder ton. Nde tawnoo hi…ìe faalaa too…≤ude Iisaa, …ìe landii mo, …ìe wi'i: ¬´E hara no dagii ka go…ó…óo …≤awndee e asewe?¬ª
12.11: O jaabii …ìe, o wi'i: ¬´Ko hombo e mon, si no mari baalii gootii, ngin ara e yanude e ngayka e aseweere, hara o ronkay ngii nangude, ∆¥awna?
12.12: E ko haa honto non ne…ó…óo hitti …ìuri baalii! Awa no dagii wa…óugol ko mo∆¥∆¥i …≤ande …≤alaande fowteteende nden.¬ª
12.13: Onsay o wi'i on ne…ó…óo: ¬´Fontu jungo maa ngon.¬ª On fonti ngo, ngo selliri wa ngoya.
12.14: Onsay Fariisiyaa…ìe …ìen yalti, fewjodi no …ìe warira mo. Fii Kurkaadu ndu Alla Su…ìii ndun
12.15: ∆Åay Iisaa faamii nden e…ì…ìoore ma…ì…ìe, o iwi …óon. Buy jokki mo, o sellini …ìe fow.
12.16: O yamiri …ìe wota …ìe fe…≤…≤in fii makko,
12.17: fii no ko daaliranoo annabi Isaaya kon laatora, wonde:
12.18: ¬´E hino kurkaadu an ndu mi su…ìii ndun, on yi…óaa…óo an mo mi weltori. Mi wa…óay Ruuhu an on e makko, o fe…≤…≤inanoya le∆¥∆¥i …óin peewal ngal.
12.19: O yeddondiroytaa e go…ó…óo, o sonkoytaa, e hay gooto nanoytaa hito makko ka balla≈ãe.
12.20: O heloytaa ku…óol …ìa∆¥∆¥ungol, o roccinoytaa sarbu won…óo e suurude, haa o folna peewal ngal.
12.21: Onsay le∆¥∆¥i …óin tan∆¥inoroyay innde makko nden.¬ª Fii no Iisaa Jaabori Too…≤e …óe O Too…≤aa (Mrk. 3.22-30; Luk. 11.14-23)
12.22: ∆Åawto …óun …ìe addani mo mo jinna nangi, tawi on ko mboboojo bun…óo, o sellini mo. Onsay on mboboojo wowli, yi'i.
12.23: Tawi …óun no ≈ãal…óini jamaa on fota, …ìe wi'i: ¬´Taw si ko oo woni *Almasiihu mo Daawuuda?¬ª
12.24: ∆Åay Fariisiyaa…ìe …ìen nanii …óun, …ìe wi'i: ¬´Oo ne…ó…óo ko e innde *Balzabuula lan…óo jinnaaji …óin tun o woni ra…óorde jinnaaji …óin!¬ª
12.25: Nde tawnoo Iisaa no andi ko …ìe miijii, o wi'i …ìe: ¬´Kala laamateeri liddondirndi, kayri tigi ndi caabay. E kala saare maa suudu, si liddondirii ka…≤un tigi, haray waawataa tabitude.
12.26: Si tawii non Ibuliisa ra…óike Ibuliisa, o liddike hoore makko kanko tigi. Haray ko honno laamateeri makko ndin tabitirta?
12.27: Si tawii non min ko tippude e Balzabuula mi woni ra…óorde jinnaaji …óin, haray …ìe mon …ìen non ko tippude e hombo woni …ói ra…óorde? Ko …óun wa…ói si kam…ìe tigi …ìe …≤aawoyay on.
12.28: Kono si tawii ko tippude e Ruuhu Alla on mi woni ra…óorde jinnaaji …óin, haray *laamu Alla ngun arii haa e mon.
12.29: ¬´Maa ko honno go…ó…óo waawirta naatude e nder suudu ne…ó…óo dolnu…óo, moo…ìa keyeeji on …óin, ado o ha…ì…ìude on ne…ó…óo dolnu…óo taho. Ko onsay doo o waawata moo…ìude ko woni ka suudu on kon.
12.30: Awa, kala mo aldaa e an haray ko ga…≤o an, awa kadi kala mo wallataa lan moo…ìitude haray ko saakoowo.
12.31: ¬´Ko …óun wa…ói si mi wi'ay on, kala junuubu maa hoyre yaafante yim…ìe …ìen, kono hoyre hoynu…óo Ruuhu Alla on yaafetaake few.
12.32: Kala wowlu…óo ∆Åii-Aaden on ko boni, no ara ka yaafanee. Kono kala wowlu…óo *Ruuhu Senii…óo on ko boni, o yaafantaake e oo aduna fewndii…óo …óoo, e aroyoowo on kadi.¬ª Misal ∆≥ettaangal e Leggal e ∆Åi…ì…ìe Mun (Luk. 6.43-45)
12.33: ¬´Si leggal no mo∆¥∆¥i, haray …ìi…ì…ìe maggal on no mo∆¥∆¥i. Si leggal mo∆¥∆¥aa, haray …ìi…ì…ìe maggal on mo∆¥∆¥aa. Ko fii leggal kala no anditiree …ìi…ì…ìe mun …ìen.
12.34: Ko onon yo iwdi kuura! Ko honno wowlirton ko mo∆¥∆¥i, hara ko on bon…ìe? Ko fii ko ko heewi e …ìernde woo hunduko wowlata.
12.35: Ne…ó…óo mo∆¥∆¥o on yaltinay mo∆¥∆¥ere ka mo∆¥∆¥uki mun, ne…ó…óo bon…óo on kadi yaltina bonki ka bonki mun.
12.36: Awa mi andinii on, …≤ande …≤aawoore nden yim…ìe …ìen hasborte kala kongu…ói mehi …ói …ìe wowlaynoo.
12.37: Ko fii ko kongu…ói maa …óin …≤aawirte…óaa feewu…óo maa bon…óo.¬ª Fii no Iisaa Tororaa Wa…óugol Maande (Mrk. 8.11-12; Luk. 11.29-32)
12.38: Onsay wo…ì…ìe e jannoo…ìe fii Sariya on e Fariisiyaa…ìe …ìen ∆¥etti haala kan, wi'i: ¬´Karamoko, me…óen faalaa yo a wa…óan men maande hawniinde, men yi'a.¬ª
12.39: O jaabii …ìe, o wi'i: ¬´Jamaanu bonngu jinoowu no …óa…ì…ìa maande, kono ngu jonnetaake maande si hinaa sifa ndee nde annabi Yuunusa.
12.40: Ko fii ko wano Yuunusa wonirnoo ka nder reedu lingii njanii ngin non bal…óe tati , ko wano non ∆Åii-Aaden on wonirta ka nder leydi bal…óe tati.
12.41: Awa kadi …≤ande …≤aawoore nden, nde yim…ìe nguu jamaanu …óoo no …≤aawee woo, yim…ìe *Niinawa …ìen kadi immoyto, …≤aawoya …ìe sabu kon ko …ìe he…óinoo ngun waaju Yuunusa, …ìe tuubi, hara-le …ìur…óo Yuunusa no …óoo.
12.42: ∆ùande …≤aawoore nden, nde yim…ìe nguu jamaanu …óoo no …≤aawee woo, onsay oo debbo laaminoo…óo ndii leydi hikkorndi ka sengo …≤aamo immoyto, …≤aawoya …ìe sabu iwugol mo haa ka kattudi ley…óe, ara he…óitoo ngun faamu Sulaymaana, hara-le …ìur…óo Sulaymaana no …óoo.
12.43: ¬´Nde jinnawii yalti e ne…ó…óo woo, ngii hammiray ka wulaa, hara hingii …óa…ì…ìa nokkuure fowtorde. Si ngii tawii ngii he…ìaali,
12.44: ngii wi'ay: ‚ÄπYo mi yiltito ka suudu ka mi iwnoo …óon.‚Ä∫ Nde ngii hewtiti, ngii tawa ndun suudu fittaama la…ì…ìinaama.
12.45: Onsay ngii yahay, ngii …óa…ì…ìoya jinnaaji jee…ói…ói …ìur…ói ngii hun∆¥ude, …ói naata …óon, …ói ho…óa. Onsay sakkitorde on ne…ó…óo …ìuray aranun …óun bonude. Ko wano non woniranta nguu jamaanu bonngu.¬ª Fii ∆Åeynguure Iisaa nden (Mrk. 3.31-35; Luk. 8.19-21)
12.46: E nder ko Iisaa yewtata jamaa on kon, tawi yumma makko e yumma-gootoo…ìe makko …ìen no darii ka yaasi, no faalaa yiidude e makko.
12.47: Onsay go…ó…óo wi'i mo: ¬´Yumma mon e yumma-gootoo…ìe mon …ìen no darii ka yaasi, hi…ìe faalaa on yewtude.¬ª
12.48: Kono Iisaa jaabii mo, wi'i: ¬´Ko hombo woni yumma an e ko hom…ìe woni yumma-gootoo…ìe an …ìen?¬ª
12.49: Onsay o sappii taalibaa…ìe makko …ìen, o wi'i: ¬´E hino yumma an e yumma-gootoo…ìe an …ìen.
12.50: Ko fii kala wa…óu…óo faale Ben an Won…óo ka kammu on, haray ko on woni yumma-gooto an on e bandiraawo an on e yumma an.¬ª

13.1: Nden …≤ande Iisaa yalti ka suudu, o joo…óoyii ka daande weendu.
13.2: Hakkee ko jamaa moo…ìinoo…óo takko makko on …óuu…ói, o bakii e laakun, o joo…óii, tawi jamaa on fow ka…≤un no ka daande weendu.
13.3: O yewtiri …ìe piiji buy mise, o wi'i: ¬´Ko remoowo yaltunoo sankugol.
13.4: E nder ko o sankata kon, gabbe goo yani ka …óatal, colli …óin ari mo…ói …óe.
13.5: Go…ó…óe …óen yani e hoore kaa∆¥e, ka leydi …óuu…óaa. ∆äe fu…ói he…≤a sabu …óewlugol leydi ndin.
13.6: ∆Åay naange ngen yaltii, …óe sumi, …óe yoori, sabu angal ka …óa…ói …óin si≈ãoo.
13.7: Go…ó…óe goo kadi yani ka soo∆¥oore, …óe fu…óidi e mayre, soo∆¥oore nden mo…ói …óe.
13.8: Go…ó…óe goo yani ka leydi mo∆¥∆¥iri. ∆äe fu…ói, …óe rimi, cawti goo gabbe teemedere, cawti goo gabbe cappan…óe jeegoo, cawti goo gabbe cappan…óe tati.
13.9: Mo no mari noppi yo nanu!¬ª
13.10: Onsay taalibaa…ìe …ìen …ìadii mo, wi'i: ¬´Ko fii hon…óun yewtiranton …ìe mise?¬ª
13.11: Iisaa jaabii …ìe, wi'i: ¬´Onon on ye…óaama andugol gundooji laamu kammu ngun, kono kam…ìe …ìe ye…óaaka …óun.
13.12: Ko fii ko mar…óo …ìeydantee haa …óuu…óa, kono mo maraa on ja…ìitante hay yeru ko o mari kon.
13.13: Ko wa…ói si mi…óo yewtirde …ìe mise, ko …ìay hi…ìe ndaara, kono …ìe yi'ataa, hi…ìe jentoo, kono …ìe nanataa, …ìe faamataa.
13.14: Fii ko Alla longinnoo Isaaya kon no laatora e ma…ì…ìe, wonde: ‚ÄπPellet hi…óon nana, kono on faamataa few. Pellet hi…óon ndaara, kono on yi'ataa few.
13.15: Ko fii …óee …ìer…óe oo jamaa wonii yooru…óe. ∆Åe uddii noppi ma…ì…ìe …óin, awa kadi …ìe ombii gite …óen, sakko …ìe yiira gite ma…ì…ìe …óen, maa …ìe nanira noppi ma…ì…ìe …óin, maa …ìe faamira …ìer…óe ma…ì…ìe …óen, haa …ìe tuuba, mi sellina …ìe.‚Ä∫
13.16: ¬´Onon non, gite mon …óen malii ko fii hi…óe yi'ude, noppi mon …óin malii ko fii hi…ói nanude.
13.17: Ko fii ka haqiiqa mi andinii on, annabaa…ìe e feewu…ìe buy faalano yi'ude koo ko won…óon yi'ude, kono …ìe yi'aali. ∆Åe faalano kadi nanude koo ko won…óon nanude, kono …ìe nanaali.
13.18: ¬´Kono onon, he…óee firo ngal misal remoowo on.
13.19: Nde go…ó…óo he…óii daalol *laamu Alla ngun, ronki ngol faamude, bon…óo on aray, itta ko aawaa kon ka …ìernde makko. ∆äun no wa'i wa nde awdi sankaandi ndin saami ka …óatal.
13.20: Nde awdi sankaandi ndin saami ka kaa∆¥e, …óun no wa'i wa nde go…ó…óo nani daalol ngol, o ja…ìa ngol he…≤a e nder weltaare.
13.21: Kono o alaa …óa…ói, ko fii hinaa o tabitu…óo. Nde satteendeeji maa cukkeede aroyi sabu jokkugol makko daalol ngol, o tertoto kisan.
13.22: Nde awdi sankaandi ndin saami ka soo∆¥oore, …óun no wa'i wa nde go…ó…óo nani daalol ngol, hara ngol rimataa e makko ko fii haray ngol mo…óiraama anndeeji aduna e …óayniro jawle.
13.23: Nde awdi sankaandi ndin saami ka leydi mo∆¥∆¥iri, …óun no wa'i wa nde go…ó…óo nani daalol ngol, faami, ngol rimi e makko, wo…ì…ìe …ìen laabi teemedere, wo…ì…ìe …ìen laabi cappan…óe jeegoo, …ìeya …ìen laabi cappan…óe tati.¬ª Misal ∆≥ettaangal e Ga…≤o Sankoowo Kenkesama
13.24: Iisaa addani …ìe misal goo kadi, o wi'i …ìe: ¬´Laamu kammu ngun no wa'i wa nde aaden sanki awdi mo∆¥∆¥iri e ngesa mun.
13.25: Kono wa ko yim…ìe …ìen …óaanii, ga…≤o makko on ari, sanki kenkesama ka ngesa makko ngawri, o yahi.
13.26: ∆Åay wonii ngawri ndin fu…óii haa mawnii sawtii, kenkesama on kadi yaltiti.
13.27: ¬´Kurkaaduu…ìe jom suudu ndun ari, wi'i mo: ‚ÄπJom amen, e hinaa awdi mo∆¥∆¥iri sanku…óon ka ngesa mon? E hara ko honto oo kenkesama iwri?‚Ä∫
13.28: ¬´O jaabii …ìe, o wi'i: ‚ÄπKo ga…≤o wa…ói …óun.‚Ä∫ ¬´Onsay kurkaaduu…ìe …ìen wi'i mo: ‚ÄπHi…óon faalaa yo men yahu men …ìoroya …óun?‚Ä∫
13.29: ¬´O jaabii …ìe: ‚ÄπOo'o, fii wota on …ìoror ngawri ndin nde hi…óon …ìora kenkesama on.
13.30: Accee …ói njan…óida haa ka baagol. Si baagol ngol fewndike, mi wi'ay wa'oo…ìe …ìen yo …ìe …ìoru taho kenkesama on, …ìe ha…ì…ìira ba'e ba'e fii ko sunnee, …ìe moo…ìa ngawri ndin ka tumusuuje an.‚Ä∫ ¬ª Misal ∆≥ettaangal e Abbere Bene (Mrk. 4.30-32; Luk. 13.18-19)
13.31: Iisaa addani …ìe misal goo kadi, o wi'i …ìe: ¬´Laamu kammu ngun no wa'i wa abbere bene, nde go…ó…óo ∆¥etti, aawi e ngesa mun.
13.32: Pellet, ko nden …ìuri fan…óude e ko aawetee kon fow, kono nde nde fu…ói, haray ko nden …ìuri mawnude kala ko tutetee e naakoo, nde wonta leggal haa ka tawata colli …óin ka weeyo aray, ho…óa e cal…ói maggal on.¬ª Misal ∆≥ettaangal e Lewen (Luk. 13.20-21)
13.33: Iisaa addani …ìe ngal misal …óoo kadi, o wi'i …ìe: ¬´Laamu kammu ngun no wa'i wa lewen mo debbo ∆¥etti, jillindiri e sariyaare tati condi farin, o piya …óun, on lewen wona sabu …óun fow ∆¥ura.¬ª
13.34: Iisaa yewtiri …óun jamaa on mise. O yewtirtaano …ìe si wonaa mise,
13.35: fii no ko daaliranoo annabaajo on kon laatora, wonde: ¬´Mi udditay hunduko an kon fii yewtirgol mise, mi fe…≤…≤ina piiji suu…óinoo…ói gila ka fu…ó…óoode.¬ª Firo Misal ∆≥ettaangal e Kenkesama
13.36: Onsay Iisaa acci …óon jamaa on, o naati ka suudu. Taalibaa…ìe makko …ìen …ìadii mo, …ìe wi'i: ¬´Sifanee men ngal misal kenkesama ka ngesa.¬ª
13.37: O jaabii …ìe, o wi'i: ¬´Sanku…óo awdi mo∆¥∆¥iri on ko *∆Åii-Aaden on.
13.38: Ngesa mban ko aduna on. Awdi mo∆¥∆¥iri ndin, ko …ìen woni …ìi…ì…ìe laamateeri ndin. Kenkesama on non ko …ìen woni …ìi…ì…ìe bon…óo on.
13.39: Ga…≤o sanku…óo kenkesama on, ko on woni Ibuliisa. Baagol ngol non ko lannoode aduna on, wa'oo…ìe …ìen ko …ìen woni malaa'ikaa…ìe …ìen.
13.40: Wano kenkesama on …ìorirtee non fii bugegol ka yiite, ko non woniroyta nde aduna on lanni.
13.41: ∆Åii-Aaden on imminoyay malaa'ikaa…ìe mun …ìen ko suuta e nder laamateeri makko ndin fegginay…ìe …ìen fow e wa…óoo…ìe ko boni …ìen,
13.42: …ìe bugoo …ìe ka nder beembal yiite ka wullaandu e ≈ãatindiro …≤ii∆¥e woni ton.
13.43: Kono feewu…ìe …ìen jalbiroyay wa naange ka nder laamateeri Ben ma…ì…ìe. Mo no mari noppi, yo nanu!¬ª Mise E…ì…ìindiraa…óe e Laamu Alla ngun
13.44: Iisaa wi'i kadi: ¬´Laamu kammu ngun no wa'i wa keyee suu…óii…óo e nder ngesa mo ne…ó…óo goo arata yi'a suu…óa. E nder weltaare makko nden o yaha, o yeeya kala ko o jogii, o sooda mban ngesa.
13.45: ¬´Laamu kammu ngun no wa'i kadi wa njulaajo won…óo …óa…ì…ìude lambiri.
13.46: ∆Åay o yi'ii satta-cogguure, o yahi, o yeeyiti kala ko o jeynoo, o soodi nde.
13.47: ¬´Laamu kammu ngun no wa'i kadi wa *jalaaji bugaa…ói e nder maayo, moo…ìi noone li∆¥∆¥i fow.
13.48: ∆Åay …ói heewii, …ói poo…óaa ka pencen, joo…óaa. Mo∆¥∆¥i …óin ∆¥ettaa wattaa ka miranji, bon…ói …óin bugaa.
13.49: Ko non kadi woniroyta nde aduna on lanni. Malaa'ikaa…ìe …ìen yahoyay sendindira bon…ìe …ìen e mo∆¥∆¥u…ìe …ìen.
13.50: ∆Åe bugoo bon…ìe …ìen ka beembal yiite ka wullaandu e ≈ãatindiro …≤ii∆¥e woni ton.
13.52: O wi'i …ìe kadi: ¬´Ko …óun wa…ói, kala jannoowo jamaa on fii Sariya on, si no jannaa fii laamu kammu ngun, no wa'i wa nde jom suudu no yaltina e nder marga mun keyeeji kesi e ki…ó…ói.¬ª
13.53: ∆Åay wonii Iisaa gaynii …óee mise, o iwi …óon. Fii no …ìe Naasirata …ìen Yawori Iisaa (Mrk. 6.1-6; Luk. 4.16-30)
13.54: Iisaa yahi ka o ne'aa …óon, …óun ko Naasirata, o woni e waajagol ka nder juulirde ma…ì…ìe. ∆äun ≈ãal…óini …ìe haa …ìe wi'i: ¬´Ko honto nguu faamu e …óii kaawakeeji mo∆¥∆¥i iwrani mo?
13.55: E hinaa …ìi…ó…óo minisiyeejo on nii? Hinaa yumma makko wi'etee Mariyama? E hara neene-gootoo…ìe makko …ìen hinaa Yaaquuba e Yuusufu e Sim'uunu e Yuudu?
13.56: E hinaa bandiraa…ìe makko …ìen fow no wondi e men? E hara ko honto …óun fow iwrani mo?¬ª
13.57: ∆äun ha…ói …ìe gom…óingol mo. Kono Iisaa wi'i …ìe: ¬´Annabaajo ko ka leydi mun tun e ka …ìeynguure mun yawaa.¬ª
13.58: Laatii o wa…óaali …óon kaawakeeji mo∆¥∆¥i buy sabu angal gom…óinal ma…ì…ìe ngal.

14.1: Ko e on saa'i …óon, *Heroodu lan…óo diiwal Jaliilu ngal nani fii Iisaa no wowlee.
14.2: O wi'i kurkaaduu…ìe makko …ìen: ¬´Ko Yaayaa lootaynoo…óo maande tuubuubuyee on nii! O immitike e hakkunde may…ìe …ìen! Ko …óun wa…ói si himo mari bawgal wa…óugol kaawakeeji mo∆¥∆¥i!¬ª
14.3: Ko Heroodu wi'irnoo …óun ko …ìay hari o nangiino Yaayaa, o jolkii mo, o wa…óii e kaso sabu oo debbo wi'etee…óo Heroodiiya, …ìeyngu Filiipu, yumma-gooto makko on nun kanko Heroodu,
14.4: ko fii hari Yaayaa wi'ii mo kanko Heroodu wonde daganaaki mo ka o ∆¥etta on debbo.
14.5: O faalaa mo warude, kono o huli jamaa on, ko fii hari hi…ìe jogori Yaayaa wa annabaajo.
14.6: Kono e nder …≤alaande anditugol jibineede makko nden kanko Heroodu, jiwo Heroodiiya on ami e hakkunde saatinaa…ìe …ìen. ∆äun weli Heroodu
14.7: haa o fodi on jiwo e hoore woondoore wonde o wa…óanay mo kala ko o torii mo fewndo …óon.
14.8: Tippude e ko yumma makko kanko jiwo on lowi mo kon, on jiwo wi'i: ¬´Jonnan …óoo hoore Yaayaa lootoowo maande tuubuubuyee on nden, hara hinde tumbaa e miran.¬ª
14.9: Onsay lan…óo on aani. Kono sabu woondooje makko …óen, e …ìe o saatinnoo …ìen, o yamiri yo nde jonne mo.
14.10: O immini ko ta∆¥oya hoore Yaayaa nden ka kaso,
14.11: nde addaa e miran, …óun jonnaa jiwo on, kanko kadi o na…ìani nde yumma makko.
14.12: Onsay taalibaa…ìe Yaayaa …ìen ari, ∆¥etti furee makko on, surroyi. ∆Åe yahi, …ìe humpitoyi Iisaa. Fii no Iisaa ∆ùamminiri Yim…ìe Guluuje Njowo (Mrk. 6.30-44; Luk. 9.10-17; Yhn. 6.1-14)
14.13: ∆Åay Iisaa nanii …óun, o iwi …óon e laana ndiyan, kanko tun o yahi e nokkuure wul…óinnde. Jamaa on humpitii …óun, …ìe iwi ka ca'e, …ìe seppi, …ìe jokki mo.
14.14: ∆Åay o iwii ka laana, o yi'i jamaa moolanaa…óo, o yurmaa …ìe, o …≤awndi …≤aw…ìe wonnoo…ìe …óon …ìen.
14.15: ∆Åay ni…ì…ìii, taalibaa…ìe …ìen …ìadii mo, wi'i: ¬´∆äoo ko nokkuure wul…óinnde nii, …≤allal ngal poo…óike. Accitee jamaa on, …ìe yaha ka ko…óooli, …ìe …óa…ì…ìa ko …ìe …≤aama.¬ª
14.16: Iisaa jaabii …ìe, wi'i: ¬´Jaraa ka …ìe yaha. Onon tigi okkoree …ìe ko …ìe …≤aama.¬ª
14.17: Kono …ìe wi'i mo: ¬´Ko bireediije jowi e li∆¥∆¥i …ói…ói pet men mari …óoo!¬ª
14.19: Onsay o yamiri jamaaji …óin yo …ìe joo…óo ka hu…óo. O ∆¥etti bireediije …óen jowi e li∆¥∆¥i …óin …ói…ói, o …ìanti gite …óen, o fewtini ka kammu. O du'ii, o ta∆¥iti bireedi on, o jonni taalibaa…ìe …ìen, taalibaa…ìe …ìen hewtini jamaa on.
14.20: Fow …≤aami haa haari. ∆Åe moo…ìiti debeeje sappoo e …ói…ói tew kunte ko lutti.
14.21: Tawi …ìen …≤aamu…ìe ko wa …ìe wor…ìe guluuje njowo, hara rew…ìe e fay…ìe lintaaka. Fii no Iisaa Seppiri ka hoore Ndiyan (Mrk. 6.45-52; Yhn. 6.16-21)
14.22: ∆Åawto …óun kisan, Iisaa yamiri taalibaa…ìe mun …ìen yo …ìe bako ka laana, …ìe hikkoo yeeso makko, …ìe lumba ga…óa fewndo o yiltata jamaa on.
14.23: ∆Åay wonii o yiltii …ìe, o ∆¥awi ka fello fii juulugol toroo ka weddii. ∆Åay ni…ì…ìii, tawi ko kanko tun woni …óon.
14.24: Tawi laana kan wo…ó…óitorii leydi ndin wa palan…óe teeme…ó…óe, awa kadi morloo…óe ndiyan …óan no piyaade e makka, ko fii hari hika tiindondiri e hendu ndun.
14.25: Ka subaka, Iisaa sutori e ma…ì…ìe, himo seppa ka hoore ndiyan.
14.26: ∆Åay taalibaa…ìe …ìen yi'ii himo seppa ka hoore ndiyan, …ìe huli, …ìe wi'i: ¬´Ko mbeelu!¬ª E nder kulol ma…ì…ìe ngol …ìe sonki.
14.27: Iisaa wi'i …ìe kisan: ¬´Hoolee, ko min nii! Wota on hulu!¬ª
14.28: Onsay Petruusu jaabii mo, wi'i: ¬´Si tawii ko onon, yo Koohoojo, yamiree lan yo mi rewu ka hoore ndiyan, mi yaha ka won…óon ton.¬ª
14.29: Iisaa wi'i mo: ¬´Aru!¬ª Onsay Petruusu tippii ka laana, o seppi ka hoore ndiyan, o yahi fottoygol e Iisaa.
14.30: Kono …ìay o yi'ii ko hendu ndun tii…ói kon, o huli. Tun o fu…ó…óii mutude, o sonki, o wi'i: ¬´Dandee lan, yo Koohoojo!¬ª
14.31: Iisaa fonti jungo mun ngon, nangi mo, o wi'i: ¬´Ko an yo fan…óa-gom…óinaljo, ko hon…óun sikkitanto…óaa?¬ª
14.32: Onsay …ìe ∆¥awi ka laana, hendu ndun de∆¥∆¥iti.
14.33: Wonnoo…ìe ka laana …ìen sujjani mo, wi'i: ¬´Ka haqiiqa, ko a *∆Åi…ó…óo Alla!¬ª
14.34: ∆Åay …ìe gaynii lumbude weendu ndun, …ìe hewti Jaani-Saarata.
14.35: Yim…ìe nden nokkuure anditi Iisaa, …ìe nuli e ba≈ã≈ãeeji …óon …óin fow. ∆Åe addani mo …≤aw…ìe …ìen fow,
14.36: …ìe jeeji mo yo o newnan …ìe tun …ìe meema kombol dolokke makko on, onsay meemunoo…ìe mo …ìen fow ndikki.

15.1: Onsay *Fariisiyaa…ìe e jannoo…ìe fii Sariya on iwri Yerusalaam, ari tawi Iisaa, …ìe landii mo, …ìe wi'i:
15.2: ¬´Ko fii hon…óun taalibaa…ìe maa …ìen jaggitanta naamuuji maw…ìe …ìen? Ko fii …ìe soo…óotaako nde hi…ìe …≤aama.¬ª
15.3: O jaabii …ìe, o wi'i: ¬´Onon non ko hon…óun jaggitanton yamirooje Alla …óen sabu naamuuji mon …óin?
15.4: Ko fii Allaahu on no daali: ‚ÄπTeddin yumma maa e ben maa‚Ä∫, awa kadi: ‚Äπon mo hu…ói ben mun maa yumma mun donkinirte mayde.‚Ä∫
15.5: Kono onon, hi…óon wi'a wonde kala wi'u…óo ben mun maa yumma mun: ‚Äπmi ye…óii Alla ko mi nafiraynoo on kon‚Ä∫,
15.6: haray fawaaki ontigi wallugol ben mun maa yumma mun. Si ko nii, haray on mehin…óinii daaluyee Alla on sabu naamu mon on.
15.7: Ko onon yo faasiqii…ìe, Isaaya no haalunoo ko Alla longini mo fii mon mo∆¥∆¥a, o wi'i:
15.8: ‚ÄπOo jamaa ko ka toni mun woni lan mawninde, kono …ìer…óe ma…ì…ìe …óen no wo…ó…óondiri e an fota.
15.9: Ko e nder meere …ìe woni lan rewude, janndeeji …ói …ìe woni jannude …óin ko …ói yim…ìe …ìen sinci.‚Ä∫ ¬ª
15.10: Onsay Iisaa noddi jamaa on e makko, o wi'i …ìe: ¬´He…óee, faamon.
15.11: Hinaa ko naatiri ka hunduko tuuninta ne…ó…óo, kono ko ko yaltirta ka hunduko kon tuuninta ne…ó…óo.¬ª
15.12: Onsay taalibaa…ìe makko …ìen …ìadii mo, wi'i: ¬´Hi…óon andi Fariisiyaa…ìe …ìen mettinii sabu nanugol ngol kongol?¬ª
15.13: O jaabii …ìe, o wi'i: ¬´Kala ko tutaa, ko tawi hinaa Ben an Kammuyankeejo on tuti, …ìorete.
15.14: Tertee …ìe, ko bum…ìe woni …óowude bum…ìe. Si bun…óo non …óowii bun…óo, …ìe …ói…óoo non …ìe yanay e nder ngayka.¬ª
15.15: Petruusu ∆¥etti haala kan, wi'i: ¬´Sifanee men fii ngal misal.¬ª
15.16: Iisaa wi'i mo: ¬´E onon kadi haa jooni ko on …ìe alaa faamu?
15.17: E on andaa kala ko naati ka hunduko ko ka nder reedu yahata, …ìawto …óun hawkoyee ka weddii?
15.18: Kono ko yaltiri ka hunduko kon ko ka …ìernde iwri, e ko …óun-le tuuninta ne…ó…óo.
15.19: Ko fii, ko e nder …ìernde ne…ó…óo miijooji bon…ói yaltata, ka…≤un e waru-hoore e jinaa e cagayaagal e nguyka e seeditagol fenaande e hoyre.
15.20: Ko …óun woni ko tuuninta ne…ó…óo. Kono …≤aamugol hara soo…óaaki, …óun tuunintaa ne…ó…óo.¬ª Fii no Debbo Kanaaniyankeejo on Gom…óiniri (Mrk. 7.24-30)
15.21: ∆Åay Iisaa iwii e nden nokkuure, o yahi e ndii leydi …óee ca'e Tiiri e Siduuna.
15.22: Tun, debbo Kanaaniyankeejo ho…óu…óo …óon ari tawi mo, no ewnoo, wi'a: ¬´Koohoojo, …ìii Daawuuda, yurminee lan! Jinna no tampini jiwo an on no hawnori!¬ª
15.23: Laatii kanko Iisaa o jaabaaki mo hay kongol. Taalibaa…ìe makko …ìen …ìadii mo, wi'i: ¬´Yiltee oo debbo, ko fii himo sonkude …ìaawo men.¬ª
15.24: O jaabii, o wi'i: ¬´Ko fii ko baali suudu Isra'iila majju…ói …óin tun mi addiraa.¬ª
15.25: Kono kanko debbo on o ari, o jiccii yeeso makko e hoore himo wi'a: ¬´Koohoojo, faabee lan!¬ª
15.26: O jaabii debbo on, o wi'i: ¬´Mo∆¥∆¥aa ka bireedi paykoy koy ∆¥ettee, buganee bareeji …óin.¬ª
15.27: Debbo on jaabii: ¬´Hiiyii, Koohoojo, kono hay bareeji …óin …≤aamay ko iwata ka taabal jom majji, saama kon.¬ª
15.28: Onsay Iisaa jaabii mo, wi'i: ¬´Debbo, gom…óinal maa ngal no tii…ói. Yo wonirane no faalira…óaa non.¬ª E on saa'i tigi jiwo makko on ndikki. Fii no Iisaa ∆ùamminiri Yim…ìe Guluuje Nayo (Mrk. 8.1-10)
15.29: ∆Åay fe∆¥∆¥ii e …óun, Iisaa iwi e nden nokkuure, o takkii sera *Weendu Jaliilu ndun. O ∆¥awoyi …óon e fello, o joo…óii.
15.30: Jamaa moolanaa…óo kadi …ìadii mo, wondude e boofoo…ìe e bum…ìe e la∆¥oo…ìe e pahi…óu…ìe-mbobi…ói e …≤aw…ìe goo buy. ∆Åe wallini …ìen e ley koy…óe makko, o sellini …ìe.
15.31: ∆Åay jamaa on yi'ii pahi…óu…ìe-mbobi…ói …ìen wowlii, la∆¥oo…ìe …ìen kadi hettii cellal, boofoo…ìe …ìen yahii, bum…ìe …ìen yi'ii, …ìe ≈ãal…ói, …ìe mawnini Alla Isra'iilayankee…ìe …ìen.
15.32: Onsay Iisaa noddi taalibaa…ìe mun …ìen, o wi'i: ¬´Oo jamaa no yurmammi, wonii nii bal…óe tati hi…ìe wondi e an, …ìe alaa ko …ìe …≤aama. Mi faalaaka …ìe yiltude hi…ìe weelaa, sakko …ìe lo'a ka laawol.¬ª
15.33: Kono taalibaa…ìe …ìen wi'i mo: ¬´Ko honto men he…ìata bireedi ko yonata oo jamaa …óoo fow e ndee nokkuure wul…óinnde?¬ª
15.34: Iisaa landii …ìe, wi'i: ¬´Ko bireediije jelu mar…óon?¬ª ∆Åe jaabii mo, …ìe wi'i: ¬´Ko bireediije jee…ói…ói e likkoy tosokoy see…óa.¬ª
15.35: Onsay o torii jamaa on joo…óagol ka leydi.
15.36: ∆Åay o ∆¥ettii bireediije …óen jee…ói…ói e li∆¥∆¥i …óin, o jarnii Alla, o ta∆¥iti, o woni e jonnugol taalibaa…ìe makko …ìen, taalibaa…ìe …ìen kadi hewtini jamaa on.
15.37: Fow …≤aami haa haari, moo…ìitaa debeeje jee…ói…ói tew ko lutti.
15.38: Tawi …ìen …≤aamu…ìe ko …ìe wor…ìe guluuje nayo, hara rew…ìe e fay…ìe lintaaka.
15.39: ∆Åawto …óun o yilti jamaa on, o bakii e laana, o yahi e ndii leydi Magaduuna.

16.1: Onsay *Fariisiyaa…ìe …ìen e *Sadduusiyaa…ìe …ìen …ìadii mo kanko Iisaa fii ndarndagol mo, …ìe torii mo yo o hollu …ìe maande iwrunde ka kammu.
16.2: Iisaa jaabii …ìe, wi'i: ¬´Kiikii…óe on wi'ay: ‚ÄπYaasi on hentoto, fii ko kammu ngun wojji kon.‚Ä∫
16.3: Bimbi kadi wi'on: ‚ÄπHande wundinay, ko fii kammu ngun no wojji …ìawli.‚Ä∫ Hi…óon waawi faamude fii ko fee…≤i ka kammu kon, kono on waawataa faamude fii maandeeji saa'iiji …óin?
16.4: Jamaanu bonngu jinoowu no …óa…ì…ìa maande, kono ngu jonnetaake maande goo, si hinaa sifa ndee nde Yuunusa.¬ª Onsay o acci …ìe …óon, o yahi. Fii ‚ÄπLewen‚Ä∫ Fariisiyaa…ìe …ìen e Sadduusiyaa…ìe …ìen (Mrk. 8.14-21)
16.6: Iisaa wi'i …ìe: ¬´Reenee fota e lewen Fariisiyaa…ìe …ìen e Sadduusiyaa…ìe …ìen!¬ª
16.7: Taalibaa…ìe …ìen wi'indiri: ¬´Ko o wi'iri …óun, ko fii en ∆¥ettaali bireedi.¬ª
16.8: ∆Åay Iisaa andii …óun, o wi'i …ìe: ¬´Ko fii hon…óun wi'an…óon …óun, onon …ìee fan…óa-gom…óinal…ìe? Ko fii on ∆¥ettaali bireedi?
16.9: Jaka on faamaali haa jooni, on anditaali fii bireediije jowi senditananoo…óe wor…ìe guluuje njowo …óen, e ko debeeje jelu artirno…óon ko lutti?
16.10: E bireediije …óen jee…ói…ói senditananoo…óe wor…ìe guluuje nayo …óen, e yeru debeeje ko artirno…óon ko lutti?
16.11: Ko honno woniri on faamaali wonde hinaa fii bireedi mi wowlani on? Kono reenee e lewen Fariisiyaa…ìe …ìen e Sadduusiyaa…ìe …ìen!¬ª
16.12: Onsay …ìe faami ko o inni yo …ìe reeno, ko e jannde Fariisiyaa…ìe …ìen e Sadduusiyaa…ìe …ìen, hinaa e lewen wa…óetee…óo e bireedi. Fii Qirritannde Petruusu nden (Mrk. 8.27-30; Luk. 9.18-21)
16.13: Nde Iisaa naatunoo Seezariiya-Filiipu, o landii taalibaa…ìe makko …ìen ngal landal …óoo, o wi'i: ¬´E wi'i yim…ìe …ìen, ko hombo woni *∆Åii-Aaden on?¬ª
16.14: ∆Åe jaabii mo, …ìe wi'i: ¬´Wo…ì…ìe no wi'a ko onon woni Yaayaa lootaynoo…óo on, wo…ì…ìe kadi no wi'a ko onon woni Iiliiya, wo…ì…ìe goo kadi no wi'a ko onon woni Yeremiiya maa go…ó…óo goo e annabaa…ìe …ìen.¬ª
16.15: O wi'i …ìe: ¬´Onon non wi'u…óon ko hombo woni lan min?¬ª
16.16: Sim'uunu Petruusu jaabii mo wi'i: ¬´Ko onon woni *Almasiihu on, on *∆Åi…ó…óo Alla Wuuru…óo on!¬ª
16.17: Iisaa ∆¥ettiti haala kan, wi'i mo: ¬´A malii, yo Sim'uunu mo Yuunusa, ko fii hinaa …ìandu e ∆¥ii∆¥an fe…≤…≤inan-maa …óun, kono ko Ben an, on Won…óo ka kammu.
16.18: Min non mi wi'ii an Petruusu, ko a fetere. Ko e hoore ndee fetere mi darnata *moftal an ngal, hay doole jahannama foolataa ngal.
16.19: Awa kadi mi jonnoyte saabiije laamateeri kammu ngun: ko to≈ãu…óaa ka leydi woo haray to≈ãaama ka kammu, ko ja…ìu…óaa ka leydi woo haray ja…ìaama ka kammu.¬ª
16.20: Onsay o yamiri taalibaa…ìe …ìen, o tentini, wota …ìe wowlan hay gooto wonde ko kanko woni Almasiihu on. Fii Tampereeji Iisaa …óin e Artugol makko ngol (Mrk. 8.31-9.1; Luk. 9.22-27)
16.21: Gila nden …≤ande, Iisaa fu…ó…óii hollude taalibaa…ìe mun …ìen wonde ko bee o yaha Yerusalaam, o tampinoyee fota immorde e maw…ìe …ìen e hooree…ìe *yottinoo…ìe sadaka …ìen e jannoo…ìe fii Sariya on …ìen, o waree, o immintinoyee ka …≤alaande tammere.
16.22: Onsay Petruusu pottini mo sera, o woni mo e felugol wi'a: ¬´Yo Allaahu on reenu on, yo Koohoojo, hara …óun hewtaali on!¬ª
16.23: Kono Iisaa ye∆¥∆¥itii, wi'i Petruusu: ¬´Yilto …ìaawo an, yo Ibuliisa, …ìay an ko a fegginoowo lan! Ko fii miijooji maa …óin hinaa …ói Alla, kono ko …ói yim…ìe …ìen!¬ª
16.24: Onsay Iisaa wi'i taalibaa…ìe mun …ìen: ¬´Kala faalaa…óo jokkude lan, yo o hayfintino, o ∆¥etta *leggal makko altindiraangal ngal, o jokkammi.
16.25: Kala faalaa…óo dandude ngurndan mun, …óan hayriray mo, kono kala non mo ngurndan mun hayriraa sabu an min, o hettay …óan.
16.26: E ko nafa hon…óun woodani ne…ó…óo he…ìugol aduna on fow, hayra wonkii mun kin? Maa ko hon…óun ne…ó…óo ittata fii sottugol wonkii mun kin?
16.27: Ko fii ∆Åii-Aaden on ardoyay e mangural Ben mun ngal, wondude e malaa'ikaa…ìe mun …ìen, o jonnita mo kala njoddi kuu…óe mun.
16.28: Ka haqiiqa mi andinii on, no woodi wo…ì…ìe e mon onon won…ìe …óoo …ìen, …ìe maayataa ado …ìe yi'ude ∆Åii-Aaden on no arda e laamu mun ngun.¬ª

17.1: Bal…óe jeegoo …ìawto …óun, Iisaa ∆¥etti Petruusu e Yaaquuba e Yuuhanna neene-gooto Yaaquuba on, o na…ìi …ìe kam…ìe tun e hoore fello toowungo.
17.2: Mbaadi makko ndin waylii yeeso ma…ì…ìe, yeeso makko ngon jalbiri wa naange, conci makko …óin kadi rawniri wa ndaygu.
17.3: Muusaa e Iiliiya fee…≤ani …ìe, tawi hi…ìe yewtida e makko kanko Iisaa.
17.4: Onsay Petruusu ∆¥etti haala kan, o wi'i Iisaa: ¬´Koohoojo, no mo∆¥∆¥i ka wonen …óoo. Si hi…óon faalaa toode mi darnay …óoo togooji tati, onon wonndu, Muusaa wonndu, Iiliiya kadi wonndu.¬ª
17.5: Wa fewndo ko o wowlata …óun, duulere jalbunde tippii buumi …ìe. Onsay hawa yalti ka duulere, wi'i: ¬´Oo …óoo ko ∆Åi…ó…óo an yi…óaa…óo, mo mi weltori on. He…óitee mo!¬ª
17.6: ∆Åay wonii kam…ìe taalibaa…ìe …ìen …ìe nanii …óun, …ìe he…ìi kulol tii…óungol, …ìe suuyi, …ìe sujji.
17.7: Kono Iisaa …ìadii, meemi …ìe, o wi'i: ¬´Immee! Wota on hulu!¬ª
17.8: Onsay …ìe …ìanti gite …óen, …ìe tawi …ìe yi'itaali hay gooto, si hinaa Iisaa tun.
17.9: E nder ko …ìe tippotoo kon ka fello, Iisaa yamiri …ìe, wi'i: ¬´Wota on wowlan hay gooto fii ko yi'u…óon kon, haa nde *∆Åii-Aaden on immintinaa e hakkunde may…ìe …ìen woo.¬ª
17.10: Onsay taalibaa…ìe …ìen landii mo, …ìe wi'i: ¬´Ko fii hon…óun jannoo…ìe fii Sariya on …ìen wi'anta wonde ko Iiliiya haani arude taho?¬ª
17.11: O jaabii …ìe, o wi'i: ¬´Ko goonga Iiliiya aray, wattitoo fow.
17.12: Kono mi andinii on Iiliiya ariino, kono …ìe anditaali mo, …ìe wa…óiri mo no …ìe faaliraa non. Ko wano non kadi …ìe tampinirta ∆Åii-Aaden on.¬ª
17.13: Onsay taalibaa…ìe …ìen faami wonde ko fii Yaayaa lootaynoo…óo maande tuubuubuyee on o yewti …ìe. Fii no Paykun Jinnaakun Selliniraa (Mrk. 9.14-29; Luk. 9.37-43)
17.14: ∆Åay wonii …ìe hewtii takko jamaa on, onsay gorko goo ari jiccii yeeso Iisaa, o wi'i:
17.15: ¬´Koohoojo, yurminee …ìi…ó…óo an on. Ko o iirotoo…óo, himo tampi fota. Soono woo o yanay ka yiite e ka ndiyan.
17.16: Mi addii mo ka taalibaa…ìe mon …ìen, kono …ìe waawaali mo …≤awndude.¬ª
17.17: Iisaa jaabii, wi'i: ¬´Onon ko on jamaanu …ìoyliingu ngu gom…óinaa. Ko haa honde tuma mi wondata e mon? E ko haa honde tuma mi mu…≤…≤antoo on? Addanee lan mo …óoo.¬ª
17.18: Iisaa to≈ãani jinnawii ngin, ngii yalti e paykun kun, kun ndikki e on saa'i tigi.
17.19: Onsay taalibaa…ìe …ìen gundii Iisaa, wi'i mo: ¬´Ko fii hon…óun menen men waawaali ra…óaade ngii jinnawii?¬ª
17.20: Iisaa jaabii …ìe, wi'i: ¬´Ko sabu ko gom…óinal mon ngal fan…ói kon. Ko fii ka haqiiqa mi andinii on, hay si tawii gom…óinal mon ngal no fota e abbere bene, si on wi'iino ngoo fello: ‚ÄπIwu …óoo!‚Ä∫, ngo iwayno. Harayno hay huunde alaa ko ronkayno…óon.
17.21: Kono sifa ngii jinnawii, ko toraare Alla e hoorugol tun yaltinta ngii.¬ª Fii Mayde Iisaa nden e Ummutal Makko ngal (Mrk. 9.30-32; Luk. 9.43-45)
17.22: ∆ùande goo tawi Iisaa e taalibaa…ìe mun …ìen no mottondiri Jaliilu, o wi'i …ìe: ¬´∆Åii-Aaden on wattete e juu…óe yim…ìe …ìen,
17.23: …ìe wara mo, ka …≤alaande tammere o immintinoyee.¬ª ∆äun aanini …ìe fota. Fii Yo…ìugol Sagalle Juulirde Mawnde nden
17.24: Fewndo ko …ìe naatata Kafernahuum, ∆¥antoo…ìe sagalle fii *juulirde mawnde nden ari, …ìe tawi Petruusu, …ìe landii mo, …ìe wi'i: ¬´E hara karamoko mon yo…ìataa sagalle fii juulirde mawnde nden?¬ª
17.25: Kono o jaabii …ìe, o wi'i: ¬´Oo'o, …ìe yo…ìay!¬ª ∆Åay wonii Petruusu naatii ka suudu, Iisaa attii mo landaade, o wi'i: ¬´Sim'uunu, ko hon…óun sikku…óaa? Ko hombo lam…ìe leydi ∆¥antata sagalle? Ko …ìi…ì…ìe ma…ì…ìe …ìen kaa ko heddii…ìe …ìen?¬ª
17.26: O jaabii mo, o wi'i: ¬´Ko heddii…ìe …ìen.¬ª Iisaa wi'i mo: ¬´Awa yo…ìugol …óun fawaaki …ìi…ì…ìe …ìen kan.
17.27: Kono fii wota en mettin …ìer…óe …ìen ∆¥antoo…ìe sagalle, yahu ka weendu, bugo…óaa ndolinwal maa ngal ka ndiyan, nangaa lingii adiingii mo…óude ngin, udditaa hunduko maggii on, a taway ton tammaaru kaalisi ndu mbuu…ói nay. ∆≥ettaa ndu, jonnaa …ìen ∆¥antoo…ìe fii sagalle men …óen enen …ói…óo.¬ª

18.1: E on saa'i …óon taalibaa…ìe …ìen …ìadii mo kanko Iisaa, …ìe wi'i mo: ¬´Ko hombo …ìuri teddude ka laamu kammu ngun?¬ª
18.2: Onsay Iisaa noddi paykun, o jo…ó…óini kun hakkunde ma…ì…ìe,
18.3: o wi'i: ¬´Ka haqiiqa mi andinii on, si on waylaali jikku mon on, wa'on wa paykoy, on naatataa few ka laamu kammu.
18.4: Ko …óun wa…ói, kala jippin…óo hoore mun, wa'i wa kun paykun …óoo, o wonay …ìur…óo teddude on ka laamu kammu.
18.5: Awa kadi kala ja…ìu…óo paykun wa kun …óoo, e innde an, haray ko min tigi o ja…ìi.
18.6: Kono on mo woni sabu feggingol gokkun e koy paykoy gom…óinkoy lan, haray ko …ìuri mo mo∆¥∆¥ande ko kolmbireede tuntere hayre, o bugee ka ndanka baharu.
18.7: ¬´Bone wonanii oo aduna sabu …óii piiji fegginay…ói. Ko fii bee pegge wa…óa, kono bone wonanii on ne…ó…óo won…óo sabu haa …óun wa…ói!
18.8: Si tawii jungo maa ngon maa koyngal maa ngal wonay sabu ko feggin-maa, haray ta∆¥u …óe, bugo…óaa ka wo…ó…óiti-maa. Ko fii no …ìuru-maa mo∆¥∆¥ande ka naataa ka ngurndan, hara ko a ta∆¥a-jungoojo maa ta∆¥a-koyngaljo, edii a jogaade koy…óe …ói…ói maa juu…óe …ói…ói buge…óaa ka yiite poomayankeewe.
18.9: Si tawii-le ko yiitere maa nden wonata sabu ko feggin-maa, haray awu nde, bugo…óaa ka wo…ó…óiti-maa. Ko fii no …ìuru-maa mo∆¥∆¥ande ka naataa ka ngurndan hara ko mo a yiitere wootere, edii a jogaade gite …ói…ói, buge…óaa ka yiite jahannama.¬ª Misal ∆≥ettaangal e Baalii Majjungii (Luk. 15.1-7)
18.10: ¬´Wota on hayfin hay gootun e koy paykoy. Ko fii mi andinii on, malaa'ikaa…ìe makkoy on ka kammu no darii tabiti yeeso Ben an Won…óo ka kammu on.
18.11: Ko fii ko addi *∆Åii-Aaden on, ko fii dandugol majju…ìe …ìen.
18.12: ¬´Ko hon…óun sikku…óon? Si go…ó…óo no mari baali teemedere, si gootii e …óin majjii, e hara o accataa …óiya cappan…óe jeenay e jeenay ka hoore fello, o …óa…ì…ìitoya ngiya majjungii?
18.13: Si o aru ngii e yiitude, ka haqiiqa mi andinii on, o weltoray ngii …ìuri …óiya cappan…óe jeenay e jeenay …ói majjaali.
18.14: Ko wano non, hinaa e sago Ben mon Won…óo ka kammu on si gooto e …ìee fay…ìe no majja.¬ª Fii Yaafondirgol e Yaafaneede
18.15: ¬´Si musi…ó…óo maa faw…≤ike e maa, yahu yiidaa e makko, hara ko an tun kanko tun. Si o ja…ìanii ma, haray a hettii musi…ó…óo maa on.
18.16: Kono si o ja…ìanaali ma, haray …óa…ì…ìu gooto maa …ói…óo, wattidaa e maa, fii kala ko yewtaa yo …≤aawiroye kongu…ói seedee…ìe …ói…óo maa tato.
18.17: Si o ja…ìanaali …ìen…óon kadi, haray yeeto *moftal ngal. Si o ja…ìanaali non moftal ngal kadi, haray yo o jogore wa mo gom…óinaa maa wa ∆¥antiroowo sagalle janfa.
18.18: ¬´Ko fii ka haqiiqa mi andinii on, ko to≈ãu…óon ka leydi woo haray to≈ãaama ka kammu, e ko ja…ìu…óon ka leydi woo haray ja…ìaama ka kammu.
18.19: Ka haqiiqa mi andinii on kadi, si …ói…óo e hakkunde mon nanondirii ka hoore leydi fii toragol kala ko woni, Ben an Won…óo ka kammu on okkay …ìe …óun.
18.20: Ko fii ka …ói…óo maa tato mottondiri e innde an woo, haray mi…óo hakkunde ma…ì…ìe.¬ª
18.21: Onsay Petruusu …ìadii, wi'i mo: ¬´Koohoojo, ko haa laabi jelu mi haani yaafaade musi…ó…óo an, si himo faw…≤aade e an? Ko haa laabi jee…ói…ói?¬ª
18.22: Iisaa jaabii mo: ¬´Mi wi'aali ma dey ko haa laabi jee…ói…ói, kono ko haa cappan…óe jee…ói…ói laabi jee…ói…ói.
18.23: Ko …óun wa…ói, laamu kammu ngun no wa'i wa lan…óo faalanoo…óo yo jiyaa…ìe mun hunito …óun.
18.24: No on lan…óo fu…ó…óornoo, …ìe addani mo go…ó…óo joganii…óo mo ujune kaalisi.
18.25: Nde tawnoo alaa ko o yo…ìira, jom makko yamiri yo o yeeyite, kanko e …ìeyngu makko e …ìi…ì…ìe makko …ìen e kala ko o joginoo, …≤amaande nden yo…ìee.
18.26: ¬´Onsay jiyaa…óo on suuyi ka leydi, jiccii yeeso makko, wi'i: ‚ÄπKoohoojo, mu…≤…≤anee lan, mi yo…ìay on fow!‚Ä∫
18.27: Jom makko yurmaa mo, o yaafanii mo …≤amaande nden, o acciti mo, o yahi.
18.28: ¬´Ko on jiyaa…óo yaltata …óon, o yiidi e …óimmoojo makko goo, joganii…óo mo *dinaruuji teemedere. O nangi mo, o …óe…ó…ói, e hoore himo wi'a: ‚ÄπYo…ìan ko jogani…óaa mi kon!‚Ä∫
18.29: On …óimmoojo makko yani e ley koy…óe makko, jeeji mo, wi'i: ‚ÄπMu…≤…≤ano lan, mi yo…ìete!‚Ä∫
18.30: Kono o ja…ìaali. O na…ìi mo, o sokoyi haa o yo…ìa mo ko o joganii mo kon.
18.31: ∆Åay …óimmoo…ìe makko …ìen yi'ii kon ko wa…ói, …ìe aani fota, …ìe yahi, …ìe fillitanii jom ma…ì…ìe ko wa…ói kon fow.
18.32: ¬´Onsay jom ma…ì…ìe noddi on jiyaa…óo, o wi'i mo: ‚ÄπKo an, yo jiyaa…óo bon…óo, mi yaafanike ma …≤amaande maa nden fow, …ìay a jeejii lan.
18.33: An kadi a waawataano yurmeede …óimmoojo maa on, wano mi yurmira-maa non?‚Ä∫
18.34: Jom makko tikki, o wattidi mo e lettoo…ìe …ìen haa nde o yo…ìi ko o …≤awlii kon fow woo.
