2.3: Mo kala winditorayno ka saare mun.
2.4: Yuusufu ka…≤un kadi iwri ka diiwal Jaliilu e ndee saare Naasirata fii yahugol ka diiwal Yahuuda, ka saare Daawuuda wi'eteende Bayti-Lahiimi, …ìay hari ko o jeyaa…óo e nder …ìeynguure Daawuuda nden, awa kadi ko e ndun suudu o jeyaa,
2.5: fii no o winditodira e Mariyama on ∆¥amaa…óo makko, tawi on ko sowii…óo.
2.6: Fewndo …ìe wonnoo …óon, saa'i ka Mariyama jibinta hewti.
2.7: O firtii dikkuru makko ndun. O buumi mo e wudere, o wallini e nder kunnawal …≤amminirgal daabeeji, …ìay hari …ìe he…ìaali werde ka suudu ho…ì…ìe. Fii Hakkunde Malaa'ikaa…ìe …ìen e Ngaynaakoo…ìe …ìen
2.8: Tawi e on jemma, no woodunoo e ngal diiwal …óon ngaynaakoo…ìe daakinoo…ìe fii aynugol gureeli mun …óin.
2.9: Malaa'ikaajo Joomiraa…óo on fee…≤ani …ìe, annoora Joomiraa…óo on jalbini nokkuure ka …ìe woni …óon. ∆Åe huli fota.
2.10: Kono malaa'ikaajo on wi'i …ìe: ¬´Wota on hulu, sabu mi…óo fe…≤…≤inande on Kibaaru Mo∆¥∆¥o mo welo-welo moolanaango wonanayngo jamaa on fow.
2.11: Hande e ndee saare Daawuuda, on da…≤anaama ton Dandoowo, on-le ko *Almasiihu on, ko kanko woni Joomi on.
2.12: Awa seedee mun, on taway boobo penu no buumaa e nder wudere, wallinaa e nder kunnawal.¬ª
2.13: No o gaynirnoo wowlude …óun, …óon kisan konu malaa'ikaa…ìe moolanaangu tawti malaa'ikaajo on, no manta Allaahu on, hi…ìe wi'a:
2.14: ¬´Mangural wonanii Allaahu on ka kammu, …ìuttu wonii e oo aduna, hakkunde …ìen …ìe o wa…óani sulfu makko on!¬ª
2.15: ∆Åay malaa'ikaa…ìe …ìen ∆¥entii, ngaynaakoo…ìe …ìen wi'indiri: ¬´Mahen Bayti-Lahiimi ndaaroyen ko wa…ói ton kon, …óun ko koo ko Joomiraa…óo on andini en fii mun!¬ª
2.16: ∆Åe yahi he…≤a, …ìe tawoyi Mariyama e Yuusufu ton, tawi boobo penu on kadi no wallinaa ka nder kunnawal.
2.17: ∆Åay …ìe yi'ii mo, …ìe fillitii ko …ìe wowlananoo kon fii on boobo.
2.18: Kala nanunoo…ìe ko …ìen ngaynaakoo…ìe yewtaynoo kon wontiri …óun ≈ãalaw.
2.19: Mariyama mari …óun fow ka …ìernde mun, maanditii fii miijitagol.
2.20: Ontuma ngaynaakoo…ìe …ìen yiltitii, hi…ìe manta mawnina Allaahu on fii kala ko …ìe nanunoo e ko …ìe yi'i wano …ìe wowlirananoo non tigi.
2.21: ∆Åay bal…óe jeetati …óen timmii, o sunninaa o innaa Iisaa, innde nde malaa'ikaajo on to…ó…óaninoo boobo on nden ado neene makko saawude mo. Fii no Iisaa Wee…ìitiraa Yeeso Joomiraa…óo on
2.22: ∆Åay …≤alaa…óe fii la…ì…ìinagol ma…ì…ìe ngol timmii, wano Sariya Muusaa on wiirunoo non, …ìe na…ìi boobo on *Yerusalaam fii wee…ìitangol mo Joomiraa…óo on,
2.23: (wano windori non ka Sariya Joomiraa…óo on: ¬´Kala boobo gorko afo on ka neene mun ko Joomiraa…óo on jeyi.¬ª),
2.24: e fii ittugol sadaka legetereeji …ói…ói maa gabooji kecci …ói…ói wano wiiranoo non ka Sariya Joomiraa…óo on.
2.25: Tawi no woodunoo Yerusalaam gorko wi'etee…óo Sim'uunu. On ko feewu…óo e kadi ko rewoowo Joomiraa…óo on. Himo tijjaninoo *Isra'iila'en on Dandoowo, tawi kadi *Ruuhu Senii…óo on no e hoore makko.
2.26: Ruuhu Senii…óo on fe…≤…≤inanno mo wonde o maayataa ado o yi'ude Almasiihu Joomiraa…óo on.
2.27: Ruuhu Senii…óo on ardii mo haa ka *juulirde mawnde. Fewndo ko maw…ìe paykun kun addata kun, …óun ko Iisaa, fii laatinangol kun aadaaji ma…ì…ìe tippude e Sariya Muusaa on,
2.28: kanko Sim'uunu o tambii paykun kun ka juu…óe makko, o jarni Alla, o wi'i:
2.29: ¬´Jooni non, yaa an Joomiraa…óo, a accay jiyaa…óo maa on maaya e nder …ìuttu wano daaliranno…óaa mo non,
2.30: sabu mi yi'irii gite an …óen kisiyee iwru…óo e maa on,
2.32: …óun-le ko ndaygu hentinanayngu le∆¥∆¥i aduna on fow e darja wonanay…óo jamaa maa *Isra'iila on.¬ª
2.33: Ben makko e yumma makko ≈ãal…ói fii ko wowlanoo fii makko kon.
2.34: Sim'uunu du'anii …ìe, wi'i Mariyama neene paykun kun: ¬´Awa kun paykun wonoyay fii li…ìugol wo…ì…ìe, …ìanta …ìeya e nder leydi Isra'iila ndin e fii wonugol maande nde yim…ìe …ìen yeddata,
2.35: e fii no miijooji …ìer…óe buy fee…≤ira. An kadi a he…ìay nguli …ìernde wa tufiraande kaafa.¬ª
2.36: Tawi no woodunoo …óon kadi debbo haaloowo ko Alla longini …óun wi'etee…óo Hannatu, on ko ge…óal Fanu'iila, jeyaa…óo e bolondaa Asiira, duu…ìin…óo fota. On ko yeru duu…ìi jee…ói…ói wondunoo e moodi mun gila curbayaagal makko.
2.37: Ontuma o heynii haa o he…ìi duu…ìi cappan…óe jeetati e nay. E nder …óun kadi, o iwataano ka juulirde mawnde, himo duuminoo ton e rewugol Alla, hoora, toroo jemma e …≤alorma.
2.38: On debbo hewti e on saa'i tigi, himo jarna Alla, himo wowlana kala tijjinoo…óo hisineede ndee saare Yerusalaam fii kun paykun.
2.39: ∆Åay Yuusufu e Mariyama wa…óii ko Sariya Joomiraa…óo on yamiri kon fow, …ìe yiltitii ka saare ma…ì…ìe Naasirata, …óun ko e nder Jaliilu.
2.40: Tawi paykun kun no njan…óude tun tii…óa e nder ko kun heewata faamu kon. Awa kadi sulfu Alla on no e hoore makkun. Fii Iisaa Paykun ka Juulirde Mawnde
2.41: Tawi maw…ìe Iisaa …ìen yahayno hitaande kala Yerusalaam fii *Juldeere Yawtaneede nden .
2.42: ∆Åay kun he…ìii duu…ìi sappoo e …ói…ói, …ìe yaadi e makkun e nden juldeere wano woowiri non.
2.43: ∆Åay juldeere nden fe∆¥∆¥ii, maw…ìe paykun kun hooti, kono ka…≤un paykun kun, …óun ko Iisaa, luttiti Yerusalaam, tawi maw…ìe makkun …ìen andaali.
2.44: ∆Åay hi…ìe sikka paykun kun no wondi e …ìe …ìe ardunoo …ìen, …ìe yahi yeru …≤allal. Onsay …ìe woni e …óa…ì…ìitugol kun e hakkunde si…ì…ìe ma…ì…ìe …ìen e andindiraa…ìe ma…ì…ìe …ìen.

2.46: Bal…óe tati …ìaawo …óun, …ìe tawoyi kun ka juulirde mawnde, hikun joo…óii hakkunde karamokoo…ìe …ìen, he…óitii …ìe, e kadi hikun landotonoo …ìe lande.
2.47: Nanunoo…ìe hikun yewta …ìen fow ≈ãal…ói sabu hakkille makkun …óen e ko kun jaabotonoo kon.
2.48: ∆Åay maw…ìe makkun …ìen yi'ii kun, …ìe ≈ãal…ói, neene makkun wi'i kun: ¬´Boobo an, ko hon…óun wa…óan…óaa men …óun? E hino …óun fow min e ben maa me…óen …óa…ì…ìitude ma e nder sokola!¬ª
2.49: Kun wi'i …ìe: ¬´Ko fii hon…óun …óa…ì…ìitirton mi? Hari on andaa mi…óo haani wonude ka suudu Ben an?¬ª
2.50: Kono kam…ìe …ìe faamaali ngol kongol ngol kun haalani …ìe.

2.52: Tawi kun paykun, …óun ko Iisaa, no mawnude tun, faamu makko on kadi ko yeeso tun woni yaarude, himo …ìeydoo tun welude Allaahu on e yim…ìe …ìen.

3.1: Ka laamu Tibariiyu he…ìi duu…ìi sappoo e jowi …óon, …óun ko lan…óo maw…óo Roomu on, fewndo onsay hari ko Pilaatu Pontii woni lan…óo diiwal Yahuuda ngal, tawi ko *Heroodu laamii diiwal Jaliilu ngal, tawi ko Filiipu mi…≤…≤iraawo makko on kadi laamii …óee ley…óe …óoo, …óun ko Ituuriiya e Taraahuuniti, tawi ko Lisaaniiyu laamii diiwal Abiliiya ngal,
3.2: fewndo Hannaana e Qayaafa wonnoo *yottinoo…ìe maw…ìe sadaka, Allaahu on daalanno Yaayaa mo Zakariyaa'u ka wulaa.
3.3: Onsay Yaayaa yahi daande Yurdayniwol fow himo waajoo yim…ìe …ìen yo …ìe aru …ìe *lootee maande tuubuubuyee fii yo junuubaaji ma…ì…ìe …óin yaafe
3.4: wano windori non ka deftere fii …óii kongu…ói annabi *Isaaya: ¬´Kaa hawa ko hawa ewnotoo…óo ka wulaa, wi'a: Mo∆¥∆¥inee laawol Joomiraa…óo on, fewnon juri makko …óin.
3.5: Ay…óe …óen fow uddete, pelle njane e tosooke …óen fow joltinee. ∆äate …ìoylii…óe …óen fewnee, laawi kaanu…ói …óin new…óinee.
3.6: Kala ne…ó…óanke yi'ay kisiyee iwru…óo ka Alla on.¬ª
3.7: O wi'ayno …óin jamaaji aray…ói e makko fii *lootegol maande tuubuubuyee: ¬´Ko onon yo iwdi kuura! Ko hombo tindini on dogugol tikkere aroyaynde nden?
3.8: Awa yo kuu…óe mon …óen hollu wonde on tuubii. Hara on hooloraali wi'ugol wonde ko Ibraahiima woni maama mon, ko fii mi andinii on, Alla no waawi wattude …óee kaa∆¥e …óoo …ìi…ì…ìe Ibraahiima.
3.9: Toode teenirde nden no waalii ka binde le…ó…óe. Kala leggal ngal rimataa …ìi…ì…ìe mo∆¥∆¥u…ìe, ngal soppete, ngal bugee ka yiite!¬ª
3.10: Onsay yim…ìe …ìen landii mo: ¬´Ko hon…óun men wa…óata jooni?¬ª
3.11: O jaabii …ìe: ¬´Kala mar…óo dolokkaaji …ói…ói yo sendodu …ói e mo maraa. Kala jogii…óo kadi …≤aametee yo o warru wano non.¬ª
3.12: ∆≥antoo…ìe* sagalle …ìen ari e makko fii lootegol maande tuubuubuyee, …ìe wi'i mo: ¬´Karamoko, ko hon…óun men haani wa…óude?¬ª
3.13: O wi'i …ìe: ¬´Wota on ∆¥antu toonin ko yamira…óon kon.¬ª
3.14: Suufaa…ìe goo kadi landii mo: ¬´Menen-le, ko hon…óun men haani wa…óude?¬ª O jaabii …ìe: ¬´Wota on jattu hay gooto kaalisi, wota on ittin hay gooto e hoore too…≤e, yo njoddi mon ndin yonu on.¬ª
3.15: Tawi mo bee e ma…ì…ìe no miijotonoo ka …ìernde mun si tawii wonaa Yaayaa woni *Almasiihu on, ko fii hari jamaa on no sabbinoo on.
3.16: Kanko Yaayaa o jaabii …ìe, o wi'i: ¬´Min, ko ndiyan mi woni on lootirde, kono …ìur…óo lan doole on, mo mi hewtaa hay firtugol …ìoggi pa…óe mun, no arude. On non ko *Ruuhu Senii…óo on e yiite o lootirta on.
3.17: Himo jogii feeteewo makko ngon ka jungo, ko o hentinira bete makko on, o moo…ìa …≤aametee on ka beembal makko, o sunnira foron on yiite nge …óaanotaako.¬ª
3.18: Tawi Yaayaa no fe…≤…≤inanaynoo jamaa on Kibaaru Mo∆¥∆¥o wondude e waajuuji heewu…ói.
3.19: Kono …ìay Yaayaa felii *Heroodu lan…óo diiwal ngal, sabu ko on resi sonnaajo yumma-gooto mun on kon, …óun ko debbo wi'etee…óo Heroodiiya, wondude e kala bonnereeji …ói o wa…óaynoo,
3.20: onsay Heroodu …ìeyditiri …óun hendagol Yaayaa, soka mo. Fii no Iisaa Lootiraa (Mat. 3.13-17; Mrk. 1.9-11)
3.21: Fewndo ko jamaa on fow ari fii lootegol maande tuubuubuyee, Iisaa kadi lootoraa. Fewndo ko o du'otoo, kammu ngun udditii,
3.22: Ruuhu Senii…óo on ∆¥etti mbaadi gabooru tippii e makko. Onsay hawa nanii ka kammu, no wi'a: ¬´Ko an woni ∆Åi…ó…óo an yi…óaa…óo on, mi…óo weltor-maa.¬ª Fii Iwdi Iisaa ndin (Mat. 1.1-17)
3.23: Ko Iisaa fu…ó…óii waajaade, ko wa mo duu…ìi cappan…óe tati. Ko o tuumanoo…óo wonugol ge…óal Yuusufu, on …ìi…ó…óo Helii,
3.24: mo Matsaata, mo Lewi, mo Malkii, mo Yannaa, mo Yuusufu,
3.25: mo Mataasiyaa, mo Amuusa, mo Naahuuma, mo Haslii, mo Najji,
3.26: mo Maasa, mo Mataasiyaa, mo Sim'ii, mo Yuusuka, mo Yahuuza,
3.27: mo Yuuhanna, mo Reesa, mo Zarubaabila, mo Sa'alti'iila, mo Neerii,
3.28: mo Malkii, mo Addii, mo Qusaama, mo Almudaama, mo Iiri,
3.29: mo Yuusii, mo Aliyaasaru, mo Yuriima, mo Matsaata, mo Lewi,
3.30: mo Sim'uunu, mo Yahuuda, mo Yuusufa, mo Yuunaana, mo Alyaqiima,
3.31: mo Malayaa, mo Maynaana, mo Mataasa, mo Naasaana, mo Daawuuda,
3.32: mo Yassaa'u, mo Obiida, mo Bo'aaza, mo Salmaana, mo Nahasuuna,
3.33: mo Ammiina-Daaba, mo Adumiina, mo Arnii, mo Hasruunu, mo Faarisa, mo Yahuuda,
3.34: mo Yaaquuba, mo Issaaqa, mo Ibraahiima, mo Taaraha, mo Naahuura,
3.35: mo Seruuja, mo Ra'uwa, mo Faalaja, mo Aabira, mo Saalaha,
3.36: mo Kiinaana, mo Arfaksaada, mo Saama, mo Nuuhu, mo Laamaka,
3.37: mo Matuusaalaha, mo Hanuuka, mo Yaarada, mo Mahalaliila, mo Kiinaana,
3.38: mo Anuusa, mo Siita, mo *Aadama, mo Allaahu on.

4.1: Iisaa iwi Yurdayniwol no heewi *Ruuhu Senii…óo on. Ruuhu on nawri mo ka wulaa.
4.2: Ko ton Ibuliisa ndarndii mo fodde bal…óe cappan…óe nay. O …≤aamaali hay fus e nder …óen bal…óe …óon fow. ∆Åawto …óun o weelaa.
4.3: Onsay Ibuliisa wi'i mo: ¬´Si tawii ko a *∆Åi…ó…óo Alla, yamir ndee hayre yo nde wontu …≤aametee.¬ª
4.4: Iisaa jaabii mo, wi'i: ¬´No windii wondema: ‚ÄπNe…ó…óo hinaa …≤aametee tun wuurirta.‚Ä∫ ¬ª
4.5: Onsay Ibuliisa na…ìi mo ka …ìuri toowude, o holli mo laamateeriiji aduna on fow yeru hin∆¥aango yiitere.
4.6: O wi'i mo: ¬´Mi jonnete laamu e hoore majji …ói fow wondude e darja majji on, …ìay mi jonnanooma …ói, awa-le mi okkay …ói mo mi faalanaa woo.
4.7: Si tawii a sujjanii lan, …óii fow wontante.¬ª
4.8: Iisaa jaabii mo, wi'i: ¬´No windii wondema: ‚ÄπKo Alla Joomiraa…óo maa on sujjantaa, rewaa mo kanko tun.‚Ä∫ ¬ª
4.9: Ibuliisa nawri mo kadi Yerusalaam, jo…ó…óinoyi mo ka hoore war…≤akere *juulirde mawnde, o wi'i mo: ¬´Si tawii ko a ∆Åi…ó…óo Alla, hocco …óon, cikko…óaa ka leydi,
4.10: ko fii no windii wondema: ‚ÄπO yamiray malaa'ikaa…ìe makko …ìen fii maa, yo …ìe reene,
4.11: awa kadi …ìe tamborte juu…óe ma…ì…ìe …óen fii wota koyngal maa ngal feggo e hayre.‚Ä∫ ¬ª
4.12: Iisaa jaabii mo, wi'i: ¬´No windii wondema: ‚ÄπWota a ndarndo Joomiraa…óo on, on Alla maa.‚Ä∫ ¬ª
4.13: ∆Åay Ibuliisa lannii mo ndarndaade e …óii …óoo fow, o pottitii mo haa o e…ì…ìa feere goo. Fii Golle Iisaa …óen Jaliilu (Mat. 4.12-17; Mrk. 1.14-15)
4.14: Iisaa yiltodi e bawgal Ruuhu Allaahu on ka diiwal Jaliilu. Fii makko andii e nokkeeli heedu…ói …óon …óin fow.
4.15: O jannayno ka juulir…óe ma…ì…ìe. Yim…ìe …ìen fow manti mo.
4.16: O yahi Naasirata ka o ne'aa …óon. E *…≤alaande fowteteende nden, …óun ko asewe, o naati ka juulirde wano o woowiri non. O immii fii jangugol.
4.17: O jonnaa deftere annabi Isaaya nden, o udditi nde, o hawrondiri e cortewol ka …óun…óoo windii:
4.18: ¬´Ruuhu Joomiraa…óo on no e hoore an, sabu ko min woni Su…ìaa…óo on fii fe…≤…≤inangol miskin…ìe …ìen Kibaaru Mo∆¥∆¥o on. O nelii lan fii hollitugol nangaa…ìe …ìen hettugol hoore mun, hollita bum…ìe …ìen hettugol gii…óe mun …óen, hollita njaggaa…ìe …ìen kadi hettugol hoore mun,
4.19: e fii humpitugol on ndee hitaande nde Joomiraa…óo on wa…ói mo∆¥∆¥ere mun nden e mun.¬ª
4.20: Ontuma o …≤obbi deftere nden, o jonni nde wallitotoo…óo on, o jottii. Tawi yim…ìe …ìen fow ka nder juulirde no punnii mo.
4.21: Onsay o wi'i …ìe: ¬´Oo daaluyee mo nanir…óon noppi mon …óin laatike hande.¬ª
4.22: Fow seeditanii mo, ≈ãal…óidi e …óin kongu…ói makko mo∆¥∆¥i …ói o yewtaynoo, hi…ìe wi'a: ¬´Wonaa …ìi…ó…óo Yuusufu on nii?¬ª
4.23: Iisaa wi'i …ìe: ¬´Mi…óo andi on wowlanay lan ngol tindol …óoo: ∆ùawndoowo, …≤awndu hoore maa tigi. Kala ko men nani wa…óii Kafernahuum, wa…óu …óun kadi ka leydi maa …óoo.¬ª
4.24: O wi'i …ìe kadi: ¬´Mi wowlanay on haqiiqa, annabaajo hay e gooto teddinaaka ka leydi mun.
4.25: E hino goonga ko mi woni on wowlande: E fewndo jamaanu Iiliiya, hari keynguu…ìe buy no woodi e nder leydi Isra'iila. Ko fewndo onsay wonnoo duu…ìi tati e lebbi jeegoo kammu ngun no uddii ndiyan …óan to…ì…ìaali, heege tii…óunge wa…ói e leydi ndin fow,
4.26: kono hari Iiliiya nulaaka e hay gooto e …ìen keynguu…ìe, si hinaa e debbo keynguujo mo Sarfati, …óun ko e nder leydi Siduuna.
4.27: Tawi kadi e fewndo jamaanu annabi Iliyaasa, …ìe …óamajan buy no leydi Isra'iila, kono hari hay gooto e ma…ì…ìe sellinaaka, si hinaa oo Siriyankeejo wi'etee…óo Na'amaana.¬ª
4.28: ∆Åay …ìe nanii …óii kongu…ói makko, wonnoo…ìe ka nder juulirde …ìen fow tikki.
4.29: ∆Åe immii, …ìe du…≤iri mo ka …ìaawo saare, …ìe na…ìi mo haa ka fello ngon ∆¥ellitii …óon fii bugagol mo ley. Tawi nden saare ko e falo ngon fello darnaa.
4.30: Kono o ukkitii hakkunde ma…ì…ìe, o fe∆¥∆¥i, o yahi. Fii no Iisaa Ra…óori Jinna, ∆ùawndiri ∆ùabbeeli Buy (Mrk. 1.21-28)
4.31: Iisaa yahi Kafernahuum, nden saare ko jeyaande e diiwal Jaliilu, himo janna e …≤alaande fowteteende nden, …óun ko aseweere nden.
4.32: Ko o jannaynoo kon ≈ãal…óini jamaa on, sabu himo wowliraynoo bawgal.
4.33: Tawi no ka nder juulirde ton ne…ó…óo mo jinnawii bonngii nangi, on sonki, wi'i:
4.34: ¬´Hey, ko hon…óun faalana…óaa men, an Iisaa oo jeyaa…óo Naasirata? Hara ko mulugol men aran…óaa? Min mi…óo andi ko hombo wonu-maa, ko a *Senii…óo mo Alla!¬ª
4.35: Onsay Iisaa yamiri ngii, wi'i: ¬´Fanku, yaltaa e oo ne…ó…óo!¬ª Jinnawii ngin li…ìi mo hakkunde ma…ì…ìe, ngii yalti e makko, ngii barminaali mo.
4.36: Fow ≈ãal…ói, no wi'indira: ¬´E ko hon…óun woni ngol kongol? Oo no yamira jinnaaji bon…ói …óin e hoore doole e bawgal, …ói yalta!¬ª
4.37: Kibaaru fii makko lolli e nokkeeli heedu…ói …óon …óin fow.
4.38: ∆Åay o iwii ka juulirde, o yahi ka galle Sim'uunu. Tawi esiraawo Sim'uunu suddii…óo on no nawni nawnaare nguli-…ìandu tii…óuki. ∆Åe torii mo kanko Iisaa ballal.
4.39: O ugginii e hoore makko, o yamiri nawnaare nden, nde yalti e makko. ∆äon kisan on immii, o woni e kurkanagol …ìe.
4.40: ∆Åay naange ngen mutii, kala marnoo…ìe …≤aw…óo noone …≤aw fow, …ìe addi …ìe e makko. O *fawi juu…óe makko …óen e hoore mo kala e ma…ì…ìe, o sellini …ìe.
4.41: Tawi kadi jinnaaji no yaltude e buy e ma…ì…ìe, hara hi…ói sonka, wi'a: ¬´Ko an woni ∆Åi…ó…óo Alla on!¬ª Kono o to≈ãani …ói, o salii …ói wowla, …ìay hari hi…ói andi ko kanko woni *Almasiihu on.
4.42: No weetirnoo bimbi, Iisaa yalti yaari e nokkuure wul…óinnde. Jamaaji …óin woni e …óa…ì…ìitugol mo, …ìe ari haa e makko. ∆Åe faalaa mo tongude …óon, hara o accaali …ìe …óon.
4.43: Kono o wi'i …ìe: ¬´Bee mi fe…≤…≤inana …óeya ca'e kadi Kibaaru Mo∆¥∆¥o on, …óun ko kibaaru fii *laamu Alla ngun, sabu ko fii …óun mi neliraa.¬ª
4.44: Onsay o woni e waajagol ka juulir…óe diiwal Yahuuda.

5.1: ∆ùande goo, tawi Iisaa no e daande nduu *Weendu Jaani-Saarata. Tawi jamaa no du…≤indira e fee makko fii he…óagol daaluyee Allaahu on.
5.2: O haynii laakoy …ói…óoy ka sera weendu, tawi yungoo…ìe …ìen no jippii fii lootugol *jalaaji ma…ì…ìe …óin.
5.3: O ∆¥awi e gokkun e koy laakoy, …óun hawrondiri e kun Sim'uunu kun, o yamiri on…óon wo…ó…óintingol …ìe pencen on see…óa. Ontuma o joo…óii e nder makkun, o woni e jannugol jamaa on.
5.4: ∆Åay o gaynii jannude, o wi'i Sim'uunu: ¬´Nawru laakun kun ka luggi …óon, bugo…óon jalaaji mon …óin, nangon li∆¥∆¥i.¬ª
5.5: Sim'uunu jaabii mo: ¬´Jom amen, oo jemma fe∆¥∆¥u…óo …óoo fow me…óen yungude, men he…ìaali hay fus. Kono sabu ko maaku…óon kon, mi bugoto jalaaji …óin.¬ª
5.6: ∆Åay …ìe wa…óii …óun, …ìe nangi li∆¥∆¥i …óuu…óu…ói, benii jalaaji ma…ì…ìe …óin fu…ó…óii ta∆¥ude.
5.7: Onsay …ìe …ìaa∆¥i …ìeya wondi…ì…ìe ma…ì…ìe won…ìe e kuma laakun fii ko ara wallitoo …ìe. ∆Åen ari …ìe hebbini laakoy koy …ói…óoy non, haa koy faalaa mutude.
5.8: ∆Åay Sim'uunu Petruusu yi'ii …óun, o yani e ley koy…óe Iisaa, o wi'i: ¬´Koohoojo an, wo…ó…óitee lan, sabu min ko mi junuubankeejo!¬ª
5.9: ≈äalaw he…ìi mo, he…ìidi mo e …ìe o wondunoo …ìen fow, sabu ngol nangugol …óin li∆¥∆¥i.
5.10: Ko wano non kadi Yaaquuba e Yuuhanna …ìee …ìi…ì…ìe Zabadii wondi…ì…ìe Sim'uunu ≈ãal…óirnoo. Onsay Iisaa wi'i Sim'uunu: ¬´Wota a hulu, gila jooni a wonay yungoowo yim…ìe.¬ª
5.11: Onsay …ìe artiri laakoy koy ka pencen, …ìe acci fow …óon, …ìe jokki mo. Fii no Iisaa ∆ùawndiri mo ∆äamajan (Mat. 8.1-4; Mrk. 1.40-45)
5.12: Tawi Iisaa no e saare goo. Onsay mo …óamajan heewi e …ìandu mun yi'i mo, ari yani yeeso makko. O jeeji mo, o wi'i: ¬´Koohoojo, si hi…óon faalaa, hi…óon waawi lan sellinde, mi laa…ìa!¬ª
5.13: Iisaa fonti jungo mun ngon, meemi mo, wi'i: ¬´Mi…óo faalaa, laato sellu…óo laa…ìaa.¬ª ∆äon kisan …óamajan …óan yalti e makko.
5.14: Onsay o wi'i mo: ¬´Wota a wowlan …óun hay gooto. Kono non a yahay hollitoyo…óaa *yottinoowo sadaka on, ittaa sadaka fii ko la…ì…ìina…óaa kon wano Muusaa yamiri non fii yo …óun wonan …ìe seedee.¬ª
5.15: Kono tawi innde makko nden no …ìurtude lollude, jamaaji buy moo…ìii fii jentagol mo e fii …≤awndegol …≤abbeeli ma…ì…ìe,
5.16: kono tawi Iisaa no woowunoo pottitaade ka weddii, toroo Alla. Fii no Iisaa Imminiri Maaya-∆Åanduujo (Mat. 9.1-8; Mrk. 2.1-12)
5.17: ∆ùande goo tawi Iisaa no jannude. Hari *Fariisiyaa…ìe e jannoo…ìe fii Sariya on no joo…óii …óon, hi…ìe iwri e ko…óooli diiwal Jaliilu ngal fow e diiwal Yahuuda ngal e ka saare Yerusalaam. Tawi bawgal Joomiraa…óo on no wondi e makko no o …≤awndira.
5.18: Tawi kadi wo…ì…ìe arii no rondii jukku…óo e …ìoggi-dimbor…ói. Hi…ìe …óa…ì…ìa fii no …ìe naadira mo ka nder suudu, …ìe wallina mo yeeso Iisaa.
5.19: ∆Åay …ìe he…ìaali ka …ìe naadira mo sabu …óuu…óugol jamaa on, …ìe ∆¥awdi e makko ka hoore suudu, …ìe tufi ton yolnde, …ìe tippindini mo e …ìoggi-dimbor…ói …óin e hakkunde jamaa on yeeso Iisaa.
5.20: ∆Åay Iisaa yi'ii gom…óinal ma…ì…ìe ngal, o wi'i: ¬´Musi…ó…óo, junuubaaji maa …óin yaafaama.¬ª
5.21: Onsay Fariisiyaa…ìe …ìen e jannoo…ìe fii Sariya on woni e wi'indirgol: ¬´Ko hombo woni oo hoynoowo? Ko hombo waawi yaafaade junuubu ko wonaa Alla?¬ª
5.22: Iisaa andi …óin miijooji ma…ì…ìe, o wi'i: ¬´Ko hon…óun miijanto…óon …óun ka …ìer…óe mon?
5.23: Enee, hakkunde wi'ugol ‚Äπjunuubaaji maa …óin yaafaama‚Ä∫ e ‚Äπimmo yahaa‚Ä∫, ko hon…óun e …óii …óoo …ìuri wee…ìude?¬ª
5.24: O wi'i kadi: ¬´Fii no andiron wonde *∆Åii-Aaden on no mari bawgal ka aduna …óoo fii yaafagol junuubaaji¬ª, o wi'i jukku…óo on: ¬´Immo ∆¥ettaa …ìoggi-dimbor…ói maa …óin, hootaa ka maa.¬ª
5.25: On immii …óon kisan e tawnde ma…ì…ìe, o ∆¥etti …ìoggi-dimbor…ói makko …óin, o hooti ka makko, himo manta Alla.
5.26: Kaawee he…ìi …ìe fow, …ìe manti Alla, …ìe huli fota, hi…ìe wi'a: ¬´Hande men yi'ii huunde hawniinde!¬ª Fii no Matta Jokkiri Iisaa (Mat. 9.9-13; Mrk. 2.13-17)
5.27: ∆Åawto …óun, Iisaa yalti. Ko o yahata, o yi'i ∆¥antoowo sagalle wi'etee…óo Lewi no joo…óii ka ∆¥antirde sagalle. O wi'i: ¬´Aru jokkaa mi!¬ª
5.28: Lewi acci …óon ko o joginoo kon fow, o immii, o jokki mo.
5.29: Lewi wa…óani mo caatal mawngal ka mun, yim…ìe buy ∆¥antoo…ìe sagalle wondude e yim…ìe goo joo…óodi e ma…ì…ìe.
5.30: Fariisiyaa…ìe …ìen e jannoo…ìe fii Sariya on jeyaa…ìe e fedde ma…ì…ìe nden ≈ãuni taalibaa…ìe Iisaa …ìen, …ìe wi'i …ìe: ¬´E ko fii hon…óun …≤aamidanton, yaridon e junuubankee…ìe …ìen e ∆¥antoo…ìe sagalle …ìen?¬ª
5.31: Iisaa jaabii …ìe, wi'i: ¬´Hinaa sellu…ìe …ìen hatonjini e …≤awndoowo, kono ko …≤aw…ìe …ìen.
5.32: Min, wonaa noddugol feewu…ìe …ìen mi arani, kono ko junuubankee…ìe …ìen fii yo …ìe tuubu.¬ª Landal fii Hoorugol (Mat. 9.14-17; Mrk. 2.18-22)
5.33: Onsay wo…ì…ìe wi'i mo kanko Iisaa: ¬´Taalibaa…ìe Yaayaa …ìen e taalibaa…ìe Fariisiyaa…ìe …ìen ka…≤un hooray, juula soono woo. An-le, …ìe maa …ìen no …≤aamude, yara!¬ª
5.34: Iisaa jaabii …ìe wi'i: ¬´Taw si on waaway hoorinde njaatigii…ìe jom jomba …≤ande peera on, hara himo wondi e ma…ì…ìe?
5.35: Aray e saa'i nde jom jomba pottinaa e hakkunde ma…ì…ìe, onsay e …óen bal…óe …óon …ìe hooray.¬ª
5.36: O haalani …ìe ngal misal …óoo, o wi'i: ¬´Hay gooto ∆¥ettataa ceelol bagi keso, walkira dolokke ki…ó…óo. Si hinaa …óun, haray ontigi bonnii kesun …óun, walkere nden kadi yaadataa e ki…ó…óun …óun.
5.37: Hay gooto loowataa njaram *wii…≤u kesan e nder bootooji guri ki…ó…ói. Si hinaa …óun, …óan njaram kesan wonay sabu ko feeri …óin guri, njaram …óan hibba, bootooji guri …óin kadi bona.
5.38: Kono njaram kesan ko e nder bootooji guri kesi loowetee.
5.39: Kala yaru…óo njaram ki…ó…óan faaletaake njaram kesan, ko fii o wi'ay: ‚ÄπKo ki…ó…óan …óan …ìuri welude.‚Ä∫ ¬ª

6.1: E aseweere goo, …óun ko *…≤alaande fowteteende nden, hari Iisaa no rewude e gese ngawri, taalibaa…ìe makko …ìen no woocora cawti …óen gese, worsa …ói, …≤aama.
6.2: Fariisiyaa…ìe* goo wi'i: ¬´Ko hon…óun wa…óanton koo ko dagaaki e …≤alaande fowteteende nden?¬ª
6.3: Kono Iisaa jaabii …ìe, wi'i: ¬´Hara on jangaali ko Daawuuda wa…óunoo kon fewndo o weelaa, kanko e yim…ìe wondunoo…ìe e makko …ìen?
6.4: O naati ka nder suudu Alla, o ∆¥etti bireediije wee…ìitaa…óe fii sadaka …óen, o …≤aami ko daganinoo *yottinoo…ìe sadaka …ìen tun kon, o okkori kadi wondu…ìe e makko …ìen.¬ª
6.5: Onsay o wi'i: ¬´Ko *∆Åii-Aaden on woni jom …≤alaande fowteteende nden.¬ª Fii no Iisaa Selliniri Maaya-Jungoojo (Mat. 12.9-14; Mrk. 3.1-6)
6.6: E aseweere goo, Iisaa naati ka juulirde, o woni e jannugol. Tawi go…ó…óo no nder ton mo jungo mun …≤aamo maayi.
6.7: Nde tawnoo jannoo…ìe fii Sariya on …ìen e Fariisiyaa…ìe …ìen no faalaa he…ìude ko …ìe lamitora, …ìe too…≤a Iisaa, tawi hi…ìe ndaara si o …≤awnday e asewe, …óun ko …≤alaande fowteteende nden.
6.8: Kono tawi Iisaa no andunoo …óin miijooji ma…ì…ìe. Onsay o wi'i maaya-jungoojo on: ¬´Immo daro…óaa ka hakkunde …óoo.¬ª On immii, darii.
6.9: Onsay Iisaa wi'i …ìe: ¬´Mi landike on, hara no dagii ka go…ó…óo wa…óa ko mo∆¥∆¥i maa ko boni, danda wonkii maa wona sabu makki e aseweere?¬ª
6.10: Onsay o ndaari …ìe fow, o wi'i on ne…ó…óo: ¬´Fontu jungo maa ngon.¬ª On fonti ngo, jungo makko ngon selli.
6.11: ∆äun tikkini Fariisiyaa…ìe …ìen e jannoo…ìe fii Sariya on …ìen fota, …ìe woni e yeddondirgol ko hon…óun …ìe wa…óata Iisaa. Fii no Iisaa Su…ìori Sahaabaa…ìe mun …ìen (Mat. 10.1-4; Mrk. 3.13-19)
6.12: E nder …óen bal…óe …óon, Iisaa yaari ka fello fii toragol Alla, o waali toraade.
6.13: ∆Åay weetii, o noddi taalibaa…ìe makko …ìen, o su…ìii sappoo e …ói…óo e ma…ì…ìe, o to…ó…óii …ìe *sahaabaa…ìe:
6.14: …óun ko Sim'uunu, on mo o jammi Petruusu, e Andaraawu neene-gooto Sim'uunu on, e Yaaquuba e Yuuhanna e Filiipu e Bartolomaawu
6.15: e Matta e Tooma e Yaaquuba mo Alfaa e Sim'uunu tawdaa…óo e fedde *Zelotii…ìe …ìen,
6.16: e Yahuuda mo Yaaquuba e Yudaasi Iskariiyu, janfoytoo…óo mo on. Fii Waaju ngun ka hoore Fello (Mat. 4.23-25; Mrk. 3.7-11)
6.17: Iisaa jippodi e …ìen taalibaa…ìe …ìe o su…ìii, o darii e nokkuure ndeylere ka falo. Tawi taalibaa…ìe makko …óuu…óu…ìe no e nden nokkuure, wondude e jamaa moolanaa…óo iwru…óo e cen…óe …óen fow e diiwal Yahuuda ngal e saare Yerusalaam nden e …óii ba≈ã≈ãeeji Tiiri e Siduuna ka daande baharu.
6.18: ∆Åen ko arnoo…ìe he…óagol mo e fii …≤awndegol …≤abbeeli mun. ∆Åe jinna tampinnoo …ìen sellinaa.
6.19: Awa kadi mo kala e ma…ì…ìe no faalanoo mo meemude, …ìay himo wondunoo e bawgal …≤awndaynoongal …ìe fow.
6.20: O …ìanti gite makko …óen, o ndaari taalibaa…ìe …ìen, o wi'i: ¬´On malii yo onon miskin…ìe, …ìay *laamu Alla ngun ko onon wonani.
6.21: On malii yo onon weelaa…ìe fewndo …óoo, …ìay on harnoyte. On malii yo onon wulloo…ìe fewndo …óoo, …ìay on weltoyto.
6.22: On wonay malaa…ìe nde yim…ìe …ìen a…≤i on e nde …ìe ra…óii on, …ìe yenni on, …ìe …≤iddini in…óe mon …óen sabu ∆Åii-Aaden on.
6.23: Nden …≤ande, weltee, ji…≤on welo-welo, …ìay hi…óon maranaa njoddi mawndi ka kammu, ko fii ko nii kadi maw…ìe ma…ì…ìe …ìen warraynoo annabaa…ìe …ìen.
6.24: Kono bone wonanii on onon al…óu…ìe …ìen, …ìay on hendike neweende ko mon kon!
6.25: Bone wonanii on onon …ìee haaru…ìe jooni, …ìay on weeloyte. Bone wonanii on onon …ìee jaloo…ìe hande, …ìay on yoomoyay wullon.
6.26: Bone wonanii on nde yim…ìe …ìen fow wowli on ko mo∆¥∆¥i, …ìay ko non maw…ìe ma…ì…ìe …ìen wowliraynoo fii …ìee wa…óitii…ìe annabaa…ìe.¬ª Fii Yi…óugol Ay…ìe mun
6.27: ¬´Kono min mi wi'ay on yo onon …ìee he…óii…ìe lan: Yi…óee ay…ìe mon …ìen, mo∆¥∆¥o…óon e a…≤u…ìe on …ìen,
6.28: du'ano…óon hu…óoo…ìe on …ìen, torano…óon tampinoo…ìe on …ìen.
6.29: Mo bantike ma e wa…ì…ìugo, tu…óan mo ngoya kadi. Mo jattii ma waramba, wota a ha…óu mo ∆¥ettude fokiya on kadi.
6.30: Okkor kala torii…óo ma, hara kadi a ∆¥antaali ko maa kon e juu…óe jattu…ìe ma …ìen.
6.31: Wa…óanee yim…ìe …ìen wano faalira…óon yo …ìe wa…óan on non.
6.32: ¬´Si on yi…óii yi…óu…ìe on …ìen, haray ko mo∆¥∆¥ere honde he…ìoyton? Ko fii hay junuubankee…ìe …ìen no yi…ói yi…óu…ìe …ìe …ìen.
6.33: Si on mo∆¥∆¥ike e mo∆¥∆¥ii…ìe e mo'on …ìen, haray ko mo∆¥∆¥ere honde he…ìoyton? Hay junuubanke'en ko non warrata.
6.34: Si on …≤awlii …ìe tan∆¥ini…óon yo…ìitay on …ìen, haray ko mo∆¥∆¥ere honde he…ìoyton? Hay junuubanke'en …≤awlindiray fii yo …ìe yo…ìitindir.
6.35: Kono yi…óee ay…ìe mon …ìen, wa…óanon …ìe ko mo∆¥∆¥i, …≤awlon …ìe hara on habbaaki yo…ìiteede. ∆äun on he…ìoyay njoddi mawndi, wonoyon kadi …ìi…ì…ìe Jom ∆Åural on, sabu himo mo∆¥∆¥ani dullu…ìe …ìen e bon…ìe …ìen.
6.36: Wonee yurmetee…ìe wano Baaba mon Jom ∆Åural on woniri Yurmetee…óo non.¬ª Fii ∆ùaawitagol (Mat. 7.1-5)
6.37: ¬´Wota on …≤aawu, …óun on …≤aawetaake. Wota on felu, …óun on feletaake. Yaafee, …óun on yaafoyte.
6.38: Okkee, …óun on okkorte. On etirante sariyaare ye…ó…óunde, timmunde, ye∆¥aande haa juuri, wa…óane…óon ka jiifaaji mon. Ko fii ko sariyaare nde etir…óon nden etirante…óon.¬ª
6.39: O wowlani …ìe ngal misal …óoo, o wi'i: ¬´Hara bun…óo no waawi …óowude bun…óo? Hara …ìe …ói…óoo non …ìe yanidaali e nder ngayka?
6.40: Taalibaajo …ìuraa karamoko mun. Kono kala taalibaajo eltii…óo wa'ay wa karamoko mun.
6.41: ¬´Ko honno yiirataa lojol wongol ka yiitere musi…ó…óo maa on, hara a yi'aali falimawal wongal ka yiitere maa ngal?
6.42: Ko honno wawrataa wi'ude musi…ó…óo maa: ‚ÄπMusi…ó…óo, accu mi ittane lojol ngol ka yiitere maa‚Ä∫, hara an, a wattanaali yiila e falimawal wongal ka yiitere maa ngal? Ko an yo faasiqiijo, ittu taho falimawal wongal ka yiitere maa ngal, onsay non a yi'ay no ittiranaa musi…ó…óo maa on lojol wongol ka yiitere makko ngol.¬ª Misal ∆≥ettaangal e Leggal e ∆Åi…ì…ìe Mun (Mat. 7.16-20, 12.33-35)
6.43: ¬´Leggal mo∆¥∆¥al rimataa …ìi…ì…ìe bon…ìe, wano non kadi leggal bongal rimataa …ìi…ì…ìe mo∆¥∆¥u…ìe.
6.44: Leggal kala no anditiree …ìi…ì…ìe mun: ko fii on ittataa ∆¥ibbe e bulle-ko…≤on, wano non kadi on ittataa sungala e bulle-bete.
6.45: Ne…ó…óo mo∆¥∆¥o on yaltinay mo∆¥∆¥ere ka mo∆¥∆¥uki …ìernde mun, ne…ó…óo bon…óo on kadi yaltina bonki ka bonki mun, ko fii ko ko heewi e …ìernde woo hunduko wowlata.¬ª Fii ∆ùinnugol Waajuuji …óin (Mat. 7.24-27)
6.46: ¬´Ko fii hon…óun noddanton mi ‚ÄπKoohoojo, Koohoojo‚Ä∫, hara on wa…óataa ko mi wi'i on kon?
6.47: Kala ne…ó…óo ar…óo e an, nani waajuuji an …óin huutori …ói, mi hollay on no on wa'i.
6.48: On no wa'i wa darnu…óo suudu. Hara o jasu gaawol luggungol haa e fetere, o fu…ó…óii …óon mahude. Nde waamere nden wa…ói, ndiyan …óan ari e suudu ndun, …óan waawataa ndu dillinde, ko fii daroodi mayru on no tii…ói.
6.49: Kono kala nanu…óo kongu…ói an …óin, huutoraali …ói, on no wa'i wa darnu…óo suudu ndu jasanaaka gaawol. Ilol ndiyan …óan hawri e mayru tun, ndu yani kisan, fii mayru on mula few.¬ª

7.1: ∆Åay o gaynii waajaade jamaa he…óitii…óo mo on, o naati Kafernahuum.
7.2: Tawi hooreejo suufaa…ìe teemedere no mari kurkaadu ndu o yi…óunoo, hari ndun no nawni haa moggo mayde.
7.3: ∆Åay o nanii fii Iisaa, o nuli maw…ìe *Yahuudiyankee…ìe goo e makko fii toragol mo arugol …≤awndana mo ndun kurkaadu makko.
7.4: ∆Åay …ìe arii …ìe tawii Iisaa, …ìe jeeji mo …ìe multi, …ìe wi'i: ¬´Himo handi e wa…óaneede …óun,
7.5: ko fii himo yi…ói le…≤ol men ngol, awa-le kadi ko kanko darni juulirde amen nden.¬ª
7.6: Iisaa yaadi e ma…ì…ìe. ∆Åay o …ìattike suudu hooreejo suufaa…ìe …ìen, on suufaajo nuli yi…ì…ìe mun goo e Iisaa ko wi'a mo: ¬´Koohoojo, wota on tampintino, sabu mi foddaa e mo'on ka suudu an.
7.7: Ko …óun wa…ói si min tigi mi foddaa e arugol haa ka mon. Kono maakee tun kongol gootol, kurkaadu an ndun ndikkay.
7.8: Ko fii min tigi ko mi won…óo e ley kongol hooree…ìe goo, min kadi mi…óo mari suufaa…ìe won…ìe e ley kongol an. Si mi wi'ii go…ó…óo e …ìen ‚Äπyahu‚Ä∫, o yahay. Si mi wi'ii oya on ‚Äπaru‚Ä∫, o aray. Awa kadi si mi wi'ii kurkaadu an ndun ‚Äπwa…óu …óun‚Ä∫, ndu wa…óay.¬ª
7.9: ∆Åay Iisaa nanii …óin kongu…ói makko, o ≈ãal…ói, o fewti e jamaa jokku…óo mo on, o wi'i …ìe: ¬´Mi andinii on, hay ka *Isra'iila'en mi yi'aali ne…ó…óo gom…óinir…óo wa oo.¬ª
7.10: ∆Åay nulanoo…ìe …ìen yiltitike ka suudu, …ìe tawti kurkaadu nawnunoondu ndun ndikkii. Fii no ∆Åi…ó…óo Keynguujo on Wurnitiraa
7.11: E nder …óen bal…óe …óon, Iisaa yahi e saare wi'eteende Naa'ina, taalibaa…ìe makko …ìen wondude e jamaa …óuu…óu…óo yaadi e makko.
7.12: Ko o hewtaynoo ka naatirgal saare, o fotti e rondii…ìe furee, hari on furee ko …ìi…ó…óo bajjo ka neene mun, tawi kadi neene makko ko keynguujo. Tawi jamaa …óuu…óu…óo e nden saare no wondi e on debbo.
7.13: ∆Åay Koohoojo on yi'ii on keynguujo, o yurmaa mo, o wi'i mo: ¬´Wota a wullu!¬ª
7.14: O …ìadii furee on, o *fawi jungo makko ngon e hoore goyki kin, rondii…ìe furee on dartii, o wi'i: ¬´Suka, mi yamirii ma yo a immo!¬ª
7.15: Onsay may…óo on immii joo…óii, o fu…ó…óii yewtude. Iisaa jonniti mo yumma makko.
7.16: ∆Åe fow …ìe huli, …ìe manti Alla, …ìe wi'i: ¬´Annabaajo kel…óu…óo fee…≤ii e fewndo men. Allaahu on arii faabagol yim…ìe mun …ìen!¬ª
7.17: Fii ngal kuugal makko lolli e diiwal Yahuuda ngal haa e ba≈ã≈ãeeji heedu…ói …óon …óin fow. Fii Lande Yaayaa …óen (Mat. 11.2-19)
7.18: Taalibaa…ìe Yaayaa …ìen humpiti mo kanko Yaayaa kon ko wa…ói fow.
7.19: Yaayaa noddi …ói…óo e taalibaa…ìe mun …ìen, o immini …ìe e Koohoojo on yo …ìe lando mo: ¬´Taw si ko onon woni haanu…óo arude on, kaa hara yo men habbo go…ó…óo goo?¬ª
7.20: ∆Åay …ìen imminaa…ìe hewtii, …ìe wi'i Iisaa: ¬´Ko Yaayaa *lootoowo maande tuubuubuyee on immini men haa e mon fii landagol on si ko onon woni haanu…óo arude on, kaa hara yo men habbo go…ó…óo goo?¬ª
7.21: Ko e on saa'i mo …ìe hewti e mun tigi, Iisaa sellini …≤aw…ìe e jukku…ìe buy e jinnaa…ìe, o wuntini kadi bum…ìe buy.
7.22: Ontuma o jaabii …ìen …ìe Yaayaa immini, o wi'i …ìe: ¬´Yahee fillitano…óon Yaayaa ko yi'u…óon kon e ko nanu…óon kon wonde, bum…ìe …ìen yi'ii, boofoo…ìe …ìen yahii, …ìe …óamajan …ìen sellinaama, …ìe laa…ìii, pahi…óu…ìe …ìen nanii, may…ìe no immintineede, Kibaaru Mo∆¥∆¥o on no fe…≤…≤inaneede miskin…ìe …ìen.
7.23: Kala mo feggaaki e an ko malaa…óo.
7.24: ∆Åay …ìen …ìe Yaayaa nelunoo yiltitike, onsay Iisaa fu…ó…óii yewtude jamaa on fii Yaayaa, o landii …ìe …óun…óoo, o wi'i: ¬´Ko hon…óun yahuno…óon ndaaroygol ka wulaa? Hara ko ku…óol ngol hendu ndun dimbata?
7.25: Kaa ko hon…óun yahuno…óon ndaarugol? Ko ne…ó…óo …ìornii…óo conci dimi? Ndaaree …ìee …ìornii…ìe conci dimi, wuuru…ìe ngurndan mo∆¥∆¥an no e nder galleeji laamu.
7.26: Ko hon…óun non yahuno…óon ndaarugol? Ko annabaajo? Hiiyii, min mi wi'ay on, ko ko …ìuri annabaajo.
7.27: Ko oo …óoo woni mo fii mun windii on: ‚ÄπAwa, mi…óo imminde nulaa…óo an on yeeso maa, fii ko fertano-maa laawol maa ngol.‚Ä∫
7.28: ¬´Mi andinii on, alaa mo suddii…óo jibini …ìur…óo Yaayaa. Kono non …ìur…óo fan…óude on ka laamateeri Alla no …ìuri mo teddude.¬ª
7.29: (Jamaa he…óinoo…óo mo on e ∆¥antoo…ìe sagalle …ìen ja…ìi laawol Alla feewungol ngol e nder ko …ìe lootanoo maande tuubuubuyee ko Yaayaa lootaynoo kon.
7.30: Kono Fariisiyaa…ìe …ìen e waawu…ìe fii Sariya …ìen bugitii ko Allaahu on e…ì…ìannoo …ìe kon, …ìe salii Yaayaa loota …ìe maande tuubuubuyee.)
7.31: ¬´Hara ko e hon…óun mi e…ì…ìindirta …ìee yim…ìe nguu jamaanu? E ko hon…óun …ìe nandi?
7.32: Hi…ìe nandi e fay…ìe joo…óii…ìe e kubitirde, hara …ìen no noddindira, wi'a: ‚ÄπMen wuttanii on ceri, on amaali, men yimanii on gim…ói yurmu…ói, on wullaali!‚Ä∫
7.33: ¬´Ko fii Yaayaa lootoowo maande tuubuubuyee on arno, o …≤aamataano ko defaa, o yarataano ko mandilinta, wi'u…óon: ‚ÄπOn ko mo jinna!‚Ä∫
7.34: ∆Åii-Aaden* on kadi arii no …≤aama no yara, wi'u…óon: ‚ÄπOn ko reere…óu…óo, yaroowo, weldu…óo e ∆¥antoo…ìe sagalle e junuubanke'en!‚Ä∫
7.35: Kono ja…ìu…ìe faamu Allaahu on …ìen hollay wonde ko ngu feewungu.¬ª Fii no Debbo Junuubankeejo on Yaaforaa
7.36: Fariisiyaajo goo wi'etee…óo Sim'uunu torii Iisaa hawtidugol e makko. Iisaa naati ka suudu Fariisiyaajo on, o toolii fii nafagol.
7.37: Tawi debbo junuubankeejo no e nden saare, on humpitii Iisaa no nafaade ka suudu Fariisiyaajo on. O ardi e tindohun hayre daneere tew angiri,
7.38: o wontiri …ìaawo Iisaa, o ugginii ka hoore koy…óe makko, o wulli haa gon…ói makko …óin …ìu…ì…ìini koy…óe Iisaa …óen. Ontuma debbo on fittiri …óe sukundu mun ndun, o lunnii …óe, o wuji …óe angiri.
7.39: ∆Åay Fariisiyaajo noddunoo…óo Iisaa on yi'ii …óun, o wi'i e …ìernde makko: ¬´Si tawno oo ko annabaajo, o andayno ko hombo woni oo debbo meemu…óo mo e ko honno on sifori, sabu oo ko junuubankeejo!¬ª
7.40: Iisaa ∆¥etti haala kan, wi'i: ¬´Sim'uunu, no woodi ko mi haalanay-maa.¬ª On jaabii: ¬´Maakee yo karamoko'en.¬ª
7.41: O wi'i: ¬´Go…ó…óo no …≤awlunoo yim…ìe …ói…óo. Gooto on no joganii mo *dinaruuji teeme…ó…óe jowi, oya on ko *dinaruuji cappan…óe jowi.
7.42: ∆Åay …ìen he…ìaali ko yo…ìitira mo, o yaafanii …ìe …ói…óoo non ko …ìe …≤awlii mo kon. Ko hombo e …ìen …ói…óo …ìurata mo yi…óude?¬ª
7.43: Sim'uunu jaabii: ¬´Haray ko …ìur…óo …≤amaande tii…óunde on.¬ª Onsay Iisaa wi'i mo: ¬´A …≤aawirii no mo∆¥∆¥iri.¬ª
7.44: O fewti e debbo on, o wi'i Sim'uunu: ¬´A yi'ii oo debbo? An, mi naatii ka suudu maa, a okkoraali lan ndiyan ko mi sembora, kono oo …óoo …ìu…ì…ìinirii koy…óe an …óen gon…ói mun …óin, o fittirii …óe sukundu makko ndun.
7.45: A hirbanooki lan lunni…óaa, kono kanko gila mi naati …óoo, himo lunnaade lan koy…óe …óen.
7.46: A wa…óaali nebban ka hoore an, kono kanko o wa…óii angiri ka koy…óe an.
7.47: Awa mi andinii ma, junuubaaji makko e …óuu…óude yaafaama, ko …óun wa…ói si giggol makko ngol no tii…ói. Kono mo yaafaama see…óa, ko see…óa yi…óata.¬ª
7.48: Onsay o wi'i debbo on: ¬´Junuubaaji maa …óin yaafaama.¬ª
7.49: Onsay …≤aamidaynoo…ìe e makko …ìen miijii e …ìer…óe mun: ¬´Ko hombo woni oo ne…ó…óo yaafotoo…óo hay junuubaaji?¬ª
7.50: Ontuma o wi'i debbo on: ¬´Gom…óinal maa ngal dandii ma. Yahu e hoore …ìuttu.¬ª

8.1: ∆Åawto …óun, Iisaa yahayno gila e saare he…ìi e saare, gila e ho…óo haa e ko…óolun wondude e *sahaabaa…ìe makko …ìen sappoo e …ói…óo, hara himo waajoo fe…≤…≤ina Kibaaru Mo∆¥∆¥o *laamu Alla ngun.
8.2: Himo wondunoo kadi e rew…ìe goo …≤awndaa…ìe jinnaaji bon…ói e …≤abbeeli, wano Mariyama oo jammaa…óo Mariyama Magaduuna, mo jinnaaji jee…ói…ói yaltinaa e mun,
8.3: e Yuuwanna on ko sonnaajo Kuusa oo mbatulaajo *Heroodu, e Suusanatu, e wo…ì…ìe goo wallitoraynoo…ìe …ìe keyeeji mun. Misal ∆≥ettaangal e Remoowo (Mat. 13.1-23; Mrk. 4.1-20)
8.4: Jamaa njano moo…ìii, yim…ìe buy iwri e ca'e heewu…óe, ari e makko. O wa…óani …ìe ngal misal …óoo:
8.5: ¬´Ko remoowo yaltunoo sankugol awdi mun ndin. E nder ko o sankata kon, gabbe goo yani ka …óatal, fe∆¥∆¥oo…ìe …ìen yaa…ìi, colli …óin kadi mo…ói …óe.
8.6: Go…ó…óe …óen yani e hoore fetere, no …óe fu…óirnoo, …óe yoori, …ìay …óe alaa e …ìuu…ìol.
8.7: Go…ó…óe goo kadi yani ka soo∆¥oore, …óe fu…óidi e mayre, soo∆¥oore nden mo…ói …óe.
8.8: Go…ó…óe goo yani ka leydi mo∆¥∆¥iri. ∆äe fu…ói, …óe rimi cawti …ói gabbe teemedere.¬ª Wa fewndo ko o yewtaynoo …óun, o ewnii, o wi'i: ¬´Mo no mari noppi nanir…ói yo nanu!¬ª
8.9: Onsay taalibaa…ìe makko …ìen landii mo ko ngal misal …óoo firi.
8.10: O jaabii …ìe: ¬´Onon on ye…óaama andugol gundooji laamu Alla ngun. Kono …ìeya luttu…ìe, …óun wowlirante …ìe mise, fii yo …ìe ndaaru, hara …ìe yi'ataa, yo …ìe nanu, hara …ìe faamataa.
8.11: ¬´E hino ko ngal misal firi: Awdi ndin ko daalol Alla ngol.
8.12: Nde awdi sankaandi ndin saami ka …óatal, …óun no wa'i wa nde wo…ì…ìe nani daalol ngol, kono Ibuliisa ara itta ngol e …ìer…óe ma…ì…ìe fii wota …ìe gom…óin sakko …ìe dandee.
8.13: Nde awdi sankaandi ndin saami ka fetere, …óun no wa'i wa nde wo…ì…ìe nani daalol ngol, …ìe ja…ìira ngol weltaare. Kono …ìe alaa …óa…ói. ∆Åe gom…óinay haa e saa'i, kono si …ìe ndarndaama, …ìe tertoo.
8.14: Nde awdi sankaandi ndin saami ka soo∆¥oore, …óun no wa'i wa nde wo…ì…ìe nani daalol ngol, kono hara …ìe mo…óiraama anndeeji aduna e jawle aduna e faaleeji ngurndan aduna e nder yaadu ma…ì…ìe ndun, …ìe ronka rimude mo∆¥∆¥a.
8.15: Nde awdi sankaandi ndin saami ka leydi mo∆¥∆¥iri, …óun no wa'i wa nde wo…ì…ìe naniri daaluyee on …ìernde laa…ìunde mo∆¥∆¥unde, jogitoo mara. Ko …ìen woni rimoo…ìe e nder wakkilaare. Misal ∆≥ettaangal e Lampu (Mrk. 4.21-25)
8.16: ¬´Hay gooto hu…ì…ìintaa lampu buuma mo maa sorna mo e ley danki. Kono o jo…ó…óinay mo e kene fii no naatoo…ìe …ìen yi'ira ndaygu ngun.
8.17: Ko fii alaa ko suu…óii ko fee…≤ataa, kala gundoo ko sakkitorta ko fee…≤oygol.
8.18: Awa wattanee yiila e no he…óorton non, ko fii ko mar…óo …ìeydantee, kono mo maraa on ja…ìitante hay ko o sikki himo mari kon.¬ª Fii ∆Åeynguure Iisaa nden (Mat. 12.46-50; Mrk. 3.31-35)
8.19: Yumma Iisaa e yumma-gootoo…ìe makko …ìen ari, kono …ìe waawaali tumbondirde e makko hakkee yim…ìe.
8.20: O humpitaa wonde: ¬´Yumma mon e yumma-gootoo…ìe mon …ìen no darii ka yaasi, hi…ìe faalaa yiidude e mon.
8.21: Kono o jaabii …ìe, o wi'i: ¬´Yumma an e yumma-gootoo…ìe an …ìen ko he…óotoo…ìe daaluyee Alla on, …≤inna mo.¬ª Fii no Iisaa Dee∆¥iniri Waabiliire nden (Mat. 8.23-27; Mrk. 4.35-41)
8.22: ∆ùande goo Iisaa bakii e laakun wondude e taalibaa…ìe mun …ìen. O wi'i …ìe: ¬´Lumbiten ka ga…óa weendu.¬ª ∆Åe yahi.
8.23: E nder ko …ìe lumbata kon, Iisaa …óaanii. Waabiliire tii…óunde wondunde e hendu tippii ka weendu, laakun kun fu…ó…óii heewude ndiyan, …óun wonani …ìe nawaare hul…ìiniinde.
8.24: ∆Åe ari, …ìe findini mo, …ìe wi'i: ¬´Karamoko'en, Karamoko'en, en mulay woni!¬ª O immii, o to≈ãani hendu ndun e morloo…óe ndiyan …óen, …óe dee∆¥iti, onsay …ìuttu wa…ói.
8.25: Ontuma o wi'i …ìe: ¬´Ko honto gom…óinal mon ngal woni?¬ª ∆Åe huli, …ìe ≈ãal…ói, hi…ìe wi'indira: ¬´Ko hombo woni oo ne…ó…óo yamiroowo hay hendu ndun e ndiyan …óan, …óun …óoftoo mo?¬ª Fii no Iisaa Selliniri Jinnaa…óo (Mat. 8.28-34; Mrk. 5.1-20)
8.26: ∆Åe hewtoyi e ndii leydi …ìee Gadariyankoo…ìe tiindondirndi e ngal diiwal Jaliilu.
8.27: ∆Åay Iisaa jippike ka leydi, ne…ó…óo jeyaa…óo e nden saare mo jinnaaji buy nangi, ari e makko. Tawi gila nee…ìii o …ìornotaako conci, o naatataa e suudu, ko ka hakkunde genaale o ho…óunoo.
8.28: No o yiirunoo Iisaa, o sonki, o yani e ley koy…óe makko, o ewnii, himo wi'a: ¬´Ko hon…óun faalana…óaa lan an Iisaa *∆Åi…ó…óo Alla Jom ∆Åural on? Mi torike ma wota a lettan!¬ª
8.29: Ngii jinnawii bonngii wi'i …óun sabu ko Iisaa yamiraynoo ngin yaltugol e oo ne…ó…óo kon. Tawi ngin jinnawii nangayno mo soono woo, o dumbee juu…óe e koy…óe fii aynugol mo, kono o bonnayno …óen jolokooje fow, onsay jinnawii ngin nawra mo ka wulaaji.
8.30: Onsay Iisaa landii mo: ¬´Ko honno innete…óaa?¬ª Tawde hari jinnaaji buy no e makko, o jaabii: ¬´Ko Konu.¬ª
8.31: Awa kadi hi…ói jeejaynoo Iisaa fii wota o yamir …ói yahugol ka *gaygii ngin alaa kattudi ngin.
8.32: Tawi wuro kose moolanaango no ooraynoo ka falo. Onsay jinnaaji …óin jeeji Iisaa yo o accu …ói naata e …óin koseeji. O newnani …ói …óun.
8.33: Jinnaaji …óin yalti e on ne…ó…óo, …ói naati e nder …óin koseeji. Onsay koseeji …óin giddi ka falo, …ói unoyii ka weendu, …ói yoolii.
8.34: ∆Åay ornaynoo…ìe …ói …ìen yi'ii …óun, …ìe dogi, …ìe fillitoyii …óun ka saare e ka fulawaaji.
8.35: Onsay yim…ìe …ìen ari yi'ugol kon ko wa…ói. ∆Åe ari e Iisaa, …ìe tawi on ne…ó…óo mo jinnaaji …óin yalti e mun no joo…óii ka ley koy…óe Iisaa, himo …ìornii, himo wondi e hakkille timmu…óe, …ìe huli.
8.36: Yi'unoo…ìe ko wa…ói kon fillitanii …ìe no jinnanoo…óo on selliniraa.
8.37: Onsay jeyaa…ìe e diiwal Gadariyankoo…ìe …ìen fow torii mo yaltugol ka ma…ì…ìe sabu kulol ngol …ìe he…ìi …óon ngol. Ontuma Iisaa bakii ka laakun yiltitii.
8.38: Onsay ne…ó…óo mo jinnaaji …óin yaltinaa e mun on torii Iisaa wondugol e makko. Kono Iisaa yilti mo, o wi'i mo:
8.39: ¬´Hootu ka mon, fillitoyo…óaa ko Alla wa…óan-maa kon.¬ª Onsay o yahi, o ukkii ka saare, o fillitii kala ko Iisaa wa…óani mo kon. Fii no Iisaa Wurnitiri Jiwo, O Sellini Debbo (Mat. 9.18-26; Mrk. 5.21-43)
8.40: ∆Åay Iisaa lumbitii, jamaa on ja…ì…ìii mo, ko fii hari fow no sabbii mo.
8.41: Tun oo hooreejo juulirde ma…ì…ìe wi'etee…óo Yaayirusu ari e makko. Onsay o yani e ley koy…óe Iisaa, o torii mo hewtugol ka suudu makko,
8.42: …ìay tawi jiwo makko bajjo mo wa duu…ìi sappoo e …ói…ói no e daande mayde. Wa fewndo kanko Iisaa o yahata ka oo ne…ó…óo, tawi jamaa on no …ìittiri mo cen…óe …óen fow.
8.43: Tawi kadi debbo no e nden nokkuure, he…ìii duu…ìi sappoo e …ói…ói, himo soncaade. Awa kadi o ittii jawle makko fow o yo…ìii …≤awndoo…ìe …ìen, kono hay gooto e ma…ì…ìe waawaali mo sellinde.
8.44: On debbo wontiri …ìaawo Iisaa. No o meemirnoo kombol dolokke makko on, ko o soncotonoo kon ta∆¥i.
8.45: Onsay Iisaa wi'i: ¬´Ko hombo meemimmi?¬ª Tun mo kala wi'i wonaa ka…≤un. Onsay Petruusu wi'i: ¬´Karamoko'en, jamaa on no hundi on, awa kadi hi…ìe hi…ì…ìii on!¬ª
8.46: Kono Iisaa jaabii, o wi'i: ¬´Go…ó…óo meemii lan, ko fii mi andii wonde bawgal an ngal gollii go…ó…óun.¬ª
8.47: Nde debbo on tawnoo ko o wa…ói kon pulfitike, o ari himo diwna, o yani e ley koy…óe Iisaa, o fur…≤iti yeeso jamaa on fow ko fii hon…óun o meemani mo e ko honno kadi o selliniraa …óon kisan.
8.48: Onsay Iisaa wi'i mo: ¬´Jiwo an, gom…óinal maa ngal sellinii ma. Yahu e hoore …ìuttu.¬ª
8.49: Wa fewndo ko Iisaa yewtata …óun, gorko jeyaa…óo ka hooreejo juulirde nden ari, wi'i mo: ¬´Jiwo maa on maayii. Hay terti…óaa sonjugol oo karamokoojo.¬ª
8.50: Kono …ìay Iisaa nanii …óun, o wi'i hooreejo juulirde nden: ¬´Wota a hulu, gom…óin tun, jiwo maa on hisay.¬ª
8.51: ∆Åay Iisaa hewtii ka hooreejo juulirde nden, o ja…ìaano naatidude hay e gooto ka suudu si hinaa Petruusu e Yaaquuba e Yuuhanna wondude e yumma jiwo on e ben jiwo on.
8.52: Tawi fow no wulla fesa fii on jiwo. Onsay Iisaa wi'i: ¬´Wota on wullu mo, ko fii o maayaali, o …óaani.¬ª
8.53: Onsay …ìe jali mo, ko fii hi…ìe andi jiwo on maayii.
8.54: Onsay Iisaa nangi jungo jiwo on, o ewnii, o wi'i: ¬´Jiwo, immo!¬ª
8.55: Tun wonkii jiwo on arti, o immii …óon kisan. Onsay Iisaa yamiri …ìe okkorgol mo …≤aametee.
8.56: Kaawee he…ìi maw…ìe jiwo on. Kono o yamiri …ìe wota …ìe wowlan hay gooto kon ko wa…ói …óon.

9.1: O noddi …ìe o su…ìunoo …ìen sappoo e …ói…óo, o okki …ìe bawgal e doole e hoore jinnaaji …óin fow e fii sellingol …≤abbeeli.
9.2: O immini …ìe waajoyagol fii *laamu Alla ngun e sellingol …≤aw…ìe …ìen.
9.3: O wi'i …ìe: ¬´Wota on yoo…ìo hay huunde e nder yaadu mon ndun, gila e tuggordu maa bonfo maa …≤aametee goo haa na…ìani e kaalisi. Awa kadi wota on yoo…ìo dolokkaaji …ói…ói.¬ª
9.4: O wi'i …ìe kadi: ¬´Kala suudu ka naatoy…óon, weeree …óon haa tuma fokkitu…óon woo,
9.5: e kala saare nde yim…ìe …ìen ja…ìaali on e mun, nde hi…óon yalta …óon woo, honkee mbullaari teppe mon …óen fii yo …óun wonan …ìe seedee ella ma…ì…ìe on.¬ª
9.6: Onsay …ìe yahi ko…óolun e ko…óolii, hi…ìe waajoo fii Kibaaru Mo∆¥∆¥o on e kadi hi…ìe sellina hen fow …≤aw…ìe …ìen. Fii ≈äalaw Heroodu on (Mat. 14.1-12; Mrk. 6.14-16)
9.7: Heroodu* lan…óo diiwal Jaliilu ngal humpitii fii ko woni wa…óude kon, …óun jii…ìi mo …ìernde, sabu hari wo…ì…ìe no wi'a ko Yaayaa immintinaa e hakkunde may…ìe …ìen,
9.8: wo…ì…ìe …ìen no wi'a wondema ko Iiliiya fee…≤iti, wo…ì…ìe goo no wi'a wondema ko go…ó…óo e annabaa…ìe hi…ì…ìe …ìen immitii.
9.9: Kono Heroodu wi'i: ¬´Mi ta∆¥iino daande Yaayaa nden, e hara ko hombo woni oo mo mi nanata fii mun nii?¬ª Gila …óun himo etoo no o yi'ira mo. Fii no Iisaa ∆ùamminiri Yim…ìe Guluuje Njowo (Mat. 14.13-21; Mrk. 6.30-44; Yhn. 6.1-14)
9.10: ∆Åay …ìen *sahaabaa…ìe …ìe o imminnoo hewtitii, …ìe sifanii mo kanko Iisaa ko …ìe wa…óoyi kon fow. Onsay o yaadi e ma…ì…ìe haa e takko ndee saare Bayti-Sa'iida, …ìe bakitii …óon.
9.11: No yim…ìe …ìen humpitornoo …óun, …ìe jokki mo. Onsay Iisaa tolni …ìe, o yewti …ìe fii laamu Alla ngun, o …≤awndi kadi …ìen hatonjin…ìe e …≤awndeede.
9.12: Tawi …≤allal ngal wo…ó…óike. Onsay sappoo e …ói…óoo…ìe …ìen ari e makko, …ìe wi'i mo: ¬´Accitee non jamaa on, …ìe yaha ka ko…óooli e ka fulawaaji kawtir…ói e …óoo, …ìe …óa…ì…ìoya ko …ìe …≤aama e ka …ìe waaloo, ko fii ko e nokkuure wul…óinnde won…óen …óoo.¬ª
9.13: Onsay Iisaa wi'i …ìe: ¬´Onon tigi okkoree …ìe ko …ìe …≤aama.¬ª Kono …ìe jaabii, …ìe wi'i: ¬´Ko bireediije jowi e li∆¥∆¥i …ói…ói pet men mari …óoo, si hinaa hara menen tigi men yahay men soodoya ko oo jamaa …óoo fow …≤aama!¬ª
9.14: Tawi wor…ìe won…ìe …óon …ìen tun ko wa …ìe guluuje njowo. Onsay Iisaa yamiri taalibaa…ìe mun …ìen, wi'i: ¬´Jo…ó…óiniree …ìe mojobe mojobe, mojobere kala cappan…óe njowo.¬ª
9.16: Onsay Iisaa ∆¥etti bireediije …óen jowi e li∆¥∆¥i …óin …ói…ói, o …ìanti gite makko …óen, o fewti ka kammu, o du'ii. Ontuma o ta∆¥iti …óe, o woni e jonnugol taalibaa…ìe makko …ìen fii yo …ìen hewtin jamaa on.
9.17: Fow …≤aami haa haari. ∆Åe moo…ìiti debeeje sappoo e …ói…ói kunte ko lutti. Fii Qirritannde Petruusu nden (Mat. 16.13-19; Mrk. 8.27-30)
9.18: ∆ùande goo tawi Iisaa no wondi e taalibaa…ìe mun …ìen ka wirnii, himo toraade Alla. Ontuma o landii …ìe …óun…óoo, o wi'i: ¬´E wi'i jamaa on, ko hombo woni lan min?¬ª
9.19: ∆Åe jaabii mo, …ìe wi'i: ¬´Wo…ì…ìe no wi'a ko onon woni Yaayaa lootaynoo…óo on, wo…ì…ìe kadi no wi'a ko onon woni Iiliiya, wo…ì…ìe goo kadi no wi'a ko on annabaajo ki…ó…óo goo immintinaa.¬ª
9.20: Onsay o landii …ìe, o wi'i: ¬´Onon non wi'u…óon ko hombo woni lan min?¬ª Petruusu jaabii mo, wi'i: ¬´Ko onon woni *Almasiihu Alla on.¬ª
9.21: Iisaa yamiri …ìe, tentini, wota …ìe wowlan …óun hay gooto.
9.22: O …ìeyditi e …óun, o wi'i: ¬´Maa *∆Åii-Aaden on tampa fota, maw…ìe …ìen e hooree…ìe *yottinoo…ìe sadaka …ìen e jannoo…ìe fii Sariya on …ìen fow wikkoo mo, o waree, o immintinoyee ka …≤alaande tammere.¬ª
9.23: Onsay o wi'i …ìe fow wonde: ¬´Kala faalaa…óo jokkude lan, yo o hayfintino, o ∆¥etta …≤ande woo …≤ande *leggal makko altindiraangal ngal, o jokkammi.
9.24: Kala faalaa…óo dandude ngurndan mun, …óan hayriray mo, kono kala non mo ngurndan mun hayriraa sabu an min, haray ontigi dandoyay …óan.
9.25: E ko nafa hon…óun woodani ne…ó…óo he…ìugol aduna on fow si o hayrintinike maa si o halkitike kanko tigi?
9.26: Awa kadi, kala hersir…óo lan, hersiri kongu…ói an …óin, ∆Åii-Aaden on kadi hersiroyay mo tuma o ardoyi e mangural makko ngal e mangural Baabaajo on wondude e malaa'ikaa…ìe laa…ìu…ìe …ìen.
9.27: Mi…óo wowlande on goonga, no woodi wo…ì…ìe e mon onon won…ìe …óoo …ìen, …ìe maayataa ado …ìe yi'ude laamu Alla ngun.¬ª Fii Waylannde Mbaadi Iisaa ndin (Mat. 17.1-8; Mrk. 9.2-8)
9.28: ∆Åay wa bal…óe jeetati fe∆¥∆¥ii …ìawto yewtugol mo …ìe …óin kongu…ói, onsay o noddi Petruusu e Yuuhanna e Yaaquuba, …ìe yahi ka fello fii toragol Alla.
9.29: Fewndo ko o torotoo, mbaadi yeeso makko ngon waylii, dolokke makko on wonti daneejo jalbu…óo.
9.30: E nder …óun, yim…ìe …ói…óo fee…≤i no yewtida e makko, tawi …ìen-le ko Muusaa e Iiliiya.
9.31: ∆Åen no fee…≤idi e annoora, hi…ìe yewta fii yaadu makko sakkitordu ndun Yerusalaam.
9.32: Tawi Petruusu e wondi…ì…ìe mun …ìen no so∆¥∆¥aade, kono …ìe ≈ãonti, …ìe yi'i annoora Iisaa on e …ìen yim…ìe …ói…óo …ìe o wondunoo e mun.
9.33: Fewndo …ìee yim…ìe …ói…óo seedata e Iisaa, Petruusu wi'i mo: ¬´Karamoko'en, no mo∆¥∆¥i ka wonen …óoo. Darnen togooji tati, onon wonndu, Muusaa wonndu, Iiliiya kadi wonndu.¬ª Tawi kanko Petruusu o andaa ko o woni wowlude.
9.34: Wa fewndo ko o wowlata …óun, duulere ari buumi …ìe. Ko nden duulere buumata …ìe, …ìe huli.
9.35: Onsay hawa yalti ka duulere, no wi'a: ¬´Oo …óoo ko ∆Åi…ó…óo an Su…ìaa…óo on. He…óitee mo!¬ª
9.36: ∆Åay ngol ewol wa…óii, …ìe tawi ko Iisaa tun lutti …óon. Taalibaa…ìe …ìen mari …óun fanki. ∆Åe fillitanaaki hay gooto kon ko …ìe yi'i …óon e nder …óen bal…óe …óon. Fii no Iisaa Selliniri Paykun Jinnaakun (Mat. 17.14-18; Mrk. 9.14-27)
9.37: Bimbi nden …≤ande ko …ìe jippotoo ka ley fello, jamaa moolanaa…óo ari fottugol e Iisaa.
9.38: Onsay gorko goo ewnii ka hakkunde jamaa ton, o wi'i: ¬´Karamoko'en, mi torike on ten∆¥inee oo …ìi…ó…óo an, ko fii ko bajjo an on nii.
9.39: Nde jinnawii ngin nangi mo woo, o sonkay, o iiroo, o yaltina ngurda. Ngii letta mo, awa kadi ko karahan ngii yaltirta e makko.
9.40: Mi torike taalibaa…ìe mon …ìen ra…óagol ngii jinnawii, kono …ìe waawaali.¬ª
9.41: Iisaa jaabii, wi'i: ¬´Onon ko on jamaanu …ìoyliingu ngu gom…óinaa. Ko haa honde tuma mi wondata e mon, mi…óo mu…≤…≤anoo on? Awa addu …óoo …ìi…ó…óo maa on.¬ª
9.42: Wa ko o …ìannata paykun kun, jinnawii ngin li…ìi kun ka leydi, kun iirii. Kono Iisaa to≈ãani ngii. Onsay o sellini paykun kun, o jonniti kun ben makkun.
9.43: Fow ≈ãal…ói fii mangural Allaahu on. Fii no Iisaa Hiitori fii Mayde mun nden (Mat. 17.22-23; Mrk. 9.30-32) Wa fewndo ko fow ≈ãal…óidi e ko o wa…óaynoo kon kanko Iisaa, onsay o wi'i taalibaa…ìe …ìen:
9.44: ¬´Onon he…óitee fota …óii kongu…ói …óoo: ∆Åii-Aaden on janfoyte, wattee e juu…óe yim…ìe …ìen.¬ª
9.45: Kono hari taalibaa…ìe …ìen alaa faamude …óin kongu…ói, sabu hari hi…ói wirnanii …ìe fii wota …ìe andu ko …ói firi. Awa kadi hari hi…ìe huli landitagol mo …ói. Fii ∆Åur…óo Teddude on e Hakkunde Ma…ì…ìe (Mat. 18.1-5; Mrk. 9.33-37)
9.46: Onsay yeddondiral wa…ói hakkunde ma…ì…ìe fii andugol ko hombo e ma…ì…ìe …ìuri teddude.
9.47: Nde tawnoo Iisaa ka…≤un no andunoo …óin miijooji ma…ì…ìe, o ∆¥etti paykun, o jo…ó…óini takko makko.
9.48: Onsay o wi'i …ìe: ¬´Kala ja…ìu…óo kun paykun e innde an, haray ko min o ja…ìi. Awa kadi kala ja…ìu…óo lan, haray ko Nulu…óo lan on o ja…ìi. Ko fii ko …ìur…óo fan…óude on e mon woni teddu…óo.¬ª
9.49: Yuuhanna ∆¥etti haala kan, wi'i: ¬´Karamoko'en, men yi'ii go…ó…óo no ra…óoo jinnaaji e innde mo'on. Men to≈ãani mo …óun, …ìay o wondaa e amen fii jokkugol on.¬ª
9.50: Onsay Iisaa wi'i mo: ¬´Wota on to≈ãan mo …óun. Ko fii kala mo wonaa ga…≤o mon, haray ko gi…óo mon.¬ª Fii no Samariyankee…ìe …ìen Salornoo Tolnude Iisaa
9.51: ∆Åay wonii bal…óe …óe Iisaa ittetee ka aduna …óoo …óen hewtii, o fi…ìi anniyee yahugol Yerusalaam.
9.52: O immini wo…ì…ìe ko hikkoo yeeso makko, …ìen yahi haa e ho…óo Samariyankee…ìe goo fii e…ì…ìindanagol mo …óon kanko Iisaa.
9.53: Kono …ìen yim…ìe ja…ìaali mo tolnude, …ìay ko Yerusalaam o sutii.
9.54: ∆Åay …ìe yi'ii …óun, Yaaquuba e Yuuhanna wi'i Iisaa: ¬´Koohoojo amen, hi…óon faalaa yo men wi'u yo yiite ngen iwu ka kammu ara mula …ìee?¬ª
9.55: Onsay Iisaa fewti e ma…ì…ìe, feli …ìe fota.
9.56: Ontuma …ìe yaari e ho…óo goo. Fii …ìen Faalaa…ìe Jokkude Iisaa (Mat. 8.19-22)
9.57: E nder ko …ìe yahata kon, go…ó…óo wi'i mo: ¬´Mi jokkete kala ka yaaru…óaa.¬ª
9.58: Iisaa jaabii mo, wi'i: ¬´Ndoni …óin no mari gay…óe mun, awa kadi colli …óin ka weeyo no mari …≤akkaaji mun, kono ∆Åii-Aaden on kan alaa hay ka fowtina hoore mun nden.¬ª
9.59: Iisaa wi'i go…ó…óo goo: ¬´Jokkan!¬ª On jaabii mo: ¬´Koohoojo, newnanee lan taho, mi yaha mi wattinoya ben an en.¬ª
9.60: Kono Iisaa jaabii mo, wi'i: ¬´Accu may…ìe …ìen wattina may…ìe mun …ìen, kono an yahaa fe…≤…≤inoyaa fii laamu Alla ngun.¬ª
9.61: Go…ó…óo goo kadi wi'i mo: ¬´Koohoojo, mi jokkay on, kono newnanee lan taho, mi yaha mi waynoyoo …ìeynguure an nden.¬ª
9.62: Iisaa wi'i on…óon kadi: ¬´Kala fawu…óo jungo mun e hoore keri sarin, ontigi ye∆¥∆¥itii …ìaawo, haray on nafataa laamu Alla ngun.¬ª

10.1: ∆Åay fe∆¥∆¥ii e …óun, Koohoojo on to…ó…óii fahin taalibaa…ìe cappan…óe njee…ói…óo e …ói…óo. O imminiri …ìe …ói…óo …ói…óo ko yaha adoyoo mo e ca'e …óen fow e kala nokkeeli …ói o rewoyta e mun.
10.2: O wi'i …ìe: ¬´Baagol ngol no …óuu…ói, kono wa'oo…ìe …ìen …óuu…óaa. Awa jooni, toree non Jom baagol ngol yo o addu wa'oo…ìe ka baagol makko.
10.3: Jooni mi…óo imminirde on wa baaloy e hakkunde caapaali, yahee.
10.4: Awa kadi wota on yoo…ìo bonfohun kaalisi maa sasa maa pa…óe goo, hara kadi on hiwraaki hay gooto ka hoore laawol.
10.5: Kala suudu ndu naatoton e mun, wi'ee taho: ‚ÄπYo …ìuttu wonu e nduu suudu!‚Ä∫
10.6: Si …ìii-…ìuttu no e nder ndun suudu, …ìuttu mon on juuroto mo. Si ko liddu mun, on …ìuttu wontanay on.
10.7: Tabitee e ndun suudu …óon, …≤aamon yaron ko …ìe okkori on …óon woo, ko fii golloowo no handi e njoddi mun, hara on wa…óaali naata e nduu yalta e nduu.
10.8: ¬´Kala saare nde naatu…óon e mun tolna…óon, …≤aamee ko …ìannana…óon kon.
10.9: Sellinon …≤aw…ìe …ìe taw…óon …óon …ìen, wi'on …ìe wonde *laamu Alla ngun …ìadike …ìe.
10.10: Kono kala saare nde naatu…óon e mun, …ìe salii on tolnude, yahee ka fottirde ma…ì…ìe, wi'on:
10.11: ‚ÄπMen fi…ó…óay e mon mbullaari saare mon nangundi men ndin e koy…óe! Kono andee tun wonde, laamu Alla ngun …ìadike!‚Ä∫
10.12: Mi andinii on, …≤ande …≤aawoore nden ko ndee saare *Saduuma …ìuretee hoynaneede edii nden saare …óon.
10.13: ¬´Bone wonanii ndee saare Kuuraziin e ndee saare Bayti-Sa'iida! Ko fii si tawno …óii kaawakeeji mo∆¥∆¥i wa…óunoo…ói ka mon, ko non wa…óirnoo e …óee ca'e Tiiri e Siduuna, harayno nee…ìii ko jeyaa…ìe e …óen ca'e …ìornii conci heynor…ói, …ìe wujitii ndoondi fii hollugol wonde …ìe tuubii.
10.14: Ko …óun wa…ói, …≤ande …≤aawoore nden ko Tiiri e Siduuna …ìuretee hoynaneede edii onon.
10.15: Onon non, …ìee …ìe Kafernahuum, hi…óon sikka fii mon …ìantete haa ka aljanna? Oo'o, on bugete ka jahannama.
10.16: ¬´Kala he…óitii…óo on onon …ìee taalibaa…ìe an, haray ko min o he…óitii. Kala bugitii…óo on, haray ko min o bugitii. Awa-le kala bugitii…óo lan, haray ko Nulu…óo lan on o bugitii.¬ª
10.17: ∆Åen cappan…óe njee…ói…óo e …ói…óo artidi e weltaare, …ìe wi'i: ¬´Koohoojo amen, hay jinnaaji …óin yankinanike men e innde mon!¬ª
10.18: Onsay o wi'i …ìe: ¬´Mi yi'ayno Ibuliisa no iwa ka kammu yanira wa far…≤itere.
10.19: Awa mi okkii on bawgal tippugol e bolle …óen e jahe …óen e kala baw…óe ga…≤o on, hara hay fus he…ìaali on.
10.20: Wota on weltor ko jinnaaji …óin yankinanii on kon. Kono weltoree ko in…óe mon …óen windaa ka kammuuli kon.¬ª Fii Weltaare Iisaa nden (Mat. 11.25-27, 13.16-17)
10.21: Ko e on saa'i …óon tigi, Iisaa he…ìi weltaare fota immorde e *Ruuhu Senii…óo on, o wi'i: ¬´Mi yettii ma yo Baaba, Jom leydi e kammu, fii koo ko wirnan…óaa …óun …ìen faamu…ìe e …ìee gandi…óu…ìe, fe…≤…≤inan…óaa …óun …ìee fay…ìe. Hiiyii, ko fii ko …óun wonnoo yi…ói maa on yo Baaba.
10.22: ¬´Awa, Baaba an wattii fow e juu…óe an. Awa kadi hay gooto andaa ko hombo woni ∆Åi…ó…óo on si hinaa Baabaajo on, wano tawiri non kadi hay gooto andaa ko hombo woni Baabaajo on si hinaa ∆Åi…ó…óo on e on mo ∆Åi…ó…óo on faalaa mo fe…≤…≤inande.¬ª
10.23: Onsay o fewtiti taalibaa…ìe …ìen o wi'i …ìe e qunuutu: ¬´Gite yi'u…óe ko yi'u…óon kon malii!
10.24: Ko fii mi andinii on, annabaa…ìe e lam…ìe buy faalano yi'ude koo ko won…óon yi'ude, kono …ìe yi'aali. ∆Åe faalano kadi nanude koo ko won…óon nanude, kono …ìe nanaali.¬ª Misal ∆≥ettaangal e Samariyankeejo Mo∆¥∆¥o on
10.25: Onsay go…ó…óo e waawu…ìe fii Sariya …ìen immii landii mo fii ndarndagol mo, o wi'i mo: ¬´Karamoko'en, ko hon…óun mi haani wa…óude fii yo mi he…ìu …óan *ngurndan poomayankejan?¬ª
10.26: Onsay Iisaa wi'i mo: ¬´Ko hon…óun windii ka defte Sariya? Ko honno faamir…óaa …óun?¬ª
10.27: O jaabii mo, o wi'i: ¬´Yo a yi…óir Alla Joomiraa…óo maa on …ìernde maa nden fow e wonkii maa kin fow e doole maa …óen fow e hakkil maa kin fow , yi…óiraa …≤okondo maa on wano yi…óir…óaa hoore maa non.¬ª
10.28: Onsay Iisaa wi'i mo: ¬´A jaaborii no mo∆¥∆¥iri. Warru non, a he…ìay …óan ngurndan.¬ª
10.29: Kono tawi on no faalaa hollude peewal mun ngal, o wi'i Iisaa: ¬´Ko hombo non woni on …≤okondo an?¬ª
10.30: Iisaa jaabori mo nii, o wi'i: ¬´Go…ó…óo no iwraynoo Yerusalaam, no yaha Yeerikoo. O hawrondiri e wuy…ìe, …ìen …ìoori mo, piyi mo haa moggo mayde, …ìe yahi, …ìe acci mo …óon.
10.31: Hawrondiri *yottinoowo sadaka no fe∆¥∆¥aynoo …óon, o yi'i oo ne…ó…óo, o takkii mo, o fe∆¥∆¥i.
10.32: Fahin *Lewiyankeejo ari tawi mo …óon, on kadi yi'i mo, takkii mo, fe∆¥∆¥i.
10.33: Kono Samariyankeejo won…óo e nder safaari mun, ari tawi mo, yurmaa mo.
10.34: Onsay o …ìadii, o juurani mo njaram e nebban ka barmeeji, o ha…ì…ìi. Onsay o wa…ói mo ka mba…ó…óateeri makko, o na…ìi mo haa e suudu ho…ì…ìe, o dankii mo.
10.35: Bimbi mun, o ∆¥etti *dinaruuji …ói…ói, o jonni jom suudu ho…ì…ìe ndun, o wi'i mo: ‚ÄπDankor mo …óii …óoo. Kala ko fawoy…óaa e hoore …óii …óoo, mi yo…ìitoyte tuma mi rewtoyi.‚Ä∫ ¬ª
10.36: Ontuma Iisaa wi'i: ¬´Ko hombo e …ìee …óoo tato woni …≤okondo oo mo …ìee wuy…ìe yani e mun?¬ª
10.37: On waawu…óo fii Sariya jaabii, wi'i: ¬´Ko yurmaa…óo mo on.¬ª Onsay Iisaa wi'i mo: ¬´Yahu an kadi warraa non.¬ª Fii no Mariyatu e Mariyama Werniri Iisaa
10.38: Fewndo Iisaa e taalibaa…ìe mun …ìen wonnoo e hoore laawol, …ìe naati …óon e ho…óo. Debbo wi'etee…óo Mariyatu werni …ìe ka mun.
10.39: Tawi on no mari neene-gooto wi'etee…óo Mariyama, on joo…óii e ley koy…óe Koohoojo on no he…óitoo kongu…ói makko …óin.
10.40: Tawi Mariyatu ka…≤un no jindidude e muraa…ói nder suudu …óin. Onsay o ari, o wi'i: ¬´Koohoojo an, on kippataa fii ko oo neene-gooto an accidimmi e …óee golle …óoo kon fow? Wi'anee lan mo yo o wallito lan!¬ª
10.41: Koohoojo on jaabii mo, wi'i: ¬´Mariyatu, Mariyatu! Hi…óa maapii aani fii piiji …óuu…óu…ói.
10.42: Kono ko huunde wootere tun hitti. Mariyama ka…≤un su…ìike ko …ìuri hittude kon, …óun-le o ja…ìitantaake …óun.¬ª

11.1: ∆ùande goo tawi Iisaa no toraade Alla nokku goo. ∆Åay o gaynii toraade, go…ó…óo e taalibaa…ìe makko …ìen wi'i mo: ¬´Koohoojo, tindinee men no torortee wano Yaayaa tindinirnoo non taalibaa…ìe mun …ìen.¬ª
11.2: Onsay o wi'i …ìe: ¬´Nde hi…óon toroo, on wi'iray nii: ¬´Baaba, yo innde maa nden hormore, yo laamu maa ngun fee…≤u.
11.3: Okkor men …≤ande woo …≤aametee haanan…óo men on.
11.4: Yaafano…óaa men junuubaaji amen …óin, wano menen kadi men woni yaaforande kala bonnu…óo men. Wota a naadu men e jarrabuyee.¬ª
11.5: O wi'i kadi: ¬´Si go…ó…óo e mon aru e immaade tumbere jemma, yaha ka njaatigi mun, o findina mo, o wi'a mo: ‚ÄπNjaatigi, …≤awlan bireediije tati,
11.6: ko fii mi…óo he…ìi ko…óo ka jemma …óoo, mi alaa hay fus ko mi okkora mo.‚Ä∫
11.7: ¬´Si on non mo o findinoyi wi'ii mo: ‚ÄπMi torike ma wota a finnan, ko fii a taw mi falii baafal ngal, min e fay…ìe an …ìen men waalike. Mi waawataa immaade fewndo …óoo, mi jonne bireedi!‚Ä∫
11.8: Mi andinii on, hay si o immaaki, o jonnira mo sabu njaatigiyaagal wongal hakkunde ma…ì…ìe ngal, o jonniray mo kala ko o handi sabu ko on torotoo…óo ha…ì…ìitori angal hersa kon.
11.9: ¬´Min-le mi wi'ii on: Toree, on okkorte. ∆äa…ì…ìee, on he…ìay. Ho…ó…óee, on udditante.
11.10: Ko fii kala torii…óo okkorte, kala …óa…ì…ìu…óo he…ìay, awa kadi kala on ho…ó…óii…óo udditante.
11.11: ¬´Ko hombo e mon, …ìi…ó…óo mun torotoo …óun bireedi, ontigi jonna mo hayre? Maa o toroo mo lingii, ontigi jonna mo mboddi?
11.12: Maa o toroo mo woofoonde, o jonna mo yaare?
11.13: Si tawii non hay onon bon…ìe …ìen, hi…óon waawi wa…óande …ìi…ì…ìe mon …ìen piiji mo∆¥∆¥i, haray ko haa honto Ben mon Won…óo ka kammu on okkorta …ìen torii…ìe mo *Ruuhu Senii…óo on!¬ª Fii no Iisaa Ra…óori Jinnaaji …óin (Mat. 12.22-30; Mrk. 3.22-27)
11.14: ∆ùande goo Iisaa ra…óii jinnawii mbobin…óinngii go…ó…óo. No ngii yaltirnoo e ontigi, o wowli, jamaa wonnoo…óo …óon on fow mugaa.
11.15: Wo…ì…ìe e ma…ì…ìe wi'i: ¬´Ko e immorde e *Balzabuula lan…óo jinnaaji …óin o woni ra…óorde jinnaaji …óin!¬ª
11.16: Wo…ì…ìe goo kadi fii ndarndagol mo torii mo hollugol …ìe maande iwrunde ka kammu.
11.17: Nde tawnoo himo andi …óin miijooji ma…ì…ìe, o wi'i: ¬´Kala laamateeri liddondirndi, kayri tigi ndi caabay. Awa kadi si suudu liddondirii, ndu lancoto.
11.18: Onon hi…óon wi'a ko tippude e Balzabuula mi woni ra…óorde jinnaaji …óin. Si tawii non Ibuliisa liddike hoore mun tigi, ko honno laamateeri makko ndin tabitirta?
11.19: Si tawii non wonii min ko tippude e Balzabuula mi ra…óorta jinnaaji …óin, …óun haray onon …ìe mon …ìen non ko tippude e hombo …ìe ra…óorta …ói? Ko …óun wa…ói si kam…ìe tigi …ìe …≤aawoyay on.
11.20: Kono si tawii ko tippude e bawgal Alla ngal mi woni ra…óorde jinnaaji …óin, haray *laamu Alla ngun arii haa e mon.
11.21: ¬´Nde ne…ó…óo dolnu…óo jom aalaaji ayni galle mun woo, jawle mun …óen da…óay.
11.22: Kono si tawii …ìur…óo mo doole arii, yanii e makko, foolii mo, o ja…ìitay …óin jogaaji …ói o hoolornoo, o sendita …óen jawle makko.
11.23: ¬´Kala mo aldaa e an, haray ko ga…≤o an, awa kadi kala mo wallataa lan moo…ìitude, haray ko saakoowo.
11.24: ¬´Nde jinnawii yalti e ne…ó…óo woo, ngii hammiray ka wulaa, hara hingii …óa…ì…ìa nokkuure fowtorde. Si ngii tawii ngii he…ìaali, ngii wi'ay: ‚ÄπYo mi yiltito ka suudu ka mi iwnoo …óon.‚Ä∫
11.25: Nde ngii hewtiti, ngii tawa ndun suudu fittaama la…ì…ìinaama.
11.26: Onsay ngii yahay, ngii …óa…ì…ìoya jinnaaji jee…ói…ói …ìur…ói ngii hun∆¥ude, …ói naata …óon, …ói ho…óa. Onsay sakkitorde on ne…ó…óo …ìuray aranun …óun bonude.¬ª
11.27: Fewndo ko Iisaa yewtaynoo …óun, debbo ewnii ka hakkunde jamaa ton, wi'i: ¬´Maloore wonanii nduu reedu saawundu ma e …óin en…ói …ói muynu…óaa!¬ª
11.28: Kono Iisaa jaabii, wi'i: ¬´Maloore wonanii kan …ìen he…óotoo…ìe daaluyee Alla on, …óoftoo mo!¬ª Fii Maande Annabi Yuunusa nden (Mat. 12.38-42)
11.29: Nde tawnoo jamaa on no …ìeydaade tun, onsay kanko Iisaa o wi'i: ¬´Nguu jamaanu …óoo ko jamaanu bonngu, hingu …óa…ì…ìa maande. Kono ngu jonnetaake maande si hinaa sifa ndee nde Yuunusa.
11.30: Ko fii ko wano Yuunusa wonirannoo yim…ìe ndee saare *Niinawa maande non, ko wano non *∆Åii-Aaden on kadi woniranta nguu jamaanu …óoo maande.
11.31: ∆ùande …≤aawoore nden, nde yim…ìe nguu jamaanu …óoo no …≤aawee woo, onsay oo debbo laaminoo…óo ndii leydi hikkorndi ka sengo …≤aamo immoyto, …≤aawoya …ìe sabu iwugol mo haa ka kattudi ley…óe, ara he…óitoo ngun faamu Sulaymaana, hara-le …ìur…óo Sulaymaana no …óoo.
11.32: Awa kadi …≤ande …≤aawoore nden, nde yim…ìe nguu jamaanu …óoo no …≤aawee woo, yim…ìe Niinawa …ìen kadi immoyto, …≤aawoya …ìe sabu ko …ìe he…óinoo waaju Yuunusa ngun, …ìe tuubi, hara-le …ìur…óo Yuunusa no …óoo.¬ª Misal ∆≥ettaangal e Lampu (Mat. 5.15, 6.22-23; Mrk. 4.21)
11.33: ¬´Hay gooto hu…ì…ìintaa lampu suu…óa mo maa hippa mo e ley siyonwal, kono o wa…óay mo e kene fii no naatoo…ìe …ìen yi'ira ndaygu ngun.
11.34: Ko yiitere maa nden woni ndaygu …ìandu ndun. Si tawii yiitere maa nden no selli, haray …ìandu maa ndun fow no ndaygi. Si tawii non yiitere nden no …≤awi, haray …ìandu maa ndun no e nder niwre.
11.35: Reenee wota ndaygu wongu e mon ngun wontan on niwre.
11.36: Si tawii …ìandu mon ndun no ndaygi, hara teral mon hay gootal alaa ka niwre, …óun haray …ìandu mon ndun fow no ndaygiri wa nde ndaygu lampu jalbi e mon.¬ª Fii no Iisaa Hajori Fariisiyaa…ìe …ìen (Mat. 23.1-36; Mrk. 12.38-40)
11.37: Wa fewndo ko Iisaa yewtaynoo …óun, *Fariisiyaajo goo torii mo yo …ìe yaadu ka makko, …ìe hirtodoya. Onsay o naati, o joo…ói fii …≤aamugol.
11.38: Kono Fariisiyaajo on ≈ãal…ói ko Iisaa toolii fii …≤aamugol kon soo…óaaki.
11.39: Onsay Koohoojo on wi'i mo: ¬´Onon …ìee Fariisiyaa…ìe, ko …ìaawo miranji …óin tun la…ì…ìinton, hara hi…óon heewi miile e bonki.
11.40: Onon ko on faa…óa-hakkil…ìe, hara hinaa Tagu…óo …ìaawo on tagi nder on kadi?
11.41: Okkoree waasu…ìe …ìen ko woni ka nder kon, onsay ko heddii kon fow laa…ìanay on.
11.42: ¬´Kono bone wonanii on, onon …ìee Fariisiyaa…ìe, …ìay hi…óon ittana naana e suukooran e kala tutateeriiji won…ói e naakoo farilla, hara hi…óon welsindanii peewal ngal Alla ye…óata ngal e giggol makko ngol. Hara-le ko …óun haanuno…óon jokkude, tawa kadi on welsindaaki e ko heddii kon.
11.43: ¬´Bone wonanii on, onon …ìee Fariisiyaa…ìe, …ìay hi…óon yi…ói saffawol aranol ngol ka juulir…óe e hiwreede ka fottir…óe.
11.44: Bone wonanii on, …ìay hi…óon wa'i wa genaale …óe aldaa e maande, …óe go…ó…óo rewata e mun hara andaali!¬ª
11.45: Onsay go…ó…óo e hakkunde waawu…ìe fii Sariya …ìen ∆¥etti haala kan, wi'i mo: ¬´Karamoko'en, si on maakirii nii, haray on aybinii men menen kadi!¬ª
11.46: Ontuma Iisaa jaabii mo, wi'i: ¬´Bone wonanii on onon kadi …ìee waawu…ìe fii Sariya, …ìay hi…óon fawa yim…ìe …ìen dolle …óe …ìe waawataa na…ìude, hara onon on fopportaa …óun hay hoore hondu fii wallugol …ìe.
11.47: ¬´Bone wonanii on, …ìay hi…óon maha maandina genaale annabaa…ìe …ìen, hara-le ko baabiraa…ìe mon …ìen sahinbini …ìe.
11.48: ∆äun no seedintini wonde hi…óon newni …óen kuu…óe …ìen baabiraa…ìe mon, …ìay …ìen sahinbiniino annabaa…ìe …ìen, onon kadi hi…óon mahude maandina genaale ma…ì…ìe …óen.
11.49: Ko …óun wa…ói si Alla, Jom faamu on, no daalunoo: ‚ÄπMi na…ìanay …ìe annabaa…ìe e nulaa…ìe, …ìe wara wo…ì…ìe e …ìen, …ìe tampina …ìeya …ìen‚Ä∫,
11.50: fii no nguu jamaanu …óoo ∆¥antiroyee ∆¥ii∆¥an annabaa…ìe hibbanoo…óan …óan gila ka fu…ó…óoode aduna,
11.51: …óun ko gila e ∆¥ii∆¥an Haabiila …óan haa addani e ∆¥ii∆¥an Zakariyaa …óan, on waranoo…óo hakkunde *layyorde nden e *juulirde mawnde nden. Mi andinii on, pellet nguu jamaanu …óoo ∆¥antoyte fii …óun.
11.52: ¬´Bone wonanii on, onon …ìee waawu…ìe fii Sariya, …ìay on suu…óii saabiwal gandal ngal, on naataali, awa kadi on ja…ìaali faalanoo…ìe naatude …ìen naata!¬ª
11.53: ∆Åay o yaltii …óon, jannoo…ìe fii Sariya on …ìen wondude e Fariisiyaa…ìe …ìen fu…ó…óii mo monanaade, landoo mo lande …óuu…óu…óe,
11.54: wa…óana mo pirci, fii tun no …ìe nangira mo immorde e kongu…ói makko …óin.

12.1: Wa fewndo onsay, tawi yim…ìe guluuje guluuje moo…ìondirii haa hi…ìe yaa…ìindira. Onsay Iisaa attii wi'i taalibaa…ìe mun …ìen: ¬´Reenee e lewen *Fariisiyaa…ìe …ìen, …óun ko faasiqankaaku ngun.
12.2: Alaa ko suu…óii ko fee…≤ataa, awa kadi alaa gundoo mo andotaako.
12.3: Ko …óun wa…ói, kala ko wowlu…óon ka niwre fee…≤ay …≤alorma te…ó…óan, e kala ko sowndi…óon ka cuu…ói ewnorte ka war…≤akke.
12.4: ¬´Mi andinii on yo yi…ì…ìe an, wota on hulu waroo…ìe …ìandu …ìen, toonin …óun alaa ko …ìe waawi.
12.5: Mi hollay on On mo gasoton hulude: hulee on Mar…óo bawgal warugol bugoo ka jahannama nde wari. Mi andinii on, ko on Mar…óo bawgal wa…óugol …óun haanu…óon hulude.
12.6: Hinaa seresereeji jowi no yeeyee tammaaji …ói…ói? Kono Allaahu on ka…≤un yejjitaa hay gootun e majji.
12.7: Hay cukuli ko'e mon …óen fow no limaa. Wota on hulu, ko fii hi…óon …ìuri seresereeji buy hittude ka Alla.
12.8: ¬´Mi andinii on, kala qirritii…óo fii an yeeso yim…ìe …ìen, *∆Åii-Aaden on kadi qirritoyto fii makko yeeso malaa'ikaa…ìe Alla …ìen.
12.9: Kono kala yeddu…óo fii an yeeso yim…ìe …ìen, fii ontigi yeddoyte e yeeso malaa'ikaa…ìe Alla …ìen.
12.10: Kala wowlu…óo ∆Åii-Aaden on ko boni, no ara ka yaafanee. Kono kala hoynu…óo *Ruuhu Senii…óo on yaafantaake.
12.11: ¬´Tuma nodda…óon ka juulir…óe e yeeso maw…ìe …ìen e laamii…ìe …ìen, wota on ji…ìoyo ko jaabo…óon maa ko wi'on.
12.12: Ko fii …óon kisan Ruuhu Senii…óo on tigi longinay on ko gasoton yewtude kon.¬ª Fii Galo Faa…óa-Hakkiljo
12.13: Go…ó…óo e hakkunde on jamaa wi'i Iisaa: ¬´Karamoko'en, maakanee ben-gooto an on yo men sendodu ndondi amen ndin.¬ª
12.14: O jaabii on ne…ó…óo, o wi'i: ¬´Ko hombo wa…óimmi …≤aawoowo maa sendanoowo on?¬ª
12.15: O watti e …óun: ¬´Reenee wattanon yiila e kala miile, ko fii ko aaden al…ói woo, ngurndan makko …óan hinaa e …óun humii.¬ª
12.16: Onsay o wa…óani …ìe ngal misal …óoo, o wi'i: ¬´No woodunoo ne…ó…óo al…óu…óo mo toore leydi mun mo∆¥∆¥iri …óun fota.
12.17: Tawi on ne…ó…óo no miijotonoo, wi'a: ‚ÄπKo honno mi wa…óata, ko fii mi alaa ka mi wa…óa ngal co…≤al an?‚Ä∫
12.18: O wi'itii: ‚ÄπE hino ko mi wa…óata kon: Mi lancay tumusuuje an …óen, mi mo∆¥∆¥ina …ìur…óe …óe njan…óude ka mi loowa nen…óe an …óen e piiji an …óin fow.
12.19: Jooni yo wonkii an, …ìay mi…óo mari jawle buy ko yonatammi e nder duu…ìi buy, yo mi fowto, mi …≤aama, mi yara, mi weltoo!‚Ä∫
12.20: ¬´Kono Allaahu on wi'i mo: ‚ÄπKo an yo faa…óa-hakkiljo, e nder oo jemma …óoo tigi a ∆¥antete wonkii maa kin. E hara koo ko faandi…óaa, ko hombo …óun wontanta?‚Ä∫
12.21: ¬´Awa ko nii woniranta kala on moo…ìu…óo jawle e …ìaawo al…óangol Alla.¬ª Fii Hakkunde Anndeeji e Keyeeji (Mat. 6.25-34)
12.22: Onsay Iisaa wi'i taalibaa…ìe mun …ìen: ¬´Ko …óun wa…ói si mi wi'ay on wonde, wota on aanu fii ko …≤aamon e nder ngurndan mon …óan maa fii ko …ìornon …ìalli mon …óin.
12.23: Ko fii ngurndan no …ìuri neema, awa kadi …ìandu no …ìuri koltu.
12.24: Ndaaree kayakayaaji …óin: …ói sankataa, …ói wa'ataa, …ói alaa tumusuuje e caagaaje, kono Allaahu on no wurni …ói, hara-le hi…óon …ìuri colli …óin hittude.
12.25: Ko hombo e mon e nder annde mun waawata …ìeydude ngurndan mun …óan beru sogonal?
12.26: Si tawii non on waawataa hay ko …ìuri lo'ude kon, haray ko hon…óun aananton fii ko lutti kon?
12.27: ¬´Ndaaree no …óii piindiiji fu…óirta njan…óa, hara-le …ói gollataa, …ói sa…≤…≤ataa. Kono non mi andinii on, hay Sulaymaana e nder darja mun on fow holtiraali hay wa wootiri e majji.
12.28: Si tawii non Allaahu on no holtinirde non hay hu…óo wonuko hande ka ngesa kon, bugoyteeko jango ka yiite kon, hara o ronkay wa…óande on ko …ìuri …óun, onon …ìee fan…óa-gom…óinal…ìe?
12.29: Onon non wota on yango fii ko …≤aamon maa ko yaron, wota fii …óun maapin on.
12.30: Ko fii …óun fow ko …ìe gom…óinaa ka aduna …ìen …óa…ì…ìata …óun. Kono Ben mon Won…óo ka kammu on no andi hi…óon handi e …óun.
12.31: Kono …óa…ì…ìee tun laamu makko ngun, …óin piiji fow …ìeydanoyte on.
12.32: ¬´Ko onon yo wuro tosooko, wota on hulu fus, sabu Ben mon Won…óo ka kammu on tawii no wela mo ka o ye…óa on laamu ngun.
12.33: Yeeyee ko jey…óon kon, okkoron miskin…ìe …ìen, mo∆¥∆¥inee bonfooji …ói hi…ó…óataa, …óun wonanay on keyee mo lannataa ka kammuuli, …óon moo∆¥ataa, awa kadi ngujjo meemataa.
12.34: Ko fii ko ka keyee mon on woni woo, …ìernde mon nden wonata.¬ª Fii Reenugol e dow Hebulaare
12.35: ¬´Wonee hebulii…ìe, hara lampuuji mon …óin no hu…ì…ìi.
12.36: Wa'on wa nde jiyaa…óo tijjii jom mun, hara ko yahu…óo peera, hara no on hewtitiri ho…ó…óii, o udditanay mo.
12.37: ∆Åen jiyaa…ìe malii nde jom ma…ì…ìe ari tawi hi…ìe aynude. Ka haqiiqa mi andinii on, jom …ìen daditoto, o …ìannana …ìe ko …ìe …≤aama.
12.38: ∆Åen jiyaa…ìe …ìe jom mun tawi no ayna tumbere jemma maa ka tata…ìal jemma, haray …ìen malii.
12.39: Ko fii andee fota, si tawno jom galle no andunoo nde ngujjo on araynoo wujjugol, haray o accataano galle makko …óen fusee.
12.40: Awa onon kadi hebilee, ko fii ∆Åii-Aaden on aroyay e saa'i nde on sogitaaki.¬ª Fii Jiyaa…óo Holnii…óo e Jiyaa…óo Bon…óo (Mat. 24.45-51)
12.41: Onsay Petruusu wi'i mo kanko Iisaa: ¬´Koohoojo amen, hara ngal misal …óoo ko fii amen tun kaa ko fii yim…ìe …ìen fow?¬ª
12.42: Koohoojo on jaabii mo, wi'i: ¬´Hara ko golloowo hombo reenii…óo holnii…óo woni ko jom mun halfinta neemingol kurkaa…ói mun …óin e saa'i haanu…óo?
12.43: Maloore wonanii on jiyaa…óo mo jom mun ari tawi no jokkiri non.
12.44: Ka haqiiqa mi andinii on, o halfinay mo jawle makko …óen fow.
12.45: Kono si on jiyaa…óo wi'itike: ‚ÄπJom an nee…ìii araali‚Ä∫, onsay, o nangana tilfugol kurkaaduu…ìe …ìen wor…ìe e rew…ìe e …≤aamugol yara haa mandila,
12.46: jom on jiyaa…óo aray nde on jiyaa…óo sabbaaki mo e saa'i mo o sogitaaki, o letta mo lette sattu…óe, o wa…óa mo ka …ìe gom…óinaa …ìen wa…óetee ton.
12.47: ¬´Jiyaa…óo andu…óo faaleeji jom mun …óin, kono o e…ì…ìindaaki, maa o wa…óaali faaleeji jom makko …óin, o piyete piggal …óuu…óungal.
12.48: Kono si tawii non ontigi andaa faale jom mun on, o wa…óii kuu…óe foddu…óe e donkineede, o foccete ko hawri. On okkoraa…óo ko …óuu…ói ∆¥antete ko …óuu…ói, awa kadi on halfinaa…óo ko …óuu…ói landitoyte ko …ìurti.¬ª Fii Liddondiral (Mat. 10.34-36)
12.49: ¬´Mi…óo ari bugagol yiite e oo aduna, mi faalete hara nge hu…ì…ìii!
12.50: Kono no woodi lo∆¥egol ngol mi lo∆¥oytee, e maanaa …óun ko tampere, …óoo yo …óun sollitanan, haray mi…óo sonjii.
12.51: E hara on sikku ko addugol …ìuttu e oo aduna mi arani? Oo'o, hinaa …óun, kono ko liddondiral mi addi.
12.52: Ko fii gila jooni njowo wondu…ìe e nder suudu …ìe woncondiray, tato liddondiray e …ìeya …ói…óo, …ìeya …ói…óo kadi liddondira e …ìeya tato.
12.53: Baaba liddondiray e …ìi…ó…óo, …ìi…ó…óo liddondira e baaba, neene liddondira e jiwo mun, jiwo kadi liddondira e neene mun, debbo liddondira e esiraawo mun jiwo, jiwo on kadi liddondira e esiraawo mun debbo.¬ª Fii Faamugol Firo Saa'iiji (Mat. 16.2-3)
12.54: Iisaa wi'i kadi jamaa on: ¬´No yiiru…óon duulere no immori ka hirnaange, on wi'ay kisan ‚Äπndiyan …óan aray‚Ä∫, …óun wonira non.
12.55: Awa kadi no yiiru…óon hendu ndun iwrii sengo …≤aamo woo, on wi'ay ‚Äπnguleendi ndin arii‚Ä∫, …óun kadi wa…óa.
12.56: Ko onon yo faasiqii…ìe, on waawii faamude fii ko fee…≤i ka leydi kon e ko fee…≤i ka kammu kon. Ko fii hon…óun non on waawaali andude oo saa'i fewndii…óo …óoo?
12.57: ¬´Hara ko fii hon…óun onon on waawataa faamande hoore mon ko feewi kon?
12.58: Nde an e mo ha…ìidu…óaa hi…óon yaha ka yeesoojo on woo, wa…óu feere no faamondiriron ka laawol, fii wota o watte e juu…óe …≤aawoowo on, on …≤aawoowo kadi watte e juu…óe aynoo…ìe kaso ngon, …ìen sokoye.
12.59: Mi andinii ma, a yaltataa …óon fannamaa a yo…ìaali mbuu…óu sakkitoro on.¬ª

13.1: Ko fewndo onsay, wo…ì…ìe ari fillitanii Iisaa fii …ìee …ìe Jaliilu …ìe Pilaatu warnoo fewndo …ìe hirsata daabeeji fii ittugol sadakaaji ma…ì…ìe.
13.2: O jaabii …ìe kanko Iisaa, o wi'i: ¬´Hara on sikku …ìen …ìe Jaliilu no …ìuri Jaliiluyankoo…ìe …ìen fow junuubu …ìay …ìe lettorii non?
13.3: Min mi wi'ay on - oo'o! Kono si on tuubaali onon kadi, on fow on re'ay.
13.4: Kaa hara on sikku …ìee sappoo e njeetato, …ìe nduu suudu aynirdu ka maadi Siluwaama yani e mun wari, no …ìuri …ìee …ìe Yerusalaam luttu…ìe fow bakkatu?
13.5: Min mi wi'ay on - oo'o! Kono si on tuubaali onon kadi, on fow on re'ay.¬ª
13.6: Onsay o wa…óani …ìe ngal misal …óoo: ¬´Tawi go…ó…óo no marnoo ∆¥ibbehi ka tutateeri mun. O ari …óa…ì…ìugol …ìi…ì…ìe e makki, o he…ìaali.
13.7: Onsay o wi'i gollanoowo mo on ka tutateeri: ‚ÄπHe…ìii nii duu…ìi tati mi…óo arude …óa…ì…ìugol …ìi…ì…ìe e ngal leggal, mi he…ìaali. Hara ko nafa hon…óun ngal wonani …óoo? Jooni soppu ngal!‚Ä∫
13.8: ¬´Kono golloowo on jaabii mo, wi'i: ‚ÄπJom an, accee ngal …óoo ndee hitaande …óoo. ∆äoo e …óun mi jasay binde maggal on fow mi wa…óana ngal …≤olu.
13.9: No gasa ka ngal rima ko arata. Si ko liddu mun, onsay on soppoyay ngal.‚Ä∫ ¬ª Fii no Debbo Jukkunnaajo on Selliniraa e Aseweere
13.10: Tawi …≤ande goo Iisaa no jannaynoo e juulirde goo e *…≤alaande fowteteende nden, …óun ko asewe.
13.11: Tawi no …óon debbo mo jinnawii jukkini he…ìii duu…ìi sappoo e jeetati, himo turii, o waawataano …ìantaade few.
13.12: ∆Åay Iisaa yi'ii mo, o noddi mo, o wi'i: ¬´Debbo, a sendaama e jukkere maa nden!¬ª
13.13: Onsay Iisaa *fawi juu…óe mun …óen e makko. ∆äon kisan debbo on feewi e darnde, o manti Allaahu on.
13.14: Kono yeesoojo juulirde nden seytini kon ko Iisaa …≤awndi …≤ande asewe, o wi'i jamaa on: ¬´No woodi bal…óe jeegoo gasetee…óe golleede e mun. Aree …≤awnde…óon e …óen bal…óe …óon, hara hinaa e …≤alaande asewe!¬ª
13.15: Koohoojo on jaabii mo, wi'i: ¬´Ko onon yo faasiqii…ìe! Hinaa mo kala e mo'on yaltinay nagge mun maa mbabba mun ka dingiraa mun …≤ande asewe, na…ìa yarnoya?
13.16: Hara oo debbo iwdi Ibraahiima mo Ibuliisa ha…ì…ìi gila duu…ìi sappoo e jeetati, haanaa ka o firtanee …óin ka…ì…ìi …≤ande …≤alaande fowteteende nden?¬ª
13.17: ∆Åay o yewtirii non, …óun hersini ay…ìe makko …ìen fow, kono jamaa luttu…óo on weltori …óii piiji hittu…ói …ói o wa…óaynoo. Mise ∆≥ettaa…óe e Abbere Bene e Lewen (Mat. 13.31-33; Mrk. 4.30-32)
13.18: O wi'i fahin: ¬´Hara ko hon…óun *laamu Alla ngun nandi, maa ko hon…óun mi e…ì…ìindirta e maggu?
13.19: Hingu wa'i wa abbere bene nde go…ó…óo ∆¥etti, bugii ka suntuure mun. Nden fu…ói, wonti leggal ngal colli …óin ka weeyo arata ho…óa e cal…ói mun.¬ª
13.20: O wi'i kadi: ¬´E ko hon…óun mi e…ì…ìindirta e laamu Alla ngun?
13.21: Hingu wa'i wa lewen mo debbo ∆¥etti, jillindiri e sariyaare tati condi farin, o piya …óun, on lewen wona sabu …óun fow ∆¥ura.¬ª Yewtere fii Damun Tosokun (Mat. 7.13-14)
13.22: Ko Iisaa yahaynoo Yerusalaam, o rewayno ko…óolun e ko…óolii hara himo waajoo.
13.23: Go…ó…óo goo landii mo, wi'i: ¬´Koohoojo, hara ko yim…ìe see…óaa…ìe tun dandoytee?¬ª Onsay o wi'i …ìe:
13.24: ¬´Etee no naatiron ka dambugal faa…óungal, ko fii mi andinii on, buy …óa…ì…ìoyay no naatira …óon, kono …ìe waawoytaa.
13.25: Nde jom galle …óen immii ombi baafal ngal woo, hara hi…óon ka yaasi, onsay on fu…ó…óoto honkande mo baafal ngal, wi'a: ‚ÄπKoohoojo, udditanee men!‚Ä∫ O jaaboyto on, o wi'a: ‚ÄπMin mi andaa ko on …ìe honto!‚Ä∫
13.26: ¬´Wi'on kadi: ‚ÄπMen …≤aamuno men yaridi e mon, awa kadi on waajotono ka …óate amen.‚Ä∫
13.27: O jaaboo on kadi, o wi'a: ‚ÄπMin mi andaa ko on …ìe honto. Onon …ìee wa…óaynoo…ìe ko …ìoylii fow, pottitee lan!‚Ä∫
13.28: ¬´Tuma yi'u…óon Ibraahiima e Issaaqa e Yaaquuba e …ìeya annabaa…ìe heddii…ìe fow ka nder laamateeri Alla, tawa onon ko on bugoytee…ìe ka yaasi, ka wullaandu e ≈ãatindiro …≤ii∆¥e woni ton.
13.29: Iwroyte funnaange e hirnaange, nano e …≤aamo, …ìe nafodoya ka laamateeri Alla.
13.30: Awa andee wonde, no woodi …ìaawoo…ìe wontiroyay…ìe yeeso, wano tawiri non kadi no woodi yeesoo…ìe wontiroyay…ìe …ìaawo.¬ª Fii no Iisaa Aanirani Yerusalaam (Mat. 23.37-39)
13.31: Ko e on saa'i …óon *Fariisiyaa…ìe goo ari wi'i mo kanko Iisaa: ¬´Yahu iwaa …óoo, ko fii *Heroodu no faalaa sahinbinde ma!¬ª
13.32: O wi'i …ìe: ¬´Yahee hollon ndun saafaandu: Mi…óo ra…óaade jinnaaji …óin, mi sellina …≤aw…ìe …ìen hande e jango, ka …≤alaande tammere haray timmanii lan.
13.33: Kono bee mi seppa hande e jango e fa…ó…ói-jango, ko fii haanaa ka annabaajo waree ko wonaa Yerusalaam.
13.34: ¬´Ee Yerusalaam! Ee Yerusalaam! Ko an yo saare sahinbinoore annabaa…ìe, wariroore nelaa…ìe e mun kaa∆¥e! Ko haa honto mi faalanoo moo…ìude …ìee fay…ìe maa wano gertogal moo…ìirta coppi e ley gabitti mun, e hin-le on ja…ìaali …óun!
13.35: Awa nokkuure mon nden eggaama. Kono mi andinii on, on yiitataa lan haa …≤ande wi'oyton: ‚ÄπYo barki wonan oo won…óo arude e innde Joomiraa…óo on!‚Ä∫ ¬ª

14.1: E *aseweere goo, …óun ko *…≤alaande fowteteende nden, Iisaa naati e suudu hooreejo Fariisiyaa…ìe …ìen fii nafagol, tawi …ìen Fariisiyaa…ìe no ten∆¥ina mo.
14.3: Onsay Iisaa landii waawu…ìe fii Sariya …ìen e Fariisiyaa…ìe …ìen, o wi'i: ¬´Hara no dagii ka …≤awndee e aseweere kaa dagaaki?¬ª
14.4: Kono …ìe fow …ìe de∆¥∆¥i. Onsay o ∆¥etti on …≤aw…óo, o sellini, o acciti mo, on yahi.
14.5: Onsay o wi'i …ìe: ¬´Ko hombo e mon, si …ìi…ó…óo mun maa nagge mun aru e yanude e nder woyndu, salotoo nge ∆¥awnude maa ∆¥awna mo …óon kisan fii nden …≤ande ko asewe?¬ª
14.6: Laatii …ìe waawaali jaabaade hay huunde e …óun. Fii no Saatinirtee
14.7: ∆Åay o yi'ii no …ìen saatinanoo…ìe su…ìoraynoo nda…ó…óule yeesooje …óen, o wa…óani …ìe ngal misal …óoo, o wi'i …ìe:
14.8: ¬´Si on aru e saatineede e peera, wota on wonu ka nda…ó…óule yeesooje fii hita taw …ìur…óo on hittude no saatinaa …óon
14.9: haa saatin…óo on on ara wi'a on: ‚ÄπAccanee oo …óoo nda…ó…óudi ndin.‚Ä∫ Onsay on hersay ruttagol ka nda…ó…óudi …ìaawoori.
