9.20: E telen-ma Yahuudiyankee…ìe …ìen, mi wa'a wa Yahuudiyankeejo, fii no mi he…ìira Yahuudiyankee…ìe …ìen. E telen-ma won…ìe e ley Sariya on kadi, mi wa'a wa won…óo e ley Sariya on, fii no mi he…ìira won…ìe e ley Sariya on …ìen, fii kala min tigi hinaa mi won…óo e ley Sariya on.
9.21: E telen-ma …ìe alaa e ley Sariya on …ìen kadi, mi wa'a wa mo alaa e ley Sariya on, fii no mi he…ìira …ìe alaa e ley Sariya on …ìen, e hin-le min tigi wonaa wonde mi alaa e ley Sariya Alla on, kono mi…óo e ley Sariya Almasiihu on.
9.22: Mi lo'ida e lo'u…ìe …ìen fii no mi he…ìira lo'u…ìe …ìen. Mi wonii fow e telen-ma yim…ìe …ìen fow, fii no gasirta woo mi wona sabu dandugol wo…ì…ìe.
9.23: Mi wa…óiri fow sabu Kibaaru Mo∆¥∆¥o on, fii no mi he…ìiroya ge…ìal.
9.24: E on andaa? Won…ìe foolotirde e dogudu …ìen fow no dogude, kono ko gooto foolata he…ìa njoddi. Awa dogiree wano non, fii no he…ìiron njoddi.
9.25: Kala foolotirtee…óo wa…óay kala noone eltal …ìandu, fii no o he…ìira *meetelol ngol luttataa, kono enen ko meetelol luttoowol.
9.26: Min non mi…óo dogude, kono hinaa dogudu meereeru. Mi…óo uttaade, kono hinaa fii uttagol hendu ndun.
9.27: Liddu …óun on non, mi…óo yangude …ìandu an ndun, mi…óo waawi ndu, fii nde mi gaynoyi waajaade …ìeya, min tigi wota mi pottine.

10.1: Musi…ì…ìe an, mi faalaaka yo on yejjitu wonde baabiraa…ìe men …ìen fow wonno e ley duulere, …ìe fow …ìe ta∆¥itiri ka baharu.
10.2: ∆Åe fow …ìe lootaa maande gom…óinal ka duulere e ka baharu e nder humondiral e Muusaa.
10.4: ∆Åe fow …ìe yari njaram gootan iwru…óan e Alla, ko fii ko e fetere iwrunde e Alla jokkunoonde …ìe nden …ìe yaraynoo. Ko Almasiihu on wonnoo nden fetere.
10.5: Kono …ìur…ìe …ìen e ma…ì…ìe weltinaano Alla, ko …óun wa…ói si …ìe maayi ka wulaa.
10.6: Awa …óun fow ko wa…óiri ko fii hollugol en mise, fii wota en he…ìu faaleeji bon…ói wano …ìe he…ìirnoo non.
10.7: Wota on wonu rewoo…ìe sanamu, wano wo…ì…ìe wonirnoo e hakkunde ma…ì…ìe, wano windori non: ¬´Jamaa on joo…óii fii …≤aamugol e fii yarugol, …ìawto …óun …ìe immii fii fijirgol jii…ìaare.¬ª
10.8: Awa wota en jokku jinaa, wano wo…ì…ìe e ma…ì…ìe wa…óirnoo non, haa guluuje noogay e tato maayi …≤ande wootere.
10.9: Wota en ndarndo *Almasiihu on, wano wo…ì…ìe e ma…ì…ìe ndarndornoo non, …ìen …ìe bolle mulunoo.
10.10: Wota on ≈ãermu, wano …ìeya ≈ãermirnoo non, …ìen …ìe malaa'ikaajo muloowo on warunoo.
10.11: ∆äun, ko he…ìiri …ìe ko fii yo wonan en misal, windiraa kadi fii hajagol en, enen …ìee tawaa…ìe ka lannoode aduna.
10.12: Ko …óun wa…ói, on mo no sikki no darii, yo o reeno wota o yanu.
10.13: Ndarndannde woo he…ìaali on nde go…ó…óo goo he…ìaali. Alla ko Sella-Findeejo, o newnataa ndarnde…óon toonin doole mon …óen, kono e nder ndarndannde nden o adday feere no sortoron e mun, e no waawiron nde dartorde.
10.14: Ko …óun wa…ói, yo yi…ì…ìe an, dogee rewugol sanamu.
10.15: Ko wa yim…ìe faamu…ìe mi woni on yewtirde, onon tigi …≤aawee ko mi wi'i kon.
10.16: Jardukun du'aa kun won…óen du'orde kun ko yu…ì…ìondirkun e ∆¥ii∆¥an Almasiihu on. Bireedi mo won…óen ta∆¥itude on, ko yu…ì…ìondir…óo e …ìandu Almasiihu on.
10.17: ∆Åay ko bireediwal gootal woodi, enen e …óuu…óude men ko en …ìandu wooturu. Ko fii en fow hi…óen hawti bireediwal gootal.
10.18: Ndaaree …ìee *Isra'iilayankee…ìe won…ìe …≤aamude daabeeji sakkaa…ói …óin. Hinaa yu…ì…ìondir…ìe e *layyorde nden?
10.19: Awa ko hon…óun mi woni wi'ude? Wonde tebbeeli sakkaa…ói fii sanamuuji …óin ko go…ó…óun? Kaa sanamuuru ko go…ó…óun? Oo'o!
10.20: Kono kon ko rewoo…ìe sanamuuji …ìen woni sakkaade, ko jinnaaji …óin …ìe woni sakkanaade, hinaa Alla. E hin-le mi faalaaka yo on humondir e jinnaaji …óin.
10.21: On waawataa yarirde jardukun Joomi on, yariron kadi jardukun jinnaaji …óin. On waawataa he…ìude ka …≤aametee Joomi on, he…ìon kadi ka …≤aametee jinnaaji …óin.
10.22: En faalaa memminde nawliigu Joomiraa…óo on? Kaa en …ìuru mo dolnude? Fii Hettaare Wonannde Gom…óin…óo on
10.23: Fow no newnaa, kono hinaa fow wondi e nafa. Fow no newnaa, kono hinaa fow tii…óinta.
10.24: Wota gooto …óa…ì…ìu nafa mun on, kono yo …óa…ì…ìu fii heddii…ìe …ìen.
10.25: ∆ùaamee kala teewu ko yeeyetee ka luumo, hara on sikkitaaki ka …ìernde mon.
10.26: Ko fii: ¬´Leydi ndin e kala ko ndi wondi ko Joomiraa…óo on wonani.¬ª
10.27: Si tawii mo gom…óinaa saatinii on, e hin-le hi…óon faalaa yahude, …≤aamee kala ko wee…ìitanoya…óon, hara on sikkitaaki ka …ìernde mon.
10.28: Kono si go…ó…óo wi'ii on: ¬´∆äun…óoo ko ko ittaa sadaka¬ª, haray wota on …≤aamu sabu on andin…óo on e sabu …ìernde nden.
10.29: Hinaa fii …ìernde mon nden mi woni yewtude …óoo, kono ko fii …ìernde oya nden. Awa ko fii hon…óun ndimankaaku an ngun …≤aawirtee …ìernde oya nden?
10.30: Si mi jarnii Alla e nder ko mi …≤aamata kon, haray ko hon…óun mi felirtee fii on …≤aamete mo mi jarni Alla fii mun?
10.31: Woni on …≤aamay, woni on yaray, woni kala ko wa…óoton, wa…óiree piiji …óin fow fii mangu Alla ngun.
10.32: Wota on wonan hay gooto peggal, woni *Gereekiyankee…ìe …ìen, woni Yahuudiyankee…ìe …ìen, woni *moftal Alla ngal.
10.33: Wano mi woniri weloowo won…óo woo e …ói fow non, mi alaa …óa…ì…ìude nafa an on, kono ko nafa …ìur…ìe …óuu…óude …ìen fii no …ìe dandiree.

11.1: Awa …≤embee lan, wano min kadi mi woni …≤embirde *Almasiihu on non. Fii no Go…ó…óo Haani Wonirde e nder Rewugol Alla
11.2: Mi mantii on fii ko on yejjitaali fii an kon e …ói fow, e ko maanditi…óon janndeeji …óin kon, wano mi hewtiniri on …ói non.
11.3: Ko …óun wa…ói si mi…óo faalaa yo on andu wonde Almasiihu on ko hooreejo kala ne…ó…óanke, gorko kadi ko hooreejo e fee …ìeyngu mun, Alla kadi ko hooreejo e fee Almasiihu on.
11.4: Kala gorko hippii…óo kufune, nde no toroo Alla, maa no haala ko Alla longini …óun, haray o yawike hoore makko .
11.5: Ko wano non kadi, kala debbo won…óo toraade Alla maa haalude ko Alla longini …óun, hara o taaraa, haray o yawike hoore makko . Haray no wa'i wa si tawii kanko debbo on himo fembii.
11.6: Ko fii, si debbo taaraa, haray yo o ta∆¥u sukundu makko ndun. Ko fii, si no hersinanii debbo ka sukundu makko ndun ta∆¥ee, maa o femboo, haray yo o tiggo.
11.7: Kono duhii…óo haanaa ka hippoo, ko fii ko o mbaadi e darja Alla, debbo non ko darja gorko.
11.8: Ko …óun wa…ói, gorko hinaa e debbo suutaa, kono ko debbo suutaa e gorko.
11.9: Awa kadi gorko hinaa sabu debbo tagiraa, kono debbo ko sabu gorko tagiraa.
11.10: Ko …óun wa…ói, sabu malaa'ikaa…ìe …ìen, debbo no haani he…ìude ka hoore mun maande laamu ngu o woni e ley mun ngun.
11.11: Kono e telen-ma humondiral men e Joomiraa…óo on, debbo gasataa e …ìaawo gorko, gorko kadi gasataa e …ìaawo debbo.
11.12: Ko fii, ko wano debbo suutiraa e gorko non, ko wano non kadi tawi ko debbo da…≤ata gorko, …óun fow non ko immorde e Alla.
11.13: ∆ùaawee …óun onon tigi. E hara no hawri ka debbo toroo Alla, hara o taaraa?
11.14: E hara aduna on tigi faaminaali on wonde no hersinanii gorko ka o accita saayannde?
11.15: Kono he…ìugol sukundu ko darja debbo, ko fii sukundu ndu o ye…óaa ndun ko ko o buumora.
11.16: Si tawii go…ó…óo no faalaa warrude noone goo, enen en alaa on naamu, *mofte Alla …óen kadi alaa on naamu. Fii Nafakkaari Joomi on (Mat. 26.26-29; Mrk. 14.22-25; Luk. 22.15-20)
11.17: E nder wa…óugol non …óee yamirooje yeeso …óoo, alaa ko mi mantira on e nder ko mottondirton kon, hara hinaa fii ko …ìuri mo∆¥∆¥ude, kono ko fii ko …ìuri bonude.
11.18: Ko adii kon non, mi nanii nde mottondir…óon woo sendondiral wa…óay hakkunde mon. E ba≈ã≈ãe goo, …óun no henanimmi.
11.19: Bee yeddondire wona hakkunde mon, fii no holnii…ìe …ìen fee…≤ira e hakkunde mon.
11.20: Jaka nde mottondir…óon woo, hinaa fii …≤aamugol *nafakkaari Joomi on.
11.21: ∆Åay nde hi…óon …≤aama, mo kala kutoto nafakka mun on, …≤aama, hara go…ó…óo goo no weelaa, oya ka…≤un no mandili.
11.22: E hara on alaa cuu…ói ka …≤aamon e ka yaron? Kaa on hayfinay woni moftal Alla ngal, hersinon …ìe alaa huunde …ìen? Ko hon…óun mi wi'ata on? Mi mantay on? Mi mantataa on e …óun!
11.23: Ko fii, ko ko mi he…ìiri Joomi on kon mi hewtini on. E nder jemma mo Iisaa Joomi on janfaa e mun on, o ∆¥ettuno bireedi,
11.24: o jarni Alla, o ta∆¥iti, o wi'i: ¬´∆äun…óoo ko …ìandu an, wonandu on ndun nii, wa…óee …óun…óoo maande ko anditiron fii an.¬ª
11.25: Ko wano non kadi, …ìay …ìe gaynii …≤aamude, o ∆¥etti jardukun wa…óorkun njaram, o wi'i: ¬´Kun jardukun ko maande fii *ahadi heyri tippundi e ∆¥ii∆¥an an …óan, wa…óee …óun…óoo maande ko anditiron fii an, saa'i nde yaroton e mun woo.¬ª
11.26: Ko fii nde …≤aamoton oo bireedi woo, yaron e kun jardukun, on wowlay fii mayde Joomi on haa …≤ande o artoyi.
11.27: Ko …óun wa…ói, kala on …≤aamu…óo on bireedi, yari e kun jardukun Joomi on, hara ko no haaniraa, o wonay felnii…óo e telen-ma …ìandu e ∆¥ii∆¥an Joomi on.
11.28: Awa, yo mo kala miijitano hoore mun si o …≤aama on bireedi, maa o yarira kun jardukun.
11.29: Ko fii kala on …≤aamu…óo yari e …ìaawo anditugol …ìandu Joomi on, haray ontigi …≤aamii yarii …≤aawoore …≤aawaynde …óun ka…≤un tigi.
11.30: Ko …óun wa…ói si no e hakkunde mon nawnu…ìe buy e kitasoloo…ìe buy, e on mayraama wo…ì…ìe.
11.32: Kono Joomiraa…óo on no …≤aawude en donkina, fii wota en …≤aawidoye e aduna on.
11.33: Ko …óun wa…ói, yo musi…ì…ìe an, nde mottondir…óon fii nafakkaari ndin woo, habbondiree.
11.34: On mo tawi no weelaa, yo …≤aamu ka mun, fii wota on mottondir fawon …≤aawoore e hoore mon. Mi jaaboyto …óeya lande, nde mi hewtoyi.

12.1: E telen-ma dokke iwru…óe e Ruuhu Alla …óen, yo musi…ì…ìe an, mi faalaaka yo on ronku andude …óun.
12.2: Hi…óon andi fewndo ko on gom…óinaa, hi…óon selnaa, nawraa e sanamuuji mbobooji.
12.3: Ko …óun wa…ói si mi wi'ay on: kala mo Ruuhu Allaahu on ardii e nder ko o wowlata kon, wi'ataa: ¬´Iisaa ko hu…óaa…óo.¬ª Hay gooto kadi waawataa wi'ude: ¬´Iisaa ko Joomi¬ª, si hinaa *Ruuhu Senii…óo on ardii mo.
12.4: Dokke …óen no serti, kono Ruuhu Allaahu on ko gooto.
12.5: Balle …óen kadi no serti, kono Joomiraa…óo on ko gooto.
12.6: Golleeji …óin kadi no serti, kono ko Alla gooto on woni wa…óude …ói fow e yim…ìe …ìen fow.
12.7: E hin-le, mo kala ko Ruuhu Allaahu on fe…≤…≤ini e mun kon ko dokkal fii nafa fow.
12.8: Ko …óun wa…ói, Ruuhu on ye…óay go…ó…óo on kongol faamu, on Ruuhu gooto ye…óa oya on kongol gandal,
12.9: on Ruuhu gooto ye…óa go…ó…óo goo gom…óinal, on Ruuhu tigi ye…óa go…ó…óo goo …≤awndugol,
12.10: go…ó…óo goo dokkal fii wa…óugol kaawakeeji mo∆¥∆¥i, go…ó…óo goo haalugol ko Alla longini …óun, go…ó…óo goo gandal fii sendindirgol noone ruuhuuji, go…ó…óo goo noone *haalaaji janani, go…ó…óo goo nantingol …óin haalaaji.
12.11: Ko on Ruuhu gooto bajjo wa…óata …óii piiji fow, senditana mo kala e ko mun, wano o yi…óiri non.
12.12: Ko …óun wa…ói, wano tawiri non …ìandu ndun ko wooturu, hindu mari tere buy. Tere …ìandu ndun non kadi e …óuu…óude, ko …ìandu wooturu …óe mari. Ko wano non wonirani *Almasiihu on.
12.13: Ko fii ko Ruuhu gooto *lootira…óen fii wonugol …ìandu wooturu. En fow yarna…óen Ruuhu Alla gooto on, woni non Yahuudiyankee…ìe …ìen, woni *Gereekiyankee…ìe …ìen, woni jiyaa…ìe …ìen, woni rim…ìe …ìen.
12.14: Ko fii …ìandu ndun wonaali teral gootal, kono tere buy.
12.15: Si koyngal ngal wi'ii wonde: ¬´∆Åay hinaa mi jungo, mi tawdaaka e …ìandu ndun¬ª, …óun ittataa ko ngal teral e …ìandu ndun.
12.16: Si nowru ndun kadi wi'ii wonde: ¬´∆Åay hinaa mi yiitere, mi tawdaaka e …ìandu ndun¬ª, …óun ittataa ko ndu teral e …ìandu ndun.
12.17: Si tawno …ìandu ndun fow wonno yiitere, ko honno ndu naniraynoo? Maa si …ìandu ndun fow wa…óano nowru, ko honno ndu faamiraynoo barngol?
12.18: Kono Alla wa…ói teral kala e …ìandu ndun no o faaliraa non.
12.19: Si fow wonno teral gootal, ko honto …ìandu ndun wonaynoo?
12.20: Jooni non, tere buy no woodi, kono …ìandu ndun ko wooturu.
12.21: Yiitere nden waawataa wi'ude jungo ngon: ¬´Mi hatonjinaa e maa.¬ª Hoore nden kadi waawataa wi'ude koy…óe …óen: ¬´Mi hatonjinaa e mon.¬ª
12.22: ∆äun-le toode, tere …ìandu wa'u…óe wa si no …ìuri lo'ude …óen, ko …óen woni hittu…óe,
12.23: e …óe tan∆¥ini…óen no …ìuri hayfude …óen e …ìandu ndun, hi…óen hundiri …óe teddungal …ìurngal tii…óude. E hin-le tere men …ìur…óe hersinaade …óen, ko …óen …ìur…óen surrude,
12.24: …óe hersinaaki …óen kan hatonjinaa e …óun. Alla wa…óiri …ìandu ndun e noone mo …ìureten teddinirde ≈ãakkiraa…óe …óen,
12.25: fii wota liddondiral wa…óu e nder …ìandu ndun, kono yo …óe nafindir.
12.26: Si teral tampii, …óeya tere fow tampiday e maggal. Si teral gootal teddinaama, …óeya tere fow weltoday e maggal.
12.27: Ko on …ìandu Almasiihu on, mo kala e mon ko teral e mayru.
12.28: Awa, ko Alla adii wa…óude e nder *moftal ngal, ko *sahaabaa…ìe, …óimmun …óun ko haaloo…ìe ko Alla longini …óun, tammun …óun ko jannoo…ìe, …ìawto …óun dokkal fii kaawakeeji mo∆¥∆¥i, e dokke fii …≤awndugol, e wallugol, e ardagol, e wowlugol e noone haalaaji janani.
12.29: Hara fow ko sahaabaa…ìe? Kaa hara fow ko haaloo…ìe ko Alla longini …óun? Kaa hara fow ko jannoo…ìe? Kaa hara fow wa…óay kaawakeeji mo∆¥∆¥i?
12.30: Kaa hara fow ye…óa dokke …≤awndugol? Kaa ko fow ye…óaa wowlugol e haalaaji janani? Kaa hara fow ko nantinoo…ìe …óin haalaaji?
12.31: Kono himmanee dokke …ìur…óe mo∆¥∆¥ude …óen. Awa mi hollay on kadi laawol …ìurngol mo∆¥∆¥ude ngol.

13.1: Hay si mi wowlii e haalaaji yim…ìe …ìen e …ói malaa'ikaa…ìe …ìen, si tawii mi alaa giggol, haray ko mi talenhun sila sen∆¥oohun, maa foolifen won…óo e iidude.
13.2: Hay si mi ye…óaama dokkal haalugol ko Alla longinimmi kon e faamu fii gundooji …óin fow e gande …óen fow, e hay si mi he…ìii gom…óinal haa ka tawata mi dillinay pelle …óen, si tawii mi alaa giggol, haray hinaa mi fus.
13.3: Hay si mi okkitirii keyeeji an …óin fow fii …≤ammingol miskin…ìe …ìen, e hay si mi okkitirii …ìandu an ndun fii yo ndu sunne, si mi alaa giggol, …óun nafataa lan huunde.
13.4: Giggol ko mu…≤al, giggol ko mo∆¥∆¥uki, giggol nawlataa, giggol mantotaako, hinaa heewungol mawnintinaare.
13.5: Ngol waasaa needi, ngol …óa…ì…ìataa nafa maggol, ngol yaawataa seytinde, ngol marataa bone.
13.6: Ngol weltortaa angal peewal, kono ko goonga ngol weltorta.
13.7: Giggol he…≤…≤ay ko woni woo, hingol hoolii ko woni woo, hingol tan∆¥inii e ko woni woo, hingol wakkilii ko woni woo.
13.8: Giggol ngol lannataa haa poomaa. Haalugol ko Alla longini …óun fe∆¥∆¥ay, *haalaaji janani kadi fe∆¥∆¥ay, gandal kadi fe∆¥∆¥ay.
13.9: Ko fii gandal men ngal hinaa timmungal, ko haaleten kon e nder ko Alla longini en kon kadi hinaa ko timmi.
13.10: Ko fii, nde ko laatii kon aroyi woo, ko timmaa kon fe∆¥∆¥ay.
13.11: Wa fewndo ko mi wonnoo paykun, mi wowlirayno wa paykun, mi miijorayno wa paykun, mi …≤aawirayno kadi wa paykun. ∆Åay mi wonii mokobaa, mi fe∆¥∆¥ani paykunyaagal.
13.12: Hande hi…óen tintora ndaarorgal e noone no ni…ì…ìitiri, kono en yi'oyay kene e kene. Ko mi andi kon hande timmaa, kono mi andiroyay wano Alla andirimmi non.
13.13: Jooni non ko …óii piiji …óoo tati luttata: ko gom…óinal e tama'u e giggol. Kono ko …ìuri mawnude kon, ko giggol.

14.1: Awa …óa…ì…ìee giggol ngol, himmanon dokke iwru…óe e Ruuhu Alla …óen, tentinii haalugol ko Alla longini …óun.
14.2: ∆äun, on wowlu…óo e *haala janana, haray hinaa yim…ìe …ìen o wowlani, ko Alla. Ko fii hay gooto alaa mo faamude, awa kadi ko ruuhu o woni wowlirde …óin gundooji.
14.3: Kono haaloowo ko Alla longini …óun kon ko yim…ìe …ìen o woni yewtude, o tii…óina …ìe, o wakkilina …ìe, o yarlina …ìe.
14.4: On wowloowo e haala janana non ko hoore mun tun o woni tii…óinde, kono won…óo haalude ko Alla longini …óun kon ka…≤un ko *moftal ngal o woni tii…óinde.
14.5: Mi…óo yi…ói on fow yo on wowlu e haala janana, kono ko mi …ìuri faaleede kon ko yo on wonu haaloo…ìe ko Alla longini …óun. Ko fii on haaloowo ko Alla longini …óun no …ìuri wowloowo e haalaaji janani on mawnude, si hinaa hara on ne…ó…óo nantin …óun fii no moftal ngal tii…óiniree.
14.6: Jooni non, yo musi…ì…ìe an, si mi arii ka mon e yewtugol on e haalaaji janani, haray ko hon…óun mi nafi on, si wonaa hara ko kongol gandal maa jannde maa haalugol ko Alla longini …óun maa fe…≤…≤inannde mi woni wowlude?
14.7: Si tawii aalaaji …ói wuuraa no wa…óude hito, wano serdu maa hoddu, si hito majji on laa…ìaali, haray ko honno andirton galli majji on?
14.8: E si tawii hito *liital ngal laa…ìaali, ko hombo e…ì…ìindantoo hare nden?
14.9: Onon kadi wano non, si tawii on alaa yewtude haala faamotooka e nder ko wowloton e haalaaji janani kon, ko honno …ìe andirta ko won…óon wi'ude kon? Ko fii haray ko hendu ndun won…óon wowlande.
14.10: Noone haalaaji buy no woodi e oo aduna, kono alaa e majji ngol alaa firo.
14.11: Si tawii non mi faamataa haala ka go…ó…óo woni yewtude lan kan, mi wonanay mo janano, kanko kadi o wonanammi janano.
14.12: Onon kadi non, …ìay hi…óon himmande dokke iwru…óe e Ruuhu Alla …óen, yo taw ko fii tii…óingol moftal ngal won…óon himmirande …óen dokke haa fe∆¥∆¥ita.
14.13: Ko …óun wa…ói, on won…óo yewtude e *haala janana longinaaka, yo toro fii no waawira nantinirde.
14.14: Ko fii si mi…óo toraade Alla e haala janana longinaaka, haray ruuhu an on no toraade, kono haray mi alaa faamude.

1.22: o maandiniri en maande makko nden, …óun ko tolmugol Ruuhu makko on ka …ìer…óe men.

1.24: Hinaa fii me…óen laamii on e hoore gom…óinal mon ngal, kono ko men gollidoo…ìe e mon fii weltaare mon nden, …ìay hi…óon tabiti e nder gom…óinal ngal.

2.1: Min tigi mi aadii wota mi yiltitodu ka mon e sokola.
2.2: Ko fii min, si mi sokolinii on, haray ko hombo waawi lan weltinde, si hinaa onon he…ìir…ìe lan sokola …ìen?
2.3: Mi windiranii on nii fii wota mi he…ìir haanu…ìe weltinde lan …ìen sokola nde mi aroyi. Mi…óo joganii on fow ndee hoolaare wonde, weltaare an nden ko nde mon on fow.
2.4: Ko e nder annde tii…óunde e mettu …ìernde e gon…ói tii…óu…ói mi windani on, hinaa non fii sokolingol on, kono ko fii no andiron giggol tii…óungol ngol mi joganii on ngol. Fii Yaafagol Bonnu…óo
2.5: Si tawii go…ó…óo e mon wonii sabu annde, haray hinaa min o aanini, kono ko on fow, maa wo…ì…ìe e mon, (fii wota mi wowlu haa fe∆¥∆¥ita).
2.6: Feloore nde …ìur…ìe …ìen e hakkunde mon fawi mo nden, yonay on ne…ó…óo.
2.7: Haray jooni hi…óon haani mo yaafaade wakkilina, fii wota o sonjor sokola fe∆¥∆¥itu…óo.
2.8: Awa mi torike on hollugol mo giggol.
2.9: Ko fii, ko mi windirannoo on, ko fii ndarndagol on annda si hi…óon …óoftii ko woni woo.
2.10: Ko fii kala mo yaafani…óon, mi yaafanto mo min kadi. Telen-ma an min, si no woodi ko mi yaafoo, ko fii mon mi yaafori, e yeeso *Almasiihu on,
2.11: fii wota en accu Ibuliisa foola en, ko fii wonaa wa si en andaa e…ì…ìooje makko …óen. Fii Annde Puulusa nden Turuwaasi
2.12: Fewndo ko mi hewti Turuwaasi fii fe…≤…≤ingol Kibaaru Mo∆¥∆¥o Almasiihu on, mi tawi Joomiraa…óo on no udditanimmi dambugal.
2.13: Kono tawi …ìernde an nden waalanooki, …ìay mi tawaali …óon oo musi…ó…óo an wi'etee…óo Tiituusa. Onsay mi waynitii …ìe, mi fokkitani Masedonii.
2.14: Yo mantoore wonan Alla, on Won…óo en okkude polgal soono woo e nder humondiral men e Almasiihu on, on Won…óo en huutorde fii fe…≤…≤ingol nokku kala urngol andugol Almasiihu on.
2.15: Awa e hakkunde wonaa…ìe dandeede …ìen, e hakkunde won…ìe mulude …ìen, hi…óen wa'ani Alla wa angiri uurundi ndi Almasiihu on wee…ìitani mo:
2.16: hi…óen wonani wo…ì…ìe …ìen barngol mayde nawrayngol e mayde, hi…óen wonani …ìeya …ìen urngol ngurndan nawrayngol e ngurndan. Ko ne…ó…óo hombo gaynata sifa …óen golle?
2.17: Ko fii men wa'aa wa wo…ì…ìe, baanor…ìe daaluyee Alla on, kono ko e nder haqiiqa men yewtirta e innde Alla, e yeeso Alla e nder humondiral amen e Almasiihu on.

3.1: E hara men fu…ó…óitoto fahin kuljude hoore amen? Kaa men hatonjinay e …ìataake kulju…óe fii amen wano wo…ì…ìe goo? Kaa ko onon haani wa…óangol men …óun?
3.2: Ko onon tigi woni …ìatakuru amen, windiindu ka …ìer…óe amen, ndu yim…ìe …ìen fow jangi, faami.
3.3: No laa…ìi, ko on …ìatakuru *Almasiihu on, ndu menen tigi men yottini, ndu tawata hinaa ndaha windiraa, kono ko windiraandu Ruuhu Alla Wuuru…óo on, ndu tawata hinaa e hoore alluuje kaa∆¥e windaa, kono ko ka …ìer…óe mon.
3.4: Ko …óun woni hoolaare nde men jogii immorde e Almasiihu on yeeso Alla.
3.5: Hinaa wonde me…óen mari feere wa…óugol go…ó…óun menen tigi, wa ko iwrata e mbawdi amen menen tigi. Kono mbawdi amen ndin ko e Alla iwri.
3.6: O wawnii men kadi wonugol yangantoo…ìe *ahadi heyri ndin, hara hinaa tippude e bindol sariya on, kono ko tippude e Ruuhu Allaahu on. Ko fii bindol ngol waray, kono Ruuhu on wurnay. Fii Mangu Ahadi Heyri ndin
3.7: Sariya Muusaa windiranoo…óo kalfe e hoore alluuje kaa∆¥e on arduno e ngun mangu haa ka tawata *Isra'iilayankee…ìe …ìen waawataa ndaarude yeeso Muusaa ngon sabu on annoora fe∆¥∆¥oowo wonnoo…óo ka yeeso makko. Si tawii golle on Sariya nawroowo e mayde ardii e sifa ngun mangu,
3.8: haray ko haa honto non golle Ruuhu Allaahu on …ìuri mawnude!
3.9: Si tawii ko nawrata en e …≤aawoore kon mawninaama, haray ittii e sikke ko haa honto ko wa…óata en feewu…ìe yeeso Alla kon …ìuri mawnude!
3.10: Hi…óen waawi hay wi'ude wonde ngun mangu fe∆¥∆¥ungu fuutoraama mangu mun ngun fow, si ngu e…ì…ìindiraama e …ìurngu mawnude ngu hande ngun.
3.11: Si tawii ko fe∆¥∆¥ata kon he…ìii mangu, haray ko haa honto ko luttata kon mawnata!
3.12: Awa oo tama'u …óoo no okki en hoolaare tii…óunde.
3.13: En wa…óirtaa wano Muusaa non, on wa…óaynoo…óo tiggaare ka yeeso mun, fii wota Isra'iilayankee…ìe …ìen yi'u rawnoode annoora makko fe∆¥∆¥oowo on.
3.14: Kono, e nder miijooji ma…ì…ìe …óin, …ìer…óe ma…ì…ìe …óen yoorii. Ko fii, haa weetaango hande ngoo, si *ahadi hinndi ndin janga, taway haa hande nden tiggaare no woodaa. Nde ittaaka, ko fii ko e Almasiihu on tun nde muti.
3.15: Haa weetaango hande ngoo, si Sariya Muusaa on janga, taway tiggaare no wirni …ìer…óe ma…ì…ìe …óen.
3.16: Kono si fewta e Joomiraa…óo on, taway tiggaare nden ittaama ka …ìer…óe ma…ì…ìe.
3.17: E hin-le Joomiraa…óo on ko Ruuhu, awa kadi ko ka Ruuhu Joomiraa…óo on woni …óon, ko …óon ndimu ngun woni.
3.18: Enen, …ìe geece mun buumaaki …ìen fow, jalbir…ìe mangu Joomiraa…óo on wa ndaarorgal, hi…óen e nder wattegol mbaadi makko, mangu e hoore mangu, immorde e Joomiraa…óo on, …óun ko on Ruuhu.

4.1: Ko …óun wa…ói, …ìay Alla ye…óii men …óen golle e nder yurmeende makko nden, maayu …ìernde he…ìataa men.
4.2: Men sali kala ko suu…óii hersinii, men wuurirtaa kadi ∆¥oyre, men …ìoylataa kadi daaluyee Alla on, kono ko e nder ko men fe…≤…≤inta goonga on kon, …óun holnay kala …ìernde ne…ó…óanke fii amen yeeso Alla.
4.3: Si tawii haa jooni Kibaaru Mo∆¥∆¥o mo men waajotoo on no ni…ì…ìitii, haray ko won…ìe mulude …ìen o ni…ì…ìitani,
4.4: …óun ko …ìen …ìe gom…óinaa, …ìe tawata alla nguu jamaanu wuminii miijooji mun, fii wota …ìe yi'u jalbeendi Kibaaru Mo∆¥∆¥o …ìangin…óo mangu *Almasiihu on, on won…óo mbaadi Alla.
4.5: Hinaa fii amen tigi men woni waajaade, kono ko fii Iisaa Almasiihu Joomi on men woni waajaade, menen non ko men kurkaa…ói mon sabu Iisaa.
4.6: Ko fii ko on Alla daalu…óo: ¬´Yo ndaygu ngun jalbu ka nder niwre¬ª, ko kanko kadi jalbini …ìer…óe amen …óen, fii ndaygingol e amen andal mangu Alla wongu e yeeso Almasiihu on ngon.
4.7: Enen jogii…ìe ngun ngalu, hi…óen wa'i wa loo…óe leydi, fii no andiree wonde ngal bawgal mawngal ko e Alla iwi, hinaa e amen.
4.8: Men …ìittiraama nooneeji …óin fow, kono men muncaaki. Men ji…ìii, kono men ta∆¥aaki.
4.9: Men cukkaa, kono men hawkaaka. Men li…ìaa, kono men hayraali.
4.10: Me…óen wondi e mayde Iisaa nden saa'i kala ka …ìalli amen, fii no ngurndan Iisaa …óan fee…≤ira ka …ìalli amen.
4.11: Ko fii enen wur…ìe …ìen soono woo, hi…óen wee…ìitanaa mayde nden sabu Iisaa, fii no ngurndan Iisaa …óan kadi fee…≤ira e …ìalli men maayooji …óin.
4.12: Ko non men wee…ìitorani mayde nden fii no he…ìiron ngurndan.
4.13: Wano windori non: ¬´Mi gom…óinii, ko …óun wa…ói si mi wowli.¬ª Menen kadi …ìay ko noone gom…óinal gootal men mari, me…óen gom…óini, ko …óun wa…ói si me…óen wowlude,
4.14: e nder andugol wonde, on Immintin…óo Iisaa Joomi on, o immintiniday en kadi e Iisaa, o wee…ìitida men e mon yeeso makko.
4.15: Ko fii, …óun fow ko woni ardude ko fii mon, fii yo sulfu on …ìurtu hewtude yim…ìe …óuu…óu…ìe, fii no yettooje …óen ka mangu Alla laatora …óuu…óu…óe.
4.16: Ko …óun wa…ói si maayu …ìernde he…ìataa men. Hay si …ìandu amen ndun …≤olii, kono haray nder amen on no hey…óitude …≤ande woo …≤ande.
4.17: Ko fii oo saa'i satteende e fan…óude mun, o rimanay en darja teddu…óo poomayankeejo …ìur…óo oo saa'i satteende.
4.18: Ko fii menen, wonaa ko yi'otoo kon men wa…ói hakkilaaji amen …óin e mun, kono ko ko yi'otaako kon men wa…ói hakkillaaji amen e mun. Ko fii ko yi'otoo kon, ko ko fe∆¥∆¥ata, ko yi'otaako kon, ko ko luttata haa poomaa.

5.1: Hi…óen andi wonde, si tawii …óii togooji …ói ho…óu…óen e mun ka leydi …óoo, (e maanaa …ìalli men …óin), aru e bonneede, haray hi…óen mari suudu ndu Alla e…ì…ìani en, …óun ko wonunde poomayankeere, nde tawata hinaa juu…óe ne…ó…óanke mo∆¥∆¥iniraa.
5.2: Awa kadi e nder …óin togooji, hi…óen woytaade fii faale …ìornagol wonunde kammuyankeere nden,
5.3: tawa ko en …ìornii…ìe, hara tawetaake ko en daror…ìe nii.
5.4: Ko …óun wa…ói, enen won…ìe e nder …óin togooji, hi…óen woytaade, hi…óen sonjii, …ìay en faalaaka laataade …ìortii…ìe, kono hara ko …ìornii…ìe, fii no ngurndan …óan mo…óira mayde nden.
5.5: Awa on Hebulin…óo en fii nden e…ì…ìoore ko Alla, on Tolmu…óo Ruuhu mun on e men.
5.6: Awa hi…óen heewi soono woo wakkilaare. Hi…óen andi kadi fodde hi…óen wondi e nduu …ìandu, haray hi…óen wo…ó…óondiri e Joomiraa…óo on.
5.7: Ko fii, ko gom…óinal ngal woni en ardaade, hinaa gii…óe …óen.
5.8: Hi…óen heewi wakkilaare, ko …ìur…óen faaleede ko seedugol e nduu …ìandu ho…óa moggo Joomiraa…óo on.
5.9: Ko …óun wa…ói, wondu…óen e nduu …ìandu maa seedu…óen e mayru, himme men …óen ko welegol Joomiraa…óo on.
5.10: Ko fii en fow en darnete ka yeeso …≤aawirde *Almasiihu on, fii no o jonnitira mo kala njoddi kuu…óe mun …óe o wa…óunoo ka aduna, woni ko ko mo∆¥∆¥i, woni ko ko boni. Fii Mo∆¥∆¥intingol hakkunde Yim…ìe …ìen e Alla
5.11: Awa, …ìay men andii ko woni hulugol Joomiraa…óo on, me…óen …óa…ì…ìude no men fellintinira yim…ìe …ìen. Alla no andi ko men hom…ìe, awa mi…óo tan∆¥inii onon kadi ka nder …ìer…óe mon hi…óon andi men.
5.12: Men alaa kuljude hoore amen kadi, kono ko dalil men woni on jonnude fii no mantoron men, fii no waawiron jaaborde …ìen won…ìe mantorde ko woni e kene kon edii …ìe mantorde ko woni e …ìernde kon.
5.13: Si tawii ko men wilii…ìe, haray andee wonde ko fii Alla men wilanii. Si tawii kadi non me…óen selli, haray andee wonde ko fii mon men sellani.
5.14: Ko fii giggol Almasiihu on no laamii men, menen …ìee fellitu…ìe …óun…óoo: aaden gooto maayanii fow, awa fow maayii.
5.15: O maayanii fow, fii wota wur…ìe …ìen wuuran hoore mun hande kadi, kono yo wuuran May…óo immintinaa fii ma…ì…ìe on.
5.16: ∆äun haray gila jooni men jogoraa hay gooto e noone no yim…ìe oo aduna jogorta go…ó…óo non. Hay si tawiino hari men jogoriino Almasiihu on wano non, jooni men jogoraa mo non hande kadi.
5.17: Si tawii go…ó…óo no humondiri e Almasiihu on, haray ko o tagudi heyri, haray piiji ki…ó…ói …óin fe∆¥∆¥irii mo, haray piiji …óin fow wontii kesi.
5.18: ∆äun fow ko immorde e Alla woni, on Mo∆¥∆¥intin…óo hakkunde men e makko rewrude e Almasiihu on. O ye…ói men menen kadi golle mo∆¥∆¥intingol hakkunde yim…ìe …ìen e makko kanko Alla.
5.19: Ko fii Alla mo∆¥∆¥intinii hakkunde makko e aduna on rewrude e Almasiihu on, e …ìaawo joganagol yim…ìe …ìen bonnereeji ma…ì…ìe …óin, o halfinii men menen kadi kongol mo∆¥∆¥intingol hakkunde yim…ìe …ìen e makko.
5.20: Awa ko men …ìe Almasiihu on immini wa si tawii Alla no rewrude e amen fii waajagol. Awa men jeejii on e innde Almasiihu on: wonee welditu…ìe e Alla.
5.21: On mo junuubu alaa e mun, …óun ko Iisaa Almasiihu on, Alla wa…óii mo junuubu fii men, fii, sabu humondiral men e Almasiihu on, no woniren feewu…ìe Alla.

6.1: ∆Åay ko men gollidoo…ìe, men wakkilinii on wota on ja…ìir sulfu Alla on meere.
6.2: Ko fii himo daali: ¬´Mi jaabinanii ma ka saa'i sulfu, ka …≤alaande kisiyee mi faabike ma.¬ª Awa mi andinii on ko fewndo …óoo woni saa'i sulfu on, awa kadi ko …≤alaande kisiyee nden nii. Fii Tampereeji Puulusa …óin
6.3: Awa men wonataa sabu peggal woo e hoore hay gooto, fii wota golle amen …óen wonu huunde felniinde.
6.4: E kala huunde men …ìanginay ko men kurkantoo…ìe Alla, e nder ≈ãa…≤…≤an…óe buy, e nder tampereeji …óin e ≈ãakkireede, e nder anndeeji,
6.5: e nder pigge e kaseede e murtaneede, e golleeji sattu…ói e angal …óoyngol e heege.
6.6: Me…óen fe…≤…≤inira …óun laa…ìal e gandal e mu…≤al e mo∆¥∆¥uki e *Ruuhu Senii…óo on e giggol ngol alaa faasiqankaaku,
6.7: wondude e daaluyee goongaajo on e baw…óe Alla …óen, peewal ngal wona aala amen ha…ìir…óo e hiwitor…óo.
6.8: E hoore me…óen teddinee e me…óen hoynee, me…óen wowlee ko boni e me…óen wowlee ko mo∆¥∆¥i. Me…óen jogoree wa fenoo…ìe, hara-le ko men wowloo…ìe goonga.
6.9: Men jogoree wa …ìe andaaka fii kala me…óen andaa, wa won…ìe maayude e hin-le me…óen wuuri, maa wa wonaa…ìe letteede fii kala men waraaka,
6.10: wa sokolnaa…ìe e hin-le saa'i kala me…óen weltii, wa …ìillii…ìe hara-le me…óen al…óinde …óuu…óu…ìe, wa …ìe alaa huunde e hin-le me…óen mari fow.
6.11: Ko onon yo …ìe Korenti, men haalanii on ko woni e amen kon, me…óen ya…≤…≤ani on …ìer…óe amen …óen.
6.12: Men faa…óinanaali on …ìer…óe amen …óen, kono ko onon tigi faa…óinani men …ìer…óe mon …óen.
6.13: Awa mi…óo yewtira on wa fay…ìe an: onon kadi wa…óiranee men wano men wa…óirani on non, udditanon men …ìer…óe mon …óen! Fii Wo…ó…óitagol ko Boni
6.14: Wota on humondir e …ìe gom…óinaa …ìen. Ko fii ko humondiral hongal woni hakkunde peewal ngal e angal peewal ngal? Maa ko kawtital hongal woni hakkunde ndaygu e niwre?
6.15: E ko nanondiral hongal woni hakkunde *Almasiihu on e Ibuliisa? E ko ge…ìal hongal gom…óin…ìe …ìen e …ìe gom…óinaa …ìen hawti?
6.16: E ko *ahadi hondi wondi suudu Alla ndun e sanamuuji …óin? Ko fii, ko enen woni suudu Alla Wuuru…óo on, wano Alla daaliri non: ¬´Mi ho…óay, mi jinda hakkunde ma…ì…ìe, mi wona Alla ma…ì…ìe, …ìe wona jamaa an.¬ª
6.17: Ko …óun wa…ói si Joomiraa…óo on daali: ¬´Iwee e hakkunde ma…ì…ìe, seedon, wota on meemu ko laa…ìaa, min mi ja…ì…ìoyto on.
6.18: ¬´Mi wonanay on Baaba, onon wonanon mi …ìi…ì…ìe wor…ìe e …ìi…ì…ìe rew…ìe. Ko Joomiraa…óo Jom Bawgal on daali …óun.¬ª

7.1: ∆Åay non hi…óen mari wano …óii fodaariiji, yo yi…ì…ìe, la…ì…ìino…óen e kala ko tuuninta …ìandu ndun e ruuhu on, e hoore timmingol laa…ìal ngal e nder kulol Alla. Fii Tuubuubuyee …ìe Korenti …ìen e Weltaare Puulusa nden
7.2: Wernee men ka …ìer…óe mon, ko fii men faw…≤aaki hay e gooto, men bonnaali kadi hay gooto, awa kadi men huutoraali hay gooto.
7.3: Hinaa fii felugol on mi wi'iri …óun, ko fii hari mi wi'uno wonde hi…óon ka …ìer…óe amen, woni ngurndan, woni mayde.
7.4: Mi…óo mari hoolaare tii…óunde e telen-ma mon, mi…óo mari ko mi mantora fii mon fota, mi…óo wakkilinaa fota, mi…óo heewi weltaare e nder …óii satteendeeji amen fow.
7.5: Ko fii gila men hewti Masedonii, men he…ìaali feere no men fowtora hay see…óa, men tampiniraama noone fow, gere ka kene, kulol ka nder.
7.6: Kono Alla, Wakkilinoowo miskin…ìe …ìen, o wakkilinirii men ardu Tiituusa ndun.
7.7: Wonaa non ardu makko ndun tun o wakkiliniri men, kono kadi, ko wakkilaare nde wakkilin…óon mo nden. O sifanike men faale mon tii…óu…óo on e gon…ói mon …óin e cataare mon nden fii an. ∆äun wa…ói haa weltaare an nden …ìurti tii…óude.
7.8: Hay si tawii mi sokolinirii on …ìatakuru an ndun, mi ninsaa …óun jooni, hay si tawii mi…óo ninsunoo. Ko fii mi…óo sutii wonde ndun …ìatakuru ko sokolini on ko haa see…óa.
7.9: Fewndo …óoo mi…óo weltii, hinaa non fii ko sokol…óon kon, kono ko fii ko sokola mon on addi on e tuubuubuyee kon, ko fii on sokoliniraama no Alla yi…óiri, …ìay on he…ìiraali men bone woo.
7.10: Ko …óun wa…ói, sokola mo Alla yi…ói on adday tuubuubuyee nawroowo e kisiyee mo en ninsataa, e hin-le sokola oo aduna ko addata ko mayde.
7.11: Awa on yi'ii ko oo sokola mo Alla yi…ói wa…ói e mon kon: …óun ko wakkilaare, e faale danditagol too…≤e, e ko tikku…óon kon, e ko ≈ãal…óu…óon fii bone wa…óaa…óo on, e faale mon mo∆¥∆¥o fii yi'itugol lan, e cataare mon nden, e hebulaare mon nden fii donkingol bonnu…óo on. On holliri noone fow wonde on tawaaka e nduu muraadu.
7.12: Awa si mi windanii on, hinaa sabu faw…≤ii…óo on, maa faw…≤aa…óo e mun on, kono ko fii no jogitor…óon men non fee…≤irana on onon tigi yeeso Alla.
7.13: Ko …óun wa…ói si men wakkilinaa. Kono e hoore nden wakkilaare amen, men …ìurti weltorde weltaare nde Tiituusa weltinaa nden, on mo on fow weltin…óon …ìernde mun.
7.14: Si tawii mi mantorii fii mon yeeso makko see…óa, haray mi hersiraa …óun, kono ko wano ko men yewtata on saa'i woo kon woniri goonga non, ko non ko men mantori moggo Tiituusa kon woniri kadi goonga.
7.15: Awa kadi giggol ngol o joganii on ngol ko tii…óungol, tuma kala o anditi ko …óofti…óon mo kon on fow e noone no tolnir…óon mo non kulol e teddungal.
7.16: Mi…óo weltori waawugol hoolorgol on e kala huunde.

8.1: Men andinay on, yo musi…ì…ìe, fii ndee mo∆¥∆¥ere Alla ye…óaande *mofte makko …óen Masedonii,
8.2: e maanaa, noone satteendeeji …ói …ìe ndarndaa woo, weltaare ma…ì…ìe heewunde nden e …ìillaare ma…ì…ìe tii…óunde nden no okkude …ìe feere okkirgol no yaajiri.
8.3: Yeru mbawdi ma…ì…ìe ndin, mi…óo seeditii, …ìe wa…óii hay toonin mbawdi ma…ì…ìe ndin e hoore anniyee mo∆¥∆¥o.
8.4: ∆Åe landike men, e nder tentingol no tii…óiri, yo …ìe tawde e faabagol yim…ìe Alla …ìen.
8.5: ∆äun fe∆¥∆¥iti ko men tan∆¥ininoo kon. Kam…ìe tigi …ìe wee…ìitanii Joomi on taho, si …ìe wee…ìitanii men no yaadiri e faale Alla on.

9.6: Andee wonde : mo sankii see…óa ko see…óa o wa'ata, mo sankii buy ko buy o wa'ata.

10.1: Min Puulusa, mi tororii on newaare e mo∆¥∆¥uki *Almasiihu on, min oo newii…óo e yeeso mon, e heewu…óo cuucal fii mon ka wo…ó…óitii on.

12.9: o jaabii lan: ¬´Mo∆¥∆¥ere an nden yonii ma, ko fii bawgal an ngal ko e nder lo'ere nden …ìangata.¬ª Awa mi …ìeyday mantaade fii lo'ereeji an …óin, fii no bawgal Almasiihu on wonira e hoore an.

12.11: Mi wa'uno wa komoojo, kono ko onon karhunoo mi, …ìay ko onon haanuno kuljude lan! Ko fii hay huunde mi seedaa e …ìen ¬´sahaabaa…ìe townitii…ìe¬ª, fii kala hinaa mi huunde.
12.12: Maandeeji hollu…ói fii sahaabaa…ìe …ìen wa…óiraama yeeso mon ≈ãa…≤…≤annde tii…óunde, …óun ko maandeeji e kuu…óe e kaawakeeji mo∆¥∆¥i.

12.19: No gasa hi…óon sikka gila nee…ìii wonde men danditoto woni e telen-ma mon. Awa, ko yeeso Alla e innde Almasiihu on men woni yewtirde. ∆äun fow non, yo yi…ì…ìe, ko fii tii…óingol on.
12.20: Ko fii mi…óo huli, nde mi hewtoyi, no gasa mi tawroya on hara hinaa no mi faaliraa non, e min kadi no gasa hara hinaa no faalira…óon non. Mi…óo huli wota taw no gasa hara ko yeddondiral e nawliigu e monee e haasidi e …≤oore e baddi e mawnintinaare e jii…ìoldu woni hakkunde mon.

13.8: Ko fii men waawanaa goonga on hay huunde. Kono ko wonangol goonga on men waawi.
13.9: Menen men weltoto nde men lo'i, e hin-le onon hi…óon dolni, e ko men yelotoo e nder torndeeji amen …óin, ko fii no laatoron timmu…ìe.
13.10: Ko …óun wa…ói si mi…óo windande on …óun si mi alaa ton, fii nde mi aroyi, wota mi sattiniran on huutorgol mbawdi fii laamagol on ndi Joomiraa…óo on ye…óimmi ndin fii tii…óingol on, hara hinaa fii li…ìugol on. Fii Rawnoode ∆Åatakuru ndun e Salminaango mun
13.11: Fii rawnagol, yo musi…ì…ìe, wonee e nder weltaare, e…ì…ìanee wonugol timmu…ìe, wakkilindiron, he…ìon miijo wooto, wondiron …ìuttu. ∆äun, Alla Jom giggol e …ìuttu on wonday e mon.
13.12: Salmondiree, hirbondiron hirbondiral laa…ìungal. Awa kadi gom…óin…ìe …ìen fow salminii on.
13.13: Yo mo∆¥∆¥ere Iisaa Almasiihu Joomi on, e giggol Alla, wonu e mon on fow, wondude e humondiral e *Ruuhu Senii…óo on.

1.1: Immorde e an min Puulusa, oo *sahaabaajo, mo tawata hinaa yim…ìe …ìen to…ó…óii …óun, hinaa kadi e hay gooto …óun rewi si hinaa e Iisaa Almasiihu on e Alla Baabaajo on, on Immintin…óo mo e hakkunde may…ìe …ìen,
1.2: wondude e musi…ì…ìe …ìe mi wondi …ìen fow, haa e mon onon ngal *moftal Iisaa wongal Galaasi.
1.3: Yo mo∆¥∆¥ere e …ìuttu wonan on immorde e Alla Baaba men, e Iisaa Almasiihu Joomi on,
1.4: on ittu…óo hoore mun sadaka fii junuubaaji men …óin fii dandugol en e nguu jamaanu bonngu fewndiingu hande, wano Alla Baaba men hoddiri non,
1.5: on mo mangural wonani haa poomaa. Aamiina! Fii Kibaaru Mo∆¥∆¥o Bajjo on
1.6: Mi…óo ≈ãal…ói fii koo ko yaawu…óon yiltaade e …ìaawo oo Noddir…óo on mo∆¥∆¥ere Iisaa Almasiihu on, haa ka yahanon kibaaru goo.
1.7: Hara-le kibaaru goo alaa, kono yim…ìe goo no woodi won…ìe on jii…ìude, faalaa…ìe …ìoylude *Linjiila Almasiihu on.
1.8: Kono hay si ko menen maa malaa'ikaajo iwru…óo ka kammu fe…≤…≤inani on kibaaru goo sertu…óo e oya kibaaru mo men fe…≤…≤inannoo on, yo o malkise.
1.9: Hari men yeetinoke on …óun ado hande, mi…óo fillitaade kadi: si go…ó…óo fe…≤…≤inanii on kibaaru sertu…óo e oo mo hendino…óon, yo o malkise.
1.10: E jooni non, hara ko teddungal yim…ìe …ìen mi woni …óa…ì…ìude, kaa ko iwrungal ka Alla ngal? Kaa hara mi…óo …óa…ì…ìude no yim…ìe …ìen yi…óirammi? Si mi faalano haa jooni yo yim…ìe …ìen yi…óan, mi laatotanooko kurkaadu Almasiihu on. Fii no Puulusa Fe…≤…≤iniranaa Kibaaru Mo∆¥∆¥o on
1.11: Mi andinii on, yo musi…ì…ìe an, oo Kibaaru mo mi fe…≤…≤inani on hinaa iwru…óo e ne…ó…óanke.
1.12: Ko fii min mi he…ìiraali mo ne…ó…óanke, awa kadi wonaa ne…ó…óo jannimmi mo, kono ko Iisaa Almasiihu on tigi fe…≤…≤inanimmi mo.
1.13: On naniino fii …óee kuu…óe an e saa'iiji goo wa fewndo ko mi woni ka diina *Yahuudiyanke, …óun ko fewndo ko mi cukkii moftal Alla ngal haa fe∆¥∆¥iti, mi…óo lanca.
1.14: E nder kan diina Yahuudiyanke, hari mi…óo …ìuri goree…ìe an buy e hakkunde le…≤ol an ngol, ko fii hari mi…óo …ìuri …ìe himme tii…óu…óo fii aadaaji baabiraa…ìe amen …ìen.
1.15: Kono, nde Allaahu on, on Su…ìinoo…óo lan gila ka teege yumma an, …óun ko on Noddir…óo lan mo∆¥∆¥ere mun nden,
1.16: o tawno no mo∆¥∆¥i ka o fe…≤…≤inanammi ∆Åi…ó…óo makko on fii no mi wee…ìitirana mo …ìe wonaa Yahuudiyanke …ìen, laatii mi landaaki hay gooto.
1.17: Kono e hoore …óun mi yaaraali kisan *Yerusalaam fii yiidoygol e adii…ìe lan to…ó…óeede …ìen, kono mi yaari ka leydi Aarabu. ∆Åawto …óun mi yiltitii Damaasi.
1.18: Ko duu…ìi tati …ìawto …óun si mi yahi Yerusalaam fii yiidoygol e Petruusu. Mi woni ka makko …óon e nder bal…óe sappoo e jowi.
1.19: Kono hari …óun fow, mi yiidaali e sahaabaajo goo, si hinaa Yaaquuba, …óun ko mi…≤…≤iraawo Joomi on.
1.20: E nder koo ko mi woni on windande …óun, e hino Alla no reeni, mi fenaa.
1.21: ∆Åawto …óun mi yahi e nder …óee ley…óe Sirii e Silisii.
1.22: Kono hari mofte Almasiihu won…óe e diiwal Yahuuda …óen yi'aali lan.
1.23: ∆Åe naniino tun no wi'ee wonde: Oo cukkinoo…óo …ìe oya tuma, no waajaade e ngal gom…óinal ngal o faalanoo lancude.
1.24: Jooni hi…ìe mantude Alla fii an.

2.1: Duu…ìi sappoo e nay …ìawto …óun, mi yiltitii Yerusalaam, mi yiltodi e Barnabaasi e Tiituusa.
2.2: Ko sabu fe…≤…≤inaneede mi yiltitori ton. Mi holli …ìe daaluyee Kibaaru Mo∆¥∆¥o mo mi fe…≤…≤inani …ìe wonaa Yahuudiyanke …ìen on. Mi fe…≤…≤inani …óun …ìur…ìe teddude …ìen e nder gundoo, fii wota taw ko mi gollunoo kon e ko mi woni gollude kon ko meere.
2.3: Kono fii kala oo mo mi wondunoo ko mo le…≤ol goo, …óun ko Tiituusa, oo *Gereekiyankeejo, …ìe wi'aano bee o *sunninee.
2.4: Kono wa…óitii…ìe musi…ì…ìe men no suu…óinoo lombii hakkunde amen fii tefugol anda fii hettaare wonannde en e Iisaa Almasiihu on e faale maccin…óingol en.
2.5: Kono men ja…ìanaano …ìe …óun hay nde wootere, men yankinanaaki …ìe kadi, fii no goonga won…óo e nder Kibaaru Mo∆¥∆¥o on tabitira e mon.
2.6: Kono laatii, …ìee wa'u…ìe wa si ko …ìur…ìe teddude, ko …ìe wonnoo woo ko see…óa hitti e an, …ìay Allaahu on hinaa dambe ndaarata, …ìen …ìeydaano huunde e ko mi woni waajaade kon.
2.7: Kono …ìe ndaari …ìe tawi ko mi halfiniraa daaluyee Kibaaru Mo∆¥∆¥o on ko fii …ìe sunninaaka …ìen, …óun ko …ìe wonaa Yahuudiyanke …ìen, wano Petruusu halfiniraa non Kibaaru Mo∆¥∆¥o on fii sunninaa…ìe …ìen, …óun ko Yahuudiyankee…ìe …ìen.
2.8: Ko fii ko on Alla huutor…óo Petruusu, wa…ói mo *sahaabaajo fii Yahuudiyankee…ìe …ìen, ko kanko kadi huutorimmi, wa…óimmi sahaabaajo fii …ìe wonaa Yahuudiyanke …ìen.
2.9: Nde tawnoo Yaaquuba e Petruusu e Yuuhanna, jogoraa…ìe wa tugaale dental ngal, fellitii fii mo∆¥∆¥ere nde mi ye…óaa nden, …ìe tamindiri juu…óe amen …≤aame …óen, min e Barnabaasi, fii na…ìidal amen, fii yo menen men yaaru ka …ìe wonaa Yahuudiyanke …ìen, kam…ìe …ìe yaara ka Yahuudiyankee…ìe …ìen.
2.10: ∆Åe yamiri men kadi anditugol miskin…ìe …ìen, …óun ko ko mi hebulanii wa…óugol. Fii Yeddondiral hakkunde Puulusa e Petruusu
2.11: Kono nde Petruusu arnoo Antiyoosi-Sirii mi feli mo e kene, sabu tawde ko o felnii…óo.
2.12: Ko fii, ado yim…ìe …ìe Yaaquuba immini goo arude, hari o …≤aamiday e …ìe wonaa Yahuudiyanke …ìen, kono …ìay …ìen arii, o takkitii, o wonti feere, sabu kulol …ìen Yahuudiyankee…ìe gom…óin…ìe, catii e sunninegol …ìen,
2.13: haa …óun woni sabu …ìeya Yahuudiyankee…ìe …≤embi mo kanko Petruusu e ngal faasiqiyaagal, haa …óun poo…óori hay Barnabaasi, o tawti …ìe e …óun.
2.14: Kono nde mi ndaarunoo, mi tawi …ìe alaa yaarude no feewiri e no yaadiri e goonga Kibaaru Mo∆¥∆¥o on. Onsay mi holli Petruusu e tawnde fow …óun…óoo, mi wi'i mo: ¬´Si tawii an Yahuudiyankeejo on, a wa'ii wa mo wonaa Yahuudiyanke, a iwtii noone Yahuudiyanke, haray ko honno waawirtaa doolirde …ìe wonaa Yahuudiyanke'en jokkugol aadaaji Yahuudiyanke'en?¬ª
2.15: Menen non, ko men jibinannde Yahuudiyanke, wonaa men …ìe …óiya le∆¥∆¥i junuubankeeji,
2.16: kono men faamii wonde go…ó…óo jogortaake feewu…óo sabu …óoftagol Sariya on, kono ko sabu gom…óingol Iisaa Almasiihu on. Ko …óun wa…ói si menen kadi men gom…óinii Iisaa Almasiihu on, fii yo men jogore feewu…ìe sabu gom…óinal ngal gom…óin…óen Iisaa Almasiihu on ngal, hara hinaa sabu …óoftagol Sariya on. Ko fii hay gooto jogortaake feewu…óo sabu …óoftagol Sariya on.
2.17: Si tawii, e nder ko …óa…ì…ìeten jogoreede feewu…ìe kon sabu humondiral e *Almasiihu on, haray …ìangii wonde enen kadi ko en junuubankee…ìe, taw si …óun no firi wonde Almasiihu on no wonani junuubu? Oo'o!
2.18: Si mi wonii e mahitugol ko mi li…ìunoo kon, haray min tigi mi hollii ko mi bon…óo.
2.19: E telen-ma Sariya on, ko mi may…óo ka ba≈ã≈ãe Sariya fii no mi wuurirana Allaahu on.
2.20: Jooni mi fempidaama e Almasiihu on. Hinaa min tigi wuuri jooni, kono ko Almasiihu on wuuri e an. ∆äan ngurndan …óan mi wuuri jooni ka …ìandu, mi…óo wuuriri gom…óingol *∆Åi…ó…óo Alla on, on Yi…óu…óo lan, itti hoore mun sadaka fii an.
2.21: Min mi bugitotaako mo∆¥∆¥ere Alla nden, ko fii si tawiino peewal ko Sariya he…ìorta, harayno Almasiihu on ko meere maayani.

3.1: Ko onon yo …ìe Galaasi njofoo…ìe, ko hombo mbil…óori on nii, onon …ìee …ìanginanaa…ìe ko laa…ìi poy fempegol Iisaa Almasiihu on?
3.2: Jooni ko …óun…óoo tun mi faalaa andude e mon: hara ko sabu wa…óugol ko Sariya on yamiri kon he…ìir…óon Ruuhu Allaahu on, kaa ko gom…óingol ko he…ói…óon kon?
3.3: E jaa ko nii njofi…óir…óon? E on fu…ó…óor Ruuhu Allaahu on, gaynitoron jooni wakkilaare …ìandu?
3.4: E hara kon ko tampuno…óon fow wonay meere? Mi…óo tan∆¥inii wonataa meere!
3.5: E hara oo Won…óo wa…óude …óii kaawakeeji mo∆¥∆¥i e hakkunde mon, …óun ko on Ye…óu…óo on Ruuhu mun on, ko woni …ói wa…óirde ko fii hi…óon wa…óude ko Sariya on yamiri on kon, kaa ko fii hi…óon he…óorde gom…óinal?
3.6: Ko fii no windii wonde: ¬´Ibraahiima gom…óini Alla, ngal gom…óinal makko jogoranaa mo peewal.¬ª
3.7: Awa faamee wonde, gom…óin…ìe …ìen ko …ìi…ì…ìe Ibraahiima.
3.8: Awa kadi bindi …óin no wi'i wonde Alla jogitoroyay …ìe wonaa Yahuudiyanke …ìen feewu…ìe sabu gom…óinal ngal, …óun ko ka Allaahu on adii fe…≤…≤inde Kibaaru Mo∆¥∆¥o on e Ibraahiima …óon, o daali: ¬´Le∆¥∆¥i …óin fow barkinte sabu maa.¬ª
3.9: Ko …óun wa…ói …ìen gom…óin…ìe barkindinte e Ibraahiima, on gom…óinnoo…óo.
3.10: Kala …ìen hoolor…ìe Sariya on, haray ko e nder kuddi …ìe woni, ko fii no windii: ¬´Kuddi no e hoore kala on mo tabitaali e huutorgol ko windii kon fow ka nder deftere Sariya.¬ª
3.11: E hoore …óun, no laa…ìi poy wonde hay gooto jogortaake feewu…óo sabu Sariya on yeeso Alla, ko fii no windii: ¬´Feewu…óo on wuuriray gom…óinal ngal.¬ª
3.12: Awa Sariya on hottaaki gom…óinal. Ko fii no windii wonde: ¬´Kala …óoftii…óo …óee yamirooje, o wuuriray …óe.¬ª
3.13: Ko e nder ko kuddi ndin wontani *Almasiihu on fii men kon, o sotti en e ley kuddi Sariya on, ko fii no windii: ¬´Kuddi wonanii kala on wengaa…óo e leggal¬ª,
3.14: …óun ko fii no barki Ibraahiima hewtira le∆¥∆¥i …óin fow sabu Iisaa Almasiihu on, e hara kadi en hendorto fodaari Ruuhu Allaahu on gom…óinal ngal. Fii Sariya on e Fodaari ndin
3.15: Musi…ì…ìe, mi…óo ∆¥ettude misal e hoore men. Si go…ó…óo aru e wasiyaade, kala ko o wasiyii, hay gooto waawataa firtude …óun maa …ìeydita go…ó…óun e hoore …óun.
3.16: Kono fodaariiji …óin ko e hoore Ibraahiima e jurriya mun on woni. Kanko Alla o wi'aali ¬´jurriyaaji …óin¬ª, wa si tawii ko …ói buy, kono ko gooto o wi'i ¬´jurriya maa on¬ª, …óun-le ko Almasiihu on.
3.17: E hino ko mi woni wi'ude kon: Sariya ar…óo duu…ìi teeme…ó…óe nay e cappan…óe tati gaanin *ahadi ndi Allaahu on wa…óunoo ndin waawataa firtude maa mehin…óina ndin fodaari.
3.18: Ko fii si tawno ndondi ndin ko ka Sariya iwri, haray ndi fawaaki e fodaari. Kono ko sabu fodaari ndin Allaahu on ye…óiri Ibraahiima ndin ndondi.
3.19: Jooni ko sabu hon…óun addi Sariya on? Ko sabu geddi addi Sariya on, haa nde on jurriya fodaa…óo ari. Ko malaa'ikaa…ìe …ìen fe…≤…≤ini Sariya on, kono …ìe rewi e hakkundeejo.
3.20: Hakkundeejo non wonaa sengo wooto wonirta, Alla-le ko gooto.
3.21: ∆äun haray Sariya on ko liddii…óo fodaariiji Alla …óin? Kono hinaa non! Si tawii sariya on ko gasoowo wurnude addanoo, harayno peewal ngal ko e makko iwaynoo.
3.22: Ko …óun wa…ói si bindi …óin wi'i fow no sokaa e ley junuubi, fii no fodaari ndin ye…óiree gom…óin…ìe …ìen sabu ko …ìe gom…óini Iisaa Almasiihu on kon. Fii Gom…óinal ngal e Ronugol Fodaariiji …óin
3.23: Ado gom…óinal ngal arude, hari hi…óen sokii e ley joge Sariya on, haa ngal gom…óinal araynoongal fee…≤a.
3.24: Hari Sariya on ko ngaynaako men fii ko ardoo en e Almasiihu on, fii no jogore…óen feewu…ìe sabu gom…óinal ngal.
3.25: ∆Åay ngal gom…óinal arii, en alaa e ley kongol on ngaynaako han kadi.
3.26: Ko fii on fow ko on …ìi…ì…ìe Alla sabu gom…óinal ngal gom…óin…óon Iisaa Almasiihu on ngal.
3.27: Onon *lootaa…ìe maande kisiyee e nder humondiral e Almasiihu on …ìen fow, on …ìornike Almasiihu on.
3.28: Yahuudiyankeejo maa *Gereekiyankeejo, maa maccu…óo maa dimo, maa debbo maa gorko, alaa hande kadi. Ko fii on fow ko on gooto e nder humondiral mon e Iisaa Almasiihu on.
3.29: Awa-le si tawii hi…óon humondiri e Almasiihu on, haray ko on jurriya Ibraahiima, ronoo…ìe fodaari ndin.

4.1: Ko mi woni wi'ude: fannin ronoowo on ko paykun, haray alaa fus ko o serti e maccu…óo. Fii kala ko kanko jeyi fow,
4.2: haray hikun e ley kongol ne'oo…ìe kun …ìen e fewjanoo…ìe kun …ìen, haa e saa'i mo ben makkun happi on timma.
4.3: Enen kadi wano non, wa fewndo ko won…óen fay…ìe, hari ko en maccu…ìe …óii mbawdiiji adunayankeeji.
4.4: Kono …ìay saa'i on hewtii, Allaahu on adduno ∆Åi…ó…óo makko on, on mo debbo jibini, jibinaa…óo e ley Sariya on,
4.5: fii sottugol …ìen won…ìe e ley Sariya on fii no jogore…óen wa …ìi…ì…ìe.
4.6: ∆Åay ko en …ìi…ì…ìe, Alla addii ka …ìer…óe men Ruuhu ∆Åi…ó…óo makko on, …óun ko on Ruuhu won…óo ewnaade ¬´Abba¬ª e maana Baaba.
4.7: ∆äun haray hinaa a maccu…óo hande kadi, kono ko a …ìi…ó…óo. Si tawii-le ko a …ìi…ó…óo, haray ko a ronoowo immorde e Alla. Fii Annde Puulusa nden fii …ìe Galaasi …ìen
4.8: Wa fewndo ko on andaa Alla, hari ko on maccu…ìe sanamuuji …ói tawata wonaa go…ó…óun tigi e oo aduna.
4.9: Jooni non on andii Alla, e tentinii non jooni ko on …ìe Alla andi, ko honno non yiltitor…óon e …óii mbawdiiji mehi lo'u…ói? E hara on faalaa …óe maccin…óinanaade kadi?
4.10: Hi…óon hittina fii …≤alaa…óe …óen e lebbi …óin e saa'iiji …óin e duu…ìi …óin.
4.11: Mi…óo huli fii mon, wota taw koo ko mi yanganii on ko meere.
4.12: Musi…ì…ìe an, wa'ee wa an min, ko fii min mi…óo wa'i wa mon, yandi mi jeejii on! Ko fii on bonaaki e an.
4.13: Hi…óon maanditii ka aranun ko sabu nawnaare an mi he…ìiri feere fe…≤…≤inangol on Kibaaru Mo∆¥∆¥o on.
4.14: Hi…óon waawunoo non ronkude teddingol lan maa bugitoo lan sabu …≤awu an ngun, kono on wa…óaali …óun! Ka liddu …óun, on tolnirno lan wa malaa'ikaajo Alla maa wa Iisaa Almasiihu on tigi.
4.15: Ko honto weltaare mon nden woni jooni? Ko fii mi…óo seeditanaade on …óun…óoo: si no gasaynoo, on …ìorayno gite mon …óen, wattanon mi.
4.16: Haray e nder ko mi yeetotoo on goonga kon, mi wonii ga…≤o mon?
4.17: Awa himme mo …ìe joganii on on hinaa mo∆¥∆¥o, ko …ìe faalaa…ìe sortude on e amen, fii no tawtiron …ìe.
4.18: No mo∆¥∆¥i ka go…ó…óo he…ìa himme mo∆¥∆¥o saa'i woo, hara hinaa si mi…óo hakkunde mon tun.
4.19: Fay…ìe an, mi…óo joganii on kadi muuseendi ≈ãata haa wa'on wa *Almasiihu on.
4.20: Mi…óo faalaa wondude e mon jooni, mi yewtira on noone goo, ko fii mi…óo aanani on. Fii Maccangaaku e Ndimankaaku
4.21: Andinee lan, onon …ìee faalaa…ìe wonude e ley Sariya on, si on faamaali ko Sariya on wi'i kon.
4.22: Ko fii no windii, Ibraahiima no mari …ìi…ì…ìe …ói…óo: go…ó…óo on ko mo kor…óo jibinani mo on, oya on ko mo dimo on jibinani mo on.
4.23: Mo kor…óo on, ko jibiniraa…óo faale …ìandu, kono mo debbo dimo on, ko jibiniraa…óo fodaari ndin.
4.24: ∆äun ko misal nii: rew…ìe …ìen …ói…óo, ko ahadiiji …óin …ói…ói, *ahadi goo ko ndi Fello *Sinaayi ndin, …ìi…ì…ìe mayri …ìen ko maccu…ìe, …óun ko Haajirata.
4.25: Ko ngon Fello Sinaayi wongo ka leydi Aarabu woni Haajirata, hingo wa'i wa saare Yerusalaam handeere nden, …ìay hinde e nder maccangaaku, kayre e …ìi…ì…ìe mayre on.
4.26: Kono saare Yerusalaam dow-dowre nden ko dimo on, ko on woni yumma men Saarata.
4.27: Ko fii no windii: ¬´Welto yo an mo jibintaa, an mo jiidotaako! Sowtu weltaare, ewno…óaa, …óun ko an mo andaali muuseendi ≈ãata! Ko fii ko …ìi…ì…ìe on wul…óaa…óo …ìurata …óuu…óude edii on debbo wondu…óo e moodi on.¬ª
4.28: Ko fii, yo musi…ì…ìe, onon kadi ko on …ìi…ì…ìe fodaari ndin, wano *Issaaqa non.
4.29: Awa kadi, ko wano ko fe∆¥∆¥unoo kon, on he…ìiranoo…óo faale …ìandu, …ìittinayno on he…ìiraa…óo Ruuhu, ko …óun fewndii kadi jooni.
4.30: Ko hon…óun bindi …óin wi'i? Ko: ¬´Ra…óo kor…óo on e …ìi…ó…óo mun on, ko fii …ìi…ó…óo kor…óo on ronidataa e mo debbo dimo on jibini on.¬ª
4.31: Ko wano non yo musi…ì…ìe, hinaa en …ìi…ì…ìe kor…óo on, kono ko en …ìe debbo dimo on.

5.1: Ko fii no woniren rin…óinaa…ìe wa…ói si *Almasiihu on rin…óini en. Awa wonee tabitu…ìe, wota on yiltitu hoore mon kadi e ley …ìoggol maccangaaku.
5.2: Ko …óun wa…ói, min Puulusa, mi wi'ay on wonde si on etike fii yo on sunnine, haray Almasiihu on nafataa on huunde.
5.3: Awa mi fellintinanay kala ne…ó…óo kadi wonde si etike haa sunninaama, haray himo haani jokkude Sariya on fow.
5.4: Onon …ìee won…ìe …óa…ì…ìude no jogitoree feewu…ìe ka Sariya, on seedii e Almasiihu on, awa kadi on wo…ó…óondirii e mo∆¥∆¥ere Alla nden.
5.5: Kono enen, tama'u men on ko jogoreede feewu…ìe yeeso Alla sabu gom…óinal men ngal. Ko tippude e Ruuhu on sabbi…óen on tama'u.

5.11: E min non yo musi…ì…ìe, si mi…óo waajaade fii nafa sunninegol, haray ko fii hon…óun kadi mi cukkantee? Si tawno haa jooni waaju an ngun no humii e sunninegol, haray fempeede Iisaa Almasiihu on ka hoore *leggal altindiraangal accii wonangol yim…ìe …ìen peggal.

6.1: Musi…ì…ìe, si go…ó…óo e mon aru e wa…óugol bonnere, haray onon, …ìe Ruuhu on ardii …ìen, wurtiree mo hakkil newiiki. Onon tigi reeno…óon, fii wota onon kadi on jarribe.

6.10: Ko …óun wa…ói, fewndo ka wee…ìani en …óon, wa…óanen yim…ìe …ìen fow ko mo∆¥∆¥i, tentinii musi…ì…ìe men …ìen ka gom…óinal. Rawnoode ∆Åatakuru Puulusa ndun
6.11: On yi'ii ittiri bindi njani …ói mi windirani on jungo an ngon …óin.

6.13: Ko fii hay kam…ìe sunninaa…ìe …ìen tigi …ìe jokkataa Sariya on, kono ko …ìe faalirtee yo on sunnine, ko fii no …ìe mantora e hoore mon.

1.1: Immorde e an min Puulusa, mo Alla hoddiri wonugol *sahaabaajo Iisaa Almasiihu on, haa e …ìee yim…ìe Alla, sella-findee…ìe e nder humondiral ma…ì…ìe e Iisaa Almasiihu on, won…ìe Efeesi.

1.4: Ko sabu makko Allaahu on su…ìori en ko adii fu…ó…óoode aduna on, fii no woniren laa…ìu…ìe, …ìe aldaa e ella yeeso makko. E nder giggol makko ngol
1.5: o muuyanno en wonugol …ìe makko sabu Iisaa Almasiihu on, wano o faaliraa non e nder e…ì…ìoore makko mo∆¥∆¥ere nden,

1.7: Ko e nder humondiral e makko sottira…óen ∆¥ii∆¥an makko …óan, ko …óan he…ìir…óen yaafuyee junuubaaji no yaadiri e ngalu sulfu makko,

1.10: fii huuwugol mo, nde saa'i on timmoyi, mottindira kala ko woni ka kammuuli e ka hoore leydi, wa…óa …ói ley yeesoojo gooto, …óun ko *Almasiihu on.
1.11: Enen humondir…ìe e Almasiihu on …ìen, en su…ìaama fii wonugol …ìe makko e nder muuyiraneede e…ì…ìoore on Timminiroowo kala huunde no yaadiri e anniyee faale makko on,

1.15: Ko …óun wa…ói si min kadi, …ìay mi nanii fii ko gom…óin…óon Iisaa Joomi on kon, e giggol ngol yi…óu…óon yim…ìe Alla …ìen fow ngol,

4.1: Awa, mi wakkilinii on, min oo kasoojo sabu humondiral an e Joomi on, wuurugol ngurndan yaadu…óan e noddaandu ndu nodda…óon ndun,

4.19: ∆Åe alaa lee…ìol liimanaaku few, …ìe jokkii jii…ìaare, fii wa…óugol kala ko laa…ìaa ko yu…ì…ìondiri e himme.

4.24: …ìorno…óon tagudi mon heyri ndi Alla tagiri mbaadi mun e nder peewal e laa…ìal ko rimata goonga.

4.26: Si on aru seytinde, wota on wa…óu junuubu, haray wota naange ngen mutu hi…óon tikki.
4.28: Wujjaynoo…óo woo wota wujju han kadi, kono yo o gollir juu…óe makko …óen e nder nun…óal, o wa…óa go…ó…óun ko nafi, o okkora hatonjin…óo.
4.29: Wota on accu kongol barminoowol woo yalta ka hunduko mon, kono wowlee kongu…ói mo∆¥∆¥inay…ói tun, adday…ói nafa, wallay…ói …ìeya mawnugol ka nder gom…óinal, …óun …ói wa…óay ko mo∆¥∆¥i e he…óotoo…ìe on …ìen.
4.30: Wota on aanin Ruuhu Alla *Senii…óo on, on mo maandinira…óon fii ndee …≤alaande cottudi wonkii.

4.32: Mo∆¥∆¥ondiree, yurmondiron, yaafondiron, wano Alla yaafori on non sabu Almasiihu on.

5.1: Awa wonee …≤emboo…ìe Alla wa fay…ìe yi…óaa…ìe,
5.2: wuuron e nder giggol wano *Almasiihu on yi…óiri en non. O wattitii kanko tigi e sookeeje Alla fii wonangol en sadaka sakkaa…óo wa angiri uurundi.
5.3: Wota jinaa e kala noone angal laa…ìal maa himme maandine toode e hakkunde mon, …ìay …óii piiji haananaa yim…ìe Alla …ìen.
5.4: Wota haalaaji bon…ói maa …ói aldaa e faamu wowle, hay non si ko awmagol, …óun hinaa ko haani, kono yo Alla yette.
5.5: Ko fii, andee fota, kala jinoowo maa mo laa…ìaa maa himmu…óo, e maanaa rewoowo sanamu, alaa ge…ìal ka *laamateeri Alla e Almasiihu on.
5.6: Awa wota hay gooto …óaynir on haalaaji mehi, …ìay ko fii …óun tikkere Alla nden ardata e hoore murtu…ìe …ìen.
5.7: Awa wota on kafidu e ma…ì…ìe ge…ìal woo.
5.8: Hari ko on ni…ìe, kono jooni ko on ndaygu sabu humondiral mon e Joomiraa…óo on. Awa wuuriree wa fay…ìe ndaygu ngun,
5.9: ko fii ndaygu ngun no funtina kala noone mo∆¥∆¥ere e peewal e goonga.
5.10: Awa hakkilanee e ko welata Joomiraa…óo on kon.
5.11: Wota on humondir e kuu…óe meereeje woo …óe ni…ìe, kono fe…≤…≤inee fii majje.
5.12: Ko fii ko …ìen yim…ìe wa…óata kon e gundoo no hersinii toode hay wowlugol.
5.13: Kono kala ko fee…≤i ka ndaygu, yaltitay,
5.14: ko fii ndaygu ngun hentinay fow. Ko …óun wa…ói si no wi'aa: ¬´Finu, yo an …óaanii…óo, immo e hakkunde may…ìe …ìen, Almasiihu on ndaygay e hoore maa.¬ª
5.15: Awa wattanee yiila e ngurndan mon …óan, hara on wuuriraali wa komoo…ìe …ìen, kono ko wa jooma-faamu'en.
5.16: Awa wota on accu fajuhun woo fe∆¥∆¥ira on, ko fii …≤alaa…óe …óen ko bon…óe.
5.17: Ko …óun wa…ói, wota on wonu faa…óa-hakkil…ìe, kono faamee ko hon…óun woni faale Joomiraa…óo on.
5.18: Wota on yaru haa mandilon, …óun ko …ìoylaare, kono hebbinoree Ruuhu Allaahu on.
5.19: Yewtiree beyti Zabuura e jaarooje e beyti hormor…ói. Beytanon, jaaranon Joomiraa…óo on ka …ìer…óe mon,
5.20: saa'i kala yetton Alla, on Baabaajo, e kala huunde e innde Iisaa Almasiihu Joomi men on. Fii Duhii…ìe e Sonnaa…ìe mun
5.22: Onon kadi, yo sonnaa…ìe, mo kala yo yankinano moodi mun wano yankinorani non Joomiraa…óo on.
5.23: Ko fii ko gorko woni hoore debbo, wano Almasiihu on woniri non hoore *moftal ngal, ngal-le ko …ìandu makko, ko kanko woni dandoowo ngal.
5.24: Wano moftal ngal yankinorani non Almasiihu on, yo mo kala e sonnaa…ìe …ìen kadi yankinoran non moodi mun e …ói fow.
5.25: Onon kadi, yo duhii…ìe, mo kala e mon yo yi…óu sonnaajo mun on wano Almasiihu on yi…óiri moftal ngal non, haa o okkitiri hoore makko fii maggal.
5.26: O wa…óiri …óun fii no ngal wonira ngal Alla e hoore *la…ì…ìinirgol ngal lootirgol ndiyan e daaluyee on,
5.27: fii fe…≤…≤inoygol ngal moftal darjungal e makko, hara ngal aldaa e waadere woo e …≤u…óagol e huunde ko nandi e …óun, kono hara ko laa…ìungal, ngal aldaa e ella.
5.28: Wano non kadi, duhii…ìe …ìen haani yi…óirde sonnaa…ìe mun …ìen wa …ìalli ma…ì…ìe …óin tigi. Kala on yi…óu…óo sonnaajo mun on, haray no yi…óitii ka…≤un tigi.
5.29: Ko fii hay gooto a…≤ataa …ìandu mun ndun, kono o …≤amminay ndu, o dankoo wano Almasiihu on wa…óirani *moftal ngal non.
5.30: Ko fii ko en tere …ìandu makko.
5.31: ¬´Ko …óun wa…ói si gorko selay ben mun e yumma mun, humoo e …ìeyngu mun, onsay kam…ìe …ói…óo …ìe wona gooto.¬ª
5.32: On gundoo no mawni, kono ko hakkunde Almasiihu on e moftal mun ngal mi woni e…ì…ìindirde …óun.
5.33: Ko heddii kon, yo mo kala e mon yi…óir sonnaajo mun on wa hoore mun, awa kadi yo sonnaajo on teddin moodi mun.

6.1: Onon kadi fay…ìe, …óoftee maw…ìe mon …ìen sabu Joomiraa…óo on, ko fii …óun ko ko feewi.
6.2: Ko fii ¬´Teddin yumma maa e ben maa¬ª, ko yamiroore aranere nden non wondude e fodaari,
6.3: fii no ontigi malira, o he…ìa duu…ìi buy ka hoore leydi.
6.4: Onon kadi non, yo baabiraa…ìe, wota on mettin …ìer…óe fay…ìe mon …ìen, kono ne'iree …ìe waajagol …ìe, eltira laawol Joomiraa…óo on. Fii Jiyaa…óo e Jey…óo …óun
6.5: Onon kadi, yo jiyaa…ìe, …óoftee jey…ìe on jeyal adunayankewal …ìen e nder kulol e teddungal, e hoore …ìernde laa…ìunde, wano …óoftor…óon *Almasiihu on non.
6.6: ∆äun non, hara hinaa e gite ma…ì…ìe tun, maa wano welirta yim…ìe …ìen non, kono wa kurkaa…ói Almasiihu on, wa…óiroo…ìe faale Alla on …ìer…óe mun …óen fow.
6.7: Golliranon …ìe anniyee mo∆¥∆¥o wa si tawii ko Joomiraa…óo on won…óon gollande, hara hinaa yim…ìe …ìen,
6.8: e hoore andugol, kala jiyaa…óo maa dimo, Joomiraa…óo on yo…ìoyay mo embere mo∆¥∆¥i …ói o wa…ói …óin.
6.9: Onon non kadi, yo rim…ìe, wa…óiree wano non e telen-ma jiyaa…ìe mon …ìen, reeno…óon e kambugol, e nder andugol wonde Jey…óo …ìe on e Jey…óo on on no ka kammu, awa kadi yeeso makko gi…óaale alaa. Fii ∆Åornagol Aalaaji Iwru…ói ka Alla
6.10: Ka rawnoode, awa dolnoree Joomiraa…óo on e bawgal makko tii…óungal ngal.
6.11: ∆Åorno…óon aalaaji Alla …óin fow, fii no waawiron catorde dartoo pehe Ibuliisa …óen.
6.12: Tippiro men ngon wonaa hakkunde men e …ìandu e ∆¥ii∆¥an woni, kono ko hakkunde men e laamuuji …óin e mbawdiiji …óin e laamuuji oo aduna won…óo e nder ni…ìe e mbawdiiji ruuhuuyankeeji bon…ói …óin ka kammuuli.
6.13: Ko …óun wa…ói si mi wi'ay on: ∆¥ettee aalaaji Alla …óin fow, fii no waawiron dartorde tuma …≤alaande bone nden aroyi woo, e fii no waawiron darorde tabita …ìawto wa…óugol fow.
6.14: Awa daree cato…óon. Yo goonga on wonu dattol keeci mon …óin, peewal ngal wona dolokke mon hiwitor…óo on.
6.15: Yo pa…óe mon …óen wonu hebulaare iwrunde e Kibaaru Mo∆¥∆¥o ye…óoowo …ìuttu on.
6.16: E nder kala huunde, jogoree gom…óinal ngal wa hiwitorgo, ngo waawoton …óanninirde ndagaaje yiite Ibuliisa …óen fow.
6.17: Hippo…óon kadi kunnawal kisiyee ngal, jogo…óon kaafa Ruuhu on, kan-le ko daaluyee Alla on.
6.18: Saa'i kala toro…óon wano Ruuhu Allaahu on woni ardorde on non e kala noone torndeeji, lando…óon ballal Alla, findinon hakkillaaji mon …óin fii …óun, duumo…óon e …óun fota, torano…óon yim…ìe Alla …ìen fow.
6.19: Torano…óon mi min kadi, fii, nde mi udditi hunduko an kon woo, yo mi ye…óe kongu…ói fii yottingol gundoo Kibaaru Mo∆¥∆¥o on e nder cuucal.
6.20: Ko fii on Kibaaru Mo∆¥∆¥o mi wonani nulaa…óo e nder jolokooje. Torano…óon mi kadi no mi yewtira pellital, wano haaniranimmi non. Fii Salminaango ngon ka Rawnorde
6.21: Tikiiki, oo musi…ó…óo men yi…óaa…óo, kurkaadu holniindu e nder golle Joomiraa…óo on, o humpitoyay on no mi fewndori e ko mi woni wa…óude kon.
6.22: Ko wa…ói si mi immini mo haa e mon, ko fii no andiron no men fewndori, e fii yo o …ìuttin …ìer…óe mon …óen.
6.23: Yo …ìuttu e giggol ye…óe musi…ì…ìe …ìen, wondude e gom…óinal, immorde e Alla Baabaajo on e Iisaa Almasiihu Joomi on.
6.24: Yo mo∆¥∆¥ere wonan kala yi…óir…óo Iisaa Almasiihu Joomi men on, giggol ngol bontataa.

1.1: Immorde e an min Puulusa e Timotee, menen …óii kurkaa…ói Iisaa Almasiihu on, haa e yim…ìe Alla humondir…ìe e Iisaa Almasiihu on fow ka saare Filipii, e ardotoo…ìe *moftal ngal e wallitotoo…ìe ngal …ìen.
1.2: Yo mo∆¥∆¥ere e …ìuttu wonan on immorde e Alla Baaba men, e Iisaa Almasiihu Joomi on. Fii no Puulusa Du'orani …ìe Filipii …ìen
1.3: Mi…óo jarnude Alla an on saa'i kala nde mi anditi fii mon.
1.4: Saa'i kala nde mi torantoo on on fow, ko e nder weltaare mi tororta,
1.5: sabu ko kafidu…óon e amen fii Kibaaru Mo∆¥∆¥o Iisaa Almasiihu on kon, gila …≤ande mi hewti ka mon haa hande.
1.6: Mi…óo felliti, Alla, on Fu…ó…óii…óo kuugal mo∆¥∆¥al e mon, jokkay timmingol …óun haa …≤ande ardu Iisaa Almasiihu on.
1.7: No haani ka mi miijorana on nii, ko fii mi…óo wa…ói on ka …ìernde an. Ko fii on fow ko on kafidu…ìe e an sulfu Alla on, woni e nder ko mi sokaa kon, woni ko mi darantoo Kibaaru Mo∆¥∆¥o on kon, mi haqinqina mo.
1.8: Ko fii Alla no seeditanoo mi wonde mi…óo yi…ói on on fow wano Iisaa Almasiihu on yi…óiri on non.
1.9: Ko mi torantoo on, ko yo giggol mon ngol …ìurtu …ìeydaade, e nder gandal e faamangol ko woni woo.
1.10: ∆äun, on waaway taskaade, anda ko …ìuri mo∆¥∆¥ude kon, fii no laatoron …ìe …ìernde laa…ìunde e …ìe felnaaki …≤ande ardu *Almasiihu on,
1.11: heewu…ìe kuu…óe feewu…óe iwru…óe e Iisaa Almasiihu on fii mangu e mantoore Alla. Fii no Sokeede Puulusa nden ∆Åantiri fii Kibaaru Mo∆¥∆¥o on
1.12: Mi faalaa yo on andu, yo musi…ì…ìe an, ko he…ìunoo mi kon wallii fii no Kibaaru Mo∆¥∆¥o on …ìantora.
1.13: Ko …óun wa…ói, gila e …ìee suufaa…ìe lan…óo on, haa na…ìani hen fow, …ìangii wonde ko fii Almasiihu on mi sokiraa.
1.14: E nder ko mi sokaa kon, …ìur…ìe …ìen e musi…ì…ìe …ìen …ìurtii hoolaade Joomiraa…óo on, …ìe …ìeydi suusude fii fe…≤…≤ingol daaluyee Alla on e …ìaawo kulol.
1.15: Ko goonga, wo…ì…ìe …ìen no waajorde fii Almasiihu on nawliigu e monee, kono wo…ì…ìe …ìen ko e hoore anniyee mo∆¥∆¥o woni wa…óirde …óun.
1.16: ∆Åen non no wa…óirde …óun giggol, e hoore andugol wonde mi wa…óaama haqinqinoowo Kibaaru Mo∆¥∆¥o on.
1.17: E hin-le, …ìen won…ìe …ìanginirde fii Almasiihu on haasidi, anniyeeji ma…ì…ìe …óin hinaa laa…ìu…ói, hi…ìe miijii …ìeyditude satteende e hoore ko mi sokaa kon.
1.18: No wa'i woo ko see…óa hitti. Woni ko e anniyeeji mo∆¥∆¥i maa si ko e anniyeeji bon…ói, min mi weltike, mi weltoto kadi, …ìay fii Almasiihu on waajaama.
1.19: Ko fii mi…óo andi, …óun wontanay lan kisiyee sabu torndeeji mon Alla …óin e ballal Ruuhu Iisaa Almasiihu on.
1.20: Faale an tii…óu…óo on e tama'u an on ko ko tawi kon mi hersirtaa hay huunde, kono gila …óoo haa poomaa, mi geray no Iisaa Almasiihu on mawniniree e an min e nder hoolaare tii…óunde, woni non ko e nder ngurndan an …óan, woni ko e nder mayde an nden.
1.21: Ko fii min, ko Almasiihu on woni ngurndan an …óan, mayde nden ko tono e an.
1.22: Kono si mi…óo wuuri e oo aduna, …óun mi waaway gollude golle nafooje. Ko hon…óun mi haani su…ìaade? Mi andaa!
1.23: Ko fii mi…óo poo…óeede e cen…óe …óen …ói…óii non. Mi…óo mari faale yahugol tawtoya Almasiihu on, ko …óun …ìuri mo∆¥∆¥ude.
1.24: Kono ko si mi…óo wuuri …ìuri wondande on e nafa.
1.25: Ko fii mi…óo andi, mi…óo felliti mi luttay, mi wona moggo mon on fow, fii …ìantal mon ngal, e fii weltaare mon nden ka nder gom…óinal.
1.26: ∆äun, haray mantoore mon nden e fee Iisaa Almasiihu on …ìeydoto sabu an nde mi yiltitoyii ka mon.
1.27: Ko woni tun, woniree e noone no haanirani Kibaaru Mo∆¥∆¥o Almasiihu on. Woni mi aru yi'ugol on, woni mi araali, yo mi nanu tun no wowlee fii mon wonde hi…óon tabiti e miijo wooto, tippiranon gom…óinal Kibaaru Mo∆¥∆¥o on e nder anniyee gooto,
1.28: hara on ja…ìaali hul…ìinireede huunde immorde e ay…ìe …ìen. ∆äun wonanay …ìe maande halkagol ma…ì…ìe ngol, kono onon …óun wonana on maande kisiyee mon on, …óun ko immorde e Alla.
1.29: Ko onon ye…óaa mo∆¥∆¥ere sabu Almasiihu on, hinaa non gom…óingol mo tun, kono ko tampangol mo kadi.
1.30: Jooni on wakkilike tippiro ngo mi woni e mun ngon, ngon tippiro ngo yi'uno…óon mi…óo tippiree, e ngon ngo won…óon nanude mi…óo tippiree haa jooni.

2.1: Nde tawnoo on he…ìii wakkilineede sabu Iisaa Almasiihu on, e dankeede e nder giggol, e mbeldigal, e yurmeende, e jokkere en…óan e nder Ruuhu Allaahu on,
2.2: timminiree weltaare an nden he…ìugol miijo wooto, e nder giggol gootol e fondo wooto e anniyee gooto.
2.3: Wota on warru huunde haasidi maa manti mehi, kono e nder yankinaare jogoron heddii…ìe …ìen wa …ìur…ìe on.
2.4: ∆äoo e yo mo kala e mon wattan yiila e fii ko nafata …óun kon, wattanee yiila e ko nafata …ìeya kon kadi.
2.5: Wa…óon e mon miijo wonnoongo e Iisaa Almasiihu on ngon:
2.6: ∆äun ko on mo mbaadi mun woni ndi Alla, kono o ha…ì…ìitaaki fotugol e Alla,
2.7: kono o tippini hoore makko, o ∆¥etti mbaadi maccu…óo e hoore nandintinagol e ne…ó…óanke. ∆Åawto tawdegol e noone ne…ó…óanke,
2.8: o jippini hoore makko, o …óoftii haa e mayde, hay maayugol e *leggal altindiraangal.
2.9: Ko …óun wa…ói si Alla towni mo ka …ìuri toowude ton, o ye…ói mo innde …ìurnde mawnude in…óe …óen fow,
2.10: fii kala ko tagaa ko woni ka kammuuli e ka hoore leydi e ka nder leydi yo jicco e innde Iisaa,
2.11: e yo kala …óenngal qirrito wonde Iisaa Almasiihu on ko Joomiraa…óo ka mangu Alla Baabaajo on. Fii Wa'ugol wa Koode
2.12: Jooni non, yo yi…ì…ìe an, nde tawnoo hi…óon duumi e …óoftaare, golliree kisiyee mon on e nder kulol e teddungal, hara hinaa e yeeso an tun, kono yo …ìurtu e …ìaawo an.
2.13: Ko fii ko Alla woni wa…óude e mon faale on e huuwingol on ko yaadi e e…ì…ìoore makko mo∆¥∆¥ere nden.
2.14: Wa…óiree fow e …ìaawo dukugol e yeddondiro,
2.15: fii no laatoron laa…ìu…ìe …ìe felnaaki, e no woniron fay…ìe Alla …ìe felnaaki e hakkunde nguu jamaanu bonngu …ìoyliingu, ngu jalbir…óon e hakkunde mun wa koo…óe e oo aduna,
2.16: jogii…ìe daaluyee ngurndan …óan. ∆äun, on wonanoyay lan …ìe mi mantorta …≤ande ardu *Almasiihu on, …óun haray wonanii lan seedee ko mi jindi kon e ko mi tampi kon wonaali meere.
2.17: Hay si tawii mi wonay sadaka hibbantee…óo Joomiraa…óo on fii timmingol sadaka mon on e kurkagol mon ngol immorde e gom…óinal mon ngal, haray mi…óo weltii, mi…óo weltodi kadi e mon on fow.
2.18: Onon kadi weltoree wano non, weltodon e an! Fii Timotee e Epafruuditu
2.19: Mi…óo tan∆¥inori Iisaa Joomi on nelugol Timotee haa e mon ko nee…ìaa, fii no mi wakkilora min tigi sabu …óin kibaaruuji …ói mi he…ìirta on.
2.20: Ko fii hay gooto aaniranaa on wa an si hinaa kanko Timotee.
2.21: Ko fii fow ko nafa mun on woni …óa…ì…ìude, hinaa nafa won…óo e Iisaa Almasiihu on.
2.22: Kono hi…óon andi ko honno Timotee …ìanginiri fii mun, e no men gollidiri fii Kibaaru Mo∆¥∆¥o on, wa paykun wonkun moggo ben mun.
2.23: Awa, mi…óo tan∆¥inii nelugol mo haa e mon, nde mi humpitii ko laa…ìi fii ko he…ìoytammi kon woo.
2.24: Awa kadi mi…óo hoolori Joomiraa…óo on, wonde min tigi mi yahay ko nee…ìaa.
2.25: Mi…óo tan∆¥inii no mo∆¥∆¥i ka mi nelta e mon oo musi…ó…óo an, wondi…ó…óo an e golle e tippiro, wi'etee…óo Epafruuditu, mo neluno…óon e an, jonnor…óon piiji …ói mi handi.
2.26: Himo wul…óaa on fota, on fow, awa kadi himo aani fota fii ko humpiti…óon fii nawnaare makko nden kon.
2.27: Ko goonga, o nawnuno haa moggo mayde, kono Alla yurmaa mo, hinaa kanko tun non o yurmaa, kono min men, fii wota mi he…ìu sokola e hoore sokola.
2.28: Awa mi neltanii on mo e hoore hawjere tii…óunde fii yo on weltor yi'ugol mo, e no min kadi sokola an on …óuytora.
2.29: Ja…ì…ìee mo e innde Joomiraa…óo on, wondude e weltaare timmunde, teddinon kadi sifa …ìen yim…ìe.
2.30: Ko fii, ko sabu golle Almasiihu on o eppirnoo mayde, fewndo o wee…ìitunoo ngurndan makko …óan, fii gollangol lan golle …óe onon tigi on waawaano.

3.1: Ka rawnoode, yo musi…ì…ìe an, weltoree Joomiraa…óo on. Ko fii tampintaa lan ka mi fillitoo windangol on, ko fii …óun ko ko dandata on.
3.2: Awa reenee e dawaa…ói …óin, reeno…óon e golloo…ìe bon…ìe …ìen, reeno…óon e barajelii…ìe …ìen.
3.3: Ko fii, sunninaa…ìe tigi-tigii…ìe …ìen ko enen, enen …ìee rewiroo…ìe Alla Ruuhu makko on, enen …ìee mantor…ìe Iisaa Almasiihu on, enen …ìee …ìe hooloraa …ìandu mun.
3.4: E hin-le min kadi, mi…óo waawunoo fawude hoolaare an nden e …ìandu an ndun. Si tawii go…ó…óo no sikka no waawi fawude hoolaare mun nden e …ìandu mun, min kadi mi…óo waawi ko …ìuri …óun.
3.5: Ko fii mi sunninano ka …≤alaande jeetata…ìere. Ko mi jibinannde *Isra'iila ka bolondaa *Buniyamiinu, ∆¥ii∆¥an *Aabirayanke tigi. Fii telen-ma ka teddingol Sariya Muusaa on, mi…óo tawdanoo e *Fariisiyaa…ìe …ìen.
3.6: Hakkee ko mi himmunoo, mi cukkotono gom…óin…ìe Iisaa …ìen, e ley yamiroore Sariya on, tawi mi felnaaki.
3.7: Kono ko wonannoo mi tono kon, mi jogori …óun wa meere sabu *Almasiihu on.
3.8: Awa kadi mi jogorii fow wa meere e nder e…ì…ìindirgol …óun e gandal mawngal fii Iisaa Almasiihu on, on Joomi an. Ko sabu makko mi tertori piiji …óin fow, mi jogori …ói fow wa tuu…óe, fii no mi he…ìira Almasiihu on,

3.19: Sakkitoode ma…ì…ìe nden ko halkagol, ko deedi ma…ì…ìe …óin woni alla ma…ì…ìe on, hi…ìe wa…ói darja ma…ì…ìe on ka hersinta …ìe, awa kadi ko fii piiji oo aduna tun …ìe miijotoo.

4.10: Mi…óo weltanii Joomiraa…óo on fota, sabu ko wurnitu…óon nafa mon fii an kon. Hari hi…óon wondi e on nafa, kono hari feere nden no ≈ãakkiri on.

4.19: Immorde e ngalu e darja Alla an on sabu Iisaa Almasiihu on, o okkay on kala ko handu…óon.
4.20: Yo mangural wonan Alla, Baaba men, haa poomaa. Aamiina! Salminaango fii Waynitagol
4.21: Salminanee lan kala aaden Alla humondir…óo e Iisaa Almasiihu on. Musi…ì…ìe …ìe mi wondi …ìen salminii on.

1.1: Immorde e an min Puulusa, mo Alla hoddiri wonugol *sahaabaajo Iisaa Almasiihu on, wondude e oo musi…ó…óo men wi'etee…óo Timotee,

On Kibaaru fe…≤…≤inanaa…óo kala tagaa…óo ka ley kammu, ko on min Puulusa mi wonti kurkaadu mun. Fii no Puulusa Yangorani Moftal ngal
1.24: Jooni mi…óo weltii e nder tampereeji an …óin fii mon. Ko fii, e an min, mi timminirii …ìandu an ndun ko ≈ãakkunoo e tampereeji Almasiihu on, fii …ìandu makko ndun, ndun-le ko moftal ngal.

2.20: Nde tawnoo on maayidiino e Almasiihu on, on sertii e …óii mbawdiiji adunayankeeji, ko hon…óun ja…ìanton …ìe fawa on …óii aadaaji, wa si tawii hi…óon wuurani aduna,

3.1: ∆Åay non on wurnitidaama e *Almasiihu on, haray …óa…ì…ìee piiji won…ói ka dow …óin, ka Almasiihu on joo…óori ka sengo …≤aamo Alla ton.

1.1: Immorde e an min Puulusa, wondude e Silaasi e Timotee, haa e ngal *moftal wongal Tesalonii humondirngal e Alla Baaba men, e Iisaa Almasiihu Joomi on:
1.2: yo mo∆¥∆¥ere e …ìuttu wonan on immorde e Alla Baaba men, e Iisaa Almasiihu Joomi on. Fii no Alla ∆ùaawiroyta Yim…ìe …ìen

2.20: E nder suudu hittundu hinaa miranji tafiraa…ói ka≈ã≈ãe maa kaalisi tun woni ton, kono kunnaaje e payan…óe leydi kadi no ton. Miranji arani …óin ko mariraa…ói fii haaju hittu…óo, kono …óiya ko huutortee…ói fii ko woni woo.

1.1: Immorde e an min Puulusa, nduu kurkaadu Alla e *sahaabaajo mo Iisaa Almasiihu on to…ó…óii fii tii…óingol gom…óinal …ìen …ìe Alla su…ìii, adda …ìe e goonga nawray…óo e wuurirgol no Alla faaliraa non,

2.10: ∆Åe reenoo kadi e nguyka, …ìe …ìangina sella-findeyaagal timmungal, …óun …ìe teddinay gandal fii Alla Dandu…óo en on.

3.1: Andintin …ìe hi…ìe haani yankinanaade laamuuji …óin e laamii…ìe …ìen, …ìe …óoftoo …ìe, …ìe hebilanoo kala kuugal mo∆¥∆¥al.

3.7: fii no jogore…óen feewu…ìe sabu mo∆¥∆¥uki makko kin, e fii no waawiren ronirde *ngurndan poomayankejan …óan tan∆¥ini…óen …óan.

3.12: Tuma mi imminoyi oo wi'etee…óo Artemaasi maa Tikiiki haa e maa, haray eto araa tawaa mi Nikopooli, ko fii ko …óon mi aadii wa…óugol ndungu ngun.

3.15: ∆Åe mi wondi …ìen fow hiwrike ma. Mi salminii yi…óu…ìe en e nder gom…óinal …ìen. Yo mo∆¥∆¥ere Alla nden wonu e hoore mon on fow.

1.1: Immorde e an min Puulusa, oo kasoojo sabu Iisaa Almasiihu on, wondude e Timotee oo musi…ó…óo men, haa e oo gi…óo amen, wondi…ó…óo amen e golle, …óun ko an Filimuunu,
1.2: wondude e Apifiyyata oo bandiraawo amen e Arkiipe oo wondi…ó…óo amen e tippiro e haa e *moftal wongal ngal ka suudu maa an Filimuunu.
1.3: Yo mo∆¥∆¥ere e …ìuttu wonan on, immorde e Alla Baaba men, e Iisaa Almasiihu Joomi on. Fii no Puulusa Weltorani Alla fii Filimuunu
1.4: Mi…óo duumii e jarnugol Alla an on e nder ko mi maandini fii maa e nder torndeeji an …óin,
1.5: ko fii mi…óo nanude no wowlee fii ko gom…óin…óaa Iisaa Joomi on kon, e giggol ngol yi…óu…óaa yim…ìe Alla …ìen fow ngol kadi.
1.6: Mi torike yo gom…óinal maa ngal hawtu…óen ngal wa…óu batte, andaa mo∆¥∆¥ere wonannde en e nder humondiral e *Almasiihu on.
1.7: E hoore …óun mi he…ìii weltaare e wakkilaare buy sabu giggol maa ngol, ko fii ko sabu maa yo musi…ó…óo, …ìer…óe yim…ìe Alla …ìen …ìuttiniraa. Fii no Puulusa Fattorani Onesiima ka Filimuunu

1.11: Hari o wonanii ma meere, kono jooni o nafete wano o nafirimmi non.

1.1: Nde wonnoo Alla yewtiriino maamiraa…ìe men …ìen annabaa…ìe …ìen laawi buy e nooneeji buy,
1.2: Alla yewtirii en ka …≤alaa…óe sakkitore …óoo ∆Åi…ó…óo on. O wa…ói mo ronoowo e kala huunde, awa ko on o tagiri aduna on.

1.5: Ko fii ko hombo e malaa'ikaa…ìe …ìen Alla daalani: ¬´Ko an woni ∆Åi…ó…óo an on, hande a wonii mo an¬ª, maa o daalani kadi: ¬´Mi wonanay mo Baaba, o wonanammi ∆Åi…ó…óo.¬ª?
1.6: ∆Åay o addii Afo on ka nder aduna, o daali kadi: ¬´Yo malaa'ikaa…ìe Alla …ìen fow sujjan mo.¬ª
1.7: Fii malaa'ikaa…ìe …ìen o daali: ¬´O wa…óay malaa'ikaa…ìe makko …ìen hendu e kurkaa…ói makko …óin …óen…óe yiite.¬ª
1.8: Kono fii ∆Åi…ó…óo on o daali: ¬´Jullere maa laamu nden, yaa an Alla, luttay haa poomaa, labbooru maa laamu ndun ko labbooru peewal.
1.9: A yi…óii peewal ngal, a a…≤ii angal peewal ngal. Ko …óun wa…ói si Alla Joomiraa…óo maa on to…ó…óor maa nebban weltaare …ìuri wondi…ì…ìe maa …ìen.¬ª
1.10: E hoore …óun o daali kadi: ¬´Yaa an Joomiraa…óo, ko an wallini ndelo leydi ndin ka fu…ó…óoode, awa kadi kammuuli …óin ko juu…óe maa …óen tagiraa.
1.11: ∆äi lannay, kono an a luttay, …ói fow …ói nawyiray wa dolokke,

1.13: E ko hombo e malaa'ikaa…ìe …ìen o daalani: ¬´Joo…óor ka sengo an …≤aamo, haa mi wa…óa ay…ìe maa …ìen ka ley teppe maa.¬ª?
1.14: Hara …ìee malaa'ikaa…ìe fow, hinaa …ìe ruuhuuji kurkotoo…ói, nulaa…ói fii gollangol ronoo…ìe kisiyee …ìen?

2.4: Allaahu on seeditodi e ma…ì…ìe, o …ìanginiri …óun kuu…óe e maandeeji e noone kaawakeeji mo∆¥∆¥i e sendirgol dokke *Ruuhu Senii…óo on wano o yi…óiri non. Fii Ardotoo…óo Yim…ìe …ìen ka Kisiyee

2.6: Kono go…ó…óo no seeditii nokku goo, wi'i: ¬´Ko hon…óun woni ne…ó…óo fii no anditiraa fii makko, yaa an Alla, e ko woni …ìii ne…ó…óanke fii yo a danko mo?
2.7: A wa…óii mo e ley malaa'ikaa…ìe …ìen e nder see…óa nii, a taaranii mo *meetelol mangu e teddungal, a wa…óii mo e hoore kuu…óe juu…óe maa …óen,
2.8: a wa…óii piiji …óin fow e ley koy…óe makko.¬ª E nder yankinangol mo piiji …óin fow, alaa ko Alla acci yo ronku yankinanaade mo, kono haa jooni en yi'aali ka piiji …óin fow yankinanii mo.

2.10: E dow ardagol fay…ìe buy ka mangu, tawi no hawrani on Tagu…óo piiji fow, e mo piiji …óin fow wonani on, laatinirgol Iisaa timmu…óo e nder tampereeji, on Sincu…óo kisiyee ma…ì…ìe on.

2.13: O wi'i kadi: ¬´Mi wa…óay hoolaare an nden e makko.¬ª Awa kadi: ¬´E hino lan, min e fay…ìe …ìe Alla okkimmi …ìen.¬ª
2.14: Awa nde tawnoo fay…ìe …ìen no mari ∆¥ii∆¥an e …ìandu, kanko Iisaa kadi ko wano non o tawdiraa e ma…ì…ìe, fii, rewrude e mayde makko nden, yo o muncu on joginoo…óo bawgal mayde nden, …óun ko Ibuliisa,

3.1: Ko …óun wa…ói, yo musi…ì…ìe an laa…ìu…ìe, …ìe mi hawti noddaandu Alla ndun, fe≈ãee miijo mon ngon e hoore mo Alla to…ó…óii neli on, on *Yottinoowo maw…óo sadaka ka Alla, on mo qirriti…óen ka gom…óinal men, …óun ko Iisaa.

3.6: Kono *Almasiihu on kan ko ∆Åi…ó…óo sella-findeejo e hoore suudu Alla ndun. Ko enen woni suudu makko ndun, si en catike fota e wakkilaare e hoolaare nde jogi…óen fii ko tan∆¥ini…óen kon. Fii Fowtaare Maranaande Jamaa Alla on nden
3.7: Ko …óun wa…ói, wano *Ruuhu Senii…óo on wi'iri non: ¬´Si on nanii kongol makko ngol hande,
3.8: wota on sattin …ìer…óe mon …óen, wa fewndo maamiraa…ìe mon …ìen murtannoo mi, …ìe ndarndii mi ka wulaa,
3.9: ka …ìe liggitunoo mi …óon, …ìe ndarndii mi, …ìe yi'uno kuu…óe an …óen e nder duu…ìi cappan…óe nay.
3.10: Ko …óun wa…ói si mi tikkani ngun jamaanu, mi wi'i: ‚Äπ∆Åer…óe ma…ì…ìe …óen ko selu…óe saa'i kala, …ìe andaali laawi an …óin.‚Ä∫
3.11: Mi woonduno e nder tikkere an nden wonde: ‚Äπ∆Åe naatataa ka fowtaare an few!‚Ä∫ ¬ª
3.12: Awa, reenee, yo musi…ì…ìe, fii wota hay gooto e mon he…ìu …ìernde bonnde e …ìernde nde gom…óinal tabitaa e mun, haa ka yilto…óon e …ìaawo Alla Wuuru…óo on.
3.13: Kono wakkilindiree hakkunde mon …≤ande woo, yeru no wi'eede hande, fii wota hay gooto e mon sattinir …ìernde mun …óaynireede junuubu.
3.14: Ko fii en wonii kafidu…ìe e Almasiihu on, si tawii en jogitike fota pellital men aranal ngal haa ka sakkitorun,
3.15: wano bindi …óin wi'iri non wonde: ¬´Hande si on nanii hito makko ngon, wota on sattin …ìer…óe mon …óen wa fewndo murtaldu ndun.¬ª
3.16: Ko hom…ìe woni …ìen murtannoo…ìe Alla, …ìawto …ìe nanude kongol makko ngol? Hinaa …ìee …ìe Muusaa ardinoo, yaltini *Misira?
3.17: E ko hom…ìe woni …ìen …ìe Alla tikkannoo e nder …óii duu…ìi cappan…óe nay? Hinaa …ìee wa…óunoo…ìe junuubu, maayi ka wulaa?

4.1: Ko …óun wa…ói, yeru fodaari fii naatugol ka fowtaare makko no lutti, haray hulen wota go…ó…óo e mon aru e tawdeede e ronkoo…ìe naatude …ìen.

7.1: Ko *Maaliki-Siddiiqu on wonnoo lan…óo Salaam, e *yottinoowo sadaka ka Alla Jom ∆Åural on. O yahi, o fottoyi e Ibraahiima fewndo ko on iwtata fooloygol lam…ìe …ìen, kanko Maaliki-Siddiiqu o du'anii mo.

9.16: Ko fii, ka wasiyannde nden woni …óon, haray no haani ka mayde wasiyii…óo on andee.

10.1: E hoore …óun, wonaa Sariya on tigi woni haqiiqaaji aroyaynoo…ói …óin, kono ko mbaadi mun tun. O waawataa few laatinde …ìen …ìadoray…ìe non Alla timmu…ìe, rewrude e on sadaka gooto jokkondir…óo hitaande woo hitaande.

10.9: E hoore …óun o wi'i kadi: ¬´E hino lan, mi arii fii wa…óugol faale maa on.¬ª O ittii aranun …óun fii sincugol …óimmun …óun.
10.10: Awa, ko sabu faale Alla on *la…ì…ìina…óen fii wonugol yim…ìe makko, rewrude e oo sadaka mo Iisaa Almasiihu on ittiri …ìandu mun ndun tigi nde wootere ko yoni haa poomaa.

10.16: ¬´Joomiraa…óo on daali: ‚ÄπE hino *ahadi ndi mi ∆¥ettodoyta e ma…ì…ìe ndin: ∆Åawto …óee …≤alaa…óe …óoo, mi wa…óoyay sariyaaji an …óin ka …ìer…óe ma…ì…ìe, mi windoya …ói ka hakkille ma…ì…ìe.‚Ä∫ ¬ª

10.18: Ko fii ka junuubaaji …óin yaafaa …óon, haray alaa ko sakkee fii junuubu. Fii Gom…óinal Yim…ìe …ìen
10.19: Ko …óun wa…ói, yo musi…ì…ìe an, …ìay hi…óen mari hoolaare fii naatugol ka *nokkuure hormorde mawnde sabu oo sadaka ∆¥ii∆¥an Iisaa
10.20: …óan o udditirani en laawol kesol wurngol, rewrungol ka *wirngallo, ngon-le ko …ìandu makko ndun,
10.21: e …ìay kadi hi…óen mari yottinoowo maw…óo won…óo ka suudu Alla,
10.22: …ìadoren Alla …ìernde nun…óunde e gom…óinal heewungal pellital, e …ìernde la…ì…ìinaande kala miijooji bon…ói, e …ìandu lootiraandu ndiyan laa…ìu…óan.
10.23: Wonen catii…ìe tabiti e tama'u mo qirriti…óen on, ko fii Wa…óan…óo en …óin fodaariiji on ko Sella-findeejo.
10.24: Miijondiranen ko honno waaweten wakkilindirde ka giggol e ka kuu…óe mo∆¥∆¥e.
10.25: Wota en terto mottondiral men ngal, wano wo…ì…ìe woowiri non. Kono wakkilindiren fodde hi…óen yi'ude …≤alaande nden no …ìadaade.

10.27: kono ko habbannde …≤aawoore hul…ìiniinde e nguleendi yiite hebuliinge sunnugol murtu…ìe …ìen.

10.31: No hul…ìinii yanugol e juu…óe Alla Wuuru…óo on!

11.1: E hin-le, gom…óinal ngal ko pellital fii piiji …ói tan∆¥ini…óen, e hoolaare fii piiji …ói en yi'aali taho.

11.8: Ko gom…óinal ngal kadi Ibraahiima …óoftori noddaandu ndu Alla noddi mo ndun fii yahugol e leydi ndi o ronoyta ndin. O yahi e hoore o andaa ka o woni yahude.
