11.12: Ko …óun wa…ói si ne…ó…óo gooto, mo tawata mayde mun nden he…ìiino …óun, he…ìi jurriya …ìur…óo koode …óen ka kammu …óuu…óude e njaareendi ndin ka sera baharu, ko tawata en waawataa limude.
11.13: Ko e nder gom…óinal ngal …ìe fow …ìe maayi e …ìaawo hendagol piiji fodaa…ói …óin, kono …ìe haynino …ói ka wo…ó…ói, …ìe weltori, e nder qirritagol ko …ìe tu≈ãarankee…ìe e janan…ìe ka leydi.

11.19: Himo joginoo wonde Alla ko Waawu…óo hay immintingol may…óo e hakkunde may…ìe …ìen, ko …óun wa…ói si o hettitiri …ìi…ó…óo makko on wa immitii…óo e mayde.

11.27: Ko gom…óinal ngal o yaltiri Misira e …ìaawo …óen∆¥agol tikkere lan…óo on, …ìay himo catornoo wa sutii…óo on mo yi'otaako.
11.28: Ko gom…óinal ngal kadi o wa…óiri *Juldeere Yawtaneede nden, e wujugol ∆¥ii∆¥an fii wota muloowo dikkuruu…ìe on meemu ko dikkoranaa Isra'iilayankee…ìe …ìen kon.

11.34: ∆Åe …óannini giiteeli bonnooji, …ìe da…ói mbelndi kaafa, …ìe heewi doole fii kala hi…ìe lo'unoo, …ìe hollitii ka nder hareeji, …ìe ra…óii koneeli janan…ìe …ìen.

12.1: ∆Åay wano ngal dental mawngal seedee…ìe no hundi en, bugito…óen kala dongal e junuubu ko falli en no wee…ìiri, dogiren wakkilaare dogudu ndu e…ì…ìana…óen ndun.
12.2: Punno…óen Iisaa, on won…óo da∆¥∆¥ere gom…óinal ngal, on timminoowo ngal. ∆Åay himo sutinoo weltaare maraniinde mo nden, o ja…ìuno *leggal altindiraangal ngal, o yawitii hersa, o joo…óii ka sengo …≤aamo jullere laamu Alla.
12.3: Miijitee fii on ≈ãa…≤…≤ii…óo ndee liddannde nde junuubanke'en liddii mo, fii wota ronkere he…ìu on haa …ìer…óe mon maaya.

12.5: Awa kadi on yejjitii kongol ngol Allaahu on wakkiliri on ngol wa …ìi…ì…ìe makko: ¬´∆Åi…ó…óo an, wota a jogitor wurtannde Joomiraa…óo on no hayfiri, awa kadi wota …ìernde maa maayu nde o wurtu-maa.
12.6: Ko fii ko mo Joomiraa…óo on yi…ói, o wurtata, o yaggina kala mo o ja…ìi yo wonu …ìi…ó…óo makko.¬ª
12.7: Wakkilee tampereeji mon …óin, ko …óin woni on wurtude. Ko wa …ìi…ì…ìe Alla woni on jogitorde. Ko hombo woni …ìi…ó…óo mo ben mun wurtataa?
12.8: Kono si on woorike wurtannde nde fow he…ìata nden, haray ko on fattuu…ìe, hinaa on …ìi…ì…ìe.
12.9: ∆Åay en he…ìii baabaa…ìe ka aduna …óoo wurtaynoo…ìe en, …ìe teddinno…óen, ko haa honto non haanu…óen yankinanaade Ben ruuhuuji men …óin fii no wuuriren!
12.10: Ko fii baabiraa…ìe men …ìen no wurtaynoo en e nder saa'ihun nii, …ìay …ìe tawno ko ko mo∆¥∆¥i, kono Alla ko woni en wurtirde ko fii nafa men on tigi, fii no tawre…óen e laa…ìal makko ngal.
12.11: No fellitaa fewndo wurteede nandaa e huunde weltinnde, kono ko satteende. Kono …ìawto …óun, battane ngurndan feewu…óan won…óan e nder …ìuttu no maranii …ìen wurtaa…ìe.
12.12: Ko …óun wa…ói si mi wi'ay on, …ìantee juu…óe mon lo'u…óe …óen, sattinon koppi mon lo'u…ói …óin,
12.13: yo koy…óe mon …óen jokku laawi feewu…ói …óin, fii wota la∆¥ooje …óen worgito, kono …óe sella. Fii no Hittiniren e Noddaandu Heyru ndun
12.14: Etee no wondiron e fow e nder …ìuttu, wuuron e nder laa…ìal, ko fii …ìaawo maggal hay gooto yi'ataa Joomiraa…óo on.
12.15: Reenee fii wota hay gooto ≈ãakkire mo∆¥∆¥ere Alla nden, wota …óa…óol haa…óungol woo kadi funtu, wona sabu jii…ìoldu haa raa…ìa buy e mon.

12.17: Hi…óon andi, …ìawto …óun, wa fewndo ko o faalaa he…ìude du'aa ben makko on, o bugitano, ko fii o he…ìaano feere waylugol miijo ben makko ngon, fii kala hari himo …óa…ì…ìirde …óun gon…ói.
12.18: Ko fii onon, on …ìadaaki fello ngo waaweten meemude, e yiite hu…ì…ìunge e …óowdi duule e ni…ìe e nduluuru,

12.20: ko fii …ìe townataano sifa ndee yamiroore tii…óunde …óoo: ¬´Hay si mummunte meemiino ngon fello, warirteno kaa∆¥e.¬ª

12.24: On …ìadike Iisaa, on holnu…óo *ahadi heyri ndin, e ∆¥ii∆¥an makko hibbaa…óan, …óan see…óitoore mun …ìuri mo∆¥∆¥ude …óan Haabiila …óan.
12.25: Awa reenee wota on salo he…óaade on Won…óo on yewtude. ∆Åen Isra'iilayankee…ìe, salinoo…ìe he…óaade on Wonnoo…óo …ìe yamirde ka hoore leydi, …ìe da…óaano lette …óen. E ko honno non woniranta en si en huccii on Won…óo en yewtude ka kammuuli dow?

13.2: Wota on yejjitu wernugol. Ko fii e nder warrugol non wo…ì…ìe wernii malaa'ikaa…ìe, hara …ìe andaa.
13.3: Anditee fii kasoo…ìe …ìen, wa si tawii hi…óon sokidaa e ma…ì…ìe, e wonaa…ìe e tampineede …ìen, wa si tawii ko onon wonaa tampineede.
13.4: Yo mo kala teddin dewgal ngal, awa kadi yo ∆¥ettindir…ìe …ìen yonindiran, ko fii telen-ma …óon, Alla …≤aaway fijoo…ìe …ìen e jinoo…ìe …ìen.
13.5: Wota on ardinir ngurndan mon …óan giggol kaalisi, yondinoree ko jogi…óon kon fewndo …óoo. Ko fii Alla tigi no wi'i: ¬´Mi accitataa ma e mi tertotaako ma few.¬ª
13.6: Mo kala e men no waawi wi'ude e nder pellital: ¬´Ko Joomiraa…óo on woni faabo an ngon, mi hulataa. Ko hon…óun ne…ó…óo waawanimmi?¬ª
13.7: Anditee fii ardotoo…ìe on …ìen, …ìen fe…≤…≤inannoo…ìe on daaluyee Alla on, miijito…óon fii battane no …ìe wuuriri non, …≤embon gom…óinal ma…ì…ìe ngal.
13.8: Awa Iisaa Almasiihu on ko gooto, o waylotaako hanki e hande e haa poomaa.
13.9: Wota on ja…ìu kala noone janndeeji janani selna on. Ko fii no mo∆¥∆¥i ka …ìernde nden tii…óiniree mo∆¥∆¥ere Alla nden, hara hinaa sariyaaji fii …≤aameteeji …ói nafaali huunde …ìen jokku…ìe …ói.
13.10: Ko fii hi…óen mari *layyorde nde tawata haananaa golloo…ìe ka *rewirdu adunayankeeru …≤aamugol ko sakkaa …óon kon.
13.11: Ko fii *yottinoo…ìe maw…ìe sadaka …ìen sakkorayno ∆¥ii∆¥an ka nokkuure hormorde, kono tebbeeli …óin sunneteno ka …ìaawo ho…óo.
13.12: Ko …óun wa…ói si Iisaa kadi tampuno ka …ìaawo ho…óo fii *la…ì…ìinirgol jamaa on ∆¥ii∆¥an makko …óan tigi.
13.13: Awa enen kadi, yalten ka …ìaawo ho…óo fii yahugol e makko, e hoore rondagol hersa ka o rondinoo kan.
13.14: Ko fii en maraa …óoo ho…óo tabitungo, kono hi…óen …óa…ì…ìude aroyayngo ngon.
13.15: E innde makko kanko Iisaa, duumo…óen e wa…óangol Alla sadaka mantoore, e maanaa sadaka yaltoowo e toni jantotoo…ói innde makko nden.
13.16: Awa wota on weddito e wa…óugol mo∆¥∆¥ere e wallindirgol, ko …óii woni sadakaaji …ói Alla ja…ìata weltora.
13.17: ∆äoftee ardotoo…ìe on …ìen, yankinano…óon …ìe. Ko fii hi…ìe ayni fota wonkiiji mon …óin, wa hunitoytoo…ìe ka Alla. Awa etee …ìe wa…óa …óun e hoore weltaare, hara hinaa no mettirta …ìe. Si hinaa …óun, nafoytaa on.

13.19: Mi torike on fow tentinii toragol fii yo Allaahu on newnanan yiltitagol ka mon no yaawiri.
13.20: Yo Alla Jom ∆Åuttu on, on Artir…óo e hakkunde may…ìe …ìen Iisaa Joomi men, Ngaynaako Maw…óo baali …óin, rewrude e ∆¥ii∆¥an *ahadi poomayankeeri ndin,
13.21: yo o wawnu on e kala ko mo∆¥∆¥i fii wa…óugol faale makko on, o wa…óa e men ko welata mo, tippude e Iisaa Almasiihu on, on mo mangural wonani haa poomaa. Aamiina!
13.22: Mi torike on, yo musi…ì…ìe an, ja…ìugol ngol kongol wakkilinayngol, ko fii mi windanii on, mi ra…ì…ìin…óinii.
13.23: Awa andee wonde, Timotee, oo musi…ó…óo men, yaltinaama ka kaso. Si o hewtitii law, mi yaaday e makko, men yiida e mon.
13.24: Hiwranee lan ardotoo…ìe on …ìen fow e yim…ìe Alla …ìen fow. ∆Åee …ìe Italii salminii on.
13.25: Yo mo∆¥∆¥ere Joomiraa…óo on wonu e hoore mon on fow.

1.1: Salminaango an min Yaaquuba, oo jiyaa…óo Alla e Iisaa Almasiihu Joomi on, haa e …óii *bolondaaji sappoo e …ói…ói saakitii…ói e nder aduna on. Fii Wakkilagol Tampereeji
1.2: Ko onon yo musi…ì…ìe, si on rewrii e kala noone ndarndan…óe, haray jogitoree …óun weltaare fow,
1.3: ko fii hi…óon andi, ndarndagol gom…óinal mon ngal adday ≈ãa…≤…≤aare.
1.4: Kono bee ≈ãa…≤…≤aare nden wa…óa golle timmu…óe, fii no woniron mokobaa…ìe timmu…ìe, e hara on ≈ãakkiraaka huunde.
1.5: Si go…ó…óo e mon ≈ãakkira faamu, yo o toro …óun Alla, on okkay mo …óun. Ko fii kanko Alla ko Ye…óoowo fow no yaajiri e …ìaawo feloore.
1.6: Kono yo o toror mo gom…óinal ngal aldaa e sikkitaare. Ko fii on sikkitii…óo no wa'i wa morloo…óe ndiyan …óan ka baharu, …óe hendu ndun du…≤ata ∆¥e∆¥a.
1.7: Wota sifa on ne…ó…óo sikku hendoto go…ó…óun e juu…óe Joomiraa…óo on,
1.8: on ko ne…ó…óo sikkitii…óo, mo tabitaa e laawi mun …óin fow.
1.9: Yo musi…ó…óo miskiino on weltor ko Alla towni mo kon,
1.10: al…óu…óo on kadi weltora ko Alla tippini mo kon, …ìay fii makko on fe∆¥∆¥iray wa piindi ngesa.
1.11: Si naange ngen fu…óii, nge toowidii e nguleendi magge muusundi ndin, hinge yornude ku…ói …óin, piindi majji on saama, ≈ãari majji on bonta, ko non al…óu…ìe …ìen saamirta e nder golle ma…ì…ìe …óen.
1.12: Maloore wonanii on ne…ó…óo ≈ãa…≤…≤ii…óo ndarndan…óe …óen, ko fii si o dartike ndarndan…óe …óen, o hendoto *meetelol ngurndan, ngol Joomiraa…óo on fodi yi…óu…ìe mo …ìen.
1.13: Wota hay gooto wi'u e nder ko jarribetee kon: ¬´Ko Alla jarribii mi.¬ª Ko fii Alla jarribortaake ko boni, kanko kadi o jarribotaako hay gooto.
1.14: Nde jarriba…óen woo, ko himmeeji bon…ói …ói wondu…óen …óin woni en poo…óude murtina.
1.15: ∆Åawto …óun, himme bon…óo on fu…óa haa rima junuubu, si junuubu on kadi heewii, o rima mayde.

1.17: kala dokkal mo∆¥∆¥al e kala dokkal timmungal ko ka dow iwrani en, e immorde e Baabaajo ndayguuji …óin, on mo waylotaako, mo …óowdi mun dillataa,
1.18: on Woodintinir…óo en Daaluyee makko goongaajo on no o yi…óiri non, fii no laatoren dikkuruu…ìe e tagu makko ngun. Fii Huutorgol Daaluyee Alla on
1.19: Andee …óun, yo musi…ì…ìe an yi…óaa…ìe, yo ne…ó…óo kala yaawu he…óaade, nenna si yewta, nenna si tikka.

1.21: Awa sertee e kala ko tuuninta e kala bonki layuki, ja…ìiron newaare daaluyee aawaa…óo e mon on, …óun ko on waawu…óo dandude wonkiiji mon …óin.
1.22: Wonee huutoroo…ìe daaluyee on, hara hinaa on he…óotoo…ìe mo tun, si hinaa …óun, haray onon tigi on …óaynitoto woni.
1.23: Ko fii si go…ó…óo he…óike daaluyee on, o huutoraali mo, haray himo wa'i wa ne…ó…óo won…óo tintaade, yi'a yeeso mun ngon.
1.24: Si o gaynii ndaaritaade, o yahii, o yejjita kisan ko honno o wa'i.
1.25: Kono on wa…óu…óo gii…óe mun …óen ka nder sariya timmu…óo, …óun ko on sariya rin…óinoowo, o tabiti, hara hinaa fii he…óagol yejjita, kono hara ko huutorgol, on…óon wonay malaa…óo e nder kala ko o wa…óata.
1.26: On mo sikki ko dewo, e …ìaawo waawugol …óenngal mun ngal, haray on …óaynii hoore mun, ngal dewal ko meerewal.
1.27: Dewal laa…ìungal, ngal aldaa e koju ngal yeeso Alla Baabaajo on, ko dankagol aliyatiimaa…ìe …ìen e dankagol keynguu…ìe …ìen e nder satteendeeji ma…ì…ìe …óin, e rentagol e tuundiiji aduna …óin.

2.1: Musi…ì…ìe an, …ìay ko on gom…óin…ìe Iisaa Almasiihu Joomi men mo darja wonani on, reenee e …ìurdindingol yim…ìe.
2.2: Si wattii…óo hurundaare ka≈ã≈ãe, …ìornii conci dimi aru e naatude ka *moftal mon, baaso kadi …ìornii…óo conci yakkii…ói ara e naatude,
2.3: si on hittinii fii …ìornii…óo conci dimi on, on wi'ii mo: ¬´Onon toolii mon ka nda…ó…óudi …óoo!¬ª, wi'on baaso on: ¬´An daro …óaa!¬ª, maa: ¬´Joo…óo ka ley koy…óe an …óoo!¬ª,
2.4: e hara on wa…óaali sendondiral hakkunde mon onon tigi? E on …≤aawiraali miijooji bon…ói?
2.5: He…óitee, yo musi…ì…ìe an yi…óaa…ìe! E hara hinaa miskin…ìe …ìen ka aduna …óoo Alla su…ìii fii no …ìe wonira al…óu…ìe e nder gom…óinal ngal, e he…ìoo…ìe ge…ìal e laamu ngu o fodi yi…óu…ìe mo …ìen ngun?

2.7: E hinaa …ìen woni hoynoo…ìe innde teddunde nde innira…óon nden?
2.8: Kono si on …óoftike sariya maw…óo on, wano bindi …óin wi'iri non wonde: ¬´Yo a yi…óir …≤okondo maa on wano yi…óir…óaa hoore maa non¬ª, haray on wa…óii ko mo∆¥∆¥i.

2.11: Ko fii on Wi'u…óo: ¬´wota mo jeena¬ª, no wi'i kadi: ¬´wota mo itta hoore.¬ª E hin-le si on wa…óaali jinaa, kono on ittii hoore, haray on wonii bonnu…óo Sariya on.
2.12: Awa yewtiree huuwiron wa yim…ìe …≤aawiroytee…ìe Sariya rin…óinoowo on.
2.13: Ko fii …≤aawoore nden aldanaa mo yurmetaake e yurmeende, kono yurmeende nden foolay …≤aawoore nden. Fii Hakkunde Gom…óinal e Kuugal
2.14: Musi…ì…ìe an, ko nafa hon…óun woodani ne…ó…óo wi'ugol himo mari gom…óinal, si o alaa …ìanginirde …óun kuu…óe? Taw si sifa ngal gom…óinal no waawi dandude mo?
2.15: Si musi…ó…óo men gorko maa bandiraawo men no holi, no ≈ãakkiri …≤aametee kadi …≤ande woo,
2.16: go…ó…óo e mon ara e wi'ude …ìen: ¬´Yahee e jam, …ìorno…óon, …≤aamon haa haaron¬ª, e …ìaawo jonnugol …ìe ko …ìalli ma…ì…ìe …óin handi e mun kon, haray ko hon…óun …óun nafata?
2.17: Gom…óinal ngal kadi ko wano non: si ngal aldaa e kuu…óe, ko ngal mayngal kangal tigi.
2.18: Kono si go…ó…óo wi'ii: ¬´An hi…óa mari gom…óinal e min mi…óo mari kuu…óe¬ª, haray min mi wi'ay mo: ¬´Hollan gom…óinal maa ngal e …ìaawo kuu…óe, min non mi hollirte gom…óinal an ngal kuu…óe an …óen.¬ª
2.19: Hi…óa gom…óini ko Alla gooto woodi? No mo∆¥∆¥i! Jinnaaji …óin kadi no gom…óiniri non, haa hi…ói diwna.
2.20: Ko an yo njofoojo! Hi…óa faalaa faamude wonde gom…óinal ngal aldaa e kuu…óe ko meerewal?
2.21: Enee, wonaa ko Ibraahiima, on maamiraawo men, wa…óunoo kon fewndo o wee…ìiti *Issaaqa …ìi…ó…óo makko on fii layyagol ka *layyorde kon wa…ói si o jogitoraa feewu…óo?
2.22: A yi'ii, gom…óinal ngal yaadii e kuu…óe makko …óen, awa kadi ko kuu…óe makko …óen timmini gom…óinal makko ngal.

3.1: Musi…ì…ìe an, wota buy e mon himman jannugol, ko fii hi…óon andi enen jannoo…ìe …ìen en …≤aawete …≤aawoore …ìurnde sattude.
3.2: Ko fii en fow en wa…óay ellaaji …ói tawata ko nooneeji …óuu…óu…ói. On mo wa…óaali ella e nder kongu…ói, haray on ne…ó…óo ko timmu…óo, waawu…óo hu…ìindaade …ìandu mun ndun fow.

3.4: Ndaaree kadi, …óee laa…óe e njan…óude mun, ko hendu dolnundu na…ìata …óe, hi…óe ardoree aalahun …ìurkun fan…óude ka na…ìoowo on faaliraa …óon.

3.6: ∆äenngal ngal kadi ko yiite, hingal heewi boneeji, hingal tawdaa e tere …ìandu men ndun, ngal tuuninay …ìandu ndun fow, ko ka yiite jahannama ngal hu…ì…ìinaa, ngal sunnay ngurndan men …óan fow.
3.7: Kala noone kulle, wano colli …óin e ko daasotoo kon e kulle …óen ka nder ndiyan, no hu…ìindoo, …óen-le ne…ó…óanke no hu…ìindii …óe.
3.8: Kono …óenngal, hay gooto waawataa ngal hu…ìindaade. Ko bone mo waawotaako hu…ìindaade, hingal heewi tooke warooje.
3.9: Ko kangal mantirten Ben men Joomiraa…óo on, ko kangal kadi hu…óirten yim…ìe tagaa…ìe e mbaadi Alla …ìen.
3.10: Ko e kon hunduko wooto du'aa e kuddi yaltata. Kono yo musi…ì…ìe, wota …óun wonir non.

3.12: Enee musi…ì…ìe an, hara ∆¥ibbehi no waawi rimude kaccu, maa piyahi rima ∆¥ibbe? Ko wano non kadi, …ìundu ndiyan lan…óan waawataa tubbinde ndiyan wel…óan. Fii Faamu Iwrungu ka Dow ngun
3.13: Ko hombo e hakkunde mon mari faamu e hakkil? Yo o …ìanginir …óun jikku makko mo∆¥∆¥o on wondude e kuu…óe newii…óe iwru…óe e faamu.
3.14: Kono si tawii hi…óon mari ka …ìer…óe mon nawliigu tii…óungu e haasidi, haray wota on mawnintino, e wota on yeddu goonga on.

3.16: Ko fii, kala ka nawliigu e haasidi woni, ko …óon kadi jii…ìoldu e kala noone kuu…óe bon…óe woni.
3.17: Kono faamu iwrungu ka Alla ngun, ko adii taho, ko ngu laa…ìungu, awa kadi ko ngu …ìuttu, ko ngu newiingu, ko ngu dee∆¥inayngu, heewungu yurmeende e kuu…óe mo∆¥∆¥e, ngu aldaa e …ìurnondiral e faasiqankaaku.
3.18: Ko tabintinoo…ìe …ìuttu …ìen aawata e nder …ìuttu kon, rimay peewal.

4.1: Ko honto …óee poodotire e …óee yeddondire hakkunde mon iwri? E hara hinaa faaleeji bon…ói woni wa…óude hare ka …ìer…óe mon?
4.2: Hi…óon himmani, kono on alaa he…ìude. Ko on waroo…ìe, ko on miilaa…ìe e …ìaawo waawugol he…ìude hay huunde. Hi…óon wondi e yeddondire e poo…óotiro. E hin-le on hendotaako, …ìay on alaa toraade,
4.3: maa hi…óon toraade, on alaa he…ìude, …ìay hi…óon tororde anniyee bon…óo fii no huutoriron …óun fii faaleeji mon.
4.4: Ko onon, yo jamaa jinoo…ìe! E on andaa yi…óugol aduna on ko a…≤ugol Alla? Awa si go…ó…óo no faalaa yi…óude aduna on, haray o wa…óitike ga…≤o Alla.
4.5: On sikku bindi …óin ko wi'i kon ko meere, wonde: ¬´Alla no nawlani ruuhu mo o wa…ói e men on.¬ª?
4.6: Kono ko o …ìuri en ye…óude e ko mawni kon ko sulfu. Awa e hino ko bindi …óin wi'i kon: ¬´Alla liddoto mawnintinii…ìe …ìen, o ye…óa jippin…ìe hoore mun …ìen sulfu.¬ª
4.7: Awa yankinanee Alla, darto…óon Ibuliisa, …óun o dogay, o wo…ó…óoo on.
4.8: ∆Åadee Alla, …óun o …ìadoto on. La…ì…ìinee juu…óe mon …óen, yo onon junuubankee…ìe. La…ì…ìinon …ìer…óe mon …óen, yo onon sikkitii…ìe.
4.9: Woytee, yoomon, wullon. Yo jalee…óe mon …óen wontu yoomugol, weltaare mon nden wonta …ìi…óagol.
4.10: Jippinee hoore mon yeeso Joomiraa…óo on, …óun o …ìantoyay on.
4.11: Wota on …≤akkin …ìee …óoo maa …ìee …óaa, yo musi…ì…ìe an. Mo …≤akkinii musi…ó…óo mun, maa …≤aawii musi…ó…óo mun, haray ko Sariya on o …≤akkini, o …≤aawi. Si a …≤aawii-le Sariya on, haray hinaa a huutor…óo mo, kono ko a …≤aawoowo mo.
4.12: Ko fii ko Gooto pet woni Wa…óoowo Sariya …≤aawa, …óun ko on Waawu…óo dandude e mulude. An non, ko a hombo, si hi…óa …≤aawa …≤okondo maa? Fii Mawnintinaare e Townitaare
4.13: Ko onon, yo wi'u…ìe jooni: ¬´Hande maa jango men yahay e ndee saare …óoo, men wona ton hitaande, men wa…óoya ton go…ó…óun, men he…ìa tono.¬ª
4.14: Onon on andaa toode no ngurndan mon …óan wonirta jango. Ko on norngal fee…≤ungal fii saa'ihun nii, …ìawto …óun muta.
4.15: Ko haanu…óon wi'ude: ¬´Men wuuray, men wa…óa …óun…óoo maa …óun…óaa, si Joomiraa…óo on ja…ìii.¬ª
4.16: Kono jooni, hi…óon mawnintinaade e nder townitaare mon. Sifa nden mawnintinaare fow ko bonnde.

4.17: Jooni non, saa'i fu…ó…óoode …≤aawoore nden hewtii, nde fu…ó…óora yim…ìe Alla …ìen. Si tawii ko enen nde fu…ó…óori, haray ko honno sakkitoode …ìen …ìe …óoftanooki Kibaaru Mo∆¥∆¥o Alla on wa'oyta?
4.18: Si tawii non feewu…óo on dandiraama karahan, haray ko honno woniranta mo rewataa Alla on e junuubankeejo on?
4.19: ∆äun haray, yo won…ìe tampude no yaadiri e kodduruyee Alla on duumo e wa…óugol ko mo∆¥∆¥i, …ìe watta wonkiiji ma…ì…ìe …óin e juu…óe Tagu…óo on, …óun ko on Sella-Findeejo.

5.1: Awa jooni mi…óo yewtude ardotoo…ìe *moftal won…ìe hakkunde mon …ìen. Min kadi ko mi ardotoo…óo, e seedeejo tampereeji *Almasiihu on, e he…ìoowo ge…ìal e darja fe…≤…≤inoytee…óo on. Mi wakkilinii on
5.2: aynugol wuro ngo Alla halfini on ngon, hara hinaa e hoore karheede, kono hara ko no Alla yi…óiri non e hoore …ìernde laa…ìunde, hara on wa…óiraali …óun miile, kono hara ko e anniyee mo∆¥∆¥o.
5.3: Wota on hollu mbawdi e hoore …ìe halfina…óon …ìen, kono wonanon wuro ngon misal.
5.4: ∆äun, nde Hooreejo Ngaynaakoo…ìe …ìen fee…≤oyi, on hendoyto *meetelol darja, ngol ≈ãari mun bontataa haa poomaa.
5.5: Onon kadi sukaa…ìe wano non, yankinanee ardotoo…ìe moftal ngal, mo kala e mon jippina hoore mun yeeso oya, ko fii: ¬´Alla liddoto mawnintinii…ìe …ìen, kono o ye…óa jippin…ìe hoore mun …ìen sulfu.¬ª
5.6: Awa, jippinee hoore mon e ley jungo Alla dolnungo ngon fii yo o …ìantoy on e saa'i mo o to…ó…óii on.

5.8: Wonon hakkilan…ìe e reenii…ìe, ko fii liddotoo…óo on on, …óun ko Ibuliisa, no wa…óude yaha ara, riggora wa ngayuuri, hara no …óa…ì…ìa ko seekita.
5.9: Dartoree mo kanko Ibuliisa no tii…óiri e nder gom…óinal ngal, e hoore yo on andu ko tampereeji gooti fawa…óon onon e musi…ì…ìe mon won…ìe e nder aduna on fow.
5.10: Kono si on tampii e nder saa'ihun nii, Alla Jom sulfu on, on Noddu…óo on ka darja makko poomayankeejo on e nder humondiral e Iisaa Almasiihu on, o heydintinoyay on kanko tigi, o tabintina on, o tii…óinoya on, o wa…óa on …ìe dillintaako.
5.11: Ko kanko bawgal wonani haa poomaa. Aamiina! Fii Waynitannde Petruusu nden
5.12: Ko e dow ballal Silaasi, oo musi…ó…óo sella-findeejo, mi windirani on nduu …ìatakuru ra…ì…ìi…óundu, fii wakkilingol on e fii seedintingol wonde ko …óun…óoo woni mo∆¥∆¥ere Alla haqiiqaare nden, awa humee e mayre.
5.13: Su…ìaa…ìe won…ìe *Baabiila …ìen e Markuusa …ìi…ó…óo an on salminii on.
5.14: Awa hiwrondiree lunnondiral giggol si…ó…óankaaku. Yo …ìuttu wonan on, onon humondir…ìe e Almasiihu on …ìen fow.

1.1: Immorde e an min Sim'uunu Petruusu, *sahaabaajo e kurkaadu Iisaa Almasiihu on, haa e …ìee hendii…ìe gom…óinal fotayngal hittude e ngal amen ngal, immorde e peewal Alla men e Dandoowo on, …óun ko Iisaa Almasiihu on.
1.2: Yo mo∆¥∆¥ere e …ìuttu sowindirane on e hoore andugol Alla e Iisaa Joomi men on. Fii Tabintingol Noddaandu men ndun
1.3: Ko bawgal makko ngal, Alla ye…óiri en kala ko handu…óen fii ngurndan e wuurirgol wano o faaliraa non, e nder andingol en on Noddir…óo en mangural mun ngal e mo∆¥∆¥uki mun kin.
1.4: Ko nii o ye…óiri en fodaariiji …ìur…ói hittude e …ìur…ói mawnude …óin, fii, tippude e …óin fodaariiji, no tawdire…óon e jikku makko on, kanko Alla, …óun ko onon fuutinoo…ìe …ìoylaare aduna iwrunde e himmeeji bon…ói.
1.5: Ko sabu …óun wa…ói, geree …ìeyditon e gom…óinal mon ngal jikku mo∆¥∆¥o, e hoore jikku mo∆¥∆¥o on kadi …ìeyditon …óon gandal,
1.6: e hoore gandal ngal kadi …ìeyditon waawugol hoore mun, e hoore waawugol hoore mun ngol kadi …ìeyditon ≈ãa…≤…≤agol, e hoore ≈ãa…≤…≤agol ngol kadi …ìeyditon wuurirgol wano Alla faaliraa non,
1.7: e hoore wuurirgol wano Alla faaliraa non …ìeyditon giggol si…ó…óankaaku, e hoore giggol si…ó…óankaaku ngol …ìeyditon giggol.
1.8: Si …óii jikkuuji …óoo sowondirii e mon, …ói ha…óay on wonude meerentee…ìe …ìe alaa battane mo∆¥∆¥e fii andugol Iisaa Almasiihu Joomi men on.
1.9: Kono mo aldaa e …óin, haray ko bun…óo, mo felsataa, yejjitu…óo ko junuubaaji mun …óin la…ì…ìinanoo kon.
1.10: Ko …óun wa…ói, yo musi…ì…ìe, …ìurtee wakkilaade fii haqinqingol noddaandu ndu nodda…óon ndun e ko su…ìa…óon kon. Si on warrii non, on yanataa e nder bone few.
1.11: Ko nii newnirante…óon no yaajiri naatugol ka laamateeri poomayankeeri Joomi men on, on Dandoowo, …óun ko Iisaa Almasiihu on. Fii Jannde Yaadunde e Goonga on
1.12: Ko …óun wa…ói si soono woo mi andintinay on fii …óii piiji, hay si tawii hi…óon andi …ói e hi…óon tabiti e goonga mo hendi…óon on.
1.13: Mi…óo sikki no haananimmi ka mi jokka andintingol on, fannin mi…óo e nduu togooru, …óun ko …ìandu an ndun,
1.14: ko fii mi…óo andi mi sertay jooni e nduu …ìandu maayooru, wano Iisaa Almasiihu Joomi men on, …ìanginiranimmi non.
1.15: Ko …óun wa…ói si mi etoto fota, fii hay si mi iwoyii, no anditiroyon …óii piiji.
1.16: Awa, hinaa men …ìaaror…ìe taariikaaji sinciraa…ói ∆¥oyre, fewndo ko men …ìanginani on ardu Iisaa Almasiihu Joomi men on e bawgal makko ngal. Kono men yi'irii gite amen …óen tigi mangu makko ngun.
1.17: Ko fii o hendike e juu…óe Alla Baabaajo on teddungal e darja fewndo ko o nanunoo hawa iwrude ka darja heewu…óo …ìural on, ko Allaahu on daalani mo: ¬´Oo …óoo ko ∆Åi…ó…óo an yi…óaa…óo, mo mi weltori on.¬ª
1.18: Menen kadi, men nanii ngol kongol iwrungol ka kammu, fewndo men wondi e makko ka hoore fello hormorteengo.
1.19: Awa me…óen …ìuri fellitude fii kongu…ói …ói annabaa…ìe …ìen longinaa …óin, …óin …ói tawata si on wattanii yiila, haray on wa…óii ko mo∆¥∆¥i, …ìay …óin kongu…ói no wa'i wa lampu hu…ì…ìu…óo e nokkuure ni…ì…ìitunde, haa nde fajiri on feeri, jaawiire nden toowi ndaygini …ìer…óe mon …óen.
1.20: Ko adii kon, andee wonde firo kongu…ói …ói annabaa…ìe …ìen windi …óin, …óun ko daaluyeeji …ói …ìe longinaa …óin, hinaa e ne…ó…óanke iwri.
1.21: Ko fii kala kongol longinaangol hinaa e miijo ne…ó…óanke iwi, kono ko *Ruuhu Senii…óo on yim…ìe …ìen haaliri ko Alla longini …ìe kon.

2.1: Woodiino e hakkunde jamaa on wa…óitii…ìe annabaa…ìe. Jannoo…ìe fenaande woniroyay non e hakkunde mon onon kadi, hara hi…ìe …ìisa janndeeji fenaandeeji e nder ko …ìe jannata kon, nawray…ói e halkaare. ∆Åe yedda on Sooditu…óo …ìe, …óun ko Joomi on. Ko nii …ìe poo…óirta e ma…ì…ìe halakuyee yaawu…óo.
2.2: Buy jokkoyay jii…ìaare ma…ì…ìe nden, laawol goonga on hoynoyee sabu ma…ì…ìe.
2.3: Immorde e miile ma…ì…ìe …óen, …ìe hiiliroya on kongu…ói sincaa…ói. Kono gila nee…ìii ko …ìe happanaa kon no …ìadaade tun, awa hayrannde ma…ì…ìe nden ≈ão≈ãaa.
2.4: Ko fii Alla dandaali malaa'ikaa…ìe wa…óunoo…ìe junuubu …ìen, kono o nangi …ìe, o bugii ka yiite jahannama ka …ìe jolkaa …óon e nder niwre, …ìe jogoraa …óon fii …≤aaweede.
2.5: O dandaali kadi …ìeya yim…ìe aran…ìe, kono ko njeetato o acci e ma…ì…ìe, go…ó…óo on ko Nuuhu, on waajotonoo…óo fii peewal ngal, fewndo ko Allaahu on acciti waamere nden e hoore jamaa …ìe rewataa mo …ìen.
2.6: O happani kadi …óee ca'e Saduuma e *Amuura mulugol …óe, watta …óe ndoondi, fii wa…óangol …ìe rewataa mo …ìen kanko Alla misal.
2.7: Kono o dandi Luutu feewu…óo on, on mo …ìernde mun wondunoo e sokola tii…óu…óo sabu jikku jii…ìii…óo …ìee bon…ìe,
2.8: ko fii on ko feewu…óo ho…óunoo…óo hakkunde ma…ì…ìe, mo wonkii mun tampintenoo …≤ande woo …≤ande sabu angal peewal ngal o yi'aynoo ngal e ngal o nanaynoo ngal.
2.9: Awa …óun…óoo fow no holli ko Joomiraa…óo on andi ko honno o dandirta yim…ìe gom…óin…ìe …ìen ndarndeede, o donkina …ìe feewaa …ìen haa …≤ande …≤aawoore nden,
2.10: tentinii …ìen jokku…ìe himmeeji tuunu…ói …ìalli mun, hoyna laamu Joomiraa…óo on, …óun ko …ìee suusu…ìe reedu, mawnintinii…ìe, …ìe hulataa aybinde ruuhuuji …óin ka kammu.
2.11: E hin-le malaa'ikaa…ìe, …ìur…ìe …ìe doole e mbawdi …ìen, …≤aawiraali …ìen yim…ìe hoyre yeeso Joomiraa…óo on.
2.12: Kono …ìen jannoo…ìe fenaandee…ìe ko wa'u…ìe wa kulle buruure …óe alaa miijoo-miccoo, tagiraa…óe fii nangeede mulee, ko fii hi…ìe hoynude ko …ìe andaa. ∆Åe muliray wa kulle buruure nii,
2.13: ko bone wonata njoddi boneeji ma…ì…ìe …óin. ∆Åe tawi faale ma…ì…ìe on ko ji…≤angol mbelee…óe aduna tumbere …≤alorma. Ko …ìe wa'u…ìe wa ella e waadere, …ìay hi…ìe weltora …óaynugol on, hay nde hi…ìe …≤aamida e mon.
2.14: Gite ma…ì…ìe …óen no heewi jinaa, awa kadi …ìe haa…ìataa wa…óugol junuubu. Hi…ìe poo…óa wonkiiji …ói tabitaa …óin, nawra …ói e ko boni. ∆Åer…óe …ìen jannoo…ìe fenaandee…ìe no eltiraa miile, …ìen ko …ìe fay…ìe hu…óaa…ìe,
2.15: …ìay …ìe accitii laawol feewungol ngol, …ìe majjirii sabu jokkugol laawol Bal'ama ngol, on …ìi…ó…óo Be'uura, yi…óunoo…óo njoddi he…ìorndi bonki.
2.16: Kono o feliraa sabu geddi makko …óin tigi, …óin geddi woni sabu haa mbabun kun, …óun ko mummuntehun kun, wowliri wa ne…ó…óo, …óun ha…ói on annabaajo wa…óugol kuugal feetere.
2.17: ∆Åen ko …ìe …ìulli …ói alaa ndiyan, ko …ìe duule …óe hendu ra…óotoo, …ìen no maranaa niwre …ìurnde tekkude nden.
2.18: Immorde e yewtereeji ma…ì…ìe manti e mehi, hi…ìe huutora himmeeji jii…ìaare …ìandu fii poo…óugol …ìen fuutor…ìe karahan e juu…óe wuuru…ìe e majjere …ìen.
2.19: Hi…ìe foda …ìe ndimu, e hin-le kam…ìe tigi ko …ìe maccu…ìe ko nawrata e halkaare, ko fii mo kala ko maccu…óo ko fooli …óun kon.
2.20: Ko fii si tawii, …ìawto fuutagol tuundiiji oo aduna sabu andugol ma…ì…ìe Joomi on e on Dandoowo, …óun ko Iisaa Almasiihu on, si …ìe nangike kadi e pircol …óin tuundiiji haa …ói foolii …ìe, haray sakkitorde ma…ì…ìe nden …ìuray aranere nden bonude.
2.21: No …ìurani …ìe ka tawata …ìe andaano laawol peewal ngol, edii, andugol ngol, sela yamiroore hormorteende nde …ìe andinaa nden.
2.22: ∆äun haray …ìe tentinii ko ngol tindol goongawol wi'i kon wonde: ¬´Saa'i kala bareeru ndun yiltitanto ko ndu tuutunoo kon¬ª, awa kadi: ¬´Saa'i kala kosewii arngii e looteede ngin ruttitoto e rukagol ka loope.¬ª

3.1: Awa e hino …ìatakuru …óimmuru ndu mi windani on ndun, yo yi…ì…ìe. E nder majji …ói …ói…óii non, mi windiranii on …ói fii andintingol on, walla on he…ìon miijooji laa…ìu…ói,
3.2: fii no anditiron kongu…ói …ói annabaa…ìe laa…ìu…ìe …ìen *hiitinoo …óin, e yamiroore Joomi on e Dandoowo en on, nden nde sahaabaa…ìe …ìen hewtini on.
3.3: Ko adii kon, andee wonde ka …≤alaa…óe sakkitore, yawitii…ìe aroyay heewu…ìe jalnori, wuuriroyay…ìe himmeeji ma…ì…ìe …óin,
3.4: hara hi…ìe wi'oya: ¬´Ko honto ardu makko fodanoondu ndun woni? Ko fii gila baabiraa…ìe …ìen maayi, fow no wa'i wano wa'unoo non gila aduna on fu…ó…óii.¬ª
3.5: Kono …ìe tewi …ìe yejjiti wonde, ko daaluyee Alla on wa…ói si kammuuli …óin e leydi ndin woodiranoo, leydi ndin suutaa e ndiyan, ndi mo∆¥∆¥iniraa ndiyan.
3.6: Ko ndiyan kadi aduna fe∆¥∆¥unoo…óo on muliraa ndiyan waamere.
3.7: Kono ko on daaluyee Alla kadi wa…ói si kammuuli fewndii…ói …óin e aduna fewndii…óo on maranaa yiite ngen …≤ande …ìe rewataa Alla …ìen …≤aawetee halkee.
3.8: Kono no woodi to…ì…ìere nde on haanaa yejjitude, yo yi…ì…ìe: …≤allal gootal ka Joomiraa…óo on ko wa duu…ìi wuluure, awa kadi duu…ìi wuluure ko wa …≤allal gootal.
3.9: Awa Joomiraa…óo on alaa nennude hunnugol fodaari makko ndin, wano wo…ì…ìe miijori non. Kono ka liddu …óun, o mu…≤…≤ani on tun, ko fii o yi…óaa hay gooto hayra. Kono ko o yi…ói, ko yo fow aru e tuubuubuyee.
3.10: Awa, …≤alaande Joomi on arday wa ngujjo. Nden …≤ande non kammuuli …óin muliray hito uuyungo, piiji oo aduna sunnee mula, leydi ndin kadi e kuu…óe ko ndi wondi kon fe…≤…≤inee.
3.11: ∆Åay …óun fow non no e laawol mulirgol nii, haray pellet hi…óon haani wuurirde laa…ìal e no Alla faaliraa non.
3.12: Awa e nder ko habbi…óon ardu …≤alaande Alla nden kon, etee fii no …óun yaawira, …óun ko ka kammuuli …óin mulirta yiite …óon, e ka piiji oo aduna taayirta nguleendi yiite …óon.
3.13: Kono enen hi…óen habbii fodaari Alla ndin, …óun ko kammu hesu e leydi heyri ka peewal ngal ho…óoyta …óon.
3.14: Ko …óun wa…ói, yo yi…ì…ìe, e nder nden habbannde, etee fii, nde o aroyi, no o tawira on e nder …ìuttu, hara on aldaa e waadere, on aldaa e ella.
3.15: Jogoree mu…≤al Joomiraa…óo men on wa kisiyee, wano Puulusa, oo musi…ó…óo men yi…óaa…óo, windirani on non ka…≤un kadi, tippude e faamu ngu o ye…óaa ngun.
3.16: Ko …óun o woni wa…óude e …ìataake …óen fow, ka o wowli fii …óin piiji …óon, e ka windan…óe mettu…óe faamude …óen woni …óon, …óe tawata yim…ìe …ìe faamaa …ìen e …ìe tabitaa …ìen …ìoylii noone on, wano …ìe wa…óiri non e ko heddii e bindi …óin kon, fii hayrannde ma…ì…ìe kam…ìe tigi.
3.17: Onon non, yo yi…ì…ìe, …ìay on hajaama, reenee fii wota on selu jokkon …óayni …ìe …óoftaaki yamirooje Alla …óen, haa ka yoolon tabital mon ngal.
3.18: Awa …ìeydee yaarude yeeso e nder mo∆¥∆¥ere nden e andugol Joomi men on, on Dandoowo, …óun ko Iisaa Almasiihu on, on mo mangural wonani jooni e haa poomaa. Aamiina!

1.1: Ko wonnoo kon gila ka fu…ó…óoode, ko …óun men nani, men yi'iri gite amen …óen, men punnii, men meemiri juu…óe amen …óen, …óun ko daaluyee ngurndan …óan.
1.2: Awa, ngurndan …óan fee…≤ii, men yi'ii …óan, me…óen seeditanaade …óan. Me…óen fe…≤…≤inande on *ngurndan poomayankejan …óan, …óan wondunoo…óan e Baabaajo on, …óan fe…≤…≤inanaama men.
1.3: Me…óen hollitude on onon kadi ko men yi'i kon e ko men nani kon fii no laatoron humondir…ìe e amen e nder humondiral men e Baabaajo on e ∆Åi…ó…óo makko on, …óun ko Iisaa Almasiihu on.
1.4: Me…óen windude …óun…óoo fii no weltaare men nden timmira. Fii Wonugol ka Ndaygu
1.5: E hino kibaaru mo men naniri mo on, me…óen …ìanginande on mo: Alla ko ndaygu, niwre woo alaa e makko.
1.6: Si en innii hi…óen humondiri e makko, kono hi…óen yahude e nder niwre nden, haray en fenii, en wuuriraali goonga on.
1.7: Kono si tawii hi…óen yahude e nder ndaygu ngun, wano o woniri non kanko tigi ka nder ndaygu, haray hi…óen humondiri, …óun haray ∆¥ii∆¥an Iisaa ∆Åi…ó…óo makko on no *la…ì…ìinde en e kala junuubu.
1.8: Si en innii en aldaa e junuubu, haray en …óaynitike enen tigi, …óun haray goonga on alaa e men.
1.9: Si en qirritike non junuubaaji men …óin, Alla ko Sella-Findeejo, Feewu…óo, o yaafanto en junuubaaji men …óin, o la…ì…ìina en e kala bonnere.
1.10: Si en innii en wa…óaali junuubu, haray en wa…óii mo fenoowo, …óun haray daaluyee makko on alaa e men.

2.1: Fay…ìe an, mi…óo windande on …óun…óoo fii wota on wa…óu junuubu. Kono si go…ó…óo aru e wa…óude junuubu, haray hi…óen mari Fattantoo…óo en moggo Baabaajo on, …óun ko Iisaa Almasiihu, Feewu…óo on.
2.2: Ko fii kanko tigi ko o sadaka fii no he…ìiren yaafuyee junuubaaji men …óin, hinaa non fii …ói men …óin tun, kono ko fii …ói …ìe aduna on fow.
2.3: Si en …óoftike yamirooje makko …óen, haray hi…óen felliti wonde hi…óen andi mo.
2.4: Kala on wi'u…óo no andi mo, hara o …óoftaaki yamirooje makko …óen, haray ko o fenoowo, goonga on alaa e makko.
2.5: Kono kala …óoftii…óo daaluyee makko on, haray giggol Alla ngol no timmi e makko, ko non andirten hi…óen humondiri e makko.
2.6: Kala on wi'u…óo no humondiri e makko, haray no haani wuurirde wano *Almasiihu on wuurirnoo non.
2.7: Yi…ì…ìe, hinaa yamiroore heyre mi woni windande on, ko yamiroore hinnde, nde he…ìuno…óon gila ka fu…ó…óoode. Ndee yamiroore hinnde, ko ngol kongol ngol nanu…óon.
2.8: Kono fow e mun, ko yamiroore heyre mi woni windande on. Haqiiqa mayre on no …ìangi e makko, no …ìangi e mon, ko fii niwre nden no fe∆¥∆¥ude, awa kadi ndaygu haqiiqawu ngun ndaygii toode.
2.9: On wi'u…óo no ka ndaygu e hoore a…≤ugol musi…ó…óo mun, haray haa jooni himo ka niwre.
2.10: On mo yi…ói musi…ó…óo mun, haray himo ka ndaygu, peggal woo alanaa mo.
2.11: Kono on a…≤u…óo musi…ó…óo mun ko ka niwre woni, ko e nder niwre o woni yahude, o andaa ka o woni yaarude, ko fii niwre nden wuminii gite makko …óen.
2.12: Mi…óo windande on, yo fay…ìe, …ìay junuubaaji mon …óin yaaforaama sabu innde makko nden.
2.13: Mi…óo windande on, yo baabiraa…ìe, …ìay on andii on Woodanoo…óo gila ka fu…ó…óoode. Mi…óo windande on, yo sukaa…ìe, …ìay on foolii bon…óo on.
2.14: Mi windanii on kadi, yo fay…ìe, …ìay on andii Baabaajo on. Mi windanii on kadi, yo baabiraa…ìe, …ìay on andii Woodanoo…óo on gila ka fu…ó…óoode. Mi windanii on kadi, yo sukaa…ìe, …ìay hi…óon tii…ói, daaluyee Alla on no e mon, awa kadi on foolii bon…óo on. Fii A…≤ugol oo Aduna ∆Åoylii…óo
2.15: Wota on yi…óu aduna on e ko woni e aduna on kon. On mo yi…ói aduna on, haray giggol Baabaajo on alaa e makko.

2.1: ¬´Windan malaa'ikaajo moftal wongal Efeesi ngal, wi'aa: ‚ÄπE hino ko on tambii…óo koode …óen jee…ói…ói ka jungo mun …≤aamo, on jindoowo e hakkunde jo…ó…óinir…óe pitilli tafiraa…óe ka≈ã≈ãe …óen jee…ói…ói wi'i moftal ngal kon:
2.2: ‚ÄπMi…óo andi kuu…óe maa …óen e yangi maa kin e ≈ãa…≤…≤aare maa nden. Mi…óo andi kadi a ja…ìataa mu…≤…≤anaade bon…ìe …ìen, awa kadi a ndarndike wa…óitii…ìe sahaabaa…ìe …ìen, hara hinaa …ìe …óun, taw…óaa ko …ìe fenoo…ìe.
2.3: Hi…óa ≈ãa…≤…≤ii, tampi sabu innde an nden, kono a haa…ìaali.

2.6: Kono e hino ko mi weltani-maa fii mun kon: ko ko a…≤u…óaa …óee kuu…óe …ìee jokku…ìe laawol Nikola, …óe mi a…≤i min kadi.
2.7: ‚ÄπMo no mari nowru, yo jento ko Ruuhu Allaahu on woni wowlande mofte …óen kon. On foolu…óo, mi newnanay mo …≤aamugol …ìi…ì…ìe ngal leggal ngurndan wongal ka aljanna Allaahu on.‚Ä∫ ¬ª ∆Åatakuru Windanaandu Moftal wongal Simirna ngal
2.8: ¬´Windan kadi malaa'ikaajo moftal wongal Simirna ngal, wi'aa: ‚ÄπE hino ko on Won…óo Arano e Sakkitoro, on maynoo…óo wuuriti, wi'i moftal ngal kon:
2.9: ‚ÄπMi…óo andi tampere nde tampu…óaa nden e miskinankaaku maa ngun, hara-le ko a galo. Awa kadi mi…óo andi hoyre nde …ìee wi'itii…ìe *Yahuudiyankee…ìe, hara hinaa …ìe …óun, wonu-maa hoynude nden, hara …ìen ko …ìe moftal Ibuliisa.

2.12: ¬´Windan kadi malaa'ikaajo moftal wongal Pergaama ngal, wi'aa: ‚ÄπE hino ko Jogii…óo kaafa welka ka mbel…óe …ói…ói kan wi'i moftal ngal kon:

Foolu…óo on, mi neeminay mo ‚Äπ*manna‚Ä∫ suu…óii…óo, mi ye…óa mo kadi hayre raneere, hara no windii e nden hayre innde heyre nde hay gooto andaa si wonaa on hendii…óo nde.‚Ä∫ ¬ª ∆Åatakuru Windanaandu Moftal wongal Saayatiira ngal
2.18: ¬´Windan kadi malaa'ikaajo moftal wongal Saayatiira ngal, wi'aa: ‚ÄπE hino ko *∆Åi…ó…óo Alla on, on mo gite mun wa'i wa joyngol yiite, koy…óe mun wa'i wa sila-dane wi'i moftal ngal kon:
2.19: ‚ÄπMi…óo andi kuu…óe maa …óen e giggol maa ngol e gom…óinal maa ngal e golle maa …óen e ≈ãa…≤…≤aare maa nden. Awa kadi mi…óo andi kuu…óe maa sakkitore …óen no …ìuri arane …óen …óuu…óude.
2.20: ‚ÄπKono feloore nde mi jogani-maa nden, ko ko accu…óaa oo debbo wi'etee…óo Yeezabeela, wi'itii…óo ko annabaajo, janni faljini kurkaa…ói an …óin kon fii yo …ìe jokku jinaa, …ìe …≤aama tebbeeli sakkanaa…ói sanamuuji.

3.1: ¬´Windan kadi malaa'ikaajo moftal wongal Sardiisa ngal, wi'aa: ‚ÄπE hino ko Jogii…óo ruuhuuji Alla …óin jee…ói…ói e koode …óen jee…ói…ói wi'i moftal ngal kon: ‚ÄπMi…óo andi kuu…óe maa …óen, mi…óo andi kadi no wi'aa ko a wuuru…óo, kono ko a may…óo.

3.3: Anditu no nanir…óaa Kibaaru Mo∆¥∆¥o on non, e no hendor…óaa mo non. ∆äofto…óaa mo, tuubaa! Si a finaali, mi arday wa ngujjo, awa kadi a andataa ko e saa'i hombo mi arata, mi juhe.
3.4: ‚ÄπKono hi…óa mari yim…ìe see…óaa…ìe Sardiisa …óon, …ìe tuuninaali conci mun …óin. ∆Åe yaaday e an, hara hi…ìe …ìornii daneeji, ko fii hi…ìe handi e …óun.

3.6: ‚ÄπMo no mari nowru, yo jento ko Ruuhu Allaahu on woni wowlande mofte …óen kon.‚Ä∫ ¬ª ∆Åatakuru Windanandu Moftal wongal Filadelfii ngal
3.7: ¬´Windan kadi malaa'ikaajo moftal wongal Filadelfii ngal, wi'aa: ‚ÄπE hino ko *Senii…óo on daalani moftal ngal kon, …óun ko on Goongaajo, jogii…óo saabi Daawuuda on, on mo tawata ko o udditi kon, hay gooto waawataa sokude, e ko o soki kon, hay gooto waawataa udditude:
3.8: ‚ÄπMi…óo andi kuu…óe maa …óen. Awa e hino, mi wa…óii baafal udditiingal yeeso maa, ngal hay gooto waawataa ombude. A …óoftike daalol an ngol, a yeddaali innde an nden, wonaa fii kala a …óuu…óaa fiira.
3.9: Awa mi addante …ìee yim…ìe moftal Ibuliisa, wi'itii…ìe Yahuudiyankee…ìe, hara …ìe fenay, hinaa …ìe …óun. Mi adday …ìe haa ka ley koy…óe maa, …ìe jiccoo, …ìe anda wonde mi…óo yi…óu-maa.
3.10: ∆Åay a huutorii ≈ãa…≤…≤aare nde mi yamir-maa nden, min kadi mi dandoyte ndee tampere faandiinde arude e hoore aduna on fow fii ndarndagol ho…óu…ìe ka aduna …ìen.

3.13: ‚ÄπMo no mari nowru, yo jento ko Ruuhu Allaahu on woni wowlande mofte …óen kon.‚Ä∫ ¬ª ∆Åatakuru Windanaandu Moftal wongal Laa'udiisa ngal
3.14: ¬´Windan kadi malaa'ikaajo moftal wongal Laa'udiisa ngal, wi'aa: ‚ÄπE hino ko wi'etee…óo Aamiina on, on seedeejo sella-findeejo goongaajo, …óun-le ko on won…óo …ìundu tageefo Alla ngon, wi'i moftal ngal kon:
3.15: ‚ÄπMi…óo andi kuu…óe maa …óen, a wulaa, a …ìuu…ìaa. Sago an ko yo a wonu wulu…óo maa …ìuu…ìu…óo.
3.16: Ko …óun wa…ói, …ìay hinaa a hay huunde e …óun, a wulaa, a …ìuu…ìaa, mi tuutirte hunduko an kon.
3.17: Hi…óa wi'itii galo, al…óu…óo, mo ≈ãakkiraaka hay huunde, hara-le a andaa ko a tampu…óo, yurmu…óo, baaso, bun…óo, hol…óo.
3.18: Min mi waajike ma soodugol ka≈ã≈ãe la…ì…ìiniraa…óe yiite e juu…óe an fii no laatoraa galo, soodaa kadi conci daneeji ko …ìorno…óaa e juu…óe an fii wota hersa kolngal maa ngal fee…≤u, e lekki ko wujaa ka gite maa fii no yi'iraa.
